title: BrainMem: Brain-Inspired Evolving Memory for Embodied Agent Task Planning
summary: Embodied task planning requires agents to execute long-horizon, goal-directed actions in complex 3D environments, where success depends on both immediate perception and accumulated experience across tasks. However, most existing LLM-based planners are stateless and reactive, operating without persistent memory and therefore repeating errors and struggling with spatial or temporal dependencies. We propose BrainMem(Brain-Inspired Evolving Memory), a training-free hierarchical memory system that equips embodied agents with working, episodic, and semantic memory inspired by human cognition. BrainMem continuously transforms interaction histories into structured knowledge graphs and distilled symbolic guidelines, enabling planners to retrieve, reason over, and adapt behaviors from past experience without any model fine-tuning or additional training. This plug-and-play design integrates seamlessly with arbitrary multi-modal LLMs and greatly reduces reliance on task-specific prompt engineering. Extensive experiments on four representative benchmarks, including EB-ALFRED, EB-Navigation, EB-Manipulation, and EB-Habitat, demonstrate that BrainMem significantly enhances task success rates across diverse models and difficulty subsets, with the largest gains observed on long-horizon and spatially complex tasks. These results highlight evolving memory as a promising and scalable mechanism for generalizable embodied intelligence.

AI.tldr: BrainMem是一种受大脑启发的进化型分层记忆系统，能在不需额外训练的情况下显著提升多模态大模型(LLM)驱动的体感任务规划能力。
AI.motivation: 现有基于大模型的任务规划器多为无状态、反应式，缺乏持久记忆，导致重复错误并难以处理空间和时序依赖。人类灵感启示将分层记忆引入体感智能，可显著提升任务执行的泛化与适应能力。
AI.method: 提出BrainMem分层记忆系统，融入工作记忆、情景记忆和语义记忆。系统不断将交互历史转化为结构化知识图与符号性经验规则，使规划器能够检索、推理并调整行为，无需针对任务微调或再训练，可无缝接入各类多模态大型语言模型。
AI.result: 在EB-ALFRED、EB-Navigation、EB-Manipulation和EB-Habitat四大基准测试中，BrainMem提升了多模型的任务成功率，特别在长时序与空间复杂任务上收益显著。
AI.conclusion: BrainMem展示了进化型记忆机制在实现体感智能泛化能力上的潜力，是可扩展并高效的体感智能增强方案。

title: Interdisciplinary Workshop on Mechanical Intelligence: Summary Report
summary: This report provides a summary of the outcomes of the Interdisciplinary Workshop on Mechanical Intelligence held in 2024. Mechanical Intelligence (MI) represents the phenomenon that novel structural features of material/biological/robotic systems can encode intelligence through responsiveness, adaptivity, memory, and learning in the mechanical structure itself. This is in contrast to computational intelligence, wherein the intelligence functions occur through electrical signaling and computer code. The two-day workshop was held at NSF headquarters on May 30-31 and included 38 invited academic researcher participants, and 8 program officers from the NSF. The workshop was structured around active small and large group discussions in groups of 4-5 and 9-10 with the goal of addressing topical questions on MI. Working groups entered notes into shared presentation slides for each discussion session and presented their outcomes in a final presentation on the last day. Here we summarize the overall outcomes of the workshop.

AI.tldr: 该报告总结了2024年机械智能跨学科研讨会的主要成果，探讨了机械结构自身具有的响应性、自适应性、记忆和学习等智能特征。
AI.motivation: 旨在明确和推动机械智能（Mechanical Intelligence）的研究方向，将智能特性融于材料、生物和机器人系统中，实现无需传统计算智能的功能表达。
AI.method: 研讨会以小组和大组讨论的形式，围绕机械智能相关的核心问题进行交流，参与者通过共享幻灯片记录讨论内容，最后进行成果汇报。
AI.result: 汇总了不同小组讨论的结果，形成了机械智能领域的一系列主要观点、发展方向和科学问题。
AI.conclusion: 本次研讨会促进了机械智能研究者的交流和跨学科合作，为该领域后续研究和项目设定了共同的目标和路线。

title: RHINO-AR: An Augmented Reality Exhibit for Teaching Mobile Robotics Concepts in Museums
summary: We present RHINO-AR, an interactive Augmented Reality (AR) museum exhibit that reintroduces the historical mobile robot RHINO into its original exhibition environment at the Deutsches Museum Bonn. The system builds on our previous work RHINO-VR, which reconstructed the robot and the environment in virtual reality. Although this created an engaging experience, it also revealed an important limitation, because visitors were separated from the real exhibition space and from the physical robot on display. RHINO-AR addresses this reality gap by placing a virtual reconstruction of the robot directly into the real museum space. Implemented on a Magic Leap~2 headset using Unity, our system combines real-time environment meshing with interactive visualizations of LiDAR sensing, traversability, and path planning to make otherwise invisible robotics processes understandable to non-expert visitors. We evaluated RHINO-AR in a two-day museum study with 22 participants, assessing usability, technical performance, satisfaction, conceptual understanding, and preference comparison to RHINO-VR. The results show that RHINO-AR was well received, effectively conveyed key navigation concepts, and generally preferred over the VR exhibit due to its stronger physical grounding and increased realism.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了RHINO-AR，这是一个博物馆增强现实互动展览，通过AR技术让观众能在现实环境中与历史机器人RHINO互动，同时可视化其核心机器人导航过程。实测显示观众更偏好AR方案，相较VR有更好的现实感和理解体验。
AI.motivation: 传统VR展览虽然生动有趣，但隔绝了观众与实际展览空间及实物的联系，限制了真实感和参与度。作者希望通过AR让观众在真实展馆中更直观地理解机器人的运行机制。
AI.method: 在Magic Leap 2头显及Unity平台上实现系统，结合实时环境建模，直观展示机器人LiDAR感知、可通行性及路径规划，使抽象过程可视化。通过为期两天的实地测试，邀请22名参观者体验并对比RHINO-AR与RHINO-VR，评估易用性、技术表现、满意度和理解程度。
AI.result: 结果表明，RHINO-AR系统被用户良好接受，能有效帮助理解机器人导航。相较VR展览，观众更倾向AR版本，认为其物理融入感和现实感更强。
AI.conclusion: RHINO-AR在增强现实下提升了历史机器人交互体验和观众对其工作原理的理解，为未来博物馆相关教育展览提供有价值的参考。

title: Visual-RRT: Finding Paths toward Visual-Goals via Differentiable Rendering
summary: Rapidly-exploring random trees (RRTs) have been widely adopted for robot motion planning due to their robustness and theoretical guarantees. However, existing RRT-based planners require explicit goal configurations specified as numerical joint angles, while many practical applications provide goal specifications through visual observations such as images or demonstration videos where precise goal configurations are unavailable. In this paper, we propose visual-RRT (vRRT), a motion planner that enables visual-goal planning by unifying gradient-based exploitation from differentiable robot rendering with sampling-based exploration from RRTs. We further introduce (i) a frontier-based exploration-exploitation strategy that adaptively prioritizes visually promising search regions, and (ii) inertial gradient tree expansion that inherits optimization states across tree branches for momentum-consistent gradient exploitation. Extensive experiments across various robot manipulators including Franka, UR5e, and Fetch demonstrate that vRRT achieves effective visual-goal planning in both simulated and real-world settings, bridging the gap between sampling-based planning and vision-centric robot applications. Our code is available at https://sgvr.kaist.ac.kr/Visual-RRT.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了vRRT，一种结合视觉目标与RRT的运动规划器，实现了基于图像目标的机器人路径规划，在多种机器人平台上效果良好。
AI.motivation: 传统RRT规划器要求精确的关节角度目标，但实际应用中，目标往往只能通过图片或视频指定，缺乏精确数值表达，导致无法直接应用RRT进行运动规划。为适应视觉目标下的任务需求，亟需新的规划方法。
AI.method: 提出visual-RRT（vRRT）框架，将可微分机器人渲染的梯度驱动开发与RRT的采样式探索相结合。创新点包括：1）前沿驱动的探索与开发策略，自适应聚焦视觉上优越的搜索区域；2）惯性梯度树扩展，继承优化状态以提升树扩展中的动量一致性。
AI.result: 在Franka、UR5e与Fetch等多种机械臂及仿真和真实场景中，vRRT成功实现了基于视觉的目标规划，显示出有效性与广泛适用性。
AI.conclusion: vRRT有效桥接了采样式路径规划和以视觉为核心的机器人应用，使机器人能直接基于图像进行运动规划，具有实际应用价值和推广前景。

title: Multimodal Claim Extraction for Fact-Checking
summary: Automated Fact-Checking (AFC) relies on claim extraction as a first step, yet existing methods largely overlook the multimodal nature of today's misinformation. Social media posts often combine short, informal text with images such as memes, screenshots, and photos, creating challenges that differ from both text-only claim extraction and well-studied multimodal tasks like image captioning or visual question answering. In this work, we present the first benchmark for multimodal claim extraction from social media, consisting of posts containing text and one or more images, annotated with gold-standard claims derived from real-world fact-checkers. We evaluate state-of-the-art multimodal LLMs (MLLMs) under a three-part evaluation framework (semantic alignment, faithfulness, and decontextualization) and find that baseline MLLMs struggle to model rhetorical intent and contextual cues. To address this, we introduce MICE, an intent-aware framework which shows improvements in intent-critical cases.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了第一个社交媒体多模态事实提取基准，并展示了面向意图建模的新方法MICE在多模态事实提取任务上的改进。
AI.motivation: 现有自动事实核查依赖文本式主张提取，但社交媒体内容日益多模态，包含文本与图片，标准方法难以有效提取多模态主张。
AI.method: 作者构建了包含文本和一张或多张图片的社交媒体帖子数据集，并结合真实事实核查者的标注，形成金标准多模态主张。采用三分评价框架评测主流多模态大模型（MLLM）；在此基础上，提出考虑意图的新框架MICE。
AI.result: 结果显示主流多模态大模型对修辞意图与语境信号建模不足，MICE框架在意图相关案例上效果明显提升。
AI.conclusion: 多模态主张提取对现有大模型依然具挑战，而意图感知的方法能提升模型处理复杂多模态内容的能力。

title: A High-Accuracy Optical Music Recognition Method Based on Bottleneck Residual Convolutions
summary: Optical Music Recognition (OMR) aims to convert printed or handwritten music score images into editable symbolic representations. This paper presents an end-to-end OMR framework that combines residual bottleneck convolutions with bidirectional gated recurrent unit (BiGRU)-based sequence modeling. A convolutional neural network with ResNet-v2-style residual bottleneck blocks and multi-scale dilated convolutions is used to extract features that encode both fine-grained symbol details and global staff-line structures. The extracted feature sequences are then fed into a BiGRU network to model temporal dependencies among musical symbols. The model is trained using the Connectionist Temporal Classification loss, enabling end-to-end prediction without explicit alignment annotations. Experimental results on the Camera-PrIMuS and PrIMuS datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed framework. On Camera-PrIMuS, the proposed method achieves a sequence error rate (SeER) of $7.52\%$ and a symbol error rate (SyER) of $0.45\%$, with pitch, type, and note accuracies of $99.33\%$, $99.60\%$, and $99.28\%$, respectively. The average training time is 1.74~s per epoch, demonstrating high computational efficiency while maintaining strong recognition performance. On PrIMuS, the method achieves a SeER of $8.11\%$ and a SyER of $0.49\%$, with pitch, type, and note accuracies of $99.27\%$, $99.58\%$, and $99.21\%$, respectively. A fine-grained error analysis further confirms the effectiveness of the proposed model.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种端到端的光学音乐识别（OMR）方法，通过结合残差瓶颈卷积网络与BiGRU序列建模，实现了高效且高精度的乐谱图片转符号识别。
AI.motivation: 现有OMR方法无法有效兼顾细粒度符号特征与全局谱线结构，且对齐需求复杂，限制了实际应用。作者希望提升识别准确率并简化训练对齐难题。
AI.method: 方法采用带有多尺度空洞卷积的ResNet-v2残差瓶颈块提取图像特征，涵盖细节与全局信息；然后这些特征序列输入BiGRU网络，建模符号之间的时序依赖。整体采用CTC损失，实现无须显式对齐的端到端训练。
AI.result: 在Camera-PrIMuS和PrIMuS数据集上，该方法分别取得了低至7.52%/8.11%的SeER、0.45%/0.49%的SyER，以及99%以上的音高、类型、音符准确率，训练效率高，每轮平均仅需1.74秒。
AI.conclusion: 提出的端到端OMR框架在保持高效的同时大幅提升了识别准确率，不依赖复杂的对齐信息，适合实际音乐识别应用。

title: Disentangled Robot Learning via Separate Forward and Inverse Dynamics Pretraining
summary: Vision-language-action (VLA) models have shown great potential in building generalist robots, but still face a dilemma-misalignment of 2D image forecasting and 3D action prediction. Besides, such a vision-action entangled training manner limits model learning from large-scale, action-free web video data. To address these issues, we propose DeFI, a novel framework that Decouples visual Forward and Inverse dynamics pretraining to exploit respective data sources, wherein video generation and action prediction are disentangled. We introduce the General Forward Dynamics Model (GFDM), pretrained on diverse human and robot videos for future prediction, and the General Inverse Dynamics Model (GIDM), trained via self-supervised learning to infer latent actions from unlabeled video transitions. These models are then integrated into a unified architecture for end-to-end finetuning on downstream tasks. In this manner, GFDM and GIDM first shine separately and then cooperate for mutual benefit. Extensive experiments on CALVIN ABC-D and SimplerEnv demonstrate state-of-the-art performance, with DeFI achieving an average task length of 4.51 for CALVIN, 51.2% success rate on SimplerEnv-Fractal benchmark and 81.3% success rate in real-world deployment, significantly outperforming prior methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DeFI框架，将视觉前向和逆向动力学预训练解耦，用于提升视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型在泛化机器人任务中的表现。实验结果显示，该方法在多个基准上表现优异。
AI.motivation: 现有VLA模型由于视觉建模和动作预测纠缠，导致对3D动作预测效果不佳，且难以充分利用大规模无动作标签的网络视频数据。
AI.method: 提出DeFI框架，将前向动力学（GFDM）和逆向动力学（GIDM）分别在有标签和无标签视频上独立预训练，随后将两者集成并在下游任务端到端微调。GFDM负责未来视觉预测，GIDM通过自监督方式推断动作。
AI.result: DeFI方法在CALVIN、ABC-D和SimplerEnv基准上均取得了SOTA表现：平均任务长度4.51（CALVIN）、51.2%任务成功率（SimplerEnv-Fractal）、81.3%在真实机器人场景中的成功率，显著超过现有方法。
AI.conclusion: DeFI通过解耦视觉前向和逆向动力学训练，使VLA模型能更好利用异构视频数据，提升了泛化能力和实际部署效果。

title: Cross-Family Speculative Decoding for Polish Language Models on Apple~Silicon: An Empirical Evaluation of Bielik~11B with UAG-Extended MLX-LM
summary: Speculative decoding accelerates LLM inference by using a small draft model to propose k candidate tokens for a target model to verify. While effective for same-tokenizer pairs on high-bandwidth GPUs, its applicability to cross-family pairs with mismatched tokenizers and consumer-grade unified memory remains underexplored. We extend the MLX-LM framework with Universal Assisted Generation (UAG) to enable cross-tokenizer speculative decoding on Apple Silicon. We evaluate Bielik 11B-Instruct (Mistral-based) as the target model, paired with three draft models: Bielik 1.5B (Qwen-based with custom tokenizer), Qwen2.5-1.5B, and Llama 3.2-1B. Experiments on three Polish-language datasets (Wikipedia, pl_alpaca, synthetic) use draft lengths k in {2, 4, 6} to compare naive and context-aware token translation. Results show: (1) context-aware translation consistently improves acceptance rates across all configurations; (2) the Polish-specialized Bielik 1.5B achieves lower acceptance than general-purpose Qwen2.5 and Llama 3.2 drafters; (3) throughput on Apple Silicon is content-dependent, reaching 1.7x speedup for structured text but failing for varied instructions; and (4) verification cost on unified memory does not amortize as theory predicts because both models are memory-bandwidth bound, making sequential drafting expensive relative to batched verification. We propose a hardware-aware speedup formula and characterize conditions for cross-family speculative decoding on Apple Silicon. This is the first systematic evaluation of cross-family speculative decoding for Polish LLMs and the first empirical study of UAG-based decoding on unified memory architectures.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出并实证分析了在Apple Silicon上，利用具备不同分词器的跨家族（cross-family）小模型（草稿模型）辅助大模型做speculative decoding（推测式解码）的方法（UAG），首次对波兰语大模型进行了系统性评估。
AI.motivation: 尽管speculative decoding已能在高带宽GPU和同分词器大、小模型间加速LLM推理，但跨家族（分词器不同）和面向消费级统一内存设备（如Apple Silicon）下的应用被严重低估和未探究。探索跨分词器、硬件受限条件下的推理加速，有助于LLM普及。
AI.method: 扩展MLX-LM框架为Universal Assisted Generation（UAG），支持Apple Silicon上跨分词器speculative decoding。评测用Mistral系Bielik 11B-Instruct为主模型，与三个draft模型（各具不同结构和分词器）组合。在三个波兰语数据集上，实验对比原生token翻译与上下文感知token翻译对接收率、吞吐量、硬件消耗等方面的影响，测试不同k值。分析并提出硬件相关的加速公式。
AI.result: （1）上下文感知token翻译方式，提升所有模型组合下的接收率；（2）特化波兰语draft模型Bielik 1.5B，接收率反而低于两个通用草稿模型Qwen2.5和Llama 3.2；（3）在Apple Silicon端吞吐量主要依赖内容，在结构化文本可达1.7倍加速，复杂指令失败；（4）因内存带宽限制，推理论证的成本优势未完全实现，逐步草稿不如批量验证高效。
AI.conclusion: 首次实证表明，UAG方法可实现跨家族、大模型波兰语LLM在Apple Silicon上的推测式解码加速效果，条件依存于翻译方式、数据结构和硬件特点。论文为后续统一内存硬件上LLM加速和跨分词器结合提出经验与分析框架。

title: From Inheritance to Saturation: Disentangling the Evolution of Visual Redundancy for Architecture-Aware MLLM Inference Acceleration
comment: 16 pages, 14 figures, plus appendix, accepted at ACL 2026
summary: High-resolution Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) face prohibitive computational costs during inference due to the explosion of visual tokens. Existing acceleration strategies, such as token pruning or layer sparsity, suffer from severe "backbone dependency", performing well on Vicuna or Mistral architectures (e.g., LLaVA) but causing significant performance degradation when transferred to architectures like Qwen. To address this, we leverage truncated matrix entropy to uncover a universal three-stage inference lifecycle, decoupling visual redundancy into universal Intrinsic Visual Redundancy (IVR) and architecture-dependent Secondary Saturation Redundancy (SSR). Guided by this insight, we propose HalfV, a framework that first mitigates IVR via a unified pruning strategy and then adaptively handles SSR based on its specific manifestation. Experiments demonstrate that HalfV achieves superior efficiency-performance trade-offs across diverse backbones. Notably, on Qwen25-VL, it retains 96.8\% performance at a 4.1$\times$ FLOPs speedup, significantly outperforming state-of-the-art baselines. Our code is available at https://github.com/civilizwa/HalfV.

AI.tldr: 提出了HalfV框架，通过两步方法提升多模态大模型（MLLMs）在不同主干架构上的推理效率，同时几乎不损失性能。
AI.motivation: 当前高分辨率多模态大模型推理时计算量因视觉 token 爆炸而大幅增加，现有的加速方法如token裁剪、层稀疏化等，在不同主干架构间迁移时严重掉速或掉分，缺乏通用性。
AI.method: 通过分析网络推理生命周期，基于截断矩阵熵，将视觉冗余分为通用的内在视觉冗余（IVR）和架构相关的次级饱和冗余（SSR）。HalfV首先用统一的裁剪策略去除IVR，再根据模型架构特性自适应处理SSR，从而实现加速。
AI.result: HalfV在多个主干架构上取得更优稳定的效率-性能折中，特别是在Qwen25-VL主干下，性能保持96.8%，但FLOPs加速达到4.1倍，远超现有最优方法。
AI.conclusion: HalfV框架通过解耦和分阶段处理视觉冗余，实现了高效且主干无关的MLLMs推理加速，有广泛的适用性和显著的性能收益。

title: ICAT: Incident-Case-Grounded Adaptive Testing for Physical-Risk Prediction in Embodied World Models
summary: Video-generative world models are increasingly used as neural simulators for embodied planning and policy learning, yet their ability to predict physical risk and severe consequences is rarely evaluated.We find that these models often downplay or omit key danger cues and severe outcomes for hazardous actions, which can induce unsafe preferences during planning and training on imagined rollouts. We propose ICAT, which grounds testing in real incident reports and safety manuals by building structured risk memories and retrieving/composing them to constrain the generation of risk cases with causal chains and severity labels. Experiments on an ICAT-based benchmark show that mainstream world models frequently miss mechanisms and triggering conditions and miscalibrate severity, falling short of the reliability required for safety-critical embodied deployment.

AI.tldr: 目前的视频生成世界模型在预测物理风险和严重后果方面存在明显不足，ICAT提出结构化风险记忆来改进其安全性评估和事件生成，更好支持安全相关应用。
AI.motivation: 尽管世界模型被广泛用作智能体规划与策略学习的仿真器，但其能否准确预测危险和关键后果，很少被真正检验。作者发现这些模型在“想象推演”时，往往忽略或轻描淡写风险信号，可能导致不安全的智能体策略。
AI.method: 提出ICAT方法，将真实事故报告和安全手册结构化为风险记忆库，并能在生成过程中检索和组合这些记忆，以限制、引导生成带因果链和严重性标记的风险案例。
AI.result: 基于ICAT的基准实验显示，主流世界模型频繁漏掉危险机制与触发条件，并常常错误评估风险严重性，无法满足高安全要求的实际部署需求。
AI.conclusion: 当前主流世界模型在处理安全风险方面存在重大缺陷，ICAT能更准确生成和评估风险场景，是提升模型安全性的有效手段。

title: Brain-CLIPLM: Decoding Compressed Semantic Representations in EEG for Language Reconstruction
summary: Decoding natural language from non-invasive electroencephalography (EEG) remains fundamentally limited by low signal-to-noise ratio and restricted information bandwidth. This raises a fundamental question regarding whether sentence-level linguistic structure can be reliably recovered from such signals. In this work, we suggest that this assumption may not hold under realistic information constraints, and instead propose a semantic compression hypothesis in which EEG signals encode a compressed set of semantic anchors rather than full linguistic structure. Under our new perspective, direct sentence reconstruction becomes an overparameterized objective relative to the intrinsic information capacity of EEG. To address this mismatch, we introduce Brain-CLIPLM, a two-stage framework that decomposes EEG-to-text decoding into semantic anchor extraction via contrastive learning and sentence reconstruction using a retrieval-grounded large language model (LLM) with Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning, following a granularity matching principle that aligns decoding complexity with neural information capacity. Evaluated on the Zurich Cognitive Language Processing Corpus, Brain-CLIPLM achieves 67.55\% top-5 and 85.00\% top-25 sentence retrieval accuracy, significantly outperforming direct decoding baseline, while cross-subject evaluation confirms robust generalization. Control analyses, including permutation testing, further demonstrate that EEG-derived representations carry sentence-specific information beyond language model priors. These results suggest that EEG-to-text decoding is better framed as recovering compressed semantic content rather than reconstructing full sentences, providing a biologically grounded and data-efficient pathway for non-invasive brain-computer interfaces.

AI.tldr: 本研究挑战了用非侵入性脑电（EEG）直接解码完整句子的可行性，提出EEG信号更可能压缩了部分语义锚点，而非完整句法结构；并用新方法Brain-CLIPLM显著提升EEG到文本的语义解码性能。
AI.motivation: EEG信号的低信噪比和信息带宽受限，使得从EEG解码到完整自然语言句子十分困难。作者质疑现有方法假设能重建完整句子结构是否合理，提出了“语义压缩假设”。
AI.method: 作者设计了两阶段解码框架Brain-CLIPLM：首先用对比学习从EEG信号中提取语义锚点，然后利用检索式大语言模型（LLM）加Chain-of-Thought（链式推理）重建句子。此法遵循粒度匹配原则，使解码复杂度与EEG信息容量一致。
AI.result: 在Zurich脑语言数据集上，Brain-CLIPLM模型top-5句子检索准确率达67.55%，top-25达85.00%，显著超过直接句子重建的基线模型。跨被试实验显示良好的泛化性能，控制实验也证明EEG信号确实包含超越预训练模型的句子级别信息。
AI.conclusion: 研究认为EEG到文本的关键在于捕捉压缩的语义内容，而非完整还原句子。这种思路更符合脑科学原理，也显著提升了非侵入式脑机接口语义解码的数据利用效率。

title: Latent-Compressed Variational Autoencoder for Video Diffusion Models
summary: Video variational autoencoders (VAEs) used in latent diffusion models typically require a sufficiently large number of latent channels to ensure high-quality video reconstruction. However, recent studies have revealed that an excessive number of latent channels can impede the convergence of latent diffusion models and deteriorate their generative performance, even when reconstruction quality remains high. We propose a latent compression method that removes high-frequency components in video latent representations rather than directly reducing the number of channels, which often compromises reconstruction fidelity. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method achieves superior video reconstruction quality compared to strong baselines while maintaining the same overall compression ratio.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种新的视频潜变量压缩方法，通过去除高频成分而非简单减少通道数量，从而提升潜变量扩散模型的生成性能和重建质量。
AI.motivation: 现有视频潜变量自编码器（VAE）通常需要较多潜变量通道以保证重建质量，但过多的通道会影响扩散模型的收敛和生成效果。为了解决这一矛盾，作者探讨了更高效的视频潜变量压缩方法。
AI.method: 提出在压缩视频潜变量表示时，通过去除高频成分替代直接降低通道数。这种方式可以保持更高的重建保真度且不影响压缩比。
AI.result: 实验证明，该方法在整体压缩比不变的情况下，视频重建质量优于强基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 论文方法有效权衡了压缩率与重建质量，为视频潜变量表示的优化提供了新途径。

title: An Edge-Host-Cloud Architecture for Robot-Agnostic, Caregiver-in-the-Loop Personalized Cognitive Exercise: Multi-Site Deployment in Dementia Care
comment: 21 pages, 6 figures, 10 tables, submitted to IEEE Transactions on Robotics (T-RO)
summary: We present Speaking Memories, a distributed, stakeholder-in-the-loop robotic interaction platform for personalized cognitive exercise support. Rather than a single robot-centric system, Speaking Memories is designed as a generalizable robotics architecture that integrates caregiver-authored knowledge, local edge intelligence, and embodied robotic agents into a unified socio-technical loop. The platform fuses auditory, visual, and textual signals to enable emotion-aware, personalized dialogue, while decoupling multimodal perception and reasoning from robot-specific hardware through a local edge interaction server. This design achieves low-latency, privacy-preserving operation and supports scalable deployment across heterogeneous robotic embodiments. Caregivers and family members contribute structured biographical knowledge via a secure cloud portal, which conditions downstream dialogue policies and enables longitudinal personalization across interaction sessions. Beyond real-time interaction, the system incorporates an automated multimodal evaluation layer that continuously analyzes user responses, affective cues, and engagement patterns, producing structured interaction metrics at scale. These metrics support systematic assessment of interaction quality, enable data-driven model fine-tuning, and lay the foundation for future clinician- and caregiver-informed personalization and intervention planning. We evaluate the platform through real-world deployments, measuring end-to-end latency, dialogue coherence, interaction stability, and stakeholder-reported usability and engagement. Results demonstrate sub-6-second response latency, robust multimodal synchronization, and consistently positive feedback from both participants and caregivers. Furthermore, subsets of the dataset can be shared upon request, subject to participant consent and IRB constraints.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了Speaking Memories，一个面向个性化认知训练的分布式机器人交互平台，结合多方信息和数据安全隐私，具备多模态理解与可拓展性。实地测试验证了平台的高反应速度、对话质量和用户满意度。
AI.motivation: 当前认知训练机器人通常依赖单一、封闭的系统，难以实现个性化、实时反应和多方参与，且在隐私和部署灵活性上面临挑战。本研究旨在通过一种通用、分布式架构，解决上述局限，实现认知训练的真正个性化和可规模化应用。
AI.method: 平台架构融合了照护者/家属经云端提交的知识、边缘端智能和本地机器人，通过本地服务器实现多模态感知与推理的解耦。系统可感知用户情感，实现个性化对话，并通过自动化评估层分析用户反应和交互质量，反馈用于模型优化。多种机器人可无缝部署该平台。
AI.result: 实地部署显示：端到端反应延迟低于6秒，多模态信息同步良好，用户与照护者反馈一致积极，交互稳定，平台具备良好扩展性。部分数据可在受试者同意下分享。
AI.conclusion: Speaking Memories平台实现了结合利益相关方的个性化、可扩展认知训练机器人系统，在实时性、隐私、安全和用户体验上表现突出，为未来基于数据的个性化干预奠定了基础。

title: CFMS: Towards Explainable and Fine-Grained Chinese Multimodal Sarcasm Detection Benchmark
summary: Multimodal sarcasm detection has recently garnered significant attention. However, existing benchmarks suffer from coarse-grained annotations and limited cultural coverage, which hinder research into fine-grained semantic understanding. To address this, we construct CFMS, the first fine-grained multimodal sarcasm dataset tailored for Chinese social media. It comprises 2,796 high-quality image-text pairs and provides a triple-level annotation framework: sarcasm identification, target recognition, and explanation generation. We find that the fine-grained explanation annotations effectively guide AI in generating images with explicit sarcastic intent. Furthermore, we curate a high-consistency parallel Chinese-English metaphor subset (200 entries each), revealing significant limitations of current models in metaphoric reasoning. To overcome the constraints of traditional retrieval methods, we propose a Reinforcement Learning-augmented In-Context Learning strategy (PGDS) to dynamically optimize exemplar selection. Extensive experiments demonstrate that CFMS provides a solid foundation for building reliable multimodal sarcasm understanding systems, and the PGDS method significantly outperforms existing baselines on key tasks. Our data and code are available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/CFMS-E8F9.

AI.tldr: 本文构建了首个面向中文社交媒体的细粒度多模态讽刺数据集（CFMS），并提出了一种强化学习增强的例子选择策略（PGDS），在多项讽刺理解任务中取得了优异表现。
AI.motivation: 现有多模态讽刺检测数据集注释粗糙且文化覆盖有限，无法支撑对细粒度语义的深入研究，特别是在中文社交媒体环境下更为突出。
AI.method: 1）构建了包含2,796条高质量图片-文本对的CFMS数据集，采用三层注释框架：讽刺识别、目标识别、解释生成。2）人工整理高一致性的中英隐喻平行子集（各200条），测试模型在隐喻推理上的能力。3）提出强化学习增强的例子选择方法PGDS，用于上下文学习中的检索优化。
AI.result: CFMS数据集为多模态讽刺理解系统提供了坚实基础。PGDS方法在关键任务上显著优于传统检索方法和已有基线模型。当前模型在隐喻推理仍有明显短板。
AI.conclusion: CFMS有效推动了中文细粒度多模态讽刺检测的发展，PGDS方法提升了模型泛化能力。数据和代码已公开，有助于推动相关领域研究。

title: Positioning radiata pine branches requiring pruning by drone stereo vision
summary: This paper presents a stereo-vision-based system mounted on a drone for detecting and localising radiata pine branches to support autonomous pruning. The proposed pipeline comprises two stages: branch segmentation and depth estimation. For segmentation, YOLOv8, YOLOv9, and Mask R-CNN variants are compared on a custom dataset of 71 stereo image pairs captured with a ZED Mini camera. For depth estimation, both a traditional method (SGBM with WLS filtering) and deep-learning-based methods (PSMNet, ACVNet, GWCNet, MobileStereoNet, RAFT-Stereo, and NeRF-Supervised Deep Stereo) are evaluated. A centroid-based triangulation algorithm with MAD outlier rejection is proposed to compute branch distance from the segmentation mask and disparity map. Qualitative evaluation at distances of 1-2 m indicates that the deep learning-based disparity maps produce more coherent depth estimates than SGBM, demonstrating the feasibility of low-cost stereo vision for automated branch positioning in forestry.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种安装在无人机上的基于立体视觉的系统，通过分割和深度估计检测并定位辐射松树枝，为自动化修枝工作提供支持。主要评估了多种分割和深度估计方法，验证了廉价立体视觉方案的可行性。
AI.motivation: 自动修枝可以提高林业作业效率，但准确检测和定位树枝具有挑战性。现有方法多依赖昂贵传感器或手动标注，本文探索基于低成本立体视觉实现高效自动树枝定位的可能性。
AI.method: 采用了两阶段流程：树枝分割阶段，比较YOLOv8、YOLOv9和Mask R-CNN在自建数据集上的表现；深度估计阶段，评估SGBM传统方法和多种深度学习模型，并提出了带MAD异常值剔除的三角测量法来计算树枝距离。
AI.result: 定性评价显示，深度学习方法生成的视差图比SGBM更加连贯和准确，能更好地估计1-2米范围内树枝的深度。
AI.conclusion: 结果证明了依靠低成本立体视觉方案可实现自动化树枝定位，为林业自动修枝提供了可行的技术基础。

title: LatentMimic: Terrain-Adaptive Locomotion via Latent Space Imitation
summary: Developing natural and diverse locomotion controllers for quadruped robots that can adapt to complex terrains while preserving motion style remains a significant challenge. Existing imitation-based methods face a fundamental optimization trade-off: strict adherence to motion capture (mocap) references penalizes the geometric deviations required for terrain adaptability, whereas terrain-centric policies often compromise stylistic fidelity. We introduce LatentMimic, a novel locomotion learning framework that decouples stylistic fidelity from geometric constraints. By minimizing the marginal latent divergence between the policy's state-action distribution and a learned mocap prior, our approach provides a conditional relaxation of rigid pose-tracking objectives. This formulation preserves gait topology while permitting independent end-effector adaptations for irregular terrains. We further introduce a terrain adaptation module with a dynamic replay buffer to resolve the policy's distribution shifts across different terrains. We validate our method across four locomotion styles and four terrains, demonstrating that LatentMimic enables effective terrain-adaptive locomotion, achieving higher terrain traversal success rates than state-of-the-art motion-tracking methods while maintaining high stylistic fidelity.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种能在复杂地形适应且保持运动风格的四足机器人控制方法LatentMimic，并在多种风格和地形上验证了优越性。
AI.motivation: 现有模仿学习方法在保持动作风格与地形适应之间难以两全——严格依赖动作捕捉会限制对地形变化的适应，而地形导向的方法又常损失风格。该工作旨在突破这一优化困境。
AI.method: LatentMimic框架通过最小化策略与学习到的动作捕捉先验在隐空间分布的偏差，实现在保持运动风格的同时允许末端执行器独立适应复杂地形。同时引入地形适应模块和动态回放缓冲区，帮助应对策略分布在不同地形间的转变。
AI.result: 在四种运动风格和四种地形的实验中，LatentMimic实现了优于当前主流跟踪方法的地形适应能力，同时保持较高风格一致性。
AI.conclusion: LatentMimic成功平衡了风格一致性和地形适应性，为四足机器人鲁棒且多样化的运动控制提供了新思路。

title: Foundational Study on Authorship Attribution of Japanese Web Reviews for Actor Analysis
summary: This study investigates the applicability of authorship attribution based on stylistic features to support actor analysis in threat intelligence. As a foundational step toward future application to dark web forums, we conducted experiments using Japanese review data from clear web sources. We constructed datasets from Rakuten Ichiba reviews and compared four methods: TF-IDF with logistic regression (TF-IDF+LR), BERT embeddings with logistic regression (BERT-Emb+LR), BERT fine-tuning (BERT-FT), and metric learning with $k$-nearest neighbors (Metric+kNN). Results showed that BERT-FT achieved the best performance; however, training became unstable as the number of authors scaled to several hundred, where TF-IDF+LR proved superior in terms of accuracy, stability, and computational cost. Furthermore, Top-$k$ evaluation demonstrated the utility of candidate screening, and error analysis revealed that boilerplate text, topic dependency, and short text length were primary factors causing misclassification.

AI.tldr: 本研究探讨了基于文体特征的作者归属方法在威胁情报行为者分析中的适用性。通过日本电商评论数据对多种归属算法进行了对比，评估其在未来暗网论坛分析中的潜力。
AI.motivation: 随着网络安全威胁分析需求增长，准确识别网络环境中特定行为者越来越重要。作者归属技术被视为分析暗网等场景下威胁行为者身份的关键工具，因此有必要验证在实际数据（如评论数据）上的有效性和可扩展性。
AI.method: 作者构建了来自乐天市场的日本语评论数据集，对比了四种作者识别方法：TF-IDF+逻辑回归，BERT嵌入+逻辑回归，BERT微调，以及度量学习+kNN。性能在不同作者数量规模下进行对比，并分析了误分类原因。
AI.result: BERT微调方法整体识别效果最佳，但在作者数量较多时，训练变得不稳定；此时TF-IDF+逻辑回归在准确率、稳定性和计算成本方面表现更好。同时，Top-k评估结果表明其在候选筛查方面有实用价值。误差分析指出模板化文本、主题依赖和文本过短是主要误判因素。
AI.conclusion: 基于文体特征的作者归属方法在威胁情报分析中具有应用前景，但在作者数量大和数据复杂度上存在挑战。实际应用时应权衡准确率、稳定性与计算资源，并进一步研究误判成因以提升整体性能。

title: Erasing Thousands of Concepts: Towards Scalable and Practical Concept Erasure for Text-to-Image Diffusion Models
summary: Large-scale text-to-image (T2I) diffusion models deliver remarkable visual fidelity but pose safety risks due to their capacity to reproduce undesirable content, such as copyrighted ones. Concept erasure has emerged as a mitigation strategy, yet existing approaches struggle to balance scalability, precision, and robustness, which restricts their applicability to erasing only a few hundred concepts. To address these limitations, we present Erasing Thousands of Concepts (ETC), a scalable framework capable of erasing thousands of concepts while preserving generation quality. Our method first models low-rank concept distributions via a Student's t-distribution Mixture Model (tMM). It enables pin-point erasure of target concepts via affine optimal transport while preserving others by anchoring the boundaries of target concept distributions without pre-defined anchor concepts. We then train a Mixture-of-Experts (MoE)-based module, termed MoEraser, which removes target embeddings while preserving the anchor embeddings. By injecting noise into the text embedding projector and fine-tuning MoEraser for recovery, our framework achieves robustness to white-box attack such as module removal. Extensive experiments on over 2,000 concepts across heterogeneous domains and diffusion models demerate state-of-the-art scalability and precision in large-scale concept erasure.

AI.tldr: 提出一种名为ETC（Erasing Thousands of Concepts）的新框架，能够在保持生成图像质量的同时，对大规模文本到图像扩散模型中数千个目标概念实现精准高效的擦除。
AI.motivation: 当前大规模文本到图像扩散模型虽然生成效果极佳，但存在生成违禁或受版权保护内容的安全隐患。现有的概念擦除方法在扩展性、精确性、鲁棒性上均有不足，仅能处理数百个概念，难以应对实际需求。因此，亟需一种更高效、更大规模、且鲁棒性更强的概念擦除方法。
AI.method: 作者提出ETC框架，包括：（1）通过学生t分布混合模型（tMM）对低秩概念分布建模，实现对目标概念的高精度、定点擦除，并通过锚定目标分布边界保持其他概念的完整性；（2）引入基于专家混合（MoE）结构的MoEraser模块，擦除目标嵌入同时保持锚点嵌入；（3）在文本嵌入投影过程中注入噪声，并对MoEraser进行微调，以增强对白盒攻击（如模块移除）的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在2,000多个来自不同领域和扩散模型的概念上进行了大量实验，结果表明ETC在大规模概念擦除的可扩展性和精度方面均达到最新水平。
AI.conclusion: ETC框架显著提升了大规模文本到图像模型安全可靠的概念擦除能力，能有效兼顾生成质量与安全性，拓宽了大模型实际应用的范围。

title: Compiling OpenSCENARIO 2.1 for Scenario-Based Testing in CARLA
summary: While the ASAM OpenSCENARIO 2.1 Domain-Specific Language (DSL) enables declarative, intent-driven authoring for Scenario-Based Testing (SBT), its integration into open-source simulators like CARLA remains limited by legacy parsers. We propose a multi-pass modern compiler architecture that translates the OpenSCENARIO 2.1 DSL directly into executable CARLA behaviors. The pipeline features an ANTLR4 frontend for Abstract Syntax Tree (AST) generation, a semantic middle-end, and a runtime backend that synthesizes deterministic py_trees behavior trees. Mapping the standardized domain ontology directly to CARLA's procedural API via a custom method registry eliminates the need for external logic solvers. A demonstrative multi-actor cut-in and evasive maneuver, selected from a wider suite of validated scenarios, confirms the compiler's ability to process concurrent actions, dynamic mathematical expressions, and asynchronous signaling. This framework establishes a functional baseline for reproducible, large-scale SBT, paving the way for future C++ optimizations to mitigate current Python-based computational overhead.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种多遍现代编译器架构，将OpenSCENARIO 2.1 DSL直接翻译为CARLA仿真器可执行的行为树，以实现高效、准确的场景测试。
AI.motivation: 虽然OpenSCENARIO 2.1 DSL为场景测试提供了强大的声明式描述能力，但其在开源仿真器（如CARLA）中的集成因旧有解析器而受限，影响了其广泛应用与自动化程度。
AI.method: 采用基于ANTLR4的前端生成抽象语法树（AST），中端做语义处理，后端在CARLA中合成py_trees行为树，并通过自定义方法注册表直接把标准领域知识映射到CARLA API，无需外部逻辑推理器。
AI.result: 展示了多车道插队和躲避等复杂场景的实现，验证了编译器对并发动作、动态数学表达式和异步信号的处理能力，证明了架构的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本框架能够实现可复现且大规模的场景测试，为后续用C++优化计算性能提供了基础。

title: GoCoMA: Hyperbolic Multimodal Representation Fusion for Large Language Model-Generated Code Attribution
comment: Accepted to the International Conference on Multimedia & Expo (ICME) 2026
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) trained on massive code corpora are now increasingly capable of generating code that is hard to distinguish from human-written code. This raises practical concerns, including security vulnerabilities and licensing ambiguity, and also motivates a forensic question: 'Who (or which LLM) wrote this piece of code?' We present GoCoMA, a multimodal framework that models an extrinsic hierarchy between (i) code stylometry, capturing higher-level structural and stylistic signatures, and (ii) image representations of binary pre-executable artifacts (BPEA), capturing lower-level, execution-oriented byte semantics shaped by compilation and toolchains. GoCoMA projects modality embeddings into a hyperbolic Poincaré ball, fuses them via a geodesic-cosine similarity-based cross-modal attention (GCSA) fusion mechanism, and back-projects the fused representation to Euclidean space for final LLM-source attribution. Experiments on two open-source benchmarks (CoDET-M4 and LLMAuthorBench) show that GoCoMA consistently outperforms unimodal and Euclidean multimodal baselines under identical evaluation protocols.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向大型语言模型（LLMs）生成代码溯源的多模态框架GoCoMA，通过融合代码风格特征与二进制可执行工件图像特征，实现对代码作者/模型的高效识别。实验结果优于主流基线方法。
AI.motivation: 随着LLMs生成代码能力激增，鉴别代码作者对安全、法律等领域非常重要，迫切需要解决'代码是谁（哪个模型）写的'这一鉴定难题。
AI.method: 提出GoCoMA多模态框架：一方面采用代码文体分析识别高层结构/风格特征，另一方面将编译生成的二进制工件转成图像抓取低层语义，两种模态特征分别在Poincaré球上嵌入后，经GCSA跨模态注意力机制融合，最后将结果映射回欧氏空间以进行作者归属判定。
AI.result: 在CoDET-M4与LLMAuthorBench两个开源代码溯源基准上，GoCoMA在相同评测协议下，准确率等度量指标均超越现有单模态及欧氏空间多模态方法。
AI.conclusion: GoCoMA实现了跨模态信息有效整合，对于区分人类和AI代码、追踪代码来源具有重要实际意义，提升了复杂代码出处识别的准确性和鲁棒性。

title: A Survey of Spatial Memory Representations for Efficient Robot Navigation
comment: Accepted at the Women in Computer Vision (WiCV) Workshop at CVPR 2026
summary: As vision-based robots navigate larger environments, their spatial memory grows without bound, eventually exhausting computational resources, particularly on embedded platforms (8-16GB shared memory, $<$30W) where adding hardware is not an option. This survey examines the spatial memory efficiency problem across 88 references spanning 52 systems (1989-2025), from occupancy grids to neural implicit representations. We introduce the $α= M_{\text{peak}} / M_{\text{map}}$, the ratio of peak runtime memory (the total RAM or GPU memory consumed during operation) to saved map size (the persistent checkpoint written to disk), exposing the gap between published map sizes and actual deployment cost. Independent profiling on an NVIDIA A100 GPU reveals that $α$ spans two orders of magnitude within neural methods alone, ranging from 2.3 (Point-SLAM) to 215 (NICE-SLAM, whose 47,MB map requires 10GB at runtime), showing that memory architecture, not paradigm label, determines deployment feasibility. We propose a standardized evaluation protocol comprising memory growth rate, query latency, memory-completeness curves, and throughput degradation, none of which current benchmarks capture. Through a Pareto frontier analysis with explicit benchmark separation, we show that no single paradigm dominates within its evaluation regime: 3DGS methods achieve the best absolute accuracy at 90-254,MB map size on Replica, while scene graphs provide semantic abstraction at predictable cost. We provide the first independently measured $α$ reference values and an $α$-aware budgeting algorithm enabling practitioners to assess deployment feasibility on target hardware prior to implementation.

AI.tldr: 本文综述了视觉机器人在大环境导航中空间记忆效率面临的计算资源瓶颈，并针对52种系统提出统一的内存评估方法和新性能指标，帮助行业更准确评估和部署SLAM系统。
AI.motivation: 嵌入式和资源受限硬件下，视觉机器人所需的空间记忆随着环境复杂度迅速上升，现有评估指标不能有效反映系统运行时与存储时的真实资源消耗，阻碍了方法的公平比较和实际部署。
AI.method: 调查了1989-2025年88篇文献中的52种空间建图系统，从传统栅格地图到神经隐式表示，系统性对比。引入新指标α= M_peak / M_map，揭示运行时与存储的内存消耗比。使用NVIDIA A100 GPU对代表性神经方法独立测试，并通过帕累托前沿分析比较不同方法。此外，制定了统一的评测协议，包括内存增长率、查询延迟、完整性曲线和吞吐衰减等。
AI.result: 实验显示神经方法的α值相差百倍：如Point-SLAM为2.3，NICE-SLAM高达215（47MB地图需10GB内存）。不同范式（如3DGS、场景图）在现实任务下各有优势，没有一种方法全面优于其他方法。首次给出不同主流方法的独立α参考值。
AI.conclusion: 空间记忆系统的可部署性由具体内存架构，而非方法类别决定。提出的α指标与评测协议为领域标准化和实际部署提供了有力工具，并给出α感知的内存预算算法，便于提前量化目标硬件上的上线可行性。

title: Learning-Based Sparsification of Dynamic Graphs in Robotic Exploration Algorithms
summary: Many robotic exploration algorithms rely on graph structures for frontier-based exploration and dynamic path planning. However, these graphs grow rapidly, accumulating redundant information and impacting performance. We present a transformer-based framework trained with Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) to prune these graphs during exploration, limiting their growth and reducing the accumulation of excess information. The framework was evaluated on simulations of a robotic agent using Rapidly Exploring Random Trees (RRT) to carry out frontier-based exploration, where the learned policy reduces graph size by up to 96%. We find preliminary evidence that our framework learns to associate pruning decisions with exploration outcomes despite sparse, delayed reward signals. We also observe that while intelligent pruning achieves a lower rate of exploration compared to baselines, it yields the lowest standard deviation, producing the most consistent exploration across varied environments. To the best of our knowledge, these results are the first suggesting the viability of RL in sparsification of dynamic graphs used in robotic exploration algorithms.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种用强化学习剪枝动态探索图的新方法，显著减少储存冗余，提高探索一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有机器人前沿探索与路径规划算法依赖的图结构会快速扩展，造成冗余信息积累，降低算法性能。因此需要有效手段在保持探索效率的同时控制图规模。
AI.method: 作者提出了基于Transformer，并结合近端策略优化（PPO）训练的图剪枝框架。在仿真环境下，机器人利用RRT方法进行前沿探索时，通过强化学习策略动态决策剪枝行为，有效抑制图的无序增长。
AI.result: 实验证明，所提方法在仿真中能将探索图规模缩减最高96%。尽管剪枝带来的探索速度略低于基线，但在各种环境下表现更为稳定，标准差最小，还能在稀疏、延迟奖励下学习到有效策略。
AI.conclusion: 本研究首次证实利用强化学习进行动态探索图剪枝的可行性，为提升机器人探索算法效率与一致性提供了新方向。

title: Reciprocal Co-Training (RCT): Coupling Gradient-Based and Non-Differentiable Models via Reinforcement Learning
summary: Large language models (LLMs) and classical machine learning methods offer complementary strengths for predictive modeling, yet their fundamentally different representations and training paradigms hinder effective integration: LLMs rely on gradient-based optimization over textual data, whereas models such as Random Forests (RF) employ non-differentiable feature partitioning. This work introduces a reciprocal co-training framework that couples an LLM with an RF classifier via reinforcement learning, creating an iterative feedback loop in which each model improves using signals from the other. Tabular data are reformulated into standardized textual representations for the LLM, whose embeddings augment the RF feature space, while calibrated RF probability estimates provide feedback signals that guide reinforcement learning updates of the LLM. Experiments across three medical datasets demonstrate consistent performance gains for both models, with particularly strong effects for the LLM. Ablation analyses show that iterative refinement, hybrid reward design, and dimensionality control jointly contribute to these gains. The proposed framework provides a general mechanism that allows incompatible model families to leverage each other's strengths through bidirectional adaptation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种将大语言模型（LLM）与随机森林（RF）结合的互补协同训练框架，通过强化学习实现双向反馈，提升两类模型的预测性能，尤其对LLM提升显著。
AI.motivation: LLM和传统机器学习方法如RF在特征表达和训练机制上存在本质差异，难以直接集成。作者希望打破模型间壁垒，实现优势互补，从而提升整体预测性能。
AI.method: 作者提出了“互补协同训练”框架。具体做法是：将结构化表格数据格式化为适合LLM输入的文本，获得LLM生成的嵌入，将其作为RF的额外特征输入；同时，RF输出的概率值经过校准后，作为奖励信号反向用于强化学习优化LLM参数，形成一个模型间的迭代反馈回路。
AI.result: 在三个医学数据集上实验证明，该框架对RF和LLM均带来持续性能提升，尤其对LLM效果显著。消融实验表明，模型的迭代式优化、奖励机制设计和特征维数控制对性能提升起到关键作用。
AI.conclusion: 该框架提供了一种通用机制，使本质不兼容的模型家族能通过双向自适应实现优势互补，为模型集成和跨范式融合提供了新思路。

title: Dynamic Eraser for Guided Concept Erasure in Diffusion Models
summary: Concept erasure in Text-To-Image (T2I) diffusion models is vital for safe content generation, but existing inference-time methods face significant limitations. Feature-correction approaches often cause uncontrolled over-correction, while token-level interventions struggle with semantic granularity and context. Moreover, both types of methods are prone to severe semantic drift or even complete representation collapse. To address these challenges, we present Dynamic Semantic Steering (DSS), a lightweight, training-free framework for interpretable and controllable concept erasure. DSS introduces: 1) Sensitive Semantic Boundary Modeling (SSBM) to automate the discovery of safe semantic anchors, and 2) Sensitive Semantic Guidance (SSG), which leverages cross-attention features for precise detection and performs correction via a closed-form solution derived from a well-posed objective. This ensures optimal suppression of sensitive content while preserving benign semantics. DSS achieves an average erasure rate of 91.0\%, significantly outperforming SOTA methods (from 18.6\% to 85.9\%) with minimal impact on output fidelity.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新方法DSS，以更高效、安全地从扩散模型中删除敏感概念，使内容生成更加可控和安全，显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有T2I扩散模型的敏感内容擦除方法在推理时存在过度纠正、语义漂移、表示崩溃等问题，很难实现可控又不损害无害内容的语义擦除。
AI.method: 提出Dynamic Semantic Steering (DSS)方法，无需重新训练，分为两部分：1）通过Sensitive Semantic Boundary Modeling (SSBM)自动找到安全语义锚点；2）用Sensitive Semantic Guidance (SSG)利用交叉关注特征进行敏感内容检测，并通过闭式解实现精准校正。
AI.result: DSS实现了平均91.0%的敏感概念擦除率，明显优于当前最优方法（18.6%~85.9%），且对输出质量影响极小。
AI.conclusion: DSS为文本到图像扩散模型中的安全概念擦除提供了高效、解释性强且更精准的新思路，有助于安全生成内容，同时保护无害语义。

title: On-Orbit Space AI: Federated, Multi-Agent, and Collaborative Algorithms for Satellite Constellations
summary: Satellite constellations are transforming space systems from isolated spacecraft into networked, software-defined platforms capable of on-orbit perception, decision making, and adaptation. Yet much of the existing AI studies remains centered on single-satellite inference, while constellation-scale autonomy introduces fundamentally new algorithmic requirements: learning and coordination under dynamic inter-satellite connectivity, strict SWaP-C limits, radiation-induced faults, non-IID data, concept drift, and safety-critical operational constraints. This survey consolidates the emerging field of on-orbit space AI through three complementary paradigms: (i) {federated learning} for cross-satellite training, personalization, and secure aggregation; (ii) {multi-agent algorithms} for cooperative planning, resource allocation, scheduling, formation control, and collision avoidance; and (iii) {collaborative sensing and distributed inference} for multi-satellite fusion, tracking, split/early-exit inference, and cross-layer co-design with constellation networking. We provide a system-level view and a taxonomy that unifies collaboration architectures, temporal mechanisms, and trust models. To support community development and keep this review actionable over time, we continuously curate relevant papers and resources at https://github.com/ziyangwang007/AI4Space.

AI.tldr: 本文综述了卫星星座中的在轨空间AI，涵盖了联邦学习、多智能体算法及协作感知与分布式推理三大范式，并提出统一的系统性视角和分类法。
AI.motivation: 随着卫星星座的发展，卫星系统从孤立的航天器转变为网络化、可定义的软件平台，对应的AI研究需求也从单星推理转向星座级自治，面临通信、算力、可靠性和异构数据等新挑战。
AI.method: 文章从三个范式综述该领域：（1）跨卫星的联邦学习，用于分布式训练、个性化和安全聚合；（2）多智能体算法，实现合作规划、资源调度、编队控制与避碰等任务；（3）协作感知与分布式推理，提升多星数据融合、目标跟踪和联合推理能力，并讨论星座网络的协同设计。
AI.result: 论文整理并分类了当前该领域代表性研究，提出了协作架构、时序机制与信任模型的统一分类法，构建和维护了相关文献与资源库，便于持续跟踪和深度发展。
AI.conclusion: 星座级AI对未来空间系统至关重要，上述三类方法能高效支持智能化、自治化的在轨任务；统一架构和分类有助于凝聚社区共识并指导后续研究实践。

title: Data Mixing for Large Language Models Pretraining: A Survey and Outlook
summary: Large language models (LLMs) rely on pretraining on massive and heterogeneous corpora, where training data composition has a decisive impact on training efficiency and downstream generalization under realistic compute and data budget constraints. Unlike sample-level data selection, data mixing optimizes domain-level sampling weights to allocate limited budgets more effectively. In recent years, a growing body of work has proposed principled data mixing methods for LLM pretraining; however, the literature remains fragmented and lacks a dedicated, systematic survey. This paper provides a comprehensive review of data mixing for LLM pretraining. We first formalize data mixture optimization as a bilevel problem on the probability simplex and clarify the role of data mixing in the pretraining pipeline, and briefly explain how existing methods make this formulation tractable in practice. We then introduce a fine-grained taxonomy that organizes existing methods along two dimensions: static versus dynamic mixing. Static mixing is further categorized into rule-based and learning-based methods, while dynamic mixing is grouped into adaptive and externally guided families. For each class, we summarize representative approaches and analyze their strengths and limitations from a performance-cost trade-off perspective. Building on this analysis, we highlight challenges that cut across methods, including limited transferability across data domains, optimization objectives, models, and validation sets, as well as unstandardized evaluation protocols and benchmarks, and the inherent tension between performance gains and cost control in learning-based methods. Finally, we outline several exploratory directions, including finer-grained domain partitioning and inverse data mixing, as well as pipeline-aware designs, aiming to provide conceptual and methodological insights for future research.

AI.tldr: 本文综述了大语言模型（LLMs）预训练中的数据混合方法，总结和分类了现有研究，并分析了调优数据混合对模型性能与成本的影响，为后续研究提供了方向。
AI.motivation: LLM的训练依赖于大规模异质语料，而训练数据的组成直接影响训练效率与泛化能力，但业界缺乏关于数据混合方法的系统性综述。本文旨在梳理和比较各类数据混合方法，帮助提升训练效率，并明确存在的挑战与未来的研究空间。
AI.method: 作者将数据混合优化形式化为概率单纯形上的二层问题，并对现有方法进行细致的分类：分为静态与动态混合，静态方法又分基于规则与基于学习，动态混合分为自适应和外部引导类。针对各类方法进行汇总、优缺点评析，并关注性能和成本的权衡。
AI.result: 系统归纳了现有数据混合方法，建立了细致的分类法，对比其在性能提升与成本控制上的表现，并总结了普遍挑战：如数据域间迁移性、目标函数、多模型适应性、评测标准的不统一，以及基于学习方法的成本难题。
AI.conclusion: 本文厘清了LLM预训练数据混合方法的现状及核心挑战，提出了更细粒度域切分、逆向数据混合和流水线感知的创新方向，为未来研究提供了理论和方法指导。

title: DexWorldModel: Causal Latent World Modeling towards Automated Learning of Embodied Tasks
summary: Deploying generative World-Action Models for manipulation is severely bottlenecked by redundant pixel-level reconstruction, $\mathcal{O}(T)$ memory scaling, and sequential inference latency. We introduce the Causal Latent World Model (CLWM), which employs DINOv3 features as generative targets to disentangle interaction semantics from visual noise, yielding highly robust domain generalization. To overcome memory scaling, CLWM features a Dual-State Test-Time Training (TTT) Memory that guarantees a strict $\mathcal{O}(1)$ footprint for long-horizon tasks. To overcome deployment latency, we propose Speculative Asynchronous Inference (SAI) to mask partial diffusion denoising behind physical execution, cutting blocking latency by about $50\%$. To scale robust policies, we present EmbodiChain, an online framework that establishes the Efficiency Law by injecting an infinite flow of physics-grounded trajectories during training. Extensive experiments validate that CLWM achieves state-of-the-art performance in complex dual-arm simulation and unprecedented zero-shot sim-to-real transfer on physical robots, outperforming baselines explicitly finetuned on real-world data.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Causal Latent World Model（CLWM）来提升生成式世界-动作模型在操作控制中的效率与泛化性能，通过高效特征、内存管理与推理，并结合大规模高效的训练管线，实现了更快、更准确的机器人操作，并首次在无需真实数据微调的情况下完成高质量零样本迁移。
AI.motivation: 现有生成式世界-动作模型在机器人操作任务中的应用受限于像素级重建的冗余、内存随任务时长爆炸、序列推理延迟高，且在真实场景泛化能力弱，需要高效且可靠的模型来克服这些瓶颈。
AI.method: 1）用DINOv3视觉特征作为生成目标，分离语义与噪声，增强泛化能力；2）设计Dual-State Test-Time Training（TTT）Memory，将长时序任务的内存需求从线性降低到常数；3）提出Speculative Asynchronous Inference（SAI）方法，将部分推理与物理执行并发，大幅降低阻塞延迟；4）通过EmbodiChain管线持续注入物理轨迹，提升策略训练规模和泛化。
AI.result: CLWM在复杂双臂仿真环境下达到SOTA表现，并首次实现了无需真实数据微调的高性能零样本仿真到实物（sim-to-real）迁移，全面优于现有仅依赖真实数据微调的基线模型。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的CLWM及其相关组件有效消除了传统生成模型操作过程中的性能、内存和泛化瓶颈，使机器人在不依赖真实环境微调下实现了高效、强泛化的操作控制，具备推动仿真—现实一体化学习的意义。

title: Human Cognition in Machines: A Unified Perspective of World Models
summary: This comprehensive report distinguishes prior works by the cognitive functions they innovate. Many works claim an almost "human-like" cognitive capability in their world models. To evaluate these claims requires a proper grounding in first principles in Cognitive Architecture Theory (CAT). We present a conceptual unified framework for world models that fully incorporates all the cognitive functions associated with CAT (i.e. memory, perception, language, reasoning, imagining, motivation, and meta-cognition) and identify gaps in the research as a guide for future states of the art. In particular, we find that motivation (especially intrinsic motivation) and meta-cognition remain drastically under-researched, and we propose concrete directions informed by active inference and global workspace theory to address them. We further introduce Epistemic World Models, a new category encompassing agent frameworks for scientific discovery that operate over structured knowledge. Our taxonomy, applied across video, embodied, and epistemic world models, suggests research directions where prior taxonomies have not.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个统一的认知架构世界模型框架，全面涵盖了CAT相关的认知功能，并梳理研究空白，指引未来发展方向。
AI.motivation: 目前许多世界模型宣称具备类人认知能力，但缺乏对认知架构理论的系统结合，尤其在动机和元认知的研究上存在不足。为了真实评估这些模型的认知能力，需要基于认知架构理论进行系统归纳和分析。
AI.method: 作者提出一个统一的概念框架，全面整合了认知架构理论中的各项认知功能（如记忆、感知、语言、推理、想象、动机、元认知），并结合现有研究，梳理出各功能下的研究进展和缺口。同时，提出了针对动机（尤其内在动机）和元认知的研究方向，借鉴主动推断和全球工作空间理论。
AI.result: 发现动机（尤其内在动机）和元认知在现有研究中极为薄弱。提出了Epistemic World Models作为新型科学发现型智能体世界模型类别。通过将新提出的分类体系应用于不同类型的世界模型，揭示了以往分类未涉及的研究方向。
AI.conclusion: 当前世界模型研究对部分认知功能涉及不深，未来需加强内在动机与元认知的研究。作者的分类及研究指引为世界模型的发展和认知能力提升提供了重要框架和方向。

title: LiFT: Does Instruction Fine-Tuning Improve In-Context Learning for Longitudinal Modelling by Large Language Models?
summary: Longitudinal NLP tasks require reasoning over temporally ordered text to detect persistence and change in human behavior and opinions. However, in-context learning with large language models struggles on tasks where models must integrate historical context, track evolving interactions, and handle rare change events. We introduce LiFT, a longitudinal instruction fine-tuning framework that unifies diverse longitudinal modeling tasks under a shared instruction schema. LiFT uses a curriculum that progressively increases temporal difficulty while incorporating few-shot structure and temporal conditioning to encourage effective use of past context. We evaluate LiFT across five datasets. Models trained on longitudinal tasks with different levels of temporal granularity are tested for generalisability on two separate datasets. Across models with different parameter sizes (OLMo (1B/7B), LLaMA-8B, and Qwen-14B), LiFT consistently outperforms base-model ICL, with strong gains on out-of-distribution data and minority change events.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出LiFT，一个纵向NLP任务的指令微调框架，通过统一指令结构提升大模型对时序文本的理解和变更事件检测能力，并在多数据集和不同模型参数下取得了优越表现。
AI.motivation: 当前大语言模型在处理需要整合历史上下文、追踪行为变化和应对少见变更事件的纵向NLP任务时表现较弱，因此需要改进模型对时序信息的建模能力。
AI.method: 提出LiFT框架，通过统一的指令模式、时间难度递增的课程学习、少样本结构与时序条件化，系统提升模型对历史信息和事件变更的理解力，对不同时序粒度任务进行微调训练。
AI.result: 在五个数据集上评估，并测试了不同参数规模的模型（如OLMo 1B/7B，LLaMA-8B，Qwen-14B），LiFT显著优于基础模型的in-context learning，尤其在分布外数据和少数变更事件上提升更明显。
AI.conclusion: LiFT能够有效提升大语言模型在纵向任务中的泛化能力和对稀有变化的检测能力，具有较好的实际应用前景。

title: Saccade Attention Networks: Using Transfer Learning of Attention to Reduce Network Sizes
summary: One of the limitations of transformer networks is the sequence length due to the quadratic nature of the attention matrix. Classical self attention uses the entire sequence length, however, the actual attention being used is sparse. Humans use a form of sparse attention when analyzing an image or scene called saccades. Focusing on key features greatly reduces computation time. By using a network (Saccade Attention Network) to learn where to attend from a large pre-trained model, we can use it to pre-process images and greatly reduce network size by reducing the input sequence length to just the key features being attended to. Our results indicate that you can reduce calculations by close to 80% and produce similar results.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种借鉴人类注视(saccades)方式的稀疏注意力方法，通过选取关键特征大幅减少transformer网络中的计算量，并能在保持性能的同时，减少约80%的计算。
AI.motivation: transformer网络受自注意力机制的限制，当前方法在长序列处理上计算复杂度高，而实际注意力往往是稀疏的。人类视觉的saccades表明关注于重要信息即可。本文旨在借鉴这一稀疏关注特点以减少计算开销。
AI.method: 作者提出Saccade Attention Network（Saccade注意力网络），先利用大规模预训练模型学习‘关注目标’，然后用该模型筛选输入图像的关键特征，仅用这些特征代替原全序列输入进行后续transformer处理，从而显著减少序列长度。
AI.result: 实验结果显示，通过只输入被Saccade注意力网络选中的关键特征，网络计算量减少近80%，但性能与原始全序列输入接近。
AI.conclusion: Saccade注意力网络能够高效预处理图像数据，极大减少transformer结构的计算需求，同时依然保持类似的结果表现，展现了稀疏注意力在视觉任务中的实用价值。

title: Emergency Stopping for Liquid-manipulating Robots
summary: Manipulating open liquid containers is challenging because liquids are highly sensitive to vessel accelerations and jerks. Although spill-free liquid manipulation has been widely studied, emergency stopping under unexpected hazards has received little attention, despite the fact that abrupt braking may cause hazardous spills. This letter presents an emergency stop system for robots manipulating liquids in open containers. We formulate emergency stopping as an optimal control problem and solve it in a model predictive control framework to generate time-optimal, spill-free stopping trajectories. The method operates as a plug-and-play safety layer on top of existing slosh-free motion planning methods, enabling immediate reaction to detected hazards while accounting for nonlinear liquid dynamics. We demonstrate, through simulation and on a 7-DoF Franka Emika Panda robot, that the proposed approach achieves fast emergency stopping without spilling.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于机器人操作敞口液体容器时的紧急停止系统，可在遇到意外危险时实现无洒溅的快速制动。
AI.motivation: 现有机器人液体搬运多关注于无洒溅的常规操作，对遭遇突发事件时的应急停止问题关注不足，然而紧急制动引发的液体溅出具有危险性。
AI.method: 将紧急停止问题建模为最优控制问题，并基于模型预测控制框架，生成最优时间、无洒溅的停止轨迹。该方法可作为现有运动规划算法的安全加层，实现对危险的即时响应，并同时考虑非线性液体动力学。
AI.result: 在仿真及Franka Emika Panda七轴机器人实验证明该方法能实现快速、无洒溅的紧急制动。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的紧急停止系统为机器人搬运液体容器提供了新的安全保障，有效地解决了突发情况下的溅出风险。

title: QU-NLP at QIAS 2026: Multi-Stage QLoRA Fine-Tuning for Arabic Islamic Inheritance Reasoning
comment: Accepted for publication, The 7th Workshop on Open-Source Arabic Corpora and Processing Tools, LREC26 conference
summary: Islamic inheritance law (ilm al-mawarıth) presents a challenging domain for evaluating large language models' structured reasoning capabilities, requiring multi-step legal analysis, rule-based blocking decisions, and precise fractional calculations. We present QU-NLP's submission to the QIAS 2026 shared task on Arabic Islamic inheritance reasoning. Our approach employs a multi-stage Quantized Low-Rank Adaptation (QLoRA) fine-tuning strategy on Qwen3-4B: (1) domain adaptation on 3,166 Islamic fatwa records to acquire inheritance terminology and jurisprudential reasoning patterns, followed by (2) task-specific training on 12,000 structured inheritance cases to optimize JSON-formatted output generation. Using 4-bit NF4 quantization with rank-128 LoRA adapters, our model achieves 90% MIR-E (Mawarith Inheritance Reasoning Evaluation) score on the test set, demonstrating competitive performance while requiring minimal computational resources. Our results show that domain-specific pre-adaptation combined with structured output training enables small language models to perform complex legal reasoning tasks effectively comparing to commercial systems such as Gemini-2.5-flash.

AI.tldr: 本文提交了一种用于阿拉伯伊斯兰继承法推理任务的小型大语言模型（Qwen3-4B）的微调方法，在结构化推理和准确率方面表现优异，并且资源需求低。
AI.motivation: 伊斯兰继承法涉及复杂的多步法律推理、基于规则的阻断决策和精确分数计算，这对语言模型的结构化推理能力提出了挑战。作者希望探索小型模型在该领域中的有效性。
AI.method: 采用多阶段QLoRA微调策略：（1）首先在3166条伊斯兰教法裁决记录上进行领域适应，以学习继承术语和推理模式；（2）随后在12000个结构化继承案件上进行任务特定训练，优化生成JSON输出。技术上应用4-bit NF4量化与rank-128 LoRA适配器。
AI.result: 所提出模型在测试集上取得了90%的MIR-E（伊斯兰继承推理评估）得分，表现优于部分商业系统，同时计算资源消耗极低。
AI.conclusion: 领域适应和结构化输出训练相结合，使得小型语言模型能够高效完成复杂法律推理任务，为低资源场景下的法律AI应用提供了有效方案。

title: Aletheia: Physics-Conditioned Localized Artifact Attention (PhyLAA-X) for End-to-End Generalizable and Robust Deepfake Video Detection
comment: Code: https://github.com/devghori1264/Aletheia (MIT license). Dataset notes: see Data and Code Availability section
summary:
State-of-the-art deepfake detectors achieve near-perfect in-domain accuracy yet degrade under cross-generator shifts, heavy compression, and adversarial perturbations. The core limitation remains the decoupling of semantic artifact learning from physical invariants: optical-flow discontinuities, specular-reflection inconsistencies, and cardiac-modulated reflectance (rPPG) are treated either as post-hoc features or ignored.
  We introduce PhyLAA-X, a novel physics-conditioned extension of Localized Artifact Attention (LAA-X). PhyLAA-X injects three end-to-end differentiable physics-derived feature volumes - optical-flow curl, specular-reflectance skewness, and spatially-upsampled rPPG power spectra - directly into the LAA-X attention computation via cross-attention gating and a resonance consistency loss. This forces the network to learn manipulation boundaries where semantic inconsistencies and physical violations co-occur - regions inherently harder for generative models to replicate consistently.
  PhyLAA-X is embedded across an efficient spatiotemporal ensemble (EfficientNet-B4+BiLSTM, ResNeXt-101+Transformer, Xception+causal Conv1D) with uncertainty-aware adaptive weighting. On FaceForensics++ (c23), Aletheia reaches 97.2% accuracy / 0.992 AUC-ROC; on Celeb-DF v2, 94.9% / 0.981; on DFDC, 90.8% / 0.966 - outperforming the strongest published baseline (LAA-Net [1]) by 4.1-7.3% in cross-generator settings and maintaining 79.4% accuracy under epsilon = 0.02 PGD-10 attacks. Single-backbone ablations confirm PhyLAA-X alone delivers a 4.2% cross-dataset AUC gain. The full production system is open-sourced at https://github.com/devghori1264/Aletheia (v1.2, April 2026) with pretrained weights, the adversarial corpus (referred to as ADC-2026 in this work), and complete reproducibility artifacts.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的深度伪造检测方法PhyLAA-X，通过结合基于物理的特征，有效提升了在复杂与跨域环境下的检测准确率，且对抗扰动下表现依然优越。
AI.motivation: 当前最先进的深度伪造检测器在标准测试集上表现优异，但在遇到不同生成器、强压缩和对抗扰动时性能急剧下降，主要因为现有方法未能结合物理不变量和语义伪造特征。
AI.method: PhyLAA-X将基于光流、不规则镜面反射和心率调制反射信号三种物理特征，端到端地注入到精细化伪造关注机制（LAA-X）中，通过交叉关注门控和共振一致性损失加强网络对伪造边界的感知。这一方法集成于高效的时空多骨干网络体系中，并采用基于不确定性的自适应加权。
AI.result: 在FaceForensics++ (c23)、Celeb-DF v2 和 DFDC 三大数据集上分别取得97.2%、94.9%、90.8%的准确率，在跨生成器测试场景下超过最强基线（LAA-Net）4.1-7.3%，且在对抗攻击下（epsilon = 0.02 PGD-10）仍保持79.4%准确率。消融实验表明PhyLAA-X可单独带来4.2%的跨数据集AUC提升。
AI.conclusion: 引入物理特征并与语义特征联合关注，是提升深度伪造检测鲁棒性的重要方向。PhyLAA-X证明了该策略在实际复杂环境和对抗威胁下的有效性，代码与数据集已开源，利于社区复现和推进研究。

title: Diffusion-Based Optimization for Accelerated Convergence of Redundant Dual-Arm Minimum Time Problems
summary: We present a framework leveraging a novel variant of the model-based diffusion algorithm to minimize the time required for a redundant dual-arm robot configuration to follow a desired relative Cartesian path. Our prior work proposed a bi-level optimization approach for the dual-arm problem, where we derived the analytical solution to the lower-level convex sub-problem and solved the high-level nonconvex problem using a primal-dual approach. However, the gradient-based nature leads to a large computation overhead, and it prohibits directly imposing an $L_{\infty}$ Cartesian error constraint along the joint trajectory due to the sparsity of the gradient. In this work, we propose a diffusion-based framework that relies on probabilistic sampling to tackle the aforementioned challenges in the nonconvex high-level problem, leading to a 35x reduction in the runtime and 34\% less Cartesian error compared to our prior work.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的基于扩散算法的框架，可显著降低双臂机器人跟踪期望笛卡尔轨迹所需的时间和误差。
AI.motivation: 现有基于梯度的优化方法在解决双臂机器人协作路径优化时，计算开销大且难以直接添加笛卡尔误差约束。对此，需寻找高效且能处理非凸问题的方法。
AI.method: 提出了一种基于概率采样的扩散算法框架，用于解决高层非凸优化问题，替代以往的基于梯度的原始-对偶方法。该框架可直接处理$L_\infty$笛卡尔误差约束，并通过采样而非梯度优化进行路径规划。
AI.result: 与以往工作相比，所提方法在运行时间上提升35倍，笛卡尔误差减少34%。
AI.conclusion: 基于扩散的概率采样优化方法在双臂协作路径规划任务中大幅提升了效率和精度，优于传统的梯度方法。

title: Measuring Representation Robustness in Large Language Models for Geometry
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly evaluated on mathematical reasoning, yet their robustness to equivalent problem representations remains poorly understood. In geometry, identical problems can be expressed in Euclidean, coordinate, or vector forms, but existing benchmarks report accuracy on fixed formats, implicitly assuming representation invariance and masking failures caused by representational changes alone. We propose GeoRepEval, a representation-aware evaluation framework that measures correctness, invariance, and consistency at the problem level across parallel formulations, combining strict answer matching, bootstrap confidence intervals, paired McNemar tests, representation-flip analyses, and regression controls for surface complexity. We prove that our Invariance@3 metric decomposes accuracy into robust and fragile components and is bounded by the weakest representation. Evaluating eleven LLMs on 158 curated high-school geometry problems (474 instances), we find accuracy gaps of up to 14 percentage points induced solely by representation choice. Vector formulations emerge as a consistent failure point, with Invariance@3 as low as 0.044 even after controlling for length and symbolic complexity. A convert-then-solve prompting intervention improves vector accuracy by up to 52 percentage points for high-capacity models, suggesting that failures reflect representation sensitivity rather than inability; however, low-capacity models show no gains, indicating deeper limitations. These results suggest that current models rely on representation-specific heuristics rather than abstract geometric reasoning. All datasets, prompts, and scripts are released at https://github.com/vedjaw/GeoRepEval.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了GeoRepEval评测框架，发现大语言模型在几何题不同表述间表现出显著的鲁棒性缺陷，尤其在向量表述下准确率骤降，揭示其依赖表征特定的启发式而非抽象几何推理能力。
AI.motivation: 目前大语言模型在数学推理尤其是几何领域的评测，多依赖单一题目表述，默认模型能跨表述形式表现一致，而实际上模型在不同但等价的表述间的鲁棒性尚未被系统研究。
AI.method: 作者设计了GeoRepEval框架，对同一几何问题的欧式、坐标和向量三种表述分别评估，使用严格答案匹配、自助法置信区间、配对McNemar检验、表述切换分析及复杂度回归控制等手段，提出Invariance@3指标衡量模型一致性，并用数学方式分解准确率的稳健与脆弱成分。
AI.result: 对11个模型158道高考几何题（474题次）评测发现，单凭表述变化，模型准确率最高可差14个百分点，向量表述是主要失分点，Invariance@3最低仅0.044。利用转换再解题的提示方法，高能力模型向量表述准确率可提升52个百分点，但低能力模型无提升。
AI.conclusion: 现有大语言模型并不具备表述无关的几何抽象推理，更依赖表述特定模式，对表述敏感。需改进评测方法与训练机制，以提升其抽象和表征泛化能力。

title: Geometry-Aware CLIP Retrieval via Local Cross-Modal Alignment and Steering
summary: CLIP retrieval is typically framed as a pointwise similarity problem in a shared embedding space. While CLIP achieves strong global cross-modal alignment, many retrieval failures arise from local geometric inconsistencies: nearby items are incorrectly ordered, leading to systematic confusions (e.g., pentagon vs. hexagon) and produces diffuse, weakly controlled result sets. Prior work largely optimizes for point wise relevance or finetuning to mitigate these problems. We instead view retrieval as a problem of neighborhood alignment. Our work introduces (1) neighborhood-level re-ranking via Hungarian matching, which rewards structural consistency; (2) query-conditioned local steering, where directions derived from contrastive neighborhoods around the query reshape retrieval. We show that these techniques improve retrieval performance on attribute-binding and compositional retrieval tasks. Together, these methods operate on local neighborhoods but serve different roles: re-ranking rewards alignment whereas local steering controls neighborhood structure. This shows that retrieval quality and controllability depend critically on local structure, which can be exploited at inference time without retraining.

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过局部结构优化提升CLIP模型在跨模态检索中的表现，具体包括匈牙利匹配算法重排序和局部引导方法，从而改善以往仅依赖全局对齐的不足。
AI.motivation: CLIP虽在全局对齐有强表现，但在局部结构中存在几何错位（如五边形和六边形易混淆），导致检索结果控制性和准确性不足；以往仅优化点对相似或微调，未充分解决局部问题。
AI.method: 本文提出两种方法：1）基于匈牙利算法的邻域重排序，确保检索结果的结构一致性；2）查询条件下的局部引导方法，通过对比邻域调整检索方向，控制局部结构。
AI.result: 实验表明，这两种技术在属性绑定和组合式检索任务中显著提升了检索性能。
AI.conclusion: 检索质量和可控性在很大程度上取决于局部结构。本文方法可在推断时利用局部结构优化检索，无需额外训练，提升了CLIP的局部对齐与可解释性。

title: ReconVLA: An Uncertainty-Guided and Failure-Aware Vision-Language-Action Framework for Robotic Control
summary: Vision-language-action (VLA) models have emerged as generalist robotic controllers capable of mapping visual observations and natural language instructions to continuous action sequences. However, VLAs provide no calibrated measure of confidence in their action predictions, thus limiting their reliability in real-world settings where uncertainty and failures must be anticipated. To address this problem we introduce ReconVLA, a reliable conformal model that produces uncertainty-guided and failure-aware control signals. Concretely, our approach applies conformal prediction directly to the action token outputs of pretrained VLA policies, yielding calibrated uncertainty estimates that correlate with execution quality and task success. Furthermore, we extend conformal prediction to the robot state space to detect outliers or unsafe states before failures occur, providing a simple yet effective failure detection mechanism that complements the action-level uncertainty. We evaluate ReconVLA in both simulation and real robot experiments across diverse manipulation tasks. Our results show that conformalized action predictions consistently improve failure anticipation, reduce catastrophic errors, and provide a calibrated measure of confidence without retraining or modifying the underlying VLA.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ReconVLA方法，为视觉-语言-动作(VLA)模型输出的动作提供了不确定性估计和故障预警，提升机器人实际应用的可靠性。
AI.motivation: 现有VLA模型虽然可将视觉和自然语言指令转化为自动控制操作，但无法输出动作预测的置信度，难以应对实际环境下的不确定性与潜在失败。
AI.method: 作者提出直接对预训练VLA策略的动作输出应用共形预测(conformal prediction)，得到置信度良好且能反映任务执行质量的不确定性估计。同时将共形预测扩展至机器人状态空间，实现对异常状态和危险的提前检测，无需重新训练或修改原有VLA。
AI.result: 在仿真与真实机器人多种操作任务中实验证明，ReconVLA能有效提升对失败的预判能力，降低灾难性错误，并提供可用的置信度指标。
AI.conclusion: ReconVLA方法高效提升了VLA模型在实际机器人任务中的可靠性与安全性，成为不确定性感知与故障预警的有力工具。

title: Injecting Structured Biomedical Knowledge into Language Models: Continual Pretraining vs. GraphRAG
summary: The injection of domain-specific knowledge is crucial for adapting language models (LMs) to specialized fields such as biomedicine. While most current approaches rely on unstructured text corpora, this study explores two complementary strategies for leveraging structured knowledge from the UMLS Metathesaurus: (i) Continual pretraining that embeds knowledge into model parameters, and (ii) Graph Retrieval-Augmented Generation (GraphRAG) that consults a knowledge graph at inference time. We first construct a large-scale biomedical knowledge graph from UMLS (3.4 million concepts and 34.2 million relations), stored in Neo4j for efficient querying. We then derive a ~100-million-token textual corpus from this graph to continually pretrain two models: BERTUMLS (from BERT) and BioBERTUMLS (from BioBERT). We evaluate these models on six BLURB (Biomedical Language Understanding and Reasoning Benchmark) datasets spanning five task types and evaluate GraphRAG on the two QA (Question Answering) datasets (PubMedQA, BioASQ). On BLURB tasks, BERTUMLS improves over BERT, with the largest gains on knowledge-intensive QA. Effects on BioBERT are more nuanced, suggesting diminishing returns when the base model already encodes substantial biomedical text knowledge. Finally, augmenting LLaMA 3-8B with our GraphRAG pipeline yields over than 3 points accuracy on PubMedQA and 5 points on BioASQ without any retraining, delivering transparent, multi-hop, and easily updated knowledge access. We release the processed UMLS Neo4j graph to support reproducibility.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出两种结合结构化知识与语言模型的方法，提升生物医学领域的问答与理解能力，包括基于UMLS知识库的持续预训练和图谱增强生成（GraphRAG），并在多个基准测试上取得了显著改进。
AI.motivation: 适应生物医学等专业领域对语言模型要求较高的专业知识，现有方法多依赖非结构化文本，而结构化知识（如UMLS知识库）利用不足，因此需要探索如何更好地将结构化知识融入语言模型。
AI.method:
1. 从UMLS构建大规模生物医学知识图谱（3.4百万概念，3420万关系），存储于Neo4j中以便高效查询。
2. 从知识图谱生成约1亿token的文本语料，对BERT和BioBERT分别持续预训练，得到BERTUMLS和BioBERTUMLS。
3. 设计Graph Retrieval-Augmented Generation (GraphRAG)方法，在推理时查询知识图谱以辅助生成。
4. 在六个BLURB子任务（五类任务）以及两个问答数据集（PubMedQA、BioASQ）上评测上述方法。
AI.result: BERTUMLS在BLURB各任务，尤其是知识密集型QA上优于BERT。对BioBERT的增益较为有限，显示基础模型知识越丰富，增益越小。GraphRAG与LLaMA 3-8B结合，不经再训练，分别在PubMedQA和BioASQ问答数据集上提升3和5个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 注入结构化知识（如UMLS知识库）能显著提升语言模型在专业领域的表现，通过持续预训练和推理时调用知识图谱两种方式互补。公开UMLS Neo4j知识图助力可复现性。

title: An Uncertainty-Aware Loss Function Incorporating Fuzzy Logic: Application to MRI Brain Image Segmentation
summary: Accurate brain image segmentation, particularly for distinguishing various tissues from magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) images, plays a pivotal role in finding the neurological dis ease and medical image computing. In deep learning approaches, loss functions are very crucial for optimizing the model. In this study, we introduce a novel loss function integrating fuzzy logic to deals uncertainty issues in brain image segmentation into various tissues. It integrates the well-known categorical cross-entropy (CCE) loss function and fuzzy entropy based on fuzzy logic. By employing fuzzy logic, this loss function accounts for the inherent uncertainties in pixel classifications. The proposed loss function has been evaluated on two publicly available benchmark datasets, IBSR and OASIS, using two widely recognised architectures, U-Net and U-Net++. Experimental results demonstrate that the trained model with proposed loss function provided better results in comparison to the CCE optimisation function in terms of various performance metrics. Additionally, it effectively enhances segmentation performance while handling meaningful uncer tainty during training. The findings suggest that this approach not only improves segmentation outcomes but also contributes to the reliability of model predictions.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种结合模糊逻辑的新型损失函数，用于提升MRI脑组织分割中的不确定性处理能力，并在多项指标上优于传统CCE损失函数。
AI.motivation: 目前脑部影像分割在区分不同脑组织时，受MRI图像本身复杂性和标签不确定性影响较大。传统的损失函数（如CCE）不能有效处理像素分类过程中的不确定性。因此需要一种能更好应对不确定性的损失函数。
AI.method: 作者设计了一种基于模糊逻辑的损失函数，将模糊熵与经典类别交叉熵（CCE）损失结合，以在训练过程中引入像素分类的不确定性。此方案被用于U-Net和U-Net++架构，并在IBSR和OASIS两个公开脑部MRI数据集上进行了测试。
AI.result: 实验显示，采用该新损失函数训练的模型在不同评估指标上均优于仅用CCE损失函数的模型，有效提高了分割精度并更好地处理了训练中的不确定性。
AI.conclusion: 模糊逻辑损失函数不仅提升了脑组织分割效果，还增强了模型预测的可靠性。该方法为医学图像分割中不确定性问题提供了一种有效解决思路。

title: Rewind-IL: Online Failure Detection and State Respawning for Imitation Learning
comment: 9 pages, 8 figures, 6 tables. Project page at https://sjay05.github.io/rewind-il
summary: Imitation learning has enabled robots to acquire complex visuomotor manipulation skills from demonstrations, but deployment failures remain a major obstacle, especially for long-horizon action-chunked policies. Once execution drifts off the demonstration manifold, these policies often continue producing locally plausible actions without recovering from the failure. Existing runtime monitors either require failure data, over-trigger under benign feature drift, or stop at failure detection without providing a recovery mechanism. We present Rewind-IL, a training-free online safeguard framework for generative action-chunked imitation policies. Rewind-IL combines a zero-shot failure detector based on Temporal Inter-chunk Discrepancy Estimate (TIDE), calibrated with split conformal prediction, with a state-respawning mechanism that returns the robot to a semantically verified safe intermediate state. Offline, a vision-language model identifies recovery checkpoints in demonstrations, and the frozen policy encoder is used to construct a compact checkpoint feature database. Online, Rewind-IL monitors self-consistency in overlapping action chunks, tracks similarity to the checkpoint library, and, upon failure, rewinds execution to the latest verified safe state before restarting inference from a clean policy state. Experiments on real-world and simulated long-horizon manipulation tasks, including transfer to flow-matching action-chunked policies, demonstrate that policy-internal consistency coupled with semantically grounded respawning offers a practical route to improved reliability in imitation learning. Supplemental materials are available at https://sjay05.github.io/rewind-il

AI.tldr: 本文提出了“Rewind-IL”框架，在不需额外训练的情况下，为模仿学习中的行动分块策略提供在线失效检测与恢复机制，有效提升了长任务场景下的可靠性。
AI.motivation: 传统模仿学习虽然能让机器人学到复杂动作，但一旦偏离演示轨迹，常常无法自行恢复，现有监测方法或需大量失效数据，或只检测无法恢复。因此，亟需既能检测又能主动恢复的解决方案。
AI.method: Rewind-IL无需训练，结合基于TIDE的零样本失效检测（用分割保序预测矫正）与状态重生机制。离线通过视觉-语言模型提取演示中的安全检查点，并用冻结编码器生成特征库。在线监控动作段间自洽与和检查点库的相似度，检测到失效就重置到最近安全状态，从干净的策略状态重新推理。
AI.result: 在现实和仿真环境中，Rewind-IL在包括迁移到flow-matching策略等长任务操作中，被证明提高了模仿策略的可靠性。
AI.conclusion: 结合策略自一致性监控和语义恢复点的重生机制，为模仿学习带来了实用的失效检测与恢复方案，显著提升了实际部署中机器人的稳定性和安全性。

title: HalluSAE: Detecting Hallucinations in Large Language Models via Sparse Auto-Encoders
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) are powerful and widely adopted, but their practical impact is limited by the well-known hallucination phenomenon. While recent hallucination detection methods have made notable progress, we find most of them overlook the dynamic nature and underlying mechanisms of it. To address this gap, we propose HalluSAE, a phase transition-inspired framework that models hallucination as a critical shift in the model's latent dynamics. By modeling the generation process as a trajectory through a potential energy landscape, HalluSAE identifies critical transition zones and attributes factual errors to specific high-energy sparse features. Our approach consists of three stages: (1) Potential Energy Empowered Phase Zone Localization via sparse autoencoders and a geometric potential energy metric; (2) Hallucination-related Sparse Feature Attribution using contrastive logit attribution; and (3) Probing-based Causal Hallucination Detection through linear probes on disentangled features. Extensive experiments on Gemma-2-9B demonstrate that HalluSAE achieves state-of-the-art hallucination detection performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于相变理论的新框架HalluSAE用于检测大语言模型的幻觉（hallucination），能够达到当前最佳表现。
AI.motivation: 虽然幻觉检测方法取得了进展，但大多忽视了幻觉产生的动态性质和机制。作者希望通过建模生成过程中的动态变化，更好地识别和解释幻觉。
AI.method: 提出HalluSAE框架，将幻觉视为潜在动态中的临界转变。具体包括：（1）通过稀疏自编码器和势能度量定位关键相变区域；（2）利用对比Logit归因法定位与幻觉相关的稀疏特征；（3）通过线性探针对解耦特征进行因果检测。
AI.result: 在Gemma-2-9B大模型上的实验表明，HalluSAE在幻觉检测任务中优于现有方法，取得了SOTA性能。
AI.conclusion: HalluSAE通过建模潜在空间的动态变化，能够有效分辨和解释大模型的幻觉错误，为相关检测技术提供新的理论和实用工具。

title: A Lightweight Transformer for Pain Recognition from Brain Activity
summary: Pain is a multifaceted and widespread phenomenon with substantial clinical and societal burden, making reliable automated assessment a critical objective. This paper presents a lightweight transformer architecture that fuses multiple fNIRS representations through a unified tokenization mechanism, enabling joint modeling of complementary signal views without requiring modality-specific adaptations or increasing architectural complexity. The proposed token-mixing strategy preserves spatial, temporal, and time-frequency characteristics by projecting heterogeneous inputs onto a shared latent representation, using a structured segmentation scheme to control the granularity of local aggregation and global interaction. The model is evaluated on the AI4Pain dataset using stacked raw waveform and power spectral density representations of fNIRS inputs. Experimental results demonstrate competitive pain recognition performance while remaining computationally compact, making the approach suitable for real-time inference on both GPU and CPU hardware.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种轻量级Transformer架构，通过统一的token机制融合多种fNIRS信号特征，以提升疼痛识别效率，且模型计算量小，适合实时应用。
AI.motivation: 疼痛具有多维且复杂的特性，传统评估方法局限性大，因此亟需高效、自动化的疼痛识别技术以改善临床和社会管理。
AI.method: 采用轻量级Transformer，设计统一token机制将不同fNIRS数据（原始波形与功率谱密度）映射到共享潜在空间，通过结构化分割方案实现不同粒度的局部聚合及全局交互，无需为不同模态定制架构。
AI.result: 在AI4Pain数据集上测试，融合原始波形与功率谱密度输入，模型在保持低计算需求的同时取得有竞争力的疼痛识别性能，支持GPU和CPU实时推断。
AI.conclusion: 该方法兼顾性能与效率，适合实际临床与便携硬件疼痛自动识别需求。

title: Autonomous Vehicle Collision Avoidance With Racing Parameterized Deep Reinforcement Learning
summary: Road traffic accidents are a leading cause of fatalities worldwide. In the US, human error causes 94% of crashes, resulting in excess of 7,000 pedestrian fatalities and $500 billion in costs annually.
