Autonomous Vehicles (AVs) with emergency collision avoidance systems that operate at the limits of vehicle dynamics at a high frequency, a dual constraint of nonlinear kinodynamic accuracy and computational efficiency, further enhance safety benefits during adverse weather and cybersecurity breaches, and to evade dangerous human driving when AVs and human drivers share roads. This paper parameterizes a Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) collision avoidance policy Out-Of-Distribution (OOD) utilizing race car overtaking, without explicit geometric mimicry reference trajectory guidance, in simulation, with a physics-informed, simulator exploit-aware reward to encode nonlinear vehicle kinodynamics. Two policies are evaluated, a default uni-direction and a reversed heading variant that navigates in the opposite direction to other cars, which both consistently outperform a Model Predictive Control and Artificial Potential Function (MPC-APF) baseline, with zero-shot transfer to proportionally scaled hardware, across three intersection collision scenarios, at 31x fewer Floating Point Operations (FLOPS) and 64x lower inference latency. The reversed heading policy outperforms the default racing overtaking policy in head-to-head collisions by 30% and the baseline by 50%, and matches the former in side collisions, where both DRL policies evade 10% greater than numerical optimal control.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出将深度强化学习（DRL）用于自动驾驶车辆极限规避碰撞策略，在三种交叉口碰撞场景中优于现有方法，并且具备更高的效率与更强的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 当前交通事故多由人为失误导致，自动驾驶车辆通过高效且具备高动态精度的规避系统可显著提升安全性，尤其是在恶劣天气及网络安全威胁时，亟需同时满足非线性动力学精度和计算效率的碰撞规避策略。
AI.method: 本文在仿真环境下，将赛车超车情景中利用DRL实现的规避策略进行了参数化，奖励函数结合物理知识和模拟器特性，避免依赖明确轨迹指导。提出了两种策略：一是正常驾驶方向，一是反向行进，采用“零样本迁移”在实际硬件进行测试。将结果与基于模型预测控制和人工势场函数的基线进行比较。
AI.result: 两种DRL策略均在交叉口三种典型碰撞场景中超越MPC-APF基线方法，推理计算量减少31倍，时延降低64倍。反向行进策略在正面碰撞中比默认策略提升30%，比基线提升50%；侧面碰撞中两种DRL策略均比基线高10%。
AI.conclusion: 基于DRL的碰撞规避策略在复杂场景下展现出优越性能和推理效率，可有效提升自动驾驶车辆面对极限危险场景和多主体复杂交通环境时的安全性和实用性。

title: SynopticBench: Evaluating Vision-Language Models on Generating Weather Forecast Discussions of the Future
comment: Accepted for presentation at Climate Informatics 2026
summary: Recent advances in visual-language models (VLMs) have led to significant improvements in a plethora of complex multimodal tasks like image captioning, report generation, and visual perception. However, generating text from meteorological data is highly challenging because the atmosphere is a chaotic system that is rapidly changing at various spatial and temporal scales. Given the complexity of atmospheric phenomena, it is critical to verifiably quantify the effectiveness of existing VLMs on weather forecasting data. In this work, we present SynopticBench, a high-quality dataset consisting of 1,367,041 text samples of Area Forecast Discussions created by the National Weather Service over the continental United States paired to images of 500mb geopotential height, 2 meter temperature, and 850mb wind velocity in weather forecasts. We also present Synoptic Phenomena Alignment and Coverage Evaluation (SPACE), a novel evaluation framework that can be used to effectively estimate the quality of text descriptions of synoptic weather phenomena. Extensive experiments on generating forecast discussions using state-of-the-art VLMs show the sensitivity of existing evaluation metrics in this domain and enable further exploration into synoptic weather and climate text generation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个专业的天气领域多模态数据集和评价体系，用于评估视觉-语言模型在气象数据文本生成任务中的表现。
AI.motivation: 受限于大气系统的复杂性，当前视觉-语言模型在处理天气预报数据生成文本方面效果未知。缺乏针对气象现象的高质量数据集和专用评价框架，限制了模型在该领域的应用与改进。
AI.method: 作者构建了大型高质量气象数据集SynopticBench，包含136万余条由美国国家气象局生成的气象文本及相关气象图像。并提出SPACE评价框架，专用于衡量气象天气现象描述的对齐性和覆盖率。利用先进视觉-语言模型进行实验，比较不同评价指标的灵敏性。
AI.result: 实验表明，主流视觉-语言模型在生成气象文本时评价指标表现出高度敏感性，现有指标对气象领域的适用性有限。数据集和评价体系有效促进该领域深入探索。
AI.conclusion: SynopticBench和SPACE为气象领域视觉-语言模型研究提供了新基础和工具，推动气象和气候文本生成研究的发展，并指出当前模型与评价方法的不足。

title: LayerCache: Exploiting Layer-wise Velocity Heterogeneity for Efficient Flow Matching Inference
summary: Flow Matching models achieve state-of-the-art image generation quality but incur substantial inference cost due to iterative denoising through large Transformer networks. We observe that different layer groups within a Transformer exhibit markedly heterogeneous velocity dynamics: shallow layers are highly stable and amenable to aggressive caching, while deep layers undergo large velocity changes that demand full computation. Existing caching methods, however, treat the entire Transformer as a monolithic unit, applying a single caching decision per timestep and thus failing to exploit this heterogeneity. Based on this finding, we propose LayerCache, a layer-aware caching framework that partitions the Transformer into layer groups and makes independent, per-group caching decisions at each denoising step. LayerCache introduces an adaptive JVP span K selection mechanism that leverages per-group stability measurements to balance estimation accuracy and computational savings. We formulate a three-dimensional scheduling problem over timesteps, layer groups, and JVP span, and solve it with a greedy budget allocation algorithm. On Qwen-Image (1024x1024, 50 steps), LayerCache achieves PSNR 37.46 dB (+5.38 dB over MeanCache), SSIM 0.9834, and LPIPS 0.0178 (a 70% reduction over MeanCache) at 1.37x speedup, dominating all prior caching methods on the quality-speed Pareto frontier.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为LayerCache的层感知缓存框架，通过分组处理Transformer的不同层，实现高效的图像生成，并在保持高质量的同时，大幅提升推理速度，优于现有缓存方法。
AI.motivation: Flow Matching模型在图像生成上表现优异，但由于依赖于大型Transformer逐步去噪，推理计算开销极高。此前缓存方法没有考虑Transformer层与层之间反应的差异性，无法进一步压缩计算成本。本文致力于挖掘不同层组动态的异质性，优化推理效率。
AI.method: 作者发现Transformer中浅层在去噪过程中动力学稳定，深层变化剧烈。基于此，提出LayerCache框架：将Transformer按层划分组，对每组独立决策是否缓存，并引入自适应JVP span K选择机制，根据每组的稳定性动态调整缓存粒度。在时间步、层组、JVP span三维空间内，通过贪婪算法分配预算。
AI.result: 在Qwen-Image（1024x1024，50步）数据集上，LayerCache取得了PSNR提升至37.46 dB（较MeanCache高5.38 dB）、SSIM为0.9834，以及LPIPS大幅降至0.0178（比MeanCache低70%），推理速度提升1.37倍，优于所有先前的缓存优化方法。
AI.conclusion: LayerCache能够充分利用Transformer层内动力学异质性，通过分层缓存和智能调度，在保证高图像生成质量的同时，有效提升推理速度，为高效大模型推理提供了新思路。

title: LiDAR-based Crowd Navigation with Visible Edge Group Representation
summary: Robot navigation in crowded pedestrian environments is a well-known challenge and we explore the practical deployment of group-based representations in this setting. Pedestrian groups have been empirically shown to enable a mobile robot's navigation behavior to be safer and more social. However, existing approaches either explored groups only in limited scenarios with no high-density crowds or depended on external detection modules to track individuals, which are prone to noise and errors due to occlusions in crowds. We show that group prediction accuracy affects navigation performance only marginally in crowded environments. Based on this observation, we propose the visible edge-based group representation. We additionally demonstrate via simulation experiments that our navigation framework, integrated with the simplified group representation, performs comparatively in terms of safety and socialness in dense crowds, while achieving faster computation speed. Finally, we deploy our navigation framework on a real robot to explore the benefits of practically deploying group-based representations in the real world.

AI.tldr: 本论文研究了在拥挤行人环境中，基于组的表示对机器人导航的实际效果，并提出了一种基于可见边缘的新组表示方法。实验和实际部署表明，该方法性能良好且计算速度更快。
AI.motivation: 现有机器人在高密度人群中导航面临安全性和社会适应性挑战。已有组表示方法受限场景或依赖外部检测容易出错，需有更实用的组表示方式。
AI.method: 作者提出了一种可见边缘基础的组表示方法（visible edge-based group representation），并在模拟和实际机器人上集成测试，考察其对导航性能、安全性、社会性和计算速度的影响。
AI.result: 实验表明，在人群密集环境下，组预测准确性对导航表现影响有限。新方法在安全性和社会性表现与复杂方法相当，但计算速度更快。
AI.conclusion: 简化组表示方法有助于在实际复杂人群中部署，能够有效提升机器人导航的实用性和计算效率。

title: EchoChain: A Full-Duplex Benchmark for State-Update Reasoning Under Interruptions
summary: Real-time voice assistants must revise task state when users interrupt mid-response, but existing spoken-dialog benchmarks largely evaluate turn-based interaction and miss this failure mode. We introduce EchoChain, a controlled benchmark for evaluating full-duplex state-update reasoning under mid-speech interruptions. EchoChain identifies three recurring failure patterns in post-interruption continuations: contextual inertia, interruption amnesia, and objective displacement. The benchmark generates scenario-driven conversations and injects interruptions at a standardized point relative to assistant speech onset, enabling controlled cross-model comparison. In a paired half-duplex control, total failures drop by 40.2% relative to interrupted runs, indicating that many errors are driven by state-update reasoning under interruption rather than task difficulty alone. Across evaluated real-time voice models, no system exceeds a 50% pass rate, showing substantial room for improvement in mid-generation state revision. EchoChain provides a reproducible benchmark for diagnosing state-update reasoning failures in full-duplex voice interaction.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了EchoChain基准，用于评估语音助手在用户中途打断时对任务状态进行及时更新的能力，揭示了当前系统在此场景下存在严重不足。
AI.motivation: 目前的语音对话基准主要测试轮流交互，未覆盖用户中途打断助手回复时的系统表现。现实中，全双工交互和中断情形很常见，探究系统在这种场景下“状态更新”能力对于提升智能助手实用性至关重要。
AI.method: 作者设计了EchoChain基准，能自动生成具体场景对话并在助手说话的标准时间点注入中断，便于模型间公平对比。基准归纳并衡量了三类常见失败模式：情境惯性（未适时更新语境）、中断失忆（忽略中断内容）、目标错位（错误理解用户目标）。
AI.result: 控制实验下，半双工（无中断）出错率相比带中断情形减少了40.2%，说明大部分错误源于中断下状态更新推理而非任务本身难度。所有主流实时语音助手模型在此基准下通过率均未超过50%，性能亟待提升。
AI.conclusion: EchoChain为真实全双工对话下智能语音助手的状态更新推理能力提供了可复现的基准，有助于发现和推动解决中断场景下的推理缺陷。

title: HQA-VLAttack: Towards High Quality Adversarial Attack on Vision-Language Pre-Trained Models
summary: Black-box adversarial attack on vision-language pre-trained models is a practical and challenging task, as text and image perturbations need to be considered simultaneously, and only the predicted results are accessible. Research on this problem is in its infancy, and only a handful of methods are available. Nevertheless, existing methods either rely on a complex iterative cross-search strategy, which inevitably consumes numerous queries, or only consider reducing the similarity of positive image-text pairs but ignore that of negative ones, which will also be implicitly diminished, thus inevitably affecting the attack performance. To alleviate the above issues, we propose a simple yet effective framework to generate high-quality adversarial examples on vision-language pre-trained models, named HQA-VLAttack, which consists of text and image attack stages. For text perturbation generation, it leverages the counter-fitting word vector to generate the substitute word set, thus guaranteeing the semantic consistency between the substitute word and the original word. For image perturbation generation, it first initializes the image adversarial example via the layer-importance guided strategy, and then utilizes contrastive learning to optimize the image adversarial perturbation, which ensures that the similarity of positive image-text pairs is decreased while that of negative image-text pairs is increased. In this way, the optimized adversarial images and texts are more likely to retrieve negative examples, thereby enhancing the attack success rate. Experimental results on three benchmark datasets demonstrate that HQA-VLAttack significantly outperforms strong baselines in terms of attack success rate.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对视觉-语言预训练模型（VL模型）的高效黑盒对抗攻击方法HQA-VLAttack，显著提升了攻击成功率。
AI.motivation: 当前黑盒对抗攻击VL模型既需扰动文本也需扰动图片，且只能访问最终预测结果。现有方法效率低下且对负样本的相似度关注不够，导致攻击性能受限。为解决这一问题，需要更高效且全面的攻击框架。
AI.method: HQA-VLAttack分为文本与图片攻击两阶段：文本扰动通过counter-fitting词向量生成替换词集，保证语义一致性；图片扰动先以层重要性引导初始化，然后通过对比学习优化，对正样本对降低相似度、负样本对提高相似度，从而提升攻击能力。
AI.result: 在三个基准数据集上实验，HQA-VLAttack在攻击成功率上显著优于主流对比方法，证明了方法的有效性和优越性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法在保证攻击效率与质量的前提下解决了现有黑盒攻击的短板，对VL模型安全性研究有重要意义。

title: LongBench: Evaluating Robotic Manipulation Policies on Real-World Long-Horizon Tasks
summary: Robotic manipulation policies often degrade over extended horizons, yet existing benchmarks provide limited insight into why such failures occur. Most prior benchmarks are either simulation-based or report aggregate success, making it difficult to disentangle the distinct sources of temporal difficulty in real-world execution. We introduce LongBench, a real-world benchmark for evaluating long-horizon manipulation. LongBench consists of over 1,000 real-world episodes, covering two complementary regimes: Context-Independent (fully observable) and Context-Dependent (ambiguity-driven). By organizing tasks into capability- and ambiguity-specific subsets, LongBench enables mechanism-aware evaluation of execution robustness, temporal consistency, and context-dependent reasoning. Evaluating six state-of-the-art policies reveals that long-horizon performance is not governed by a single factor. We observe that performance in fully observable settings is more strongly associated with execution robustness, while contextual difficulty varies across tasks and is not consistently improved by memory-based methods. We hope that LongBench serves as a useful benchmark for studying long-horizon manipulation and for developing policies with stronger robustness across both execution and contextual challenges.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了LongBench，这是一个真实世界场景下用于评估机器人长时操作的基准，包含了1000余个实验，细致区分了任务难点，并对主流策略进行了综合测试与分析。
AI.motivation: 传统操控基准（主要基于模拟或只统计总体成功率）难以揭示机器人长时操作失败背后的具体原因。因此，亟需一种能够在真实环境下细分任务难点并诊断策略表现的新型基准。
AI.method: 提出LongBench，包括1000多个现实场景下的长时操作实验，分为Context-Independent（全可观测）和Context-Dependent（上下文依赖/含糊驱动）两类，并将任务按能力和歧义分组，以便针对性评估算法的时序一致性、执行鲁棒性和情境推理能力。
AI.result: 采用LongBench评测六种主流操控策略发现，长时操作表现受多因素共同影响。执行鲁棒性对全可观测任务影响较大，而含糊性难题对不同任务影响各异，且单靠记忆增强算法难以全面提升表现。
AI.conclusion: LongBench能有效揭示机器人长时操作的具体难点，有助于推动更加鲁棒的操控策略研发，并为学界提供了衡量和分析相关方法的新标准。

title: Revisiting a Pain in the Neck: A Semantic Reasoning Benchmark for Language Models
summary: We present SemanticQA, an evaluation suite designed to assess language models (LMs) in semantic phrase processing tasks. The benchmark consolidates existing multiword expression (MwE) resources and reorganizes them into a unified testbed. It covers both general lexical phenomena, such as lexical collocations, and three fine-grained categories: idiomatic expressions, noun compounds, and verbal constructions. Through SemanticQA, we assess LMs of diverse architectures and scales in extraction, classification, and interpretation tasks, as well as sequential task compositions. We reveal substantial performance variation, particularly on tasks requiring semantic reasoning, highlighting differences in reasoning efficacy and semantic understanding of LMs, providing insights for pushing LMs with stronger comprehension on non-trivial semantic phrases. The evaluation harness and data of SemanticQA are available at https://github.com/jacklanda/SemanticQA.

AI.tldr: SemanticQA是一个评估语言模型语义短语处理能力的全新测试套件，涵盖多种语言现象和任务，对模型的语义推理能力进行细致测试。
AI.motivation: 当前语言模型在处理多词短语（如习语、复合名词等）时表现不均，缺乏系统的基准来评估其语义短语处理和推理能力。需要统一的评测方案以加深理解模型在复杂语义下的表现差异。
AI.method: 作者整合并重组了已有的多词表达资源，开发了SemanticQA评测套件，覆盖词语搭配、习语表达、名词复合体和动词结构等细分范畴，设计了抽取、分类、解释等任务，并对不同架构和规模的语言模型进行系统测试。
AI.result: 评测结果显示，模型在需要进行语义推理的任务上表现差异显著，尤其在复杂语义短语处理及推理有效性上存在明显短板，展现了不同模型的理解能力差异。
AI.conclusion: SemanticQA为语言模型在非平凡语义短语理解上的评测提供了新的工具与数据，推动了对更高语义理解能力模型的研发。

title: Semantically Stable Image Composition Analysisvia Saliency and Gradient Vector Flow Fusion
summary: The reliable computational assessment of photographic composition requires features that are discriminative of spatial layout yet robust to semantic content. This paper proposes a low-level representation grounded in the assumption that composition can be understood as the flow of visual attention across geometric structure. We introduce VFCNet, which fuses saliency and edge information into a gradient vector flow (GVF) field. The model computes dual-stream GVF representations, integrates them via attention, and extracts multi-scale flow features with a DINOv3 backbone. VFCNet achieves state-of-the-art performance on the PICD benchmark (CDA-1: 0.683, CDA-2: 0.629), improving by 33.1\% and 36.1\% over the previous best method. We also show that a simple classifier on self-supervised DINOv3 features substantially outperforms more sophisticated, composition-specialized models. Code is available at https://github.com/ADadras/VFCNet

AI.tldr: 提出了一种新的视觉特征融合网络VFCNet，通过融合显著性和边缘信息，用于更准确地评估照片的构图质量，并在基准测试集上取得显著领先。
AI.motivation: 现有的自动化图像构图评估方法受限于仅关注语义内容，缺乏对空间布局的充分建模，难以可靠地区分构图质量，因此需要一种既关注空间布局、又能抵抗语义干扰的方法。
AI.method: 设计了VFCNet，将显著性和边缘特征融合至梯度矢量流（GVF）场，采用双流GVF表示，通过注意力机制融合，并利用DINOv3骨干网络提取多尺度流动特征。此外对比发现，自监督DINOv3特征配合简单分类器也能优于复杂专业模型。
AI.result: VFCNet在PICD基准上取得了CDA-1: 0.683，CDA-2: 0.629的业界最佳成绩，分别超过此前最优方法33.1%和36.1%。同时简单DINOv3特征分类器也显著超越其他定制模型。
AI.conclusion: 通过基于视觉注意流的底层特征表达和融合，可以有效捕获和区分图像的构图特性，提升自动化构图评价的准确性。

title: Refinement of Accelerated Demonstrations via Incremental Iterative Reference Learning Control for Fast Contact-Rich Imitation Learning
summary: Fast execution of contact-rich manipulation is critical for practical deployment, yet providing fast demonstrations for imitation learning (IL) remains challenging: humans cannot demonstrate at high speed, and naively accelerating demonstrations alters contact dynamics and induces large tracking errors. We present a method to autonomously refine time-accelerated demonstrations by repurposing Iterative Reference Learning Control (IRLC) to iteratively update the reference trajectory from observed tracking errors. However, applying IRLC directly at high speed tends to produce larger early-iteration errors and less stable transients. To address this issue, we propose Incremental Iterative Reference Learning Control (I2RLC), which gradually increases the speed while updating the reference, yielding high-fidelity trajectories. We validate on real-robot whiteboard erasing and peg-in-hole tasks using a teleoperation setup with a compliance-controlled follower and a 3D-printed haptic leader. Both IRLC and I2RLC achieve up to 10x faster demonstrations with reduced tracking error; moreover, I2RLC improves spatial similarity to the original trajectories by 22.5% on average over IRLC across three tasks and multiple speeds (3x-10x). We then use the refined trajectories to train IL policies; the resulting policies execute faster than the demonstrations and achieve 100% success rates in the peg-in-hole task at both seen and unseen positions, with I2RLC-trained policies exhibiting lower contact forces than those trained on IRLC-refined demonstrations. These results indicate that gradual speed scheduling coupled with reference adaptation provides a practical path to fast, contact-rich IL.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于加速操作任务演示的方法，并通过IRLC和改进的I2RLC算法显著提升了包含接触的操作任务在高速下的模仿学习效果，最终实现了快速且准确的机器人操作。
AI.motivation: 高效执行包含复杂接触的机器人操作任务对于实际应用非常关键，但人类难以以高速度演示，而且直接加速演示会带来接触动力学变化，导致跟踪误差变大。如何获得高速、准确的演示，是模仿学习部署的主要瓶颈。
AI.method: 作者提出将IRLC（迭代参考学习控制）方法应用于对高速演示轨迹的自适应修正，并进一步提出I2RLC（增量迭代参考学习控制），通过逐步加速演示并同步修正参考轨迹，获得更高精度与更稳定的轨迹修正效果。方法在真实机器人擦白板和插销（peg-in-hole）任务上进行了验证。
AI.result: 实验结果显示，IRLC和I2RLC可以实现高达10倍速度的演示，并显著降低轨迹跟踪误差。I2RLC相对IRLC可平均提升22.5%空间轨迹相似性。基于修正后的演示轨迹训练的模仿学习策略，在已见与未见位置的插销任务中均实现了100%成功率，且I2RLC策略的接触力更小。
AI.conclusion: 分阶段速度调度结合参考轨迹自适应修正，为实现高速、复杂接触的机器人模仿学习提供了可行方法，能在保证精度与成功率的同时显著提升执行速度和安全性。

title: Spotlights and Blindspots: Evaluation Machine-Generated Text Detection
summary: With the rise of generative language models, machine-generated text detection has become a critical challenge. A wide variety of models is available, but inconsistent datasets, evaluation metrics, and assessment strategies obscure comparisons of model effectiveness. To address this, we evaluate 15 different detection models from six distinct systems, as well as seven trained models, across seven English-language textual test sets and three creative human-written datasets. We provide an empirical analysis of model performance, the influence of training and evaluation data, and the impact of key metrics. We find that no single system excels in all areas and nearly all are effective for certain tasks, and the representation of model performance is critically linked to dataset and metric choices. We find high variance in model ranks based on datasets and metrics, and overall poor performance on novel human-written texts in high-risk domains. Across datasets and metrics, we find that methodological choices that are often assumed or overlooked are essential for clearly and accurately reflecting model performance.

AI.tldr: 本文系统地评估了多种机器生成文本检测模型在不同数据集和指标下的表现，发现模型评价结果高度依赖于数据集和评价标准，且针对高风险场景的新型真人文本检测表现较差。
AI.motivation: 生成式语言模型兴起后，如何准确检测机器生成文本成为重要挑战；目前现有检测模型众多，但缺乏统一数据集和评价体系导致模型效果难以对比。
AI.method: 作者评估了6大系统下15个检测模型及7个自训练模型，涵盖7个英文文本测试集及3个人类创意文本集，分析了模型表现、训练与评估数据对结果的影响，以及评价指标带来的变化。
AI.result: 没有单一系统能在所有场景中表现最佳，绝大多数模型在特定任务上有效；模型排名受数据集与评价指标影响较大，面对高风险领域新型真人文本时全部模型表现较差。
AI.conclusion: 方法选择（如使用的数据集和指标）对结果影响巨大，经常被假设或忽视，但对真实、清晰反映模型性能至关重要，呼吁未来评测要更加标准化和细致。

title: Topology-Aware Layer Pruning for Large Vision-Language Models
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated strong capabilities in natural language understanding and reasoning, while recent extensions that incorporate visual inputs enable them to process multimodal information. Despite these advances, Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) incur substantial computational and memory costs, hindering deployment in resource-constrained scenarios. Existing layer pruning methods typically rely on local similarity metrics or static proxy signals, failing to capture the global and dynamic evolution of representations across model depth, which often leads to the removal of transition-critical layers. To address this limitation, we propose a topology-aware layer pruning framework for LVLMs. Specifically, we represent layer wise hidden states as point clouds and models their evolution using \textit{simplicial complexes}. By leveraging \textit{zigzag persistent homology}, we quantify inter-layer topological consistency and enable adaptive pruning that preserves critical representational transitions. Extensive experiments on diverse multimodal benchmarks demonstrate that the proposed framework consistently outperforms existing pruning methods across a wide range of sparsity ratios. Our code is available at https://github.com/zpc456/TopoVLM.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种拓扑感知的层级剪枝方法，用于提升大型视觉-语言模型（LVLMs）的推理效率，同时减少计算和内存消耗。在保持模型关键特征转换能力的同时，实现了更优的压缩效果。
AI.motivation: 现有的大型视觉-语言模型虽然具有强大的多模态理解能力，但计算和内存消耗极高，难以在资源受限的场景下部署。传统剪枝方法无法充分捕捉跨层的全局动态演化，常常误剪关键过渡层。因此，亟需一种既能压缩模型又能保留关键信息的有效剪枝框架。
AI.method: 作者提出将每层的隐藏状态表示为点云，并用单纯复（simplicial complexes）建模，结合Zigzag持久同调（persistent homology）评估跨层拓扑一致性。基于这些全局拓扑信号，适应性地剪枝非关键层，从而保留模型关键的表征转变。
AI.result: 在多个多模态数据集和不同稀疏度下的大量实验表明，该方法在模型压缩率和性能保留方面均优于主流剪枝方法。
AI.conclusion: 基于拓扑的层级剪枝方法能够有效提升LVLMs在资源受限场景下的部署可行性，并有望在未来更多模型压缩与高效推理场合应用。

title: Greedy Kalman-Swarm: Improving State Estimation in Robot Swarms in Harsh Environments
summary: State estimation is a fundamental requirement in robotics, where the accurate determination of a robot's state is essential for stable operation despite inherent process disturbances and sensor noise. Traditionally, this is achieved through Kalman filtering, providing a statistically optimal estimate by balancing predictive models with noisy measurements. In the context of robotic swarms, the challenge shifts from individual accuracy to collective coordination, where the integration of global dynamics can significantly enhance the precision of the entire group. Existing estimation techniques rely on centralized processing or heavy communication protocols to reach a global consensus, which are frequently impractical in real-world deployments. Here we show that a localized, "greedy" approach to distributed state estimation (termed "Greedy Kalman-Swarm") allows individual robots to leverage relative inter-robot sensing for improved accuracy without requiring full data availability or global communication. Simulations in communication-constrained environments show robots can effectively integrate all currently available neighbor data at each iteration to refine their internal states, yet remain robust and functional even when data is missing. This results in a performance profile that strikes a balance between the low overhead of independent estimation and the high accuracy of centralized systems, specifically under harsh or dynamic environmental conditions. Our results demonstrate that global state awareness can be emergent rather than enforced, providing a scalable framework for maintaining swarm cohesion in unpredictable terrains. We anticipate that this decentralized methodology will serve as a foundation for more resilient autonomous systems, particularly in search-and-rescue or space exploration missions where reliable, high-bandwidth communication cannot be guaranteed.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种“贪心Kalman-群体”算法，实现机器人群体无需全局通信即可提升状态估计精度，兼顾准确性与系统鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 传统机器人状态估计依赖Kalman滤波，但在多机器人（群体）场景中，集中式估计或高通信成本方案难以在实际约束下应用。作者希望解决群体中各机器人的状态感知，在通信受限或环境恶劣时依然保持高精度和鲁棒性的估计方法。
AI.method: 提出了一种分布式“贪心”Kalman滤波方法，各机器人利用邻居间的相对观测，无需全局数据同步，但每轮都整合当前可获得的邻居信息迭代自身状态估计。此方法在多轮通信回合中动态适应缺失数据，实现本地协同。
AI.result: 仿真表明，在通信受限环境下，该方法可显著提升状态估计精度，与集中式一致性方法相比，消息开销更低，且在数据丢失时系统依然具有较强的鲁棒性与功能性。
AI.conclusion: 全局状态认知可通过局部相互作用自发涌现，而无需强制集中式协调。该方法为群体机器人在动态、不可预知环境中的协同感知和鲁棒控制提供了新的可扩展框架，尤其适用于搜救、空间探索等难以保证高带宽通信的场景。

title: Aligning Backchannel and Dialogue Context Representations via Contrastive LLM Fine-Tuning
summary: Backchannels (e.g., `yeah', `mhm', and `right') are short, non-interruptive feedback signals whose lexical form and prosody jointly convey pragmatic meaning. While prior computational research has largely focused on predicting backchannel timing, the relationship between lexico-prosodic form and meaning remains underexplored. We propose a two-stage framework: first, fine-tuning large language models on dialogue transcripts to derive rich contextual representations; and second, learning a joint embedding space for dialogue contexts and backchannel realizations. We evaluate alignment with human perception via triadic similarity judgments (prosodic and cross-lexical) and a context-backchannel suitability task. Our results demonstrate that the learned projections substantially improve context-backchannel retrieval compared to previous methods. In addition, they reveal that backchannel form is highly sensitive to extended conversational context and that the learned embeddings align more closely with human judgments than raw WavLM features.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一种两阶段框架，通过大语言模型细致解析对话上下文，并学习对话情境与回声信号（如“yeah”、“mhm”）之间的联合嵌入空间，以更精确地匹配回声信号和上下文。结果显示该方法在符合人类感知以及对话-回声信号匹配任务上优于已有方法。
AI.motivation: 回声信号在对话中的作用重要，但现有计算研究主要关注其时机预测，忽略了其词汇与语调的形式如何与语用意义相关联。本文动机在于深入探究回声信号的词汇-韵律特征及其所传递的意义之间的关系。
AI.method: 采用两阶段方法：第一步是微调大语言模型以获得丰富的对话上下文表示；第二步是学习对话上下文与回声信号实现之间的联合嵌入空间。通过人工三元组相似性判断和上下文-回声信号适配性任务进行评估。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该方法的投影极大提升了上下文-回声信号的检索能力，并且揭示了回声信号的形式对扩展对话上下文非常敏感。学习到的嵌入向量比原始的声学特征与人类判断更为吻合。
AI.conclusion: 本文证明，基于上下文的联合语义嵌入方法能更有效捕捉回声信号的语用意义，优于当前以声学特征为主的方案，并与人的主观感知高度一致。

title: Motif-Video 2B: Technical Report
summary: Training strong video generation models usually requires massive datasets, large parameter counts, and substantial compute. In this work, we ask whether strong text-to-video quality is possible at a much smaller budget: fewer than 10M clips and less than 100,000 H200 GPU hours. Our core claim is that part of the answer lies in how model capacity is organized, not only in how much of it is used. In video generation, prompt alignment, temporal consistency, and fine-detail recovery can interfere with one another when they are handled through the same pathway. Motif-Video 2B addresses this by separating these roles architecturally, rather than relying on scale alone. The model combines two key ideas. First, Shared Cross-Attention strengthens text control when video token sequences become long. Second, a three-part backbone separates early fusion, joint representation learning, and detail refinement. To make this design effective under a limited compute budget, we pair it with an efficient training recipe based on dynamic token routing and early-phase feature alignment to a frozen pretrained video encoder. Our analysis shows that later blocks develop clearer cross-frame attention structure than standard single-stream baselines. On VBench, Motif-Video~2B reaches 83.76\%, surpassing Wan2.1 14B while using 7$\times$ fewer parameters and substantially less training data. These results suggest that careful architectural specialization, combined with an efficiency-oriented training recipe, can narrow or exceed the quality gap typically associated with much larger video models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于文本生成视频的新模型Motif-Video 2B，在资源有限（少于10M视频片段和10万H200 GPU小时）的情况下，通过架构创新实现了与甚至优于大模型相媲美的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有强力视频生成模型对数据量、参数规模和算力要求极高，作者希望探究在资源大幅缩减时，是否还能实现高质量的文本到视频生成。
AI.method: 该方法核心在于模型架构优化：利用共享交叉注意力加强长视频序列下的文本控制；采用三阶段骨干结构（早期融合、联合表征学习、细节精修）将不同视频生成任务角色分开处理。同时，提出高效训练策略，包括动态token路由和特征对齐，以适配小规模训练。
AI.result: Motif-Video 2B在VBench评测中取得83.76%的分数，超越了参数量和训练数据都远大于它的Wan2.1 14B，并且训练资源消耗显著减少（参数量少7倍，训练数据更少）。
AI.conclusion: 只要注重模型架构的专门化设计，并结合高效的训练方案，即使在大幅降低资源投入的情况下，也能获得甚至超越大模型的文本到视频生成质量。

title: Chain Of Interaction Benchmark (COIN): When Reasoning meets Embodied Interaction
summary: Generalist embodied agents must perform interactive, causally-dependent reasoning, continually interacting with the environment, acquiring information, and updating plans to solve long-horizon tasks before they could be adopted in real-life scenarios. For instance, retrieving an apple from a cabinet may require opening multiple doors and drawers before the apple becomes visible and reachable, demanding sequential interaction under partial observability. However, existing benchmarks fail to systematically evaluate this essential capability. We introduce COIN, a benchmark designed to assess interactive reasoning in realistic robotic manipulation through three key contributions. First, we construct COIN-50: 50 interactive tasks in daily scenarios, and create COIN-Primitive required by causally-dependent tasks, and COIN-Composition with mid-term complexity for skill learning and generalization evaluation. Second, we develop a low-cost mobile AR teleoperation system and collect the COIN-Primitive Dataset with 50 demonstrations per primitive task (1,000 in total). Third, we develop systematic evaluation metrics about execution stability and generalization robustness to evaluate CodeAsPolicy, VLA, and language-conditioned H-VLA approaches. Our comprehensive evaluation reveals critical limitations in current methods: models struggle with interactive reasoning tasks due to significant gaps between visual understanding and motor execution. We provide fine-grained analysis of these limitations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了COIN基准，用于系统性评测机器人在复杂交互推理任务中的能力，并揭示现有方法在视觉理解与动作执行之间存在显著瓶颈。
AI.motivation: 当前通用机器人需要在真实环境中处理因果依赖的连续交互任务，但现有基准无法系统评估机器人的交互推理和计划更新能力，限制了其实际应用。
AI.method: 作者构建了COIN-50（50个家庭日常交互任务）、COIN-Primitive（针对基本动作）和COIN-Composition（中等复杂技能）三个子集，并配套收集了大规模演示数据。同时，开发了低成本移动AR远程操控系统和一套系统化评测指标，用于衡量执行稳定性和泛化能力。以此评估当前主流的机器人方法。
AI.result: 实验结果显示，当前的主流模型在需要交互推理的任务上表现不佳，主要原因是视觉感知结果与运动决策之间存在较大鸿沟。此外，通过细粒度分析，进一步揭示了方法在稳健性和泛化性上的局限。
AI.conclusion: COIN基准为机器人的因果交互推理能力提供了标准化评测工具，有助于推动领域对复杂任务泛化和稳定性挑战的进一步研究。

title: AdaExplore: Failure-Driven Adaptation and Diversity-Preserving Search for Efficient Kernel Generation
comment: Preliminary work. The implementation is available at https://github.com/StigLidu/AdaExplore
summary: Recent large language model (LLM) agents have shown promise in using execution feedback for test-time adaptation. However, robust self-improvement remains far from solved: most approaches still treat each problem instance independently, without accumulating reusable knowledge. This limitation is particularly pronounced in domain-specific languages such as Triton, which are underrepresented in LLM pretraining data. Their strict constraints and non-linear optimization landscape further make naive generation and local refinement unreliable. We propose AdaExplore, an agent framework that enables self-improvement via accumulated execution feedback for performance-critical kernel code generation through two complementary stages: failure-driven adaptation and diversity-preserving search, jointly improving correctness and optimization performance without additional fine-tuning or external knowledge. In the adaptation stage, the agent synthesizes tasks and converts recurring failures into a reusable memory of validity rules, helping subsequent generations remain within the feasible set. In the search stage, the agent organizes candidate kernels as a tree and alternates between small local refinements and larger structural regeneration, allowing it to explore the optimization landscape beyond local optima. Experiments on kernel runtime optimization benchmarks validate these gains: AdaExplore achieves 3.12x and 1.72x speedups on KernelBench Level-2 and Level-3, respectively, within 100 steps, and continues to improve with additional computation.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为AdaExplore的代理框架，可在无需额外微调或外部知识的情况下，通过积累执行反馈实现针对性能关键核代码生成的自我改进，在Triton等特定领域语言中显著提升效率和性能。
AI.motivation: 现有大模型在执行反馈的测试时自适应上表现出色，但大多数方法未能积累可重复利用的知识，尤其在Triton等预训练语料较少、约束严格的领域型语言场景下效果有限，随机和局部优化都不可靠。
AI.method: AdaExplore包含两个互补阶段：（1）失败驱动的自适应阶段，将重复失败转化为可复用的有效性规则并存储，帮助后续生成避免无效方案；（2）多样性保持搜索阶段，将候选代码组织为树结构，在局部微调和结构重构之间切换，能跳出局部最优，进行更全面的优化探索。
AI.result: 在核代码运行时优化基准测试中，AdaExplore在100步内分别在KernelBench Level-2和Level-3上获得了3.12倍和1.72倍的加速，且算力投入增加时仍能持续提升性能。
AI.conclusion: AdaExplore能利用执行反馈不断自我改进，提升生成核代码的正确性与性能，为特定领域语言代码优化提供了新的方法。

title: From Handwriting to Structured Data: Benchmarking AI Digitisation of Handwritten Forms
summary: Manual digitisation of structured handwritten documents is slow and costly. We benchmark 17 leading frontier multi-modal large language models and open-source models against a very challenging real-world medical form that mixes dates; structured, printed text; hand-written responses and significant variability challenges. None of the smaller or older models perform well but the latest Google and OpenAI models reach accuracies around $85\%$ with weighted F1 scores $\simeq 90\%$ across the discrete or predefined fields despite the very challenging nature of the responses. Clear task specific strengths emerge: GPT 5.4 excels in noisy date extraction as well as reliability with the lowest hallucination rate ($6\%$). Claude Sonnet 4.6 had the best average performance across formatted fields (dates and numerical values), while Gemini 3.1 delivered the best overall performance, with the lowest free text error rates (WER = $0.50$ and CER = $0.31$) and the strongest results across discrete classification metrics. We further show that prompt optimisation dramatically improves macro precision, recall and F1 by over $60\%$, but has little impact on weighted metrics (only $\sim2-5\%$ improvement). These results provide evidence that the rapid improvements of multimodal large language models offer a compelling pathway toward fully automated digitisation of complex handwritten workflows that is particularly relevant in low- and middle-income countries.

AI.tldr: 本文对17种多模态大模型在处理现实世界中复杂医疗表单（包含日期、印刷文本、手写内容及高度变异）上的能力进行了基准测试。结果显示，最新的Google和OpenAI模型表现优异，准确率最高达85%，F1分数约90%。
AI.motivation: 手动数字化结构化手写文档效率低且成本高，尤其是在医疗等场景。随着多模态大模型能力提升，作者希望验证这些模型在实际复杂手写表单自动化数字化中的有效性。
AI.method: 对17种最前沿的多模态大语言模型（含开源模型）进行基准测试，选择了极具挑战性的真实医疗表单，分析处理不同类型信息（日期、结构化印刷文本、手写内容）的能力，对比模型在不同任务下的表现，并考察prompt优化的效果。
AI.result: 最新Google Gemini 3.1与OpenAI（GPT 5.4）等模型表现突出，准确率达85%，加权F1分数约90%。GPT 5.4在噪声日期提取和低幻觉率方面最优，Claude Sonnet 4.6在格式化字段上表现最佳，Gemini 3.1在整体及自由文本错误最低（WER=0.5, CER=0.31）。prompt优化能显著提升宏观指标但对加权分数提升有限。
AI.conclusion: 多模态大模型在复杂手写文档自动化数字化领域进步迅速，具备在结构化医疗场景中大幅提升数字化效率的潜力，尤其对中低收入国家更有实际意义。

title: Time-Division Multiplexing Actuation in Tendon-Driven Arms: Lightweight Design and Fault Tolerance
summary: Robotic manipulators for aerospace applications require a delicate balance between lightweight construction and fault-tolerant operation to satisfy strict weight limitations and ensure reliability in remote, hazardous environments. This paper presents Time-Division Multiplexing Actuation (TDMA), a practical approach for tendon-driven robots that significantly reduces actuator count while preserving high torque output and intrinsic fault tolerance. The key hardware employs a vertically-stacked rotational selection structure that integrates self-rotating TDM motors for rapid configuration, electromagnetic clutches enabling sub-0.1 second engagement, a worm gear reducer for enhanced load capacity and self-locking capability, and a dual-encoder system for precise, long-term positioning. Leveraging TDMA, the proposed MuxArm achieves a self-weight of 2.17 kg, supports an actuator driving capacity of 10 kg, and maintains end-effector accuracy up to 1% of its length, even under partial servo failure. Additionally, an actuation space trajectory planning algorithm is developed, enabling fault-tolerant control and reducing tendon load by up to 50% compared to conventional methods. Comprehensive experiments demonstrate MuxArm's robust performance in diverse settings, including free-space, cluttered, and confined environments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种时分复用驱动（TDMA）方法，可显著减少航天用腱驱动机器人执行器数量，同时保持高扭矩和故障容错。新结构MuxArm重量仅2.17公斤，驱动能力达10公斤，位置精度好，即使部分执行器失效也能正常工作。创新的驱动空间轨迹规划大幅减小腱负载。实验验证其高可靠性和多场景适用性。
AI.motivation: 航天领域的机械臂需兼顾轻量化和高可靠性（容错），以应对远程和危险环境中对重量和稳定性的严苛要求。传统驱动方案通常难以同时满足这些需求。
AI.method: 采用时分复用驱动（TDMA）技术，通过垂直堆叠的旋转选择结构和自转TDM电机实现多路切换，结合电磁离合和蜗轮蜗杆减速系统增强载重与自锁能力，双编码器系统提升定位精度；配合新型轨迹规划算法优化腱负载和容错能力。
AI.result: 在硬件上，MuxArm自重2.17kg，可驱动10kg负载，末端精度维持在长度的1%以内；支持部分执行器失效仍可稳定作业。轨迹规划算法将腱负载最多降至传统方法的一半。多场景实验显示系统具高鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: TDMA驱动方法有效平衡了轻量化与容错性，显著提升了腱驱动机器人在航天领域的实用性和可靠性，具有重要的应用和推广价值。

title: Migrant Voices, Local News: Insights on Bridging Community Needs with Media Content
comment: David Alonso del Barrio, Paula Dolores Rescala, Victor Bros, Daniel Gatica-Perez| ACM 2026. This is the author's version of the work. It is posted here for your personal use. Not for redistribution. The definitive Version of Record will be published in IMX'26 ACM International Conference on Interactive Media Experiences https://doi.org/10.1145/3788851.3805011
summary: Research shows news consumption differs across demographics, yet little is known about non-mainstream audiences, especially in relation to local media. Our study addresses this gap by examining how French-speaking migrants in a mid-size European city engage with local news, and whether their needs are reflected in coverage. Eight community members participated in focus groups, whose insights guided the selection of natural language processing methods (topic modeling, information retrieval, sentiment analysis, and readability) applied to over 2000 hyper-local news articles. Results showed that while articles frequently covered local events, gaps remained in topics important to participants. Sentiment analysis revealed a generally positive tone, and readability measures indicated an intermediate-advanced French level, raising questions about accessibility for integration. Our work contributes to bridging the gap between local news platforms' content and diverse readers' needs, and could inform local media organizations about opportunities to expand their current news story coverage to appeal to more diverse audiences.

AI.tldr: 本研究探讨法语移民如何消费本地新闻，并分析本地新闻是否满足其需求。通过焦点小组和自然语言处理分析2000余篇本地新闻，结果发现新闻内容与移民需求存在差距，且可读性对于部分新移民来说或有门槛。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要关注主流群体的新闻消费行为，对于非主流群体（如移民）如何与本地新闻互动，尤其关注他们的需求与媒体报道间是否匹配，了解较少。本研究旨在填补该领域的研究空白。
AI.method: 首先邀请八名法语移民参与焦点小组，收集他们对本地新闻需求的观点；继而依据反馈，采用自然语言处理技术（主题建模、信息检索、情感分析、可读性评估）分析2000多篇超本地新闻报道。
AI.result: 研究发现，虽然新闻报道经常涵盖本地事件，但在参与者关心的话题上仍存在空白。情感分析显示新闻整体语调偏积极；可读性分析表明文本达中高级法语水平，可能影响新闻对部分移民群体的可达性和融合。
AI.conclusion: 本研究揭示了本地新闻内容与多元受众（如移民）需求间的差距，建议本地媒体在选题和报道方式上更多考虑不同群体的多样化需求，以提升广泛读者的服务覆盖面。

title: Predicting Blastocyst Formation in IVF: Integrating DINOv2 and Attention-Based LSTM on Time-Lapse Embryo Images
summary: The selection of the optimal embryo for transfer is a critical yet challenging step in in vitro fertilization (IVF), primarily due to its reliance on the manual inspection of extensive time-lapse imaging data. A key obstacle in this process is predicting blastocyst formation from the limited number of daily images available. Many clinics also lack complete time-lapse systems, so full videos are often unavailable. In this study, we aimed to predict which embryos will develop into blastocysts using limited daily images from time-lapse recordings. We propose a novel hybrid model that combines DINOv2, a transformer-based vision model, with an enhanced long short-term memory (LSTM) network featuring a multi-head attention layer. DINOv2 extracts meaningful features from embryo images, and the LSTM model then uses these features to analyze embryo development over time and generate final predictions. We tested our model on a real dataset of 704 embryo videos. The model achieved 96.4% accuracy, surpassing existing methods. It also performs well with missing frames, making it valuable for many IVF laboratories with limited imaging systems. Our approach can assist embryologists in selecting better embryos more efficiently and with greater confidence.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新颖的深度学习混合模型，通过有限的胚胎每日影像预测其是否发育为囊胚，显著提升了准确率，并适用于帧数不足的场景。
AI.motivation: 在体外受精（IVF）过程中，筛选优质胚胎用于移植主要依赖胚胎时序影像的人工检查，但大多数实验室并不具备完整的时序视频系统，仅有部分每日图像，这使得准确预测囊胚形成极具挑战性。
AI.method: 提出将基于Transformer的DINOv2视觉模型与改进的长短时记忆网络（LSTM）结合，并加入多头注意力层。通过DINOv2提取每天胚胎图像的特征，再交由LSTM分析时间序列特征，并给出是否形成囊胚的预测。
AI.result: 新模型在包含704段胚胎视频的真实数据集上达到了96.4%的准确率，优于现有方法，并且在帧缺失情况下依然表现优良。
AI.conclusion: 本模型能有效辅助IVF实验室在影像数据有限情况下进行更高效、可靠的胚胎筛选，提升临床操作信心和效率。

title: Leveraging VR Robot Games to Facilitate Data Collection for Embodied Intelligence Tasks
summary: Collecting embodied interaction data at scale remains costly and difficult due to the limited accessibility of conventional interfaces. We present a gamified data collection framework based on Unity that combines procedural scene generation, VR-based humanoid robot control, automatic task evaluation, and trajectory logging. A trash pick-and-place task prototype is developed to validate the full workflow.Experimental results indicate that the collected demonstrations exhibit broad coverage of the state-action space, and that increasing task difficulty leads to higher motion intensity as well as more extensive exploration of the arm's workspace. The proposed framework demonstrates that game-oriented virtual environments can serve as an effective and extensible solution for embodied data collection.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个基于Unity的游戏化数据采集框架，有效实现了虚拟环境下的体感交互数据收集。
AI.motivation: 现有体感交互数据采集方式成本高且难度大，主要原因是传统接口的有限可及性。解决该问题有助于推动机器人与人类的交互研究。
AI.method: 作者基于Unity平台，结合程序化场景生成、VR控制的人形机器人、自动化任务评估和轨迹记录，构建了数据采集框架，并以垃圾捡拾放置任务为原型验证流程。
AI.result: 实验结果显示，框架采集的示范数据涵盖了较广的状态-动作空间。随着任务难度提高，机器人动作强度和手臂空间探索程度也相应增加。
AI.conclusion: 该框架说明，面向游戏的虚拟环境是一种有效且可扩展的体感数据采集解决方案。

title: IYKYK (But AI Doesn't): Automated Content Moderation Does Not Capture Communities' Heterogeneous Attitudes Towards Reclaimed Language
summary: Reclaimed slur usage is a common and meaningful practice online for many marginalized communities. It serves as a source of solidarity, identity, and shared experience. However, contemporary automated and AI-based moderation tools for online content largely fail to distinguish between reclaimed and hateful uses of slurs, resulting in the suppression of marginalized voices. In this work, we use quantitative and qualitative methods to examine the attitudes of social media users in LGBTQIA+, Black, and women communities around reclaimed slurs targeting our focus groups including the f-word, n-word, and b-word. With social media users from these communities, we collect and analyze an annotated online slur usage corpus. The corpus includes annotators' perceptions of whether an online text containing a slur should be flagged as hate speech, as well as contextual features of the slur usage. Across all communities and annotation questions, we observe low inter-annotator agreement, indicating substantial disagreement among in-group annotators. This is compounded by the fact that, absent clear contextual signals of identity and intent, even in-group members may disagree on how to interpret reclaimed slur usage online. Semi-structured interviews with annotators suggest that differences in lived experience and personal history contribute to this variation as well. We find poor alignment between annotator judgments and automated hate speech assessments produced by Perspective API. We further observe that certain features of a text such as whether the slur usage was derogatory and if the slur was targeted at oneself are more associated with whether annotators report the text as hate speech. Together, these findings highlight the inherent subjectivity and contextual nature of how marginalized communities interpret slurs online.

AI.tldr: 本论文分析了在网络环境下被边缘群体重新使用侮辱性词汇（reclaimed slur）时，人工与AI内容审核存在主观性与误判的问题。
AI.motivation: 当前的自动化及AI内容审核工具难以区分侮辱性词汇的自我认同用法与仇恨用法，导致边缘群体的声音被压制，因此需要深入理解群体内部对这些词汇用法的实际看法与背景。
AI.method: 采用定量和定性相结合的方法，聚焦LGBTQIA+、黑人和女性等群体，对网络中f-word、n-word和b-word等词汇的用法建立带注释的语料库。通过社区用户对这些词语用法的人工标注，并记录是否应被认定为仇恨言论及其使用语境。同时，进行半结构化访谈，分析个人经历与主观判断间的关系。
AI.result: 群体内部标注者对侮辱词用法的判断一致性较低，说明即使在圈内成员之间，对语境和意图的理解也有较大差异。自动化仇恨言论检测工具（如Perspective API）的判断与真实社区成员判断高度不一致。是否带有贬义及是否针对自我，影响更大。
AI.conclusion: 被边缘群体重新使用的侮辱性词汇具有高度主观性和语境依赖性，AI工具难以准确判断其含义，现有内容审核流程可能误伤本应被表达的群体之声，未来需要更细致、更能理解语境的判断机制。

title: Medical thinking with multiple images
comment: Equal contribution for the first two authors. To appear in the proceedings of the Fourteenth International Conference on Learning Representations (ICLR 2026). Code is in https://github.com/benluwang/MedThinkVQA. Dataset is in https://huggingface.co/datasets/bio-nlp-umass/MedThinkVQA
summary: Large language models perform well on many medical QA benchmarks, but real clinical reasoning often requires integrating evidence across multiple images rather than interpreting a single view. We introduce MedThinkVQA, an expert-annotated benchmark for thinking with multiple images, where models must interpret each image, combine cross-view evidence, and answer diagnostic questions with intermediate supervision and step-level evaluation. The dataset contains 8,067 cases, including 720 test cases, with an average of 6.62 images per case, substantially denser than prior work, whose expert-level benchmarks use at most 1.43 images per case. On the test set, the best closed-source models, Claude-4.6-Opus, Gemini-3-Pro, and GPT-5.2-xhigh, reach only 57.2%, 55.3%, and 54.9% accuracy, while GPT-5-mini and GPT-5-nano reach 39.7% and 30.8%. Strong open-source models lag behind, led by Qwen3.5-397B-A17B at 52.2% and Qwen3.5-27B at 50.6%. Further analysis identifies grounded multi-image reasoning as the main bottleneck: models often fail to extract, align, and compose evidence across views before higher-level inference can help. Providing expert single-image cues and cross-image summaries improves performance, whereas replacing them with self-generated intermediates reduces accuracy. Step-level analysis shows that over 70% of errors arise from image reading and cross-view integration. Scaling results further show that additional inference-time computation helps only when visual grounding is already reliable; when early evidence extraction is weak, longer reasoning yields limited or unstable gains and can amplify misread cues. These results suggest that the key challenge is not reasoning length alone, but reliable mechanisms for grounding, aligning, and composing distributed evidence across real-world multimodal clinical inputs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出并发布了MedThinkVQA，这是一个针对多图像推理的医学视觉问答基准数据集，挑战现有大模型在多视图诊断场景下的推理能力。实验证明无论是主流闭源还是开源大模型，在该数据集上的表现都远低于单图像基准，主要瓶颈在于跨图像证据的提取、对齐整合能力的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有医学视觉问答基准多为单图像问题，而真实临床推理往往需要综合多张医学影像的信息。为此，评估和推动大模型在多图像诊断推理上的能力成为必需。
AI.method: 作者构建了包含8067例、平均每例6.62张图片的专家标注数据集MedThinkVQA，每个问题要求模型先读图、整合多图证据并作出诊断，并在中间步骤和最终答案分别进行评价。同时，作者评测了多种主流闭源及开源大模型在该任务上的表现，对错误来源进行了细致分析并进行了不同推理机制的对照实验。
AI.result: 在测试集上，主流闭源模型准确率不到60%，开源模型最优约52%，比分辨单图像任务低很多。模型主要卡在跨图像细致证据的提取与整合，约70%错误源自于此。补充专家给出的单图提示和总结有助于模型提升表现，而依赖模型自己生成中间步骤时性能大幅下降。增加推理步数有益，但仅在基础证据提取靠谱的前提下。
AI.conclusion: 当前主流大模型在多图像医学诊断推理场景下仍有巨大提升空间。未来需着重提升模型在多视图证据提取、对齐和组合的能力，以实现真正有用的多模态医学推理，而不仅仅是延长推理链条。

title: Multi-stage Planning for Multi-target Surveillance using Aircrafts Equipped with Synthetic Aperture Radars Aware of Target Visibility
comment: Published in IEEE/RAS International Conference on Automation Science and Engineering 2025
summary: Generating trajectories for synthetic aperture radar (SAR)-equipped aircraft poses significant challenges due to terrain constraints, and the need for straight-flight segments to ensure high-quality imaging. Related works usually focus on trajectory optimization for predefined straight-flight segments that do not adapt to the target visibility, which depends on the 3D terrain and aircraft orientation. In addition, this assumption does not scale well for the multi-target problem, where multiple straight-flight segments that maximize target visibility must be defined for real-time operations. For this purpose, this paper presents a multi-stage planning system. First, the waypoint sequencing to visit all the targets is estimated. Second, straight-flight segments maximizing target visibility according to the 3D terrain are predicted using a novel neural network trained with deep reinforcement learning. Finally, the segments are connected to create a trajectory via optimization that imposes 3D Dubins curves. Evaluations demonstrate the robustness of the system for SAR missions since it ensures high-quality multi-target SAR image acquisition aware of 3D terrain and target visibility, and real-time performance.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种多阶段规划系统，用于复杂地形下SAR飞机轨迹生成，实现对多个目标的高质量成像，并兼顾实时性。
AI.motivation: SAR飞机需要沿笔直航段进行成像，但复杂地形及多目标任务下，这种航段设计很难同时满足视点需求和路径优化。以往方法无法动态适应地形和多目标场景，实际应用受限。
AI.method: 方法包括三步：一、用排列算法确定访问所有目标的顺序；二、采用深度强化学习训练的神经网络，预测在三维地形下最大化目标可见性的笔直航段；三、通过三维Dubins曲线优化，将各航段连接，形成整体轨迹。
AI.result: 该系统能够在复杂地形与多目标情境下，兼顾SAR成像质量和实时运算，验证了对目标多、地形复杂任务的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 多阶段规划方法有效提升了SAR飞机多目标任务中的成像质量与路径规划效率，适合在实际多目标实时SAR应用中部署。

title: Defragmenting Language Models: An Interpretability-based Approach for Vocabulary Expansion
summary: All languages are equal; when it comes to tokenization, some are more equal than others. Tokens are the hidden currency that dictate the cost and latency of access to contemporary LLMs. However, many languages written in non-Latin scripts observe a poor exchange rate: LLMs take several multiples of tokens to encode the same information in many languages as they do for English. Our analysis reveals that this issue, known as 'token over-fragmentation', persists in modern open-weight LLMs. The standard remedy is vocabulary expansion that adds target language items missing from the model's vocabulary. In this work, we comprehensively study and advance interpretability-based vocabulary expansion, a new research direction. We focus on two core decisions in the vocabulary expansion process: What items should we add? and How should we initialize their corresponding input and output embeddings? First, we question the conventional use of frequency-based methods to choose candidate vocabulary items to add (a decision long treated as settled), and show that interpretability-based methods offer a superior performance-token efficiency trade-off. Next, we strengthen the case for interpretability-based embedding initialization by showing large gains (~20 pts) over baseline initialization methods for several languages written in non-Latin scripts. We identify the phenomenon of "subword detokenization" where models progressively merge fragmented subword tokens into larger subwords across layers. Grounded in our analysis of this phenomenon, we propose FragMend to further push the efficiency ceiling of interpretability-based expansion. We validate the effectiveness of FragMend through comparison against strong baselines and we present extensive analysis of its design choices.

AI.tldr: 本文分析了当前LLMs对非拉丁文字语言的token过度碎片化问题，并提出了一种基于可解释性的词汇扩展方法fragMend，有效提高了多语言token效率和模型性能。
AI.motivation: 当今LLM的token机制对非拉丁文字语言不公平，编码同样内容时，这些语言需要更多的token，带来更高的成本和延迟。
AI.method: 系统研究和改进了基于可解释性的词汇扩展方法，重点考察了词汇扩展过程中的两大问题：1. 应添加哪些词项？2. 如何初始化其嵌入？论文挑战了基于频次选择候选词项的方法，提出基于可解释性的选择和初始化策略。基于对“子词去分词”现象的分析，提出了FragMend算法，优化词汇扩展效率。
AI.result: 基于可解释性的候选词选择与嵌入初始化策略在多种非拉丁文字语言中显著优于传统方法，性能提升显著（约20分）；FragMend方法进一步提高了token效率，在强基线下依然表现突出，并通过详实实验分析了其设计选择。
AI.conclusion: 基于可解释性的词汇扩展方法，尤其是FragMend，有效缓解了LLM在非拉丁文字语言token碎片化问题，显著提升了模型性能和token效率，是多语言LLM模型改进的重要方向。

title: Medial Axis Aware Learning of Signed Distance Functions
summary: We propose a novel variational method to compute a highly accurate global signed distance function (SDF) to a given point cloud. To this end, the jump set of the gradient of the SDF, which coincides with the medial axis of the surface, is explicitly taken into account through a higher-order variational formulation that enforces linear growth along the gradient direction away from this discontinuity set. The eikonal equation and the zero-level set of the SDF are enforced as constraints. To make this variational problem computationally tractable, a phase field approximation of Ambrosio-Tortorelli type is employed. The associated phase field function implicitly describes the medial axis. The method is implemented for surfaces represented by unoriented point clouds using neural network approximations of both the SDF and the phase field. Experiments demonstrate the method's accuracy both in the near field and globally. Quantitative and qualitative comparisons with other approaches show the advantages of the proposed method.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种创新的变分方法，用于从点云数据准确地计算全局有符号距离函数（SDF），通过引入更高阶的变分公式和神经网络近似，显著提升了在近场和全局的精度。
AI.motivation: 已有方法在从点云重建全局SDF时，常因无法有效处理中轴变化和复杂曲面而受限。论文关注如何提高全局和局部SDF计算的精度，尤其针对未定向点云。
AI.method: 作者将SDF梯度的不连续集（即曲面中轴）引入到变分模型，通过高阶变分公式鼓励SDF梯度在远离不连续集位置线性增长。采用了Ambrosio-Tortorelli类型的相场近似，使变分问题可计算。同时，SDF和相场函数均用神经网络逼近；并将eikonal方程和SDF零水平集作为约束处理。
AI.result: 实验证明，该方法在点云表面附近和全局都能获得更高精度的SDF重建。与其他方法对比，在定量和定性上都表现出明显优势。
AI.conclusion: 提出的高阶变分神经网络方法，能够高效准确地从无定向点云重建SDF与表面中轴，为点云处理与相关应用提供了新颖有效的方案。

title: NaviFormer: A Deep Reinforcement Learning Transformer-like Model to Holistically Solve the Navigation Problem
comment: Published in IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS) 2025
summary: Path planning is usually solved by addressing either the (high-level) route planning problem (waypoint sequencing to achieve the final goal) or the (low-level) path planning problem (trajectory prediction between two waypoints avoiding collisions). However, real-world problems usually require simultaneous solutions to the route and path planning subproblems with a holistic and efficient approach. In this paper, we introduce NaviFormer, a deep reinforcement learning model based on a Transformer architecture that solves the global navigation problem by predicting both high-level routes and low-level trajectories. To evaluate NaviFormer, several experiments have been conducted, including comparisons with other algorithms. Results show competitive accuracy from NaviFormer since it can understand the constraints and difficulties of each subproblem and act consequently to improve performance. Moreover, its superior computation speed proves its suitability for real-time missions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Transformer结构的深度强化学习模型NaviFormer，能够同时预测高层路由与低层路径，实现高效的全球导航。
AI.motivation: 传统路径规划大多只关注高层路线规划或底层路径规划之一，现实问题则要求二者协同解决，因此需要一种整体性、有效的方法。
AI.method: 提出NaviFormer模型，基于Transformer架构，使用深度强化学习技术，同时进行高层路线和低层路径的预测。通过与其他算法进行对比实验评估模型性能。
AI.result: NaviFormer在准确性方面表现出色，能够理解和应对各子问题的约束和难点，提升整体性能。此外，在计算速度上具有优势，适合实时任务应用。
AI.conclusion: NaviFormer能高效且准确地解决全局导航问题，可用于需要实时反应的实际应用，展示了深度强化学习与Transformer结合的潜力。

authors: A. B. M. Alim Al Islam
title: CBRS: Cognitive Blood Request System with Bilingual Dataset and Dual-Layer Filtering for Multi-Platform Social Streams
comment: Accepted to Findings of the ACL 2026
summary: Urgent blood donation seeking posts and messages on social media often go unnoticed due to the overwhelming volume of daily communications. Traditional app-based systems, reliant on manual input, struggle to reach users in low-resource settings, delaying critical responses. To address this, we introduce the Cognitive Blood Request System (CBRS), a multi-platform framework that efficiently filters and parses blood donation requests from social media streams using a cost-efficient dual-layered architecture. To do so, we curate a novel dataset of 11K parsed blood donation request messages in Bengali, English, and transliterated Bengali, capturing the linguistic diversity of real social media communications. The inclusion of adversarial negatives further enhances the robustness of our model. CBRS achieves an impressive 99% accuracy and precision in filtering, surpassing benchmark methods. In the parsing task, our LoRA finetuned Llama-3.2-3B model achieves 92% zero-shot accuracy, surpassing the base model by 41.54% and exceeding the few-shot performance of GPT-4o-mini, Gemini-2.0-Flash, and other LLMs, while resulting in a 35X reduction in input token usage. This work lays a robust foundation for scalable, inclusive information extraction in time-sensitive, object-focused tasks. Our code, dataset, and trained models are publicly available at [https://github.com/aaniksahaa/CBRS](https://github.com/aaniksahaa/CBRS).

AI.tldr: 本文提出了CBRS系统，能够高效从社交媒体中过滤和解析紧急献血请求，准确率达99%，大幅超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现实中，社交媒体上的紧急献血求助信息常常因信息量大被忽视，传统系统在低资源环境下难以及时覆盖用户，影响应急反应效率。
AI.method: 作者设计了CBRS多平台架构，包括高效的双层过滤和解析流程，并自建多语种（孟加拉语、英语及转写孟加拉语）数据集。采用LoRA微调的Llama-3.2-3B模型提升解析能力，并引入对抗性负例增强鲁棒性。
AI.result: CBRS过滤准确率和精度均达99%，优于现有基准方法；在解析任务中，微调模型零样本准确率达92%，比基础模型提升41.54%，大幅优于GPT-4o-mini等LLM，并大幅减少输入Token消耗。
AI.conclusion: CBRS为时效性强、对象明确的信息抽取需求提供了高效、可扩展的方案。相关资源和模型已开源，有助于信息紧急流转等公益场景的规模化应用。

title: SynthPID: P&ID digitization from Topology-Preserving Synthetic Data
summary: Automating the digitization of Piping and Instrumentation Diagrams (P&IDs) into structured process graphs would unlock significant value in plant operations, yet progress is bottlenecked by a fundamental data problem: engineering drawings are proprietary, and the entire community shares a single public benchmark of just 12 annotated images. Prior attempts at synthetic augmentation have fallen short because template-based generators scatter symbols at random, producing graphs that bear little resemblance to real process plants and, accordingly, yield only approximately 33% edge detection accuracy under synth-only training. We argue the failure is structural rather than visual and address it by introducing SynthPID, a corpus of 665 synthetic P&IDs whose pipe topology is seeded directly from real drawings. Paired with a patch-based Relationformer adapted for high-resolution diagrams, a model trained on SynthPID alone achieves 63.8 +/- 3.1% edge mAP on PID2Graph OPEN100 without seeing a single real P&ID during training, closing within 8 pp of the real-data oracle. These gains hold up under a controlled comparison against the template-based regime, confirming that generation quality drives performance rather than model choice. A scaling study reveals that gains flatten beyond roughly 400 synthetic images, pointing to seed diversity as the binding constraint.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了SynthPID合成数据集，显著提升了对P&ID图结构化的自动化处理能力。
AI.motivation: 目前P&ID工程图数字化自动化受限于极少的公开标注数据（仅12张），并且以往基于模板的合成增强方法生成的图结构与真实工厂差距大，导致实际效果欠佳。解决合成数据结构不真实的问题成为关键。
AI.method: 提出SynthPID数据集，从真实P&ID图抽取管道拓扑，合成665张更接近真实工厂结构的P&ID图。同时，结合高分辨率图适配的Relationformer模型进行关系提取。
AI.result: 仅用SynthPID（665张），在PID2Graph OPEN100任务上，模型达到63.8±3.1%的边mAP（未用任何真实图训练），接近只用真实图训练的模型，并大幅优于传统基于模板的合成数据。
AI.conclusion: 提升合成数据的结构真实性，可显著提升自动化P&ID图结构化性能，并发现提升种子多样性是进一步提升性能的关键。

title: Neural Network-Based Adaptive Event-Triggered Control for Dual-Arm Unmanned Aerial Manipulator Systems
summary: This paper investigates the control problem of dual-arm unmanned aerial manipulator systems (DAUAMs). Strong coupling between the dual-arm and the multirotor platform, together with unmodeled dynamics and external disturbances, poses significant challenges to stable and accurate operation. An adaptive event-triggered control scheme with neural network-based approximation is proposed to address these issues while explicitly considering communication constraints. First, a dynamic model of the DAUAM system is derived, and a command-filter-based backstepping framework with error compensation is constructed. Then, a neural network is employed to approximate external frictions, and an event-triggered mechanism is designed to reduce the transmission frequency of control updates, thereby alleviating communication and energy burdens. Lyapunov-based analysis shows that all closed-loop signals remain bounded and that the tracking error converges to a neighborhood of the desired trajectory within a fixed time. Finally, experiments on a self-built DAUAM platform demonstrate that the proposed approach achieves accurate trajectory tracking.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一种适用于双臂无人飞行操作系统（DAUAMs）的自适应事件触发控制方案，利用神经网络逼近技术，在保障通信约束的同时，实现系统的稳定与高精度控制。
AI.motivation: 双臂无人机操作系统由于双臂与多旋翼平台之间的强耦合性、未建模动力学及外部干扰，使得稳定精确的控制极具挑战，且实际应用中还面临着通信和能量受限的问题。
AI.method: 首先建立DAUAM动力学模型，随后在指令滤波与误差补偿的基础上，提出基于回步法的控制框架；利用神经网络对外部摩擦进行逼近，并设计事件触发机制以降低控制更新的通信频率，从而减小通信与能耗负担；理论上运用Lyapunov方法分析闭环系统稳定性。
AI.result: 理论证明所有闭环信号有界，跟踪误差在有限时间内收敛到期望轨迹附近。实验验证所提方法在自研DAUAM平台上能实现高精度轨迹跟踪。
AI.conclusion: 所提自适应事件触发神经网络控制方法能兼顾精确性与通信资源约束，为复杂无人机操作系统的实际应用提供了新的思路和技术保障。

title: No-Worse Context-Aware Decoding: Preventing Neutral Regression in Context-Conditioned Generation
summary: Large language models (LLMs) can answer questions and summarize documents when conditioned on external contexts (e.g., retrieved evidence), yet context use remains unreliable: models may overwrite an already-correct output (neutral regression) even when the context is non-informative. We formalize neutral regression as a do-no-harm requirement and quantify it by measuring accuracy drops on baseline-correct items under answer-consistent contexts. We propose No-Worse Context-Aware Decoding (NWCAD), a decode-time adapter built on a two-stream setup with a two-stage gate: it backs off to no-context decoding when the context is non-informative, and otherwise uses context-conditioned decoding with a CAD-style fallback under uncertainty. We evaluate NWCAD on benchmarks that separate do-no-harm reliability from context utilization (accuracy gains on genuinely helpful contexts). NWCAD prevents neutral regression on baseline-correct items while preserving strong context-driven accuracy on helpful contexts.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了No-Worse Context-Aware Decoding (NWCAD)方法，旨在解决大语言模型在外部上下文条件下输出的不可靠性，防止在无帮助上下文下输出变差。该方法有效减少了中性回归现象，同时在有用上下文下保持高准确率。
AI.motivation: 现有大语言模型在回答问题和摘要时，需要外部上下文，有时在不可用/无信息的上下文下，模型的输出反而比没有上下文时更差（中性回归现象），降低了模型可用性和可靠性，因此需要寻找方法提升模型在有无用或无用上下文下的稳健性。
AI.method: 作者提出NWCAD方法，在解码阶段引入两流设置和两阶段门控机制：当上下文无信息时，回退至无上下文模式；当上下文有信息时，采用上下文条件解码，并在不确定时采用CAD式回退机制。
AI.result: 在区分“无损可靠性”和“上下文利用”能力的基准测试上，NWCAD有效阻止了在原本正确输出（baseline-correct）时出现中性回归，且在有帮助的上下文条件下保持了较高准确率。
AI.conclusion: NWCAD能防止基线正确输出在无信息上下文下变差，提高了大语言模型在外部上下文作用下的输出可靠性，同时不影响有用上下文下的性能。

title: BARD: Bridging AutoRegressive and Diffusion Vision-Language Models Via Highly Efficient Progressive Block Merging and Stage-Wise Distillation
summary: Autoregressive vision-language models (VLMs) deliver strong multimodal capability, but their token-by-token decoding imposes a fundamental inference bottleneck. Diffusion VLMs offer a more parallel decoding paradigm, yet directly converting a pretrained autoregressive VLM into a large-block diffusion VLM (dVLM) often leads to substantial quality degradation. In this work, we present BARD, a simple and effective bridging framework that converts a pretrained autoregressive VLM into a same-architecture, decoding-efficient dVLM. Our approach combines progressive supervised block merging, which gradually enlarges the decoding block size, with stage-wise intra-dVLM distillation from a fixed small-block diffusion anchor to recover performance lost at larger blocks. We further incorporate a mixed noise scheduler to improve robustness and token revision during denoising, and memory-friendly training to enable efficient training on long multimodal sequences. A key empirical finding is that direct autoregressive-to-diffusion distillation is poorly aligned and can even hurt performance, whereas distillation within the diffusion regime is consistently effective. Experimental results show that, with $\leq 4.4M$ data, BARD-VL transfers strong multimodal capability from Qwen3-VL to a large-block dVLM. Remarkably, BARD-VL establishes a new SOTA among comparable-scale open dVLMs on our evaluation suite at both 4B and 8B scales. At the same time, BARD-VL achieves up to \textbf{3$\times$} decoding throughput speedup compared to the source model.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了BARD框架，有效地将预训练的自回归视觉-语言模型（VLM）转换为具有相同结构、解码高效的扩散VLM（dVLM），大幅提升了解码速度并保持较高质量。
AI.motivation: 自回归VLM虽然具备很强的多模态能力，但其逐token解码方式导致推理速度受限；扩散VLM并行解码更快，但直接将自回归模型转为大块扩散模型会导致性能显著下降。因此需要新方法在保证质量的同时提升扩散VLM的解码效率。
AI.method: BARD使用渐进式监督块合并逐步扩大解码块，同时通过阶段性扩散模型内蒸馏，从固定的小块扩散锚点恢复大块性能。此外引入混合噪声调度和记忆友好训练，提升了去噪鲁棒性及长序列训练效率。
AI.result: BARD-VL可将Qwen3-VL的多模态能力迁移至大块dVLM，实验表明在4B和8B规模下BARD-VL在开源dVLM模型中取得最佳水平（SOTA），仅用≤4.4M标注数据，同时比原模型解码速度提升最高3倍。
AI.conclusion: BARD实现了高质量与高效率的结合，为大规模高效的多模态模型推断提供了新范式；证明了扩散模型内的分阶段蒸馏策略有效优于直接自回归到扩散迁移。

title: Web-Gewu: A Browser-Based Interactive Playground for Robot Reinforcement Learning
summary: With the rapid development of embodied intelligence, robotics education faces a dual challenge: high computational barriers and cumbersome environment configuration. Existing centralized cloud simulation solutions incur substantial GPU and bandwidth costs that preclude large-scale deployment, while pure local computing is severely constrained by learners' hardware limitations. To address these issues, we propose \href{http://47.76.242.88:8080/receiver/index.html}{Web-Gewu}, an interactive robotics education platform built on a WebRTC cloud-edge-client collaborative architecture. The system offloads all physics simulation and reinforcement learning (RL) training to the edge node, while the cloud server acts exclusively as a lightweight signaling relay, enabling extremely low-cost browser-based peer-to-peer (P2P) real-time streaming. Learners can interact with multi-form robots at low end-to-end latency directly in a web browser without any local installation, and simultaneously observe real-time visualization of multi-dimensional monitoring data, including reinforcement learning reward curves. Combined with a predefined robust command communication protocol, Web-Gewu provides a highly scalable, out-of-the-box, and barrier-free teaching infrastructure for embodied intelligence, significantly lowering the barrier to entry for cutting-edge robotics technology.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Web-Gewu平台，通过创新的云-边-端协作架构，实现低门槛、低成本的机器人教育仿真和实时交互。
AI.motivation: 机器人教育随着智能体发展，对计算资源和环境部署要求高，现有方案要么云端资源消耗大且昂贵，要么本地硬件受限，影响大规模应用。
AI.method: Web-Gewu采用WebRTC实现云-边-端协作，所有物理仿真和强化学习训练在边缘节点完成，云端仅做信令中继，学生无需任何本地安装，通过浏览器P2P实时操作和观察机器人及数据。
AI.result: 平台显著降低了计算和配置门槛，实现了低延迟交互和多维实时数据可视化，支持大规模无障碍使用。
AI.conclusion: Web-Gewu极大提升了机器人体感智能教育的可达性和可扩展性，为前沿技术普及打下基础。

title: The impact of postediting on AI generative translation in Yemeni context: Translating literary prose by ChatGPT
summary: This study examines the role of artificial intelligence in translation, focusing on ChatGPT, specifically ChatGPT-4, and the extent to which human postediting is required in literary translation. A mixed-method approach was adopted, involving 30 professional translators who evaluated and postedited AI-generated translations of selected Arabic and English literary texts. The results show that although AI improves translation speed and accessibility, it remains limited in handling cultural, stylistic, and figurative aspects of language. Participants generally confirmed the necessity of human postediting, particularly in novels and drama. The findings indicate that emerging human-machine collaboration model rather than replacement of human translators. The study concludes that AI should be used as a supportive tool, while human expertise remains essential for ensuring translation quality and cultural appropriateness.

AI.tldr: 本研究探讨了ChatGPT-4在文学翻译中的应用，并评估其对人类后编辑的需求。通过30位专业译者对AI生成的阿拉伯语和英语文学文本翻译的评价与后编辑，结果显示AI能提升效率，但在人文与文学特色处理上仍需人工介入，强调人机协作模式。
AI.motivation: 近年来AI技术进步，尤其是大型语言模型在翻译领域的广泛应用。研究动因在于考察AI对提升文学翻译效率与质量的实际作用，并判断是否能够减少或替代人类译者的参与。
AI.method: 采用混合研究方法。邀请30名专业翻译人员，对AI（ChatGPT-4）翻译的阿拉伯语和英语文学文本进行评估与后编辑，收集定量与定性反馈。
AI.result: AI翻译提升了文本处理速度和可及性，但对文化、风格和修辞性语言的处理能力有限。参与者普遍认为文学领域（如小说、戏剧）仍需大量人工后编辑。
AI.conclusion: 研究认为AI应作为辅助工具而非替代者存在，在保证翻译质量和文化适应性方面，人类专业能力仍不可或缺。

title: Penny Wise, Pixel Foolish: Bypassing Price Constraints in Multimodal Agents via Visual Adversarial Perturbations
summary: The rapid proliferation of Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) has enabled mobile agents to execute high-stakes financial transactions, but their adversarial robustness remains underexplored. We identify Visual Dominance Hallucination (VDH), where imperceptible visual cues can override textual price evidence in screenshot-based, price-constrained settings and lead agents to irrational decisions. We propose PriceBlind, a stealthy white-box adversarial attack framework for controlled screenshot-based evaluation. PriceBlind exploits the modality gap in CLIP-based encoders via a Semantic-Decoupling Loss that aligns the image embedding with low-cost, value-associated anchors while preserving pixel-level fidelity. On E-ShopBench, PriceBlind achieves around 80% ASR in white-box evaluation; under a simplified single-turn coordinate-selection protocol, Ensemble-DI-FGSM transfers with roughly 35-41% ASR across GPT-4o, Gemini-1.5-Pro, and Claude-3.5-Sonnet. We also show that robust encoders and Verify-then-Act defenses reduce ASR substantially, though with some clean-accuracy trade-off.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对CLIP类多模态大模型的隐蔽视觉攻击方法，能使模型在价格约束的截图分析任务中做出错误决策，并通过实验证明当前模型易受该类攻击影响。
AI.motivation: 随着多模态大模型在金融等高风险场景广泛应用，其安全性和鲁棒性问题逐渐突出，尤其是在价格相关的任务中，视觉信息对文本证据的干扰尚未被充分研究。
AI.method: 作者提出了PriceBlind框架，这是一种针对截图场景的白盒视觉对抗攻击方法，通过语义解耦损失使图片特征向低价锚点对齐，同时保证像素级几乎不可见，从而利用CLIP编码器的模态间隙误导模型。
AI.result: 在E-ShopBench基准上，PriceBlind白盒攻击成功率约80%；在简化单轮点击协议下，Ensemble-DI-FGSM方法对GPT-4o、Gemini-1.5-Pro和Claude-3.5-Sonnet的迁移攻击成功率约为35-41%。
AI.conclusion: 当前CLIP类多模态大模型在金融场景下存在严重安全隐患，所提出的防御机制（如鲁棒编码器、Verify-then-Act流程）虽可显著降低攻击成功率，但会带来一定准确度损失。

title: Shepherding UAV Swarm with Action Prediction Based on Movement Constraints
summary: In this study, we propose a new sheepdog-inspired control method for a swarm of small unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs), which predicts the swarm behavior while explicitly accounting for the motion constraints of real robots. Sheepdog-inspired guidance control refers to a framework in which a small number of navigator agents (sheepdog agents) indirectly drive a large number of autonomous agents (a flock of sheep agents) so as to steer the group toward a target position. In conventional studies on sheepdog-inspired guidance, both types of agents have typically been modeled as point masses, and the guidance law for the navigator agents has been designed using simple interaction vectors based on the instantaneous relative positions between the agents. However, when implementing such methods on real robots such as drones, it is necessary to consider each agent's motion constraints, including upper bounds on velocity and acceleration. Moreover, we argue that guidance can be made more efficient by predicting the future behavior of the autonomous swarm that is observable to the navigator agents. To this end, we propose a three-dimensional guidance control law based on behavior prediction of autonomous agents under motion constraints, inspired by the Dynamic Window Approach (DWA). At each control cycle, the navigator agent generates a set of feasible motion candidates that satisfy its motion constraints, and predicts the short-horizon swarm evolution using an internal model of the autonomous agents maintained within the navigator agent. The motion candidates are then evaluated according to criteria such as the progress velocity toward the target, the positioning strategy with respect to the swarm, and safety margins, and the optimal motion is selected to achieve safe and efficient guidance. Numerical simulation results demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed guidance control law.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于“牧羊犬”启发的多无人机群控制新方法，兼顾了实际机器人运动约束，通过预测群体行为实现高效引导。
AI.motivation: 以往“牧羊犬”方法大多理想化地将所有无人机和导航员看作质点，忽略了实际硬件的速度、加速度等运动约束，导致方法难以直接应用于真实无人机系统。作者希望解决实际无人机群的高效、可行、安全引导问题。
AI.method: 提出在三维空间的“牧羊犬”式导航员控制方法。每次控制周期，导航员基于动态窗口法（DWA）生成一系列可行动作，预测考虑运动约束下羊群（无人机群体）的短期行为演化，然后基于靠近目标速度、与群体的相对位置和安全边界等对动作评估，最终选择最优动作。
AI.result: 仿真结果表明，所提出的控制方法能安全有效地引导无人机群体向目标运动，显示出较以往点质模型的显著优势。
AI.conclusion: 本文的方法考虑了无人机真实物理约束，并通过行为预测提升了导航效率，适合实际无人机群体的引导控制。

title: Detecting Alarming Student Verbal Responses using Text and Audio Classifier
comment: 9 Pages. Paper to be Presented at the National Council on Measurement in Education Conference on April 10, 2026
summary: This paper addresses a critical safety gap in the use Automated Verbal Response Scoring (AVRS). We present a novel hybrid framework for troubled student detection that combines a text classifier, trained to detect responses based on their content, and an audio classifier, trained to detect responses using prosodic markers. This approach overcomes key limitations of traditional AVRS systems by considering both content and prosody of responses, achieving enhanced performance in identifying potentially concerning responses. This system can expedite the review process by humans, which can be life-saving particularly when timely intervention may be crucial.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种融合文本和音频特征的新型学生异常检测框架，提升了AVRS系统在识别关键回应时的安全性和效率。
AI.motivation: 传统的自动化语音回应评分（AVRS）系统往往只关注文本或语音的单一特征，存在对学生异常行为检测的局限性，容易忽略潜在的安全风险。
AI.method: 将基于内容的文本分类器与基于韵律特征的音频分类器结合，利用多模态信息共同检测学生的异常回应。
AI.result: 该混合方法有效提升了系统对“值得关注”回应的辨识能力，优于以往只用单一模态的AVRS方法。
AI.conclusion: 综合文本内容和语音韵律特征能大幅增强自动检测系统的安全性，有助于加快人工审核速度，提升及时干预可能带来生命安全保障的能力。

title: Operationalizing Fairness in Text-to-Image Models: A Survey of Bias, Fairness Audits and Mitigation Strategies
comment: ICLR 2026 Algorithmic Fairness Across Alignment Procedures and Agentic Systems (AFAA) Workshop, reviews can be found at: https://openreview.net/forum?id=8DOkyBGWwP
summary: Text-to-Image (T2I) generation models have been widely adopted across various industries, yet are criticized for frequently exhibiting societal stereotypes. While a growing body of research has emerged to evaluate and mitigate these biases, the field at present contends with conceptual ambiguity, for example terms like "bias" and "fairness" are not always clearly distinguished and often lack clear operational definitions. This paper provides a comprehensive systematic review of T2I fairness literature, organizing existing work into a taxonomy of bias types and fairness notions. We critically assess the gap between "target fairness" (normative ideals in T2I outputs) and "threshold fairness" (normative standards with actionable decision rules). Furthermore, we survey the landscape of mitigation strategies, ranging from prompt engineering to diffusion process manipulation. We conclude by proposing a new framework for operationalizing fairness that moves beyond descriptive metrics towards rigorous, target-based testing, offering an approach for more accountable generative AI development.

AI.tldr: 本文对文本生成图像（T2I）模型中的公平性和偏见问题进行综述，梳理相关文献并提出了新的公平性操作化框架。
AI.motivation: 尽管T2I模型应用广泛，但容易反映社会刻板印象和偏见。当前关于模型偏见和公平性的研究概念模糊，定义不一，缺乏统一体系。本文旨在理清相关概念，并推动领域发展。
AI.method: 系统梳理、归纳和整理T2I领域有关公平性和偏见的研究文献，建立偏见类型和公平性概念的分类体系，分析“目标公平性”和“阈值公平性”的差异，综述主流的偏见缓解策略（如prompt工程、扩散过程干预）。
AI.result: 提出了现有公平性框架的不足，梳理了群体间的“目标公平性”与具体可执行的“阈值公平性”的落差，总结了各类缓解方法，并构建了新的操作化公平性测试框架。
AI.conclusion: 为T2I模型的公平性研究提供了系统性的参考，提出了超越传统描述性度量、面向具体目标的公平性测试新方法，有助于AI生成模型更负责任地发展。

title: Modeling, Control and Self-sensing of Dielectric Elastomer Soft Actuators: A Review
summary: Dielectric elastomer actuators (DEAs) have garnered extensive attention especially in soft robotic applications over the past few decades owing to the advantages of lightweight, large strain, fast response and high energy density. However, because the DEAs suffer from nonlinear elasticity, inherent viscoelastic creep, hysteresis and vibrational dynamics, the modeling, control and self-sensing of DEAs are challenging, thereby hindering the practical applications of DEAs. In order to address these challenges, numerous studies have been conducted. In this review, various physics-based modeling methods and phenomenological modeling methods for predicting the electromechanical response of DEAs are presented and discussed. Different control methods for DEAs are reviewed, which are classified into open-loop feedforward control, feedback control, feedforward-feedback control and adaptive feedforward control. Physics-based self-sensing methods and data-driven self-sensing methods for reconstructing the DEA displacement without the need for additional sensors are discussed. Finally, the existing problems and new opportunities for the further studies are summarized.

AI.tldr: 本文综述了介电弹性体驱动器（DEA）在建模、控制和自感知领域的最新方法和研究进展。
AI.motivation: DEA因其轻质、大变形、快速响应和高能量密度特性，在软体机器人等应用中备受关注。但由于受非线性弹性、粘弹性蠕变、迟滞及振动动态影响，使其建模、控制和自感知过程复杂，限制了其实际应用。
AI.method: 本文回顾了DEA电机响应的物理建模和现象学建模方法；总结了运行控制方法，按开环前馈、闭环反馈、前馈-反馈和自适应前馈分类；比较了物理建模自感知及数据驱动自感知方法，可无需额外传感器实现状态重构。
AI.result: 系统展示并比较了当前主流的建模、控制和自感知方法，各方法的适用范围、优缺点及实际应用问题。
AI.conclusion: DEA的发展仍存在挑战，如建模精度、控制鲁棒性和自感知可靠性，但也存在新的发展机遇，为后续的深入研究提供了方向。

title: Evaluating Adaptive Personalization of Educational Readings with Simulated Learners
summary: We present a framework for evaluating adaptive personalization of educational reading materials with theory-grounded simulated learners. The system builds a learning-objective and knowledge-component ontology from open textbooks, curates it in a browser-based Ontology Atlas, labels textbook chunks with ontology entities, and generates aligned reading-assessment pairs. Simulated readers learn from passages through a Construction-Integration-inspired memory model with DIME-style reader factors, KREC-style misconception revision, and an open New Dale-Chall readability signal. Answers are produced by score-based option selection over the learner's explicit memory state, while BKT drives adaptation. Across three sampled subject ontologies and matched cohorts of 50 simulated learners per condition, adaptive reading significantly improved outcomes in computer science, yielded smaller positive but inconclusive gains in inorganic chemistry, and was neutral to slightly negative in general biology.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于理论的模拟学习者系统，用于评估教育类阅读材料的自适应个性化效果。研究通过本体构建、文本标注和模拟阅读过程，验证了自适应阅读对不同学科的学习成效影响。
AI.motivation: 个性化教学在提高学习效果上具有潜力，但在教育阅读材料上的自适应方法如何影响不同学科的学习成效仍需系统评估。
AI.method: 1. 从开放教材生成学习目标和知识点本体，并利用浏览器工具进行管理和标注；2. 结合先进的阅读记忆模型（Construction-Integration、DIME、KREC等）以及可读性指标，模拟阅读和评估过程；3. 用贝叶斯知识追踪（BKT）实现自适应机制，并横跨三个学科对比50人模拟学习群体的效果。
AI.result: 自适应阅读在计算机科学学科中显著提升了学习成果；对无机化学有小幅但不确定的积极影响；对生物学则无影响甚至略有负面作用。
AI.conclusion: 自适应个性化阅读对学习成效存在学科差异。在某些领域有显著的提升作用，但不是所有领域都受益，说明个性化策略需结合具体学科特点优化。

title: SmoGVLM: A Small, Graph-enhanced Vision-Language Model
summary: Large vision-language models (VLMs) achieve strong performance on multimodal tasks but often suffer from hallucination and poor grounding in knowledge-intensive reasoning. We propose SmoGVLM, a small, graph-enhanced VLM that integrates structured knowledge with visual and textual modalities, using Graph Neural Networks. We investigate the effects of our method across a range of model sizes, from tiny (1.3B) to large (13B) models. Our results demonstrate that, when trained using our approach, a small model can achieve performance gains upto 16.24%, and surpass its larger counterparts, outperforming larger VLMs and strong fine-tuned baselines. These results highlight the potential of structured knowledge augmentation for efficient, smaller-scale multimodal reasoning systems.

AI.tldr: SmoGVLM是一种将图神经网络引入视觉-语言模型的方法，通过结构化知识强化模型表现，实现小模型性能超越大模型。
