However, these methods discard all collected trajectories after a single gradient update, resulting in poor sample efficiency, particularly wasteful for agentic tasks where multi-turn environment interactions are expensive. While Experience Replay drives sample efficiency in classic RL by allowing agents to reuse past trajectories and prioritize informative ones, directly applying Prioritized Experience Replay (PER) to LLMs fails. The rapid policy evolution of billion-parameter models renders stored priorities stale, causing old high-priority trajectories to dominate sampling long after they have become uninformative. We propose Freshness-Aware PER, which addresses this priority staleness problem by augmenting any PER-based priority with a multiplicative exponential age decay grounded in effective sample size analysis. To the best of our knowledge, Freshness-Aware PER is the first work to successfully apply PER to LLM/VLM reinforcement learning. We evaluate on eight multi-step agentic, reasoning, and math competition tasks with 0.5B, 3B, and 7B models. Freshness-Aware PER significantly outperforms on-policy baselines, achieving +46% on NQ Search, +367% on Sokoban, and +133% on VLM FrozenLake, while standard PER without age decay consistently degrades performance. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/Vision-CAIR/Freshness-Aware-PER.

AI.tldr: 提出了Freshness-Aware Prioritized Experience Replay（PER）方法，通过优先级随时间衰减机制，有效提升了在大规模语言及视觉-语言模型强化学习中的样本利用率，并显著超过现有主流策略。
AI.motivation: 现有主流的on-policy方法（如PPO、GRPO等）在大模型RL训练中样本利用率低，浪费大量交互数据，尤其在多轮高成本任务上影响巨大。而经典RL中的经验回放（PER）在大模型中的直接应用，会因优先级过时而效果不佳。为解决数据效率和优先级失效的问题，作者提出了研究。
AI.method: 方法核心是：对PER优先级引入指数型“新鲜度”衰减，用以防止优先级随策略迭代过快而变得不相关，确保采样偏重于对当前策略仍有价值的轨迹。该方法可无缝集成于任意基于PER的采样框架中。实验覆盖8个多步推理、智能体、多轮环境交互任务，分别在0.5B、3B、7B参数规模大模型上进行。
AI.result: Freshness-Aware PER在各项任务上显著提升模型性能，譬如NQ Search任务提升46%，Sokoban提升367%，VLM FrozenLake提升133%。不含新鲜度衰减的传统PER反而使得性能下降。
AI.conclusion: Freshness-Aware PER首次实现在LLM/VLM RL训练中基于新鲜度的PER机制，大幅提升了大模型强化学习的样本效率和任务表现。该机制也为未来大模型数据利用与高效训练提供了新思路，相关代码已开源。

title: Real-Time Visual Attribution Streaming in Thinking Model
summary: We present an amortized framework for real-time visual attribution streaming in multimodal thinking models. When these models generate code from a screenshot or solve math problems from images, their long reasoning traces should be grounded in visual evidence. However, verifying this reliance is challenging: faithful causal methods require costly repeated backward passes or perturbations, while raw attention maps offer instant access, they lack causal validity. To resolve this, we introduce an amortized approach that learns to estimate the causal effects of semantic regions directly from the rich signals encoded in attention features. Across five diverse benchmarks and four thinking models, our approach achieves faithfulness comparable to exhaustive causal methods while enabling visual attribution streaming, where users observe grounding evidence as the model reasons, not after. Our results demonstrate that real-time, faithful attribution in multimodal thinking models is achievable through lightweight learning, not brute-force computation.

AI.tldr: 作者提出了一种摊销化（amortized）的视觉归因实时流框架，能够在多模态推理模型进行实时推理时，准确且高效地展现视觉依据。该方法在五项基准和四种模型上达到了高忠实度和实时效果。
AI.motivation: 多模态推理模型在实现如截图转代码、图像解题等任务时，推理过程需真实依赖视觉信息。现有因果方法计算量大、实时性差，而基于注意力的轻量方法缺乏因果有效性。因此，需要一种同时兼顾因果有效性和实时效率的视觉归因方法。
AI.method: 提出了一种摊销化学习方法，直接利用注意力特征中的信号学习语义区域的因果效应，无需重复反向传播或大规模扰动，实现将因果归因能力融入快速流式推理流程。
AI.result: 在五个基准任务和四个推理模型上，所提方法在可解释性忠实度上可与主流因果方法媲美，且可实时流式输出归因证据，显著优于仅基于注意力的方法。
AI.conclusion: 多模态推理模型可以通过摊销化学习实现高效、忠实的实时可视化归因，无需大量计算，兼具实时性能与因果有效性。

title: SYMBOLIZER: Symbolic Model-free Task Planning with VLMs
summary: Traditional Task and Motion Planning (TAMP) systems depend on physics models for motion planning and discrete symbolic models for task planning. Although physics model are often available, symbolic models (consisting of symbolic state interpretation and action models) must be meticulously handcrafted or learned from labeled data. This process is both resource-intensive and constrains the solution to the specific domain, limiting scalability and adaptability. On the other hand, Visual Language Models (VLMs) show desirable zero-shot visual understanding (due to their extensive training on heterogeneous data), but still achieve limited planning capabilities. Therefore, integrating VLMs with classical planning for long-horizon reasoning in TAMP problems offers high potential. Recent works in this direction still lack generality and depend on handcrafted, task-specific solutions, e.g. describing all possible objects in advance, or using symbolic action models. We propose a framework that generalizes well to unseen problem instances. The method requires only lifted predicates describing relations among objects and uses VLMs to ground them from images to obtain the symbolic state. Planning is performed with domain-independent heuristic search using goal-count and width-based heuristics, without need for action models. Symbolic search over VLM-grounded state-space outperforms direct VLM-based planning and performs on par with approaches that use a VLM-derived heuristic. This shows that domain-independent search can effectively solve problems across domains with large combinatorial state spaces. We extensively evaluate on extensively evaluate our method and achieve state-of-the-art results on the ProDG and ViPlan benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种泛化能力强的新型任务与运动规划（TAMP）框架，通过结合视觉语言模型（VLM）和领域无关的启发式搜索，实现了无需手工符号动作模型即可高效规划。
AI.motivation: 传统TAMP系统中符号模型构建成本高、适应性差，且现有VLM在规划任务中的表现有限，因此亟需一种既能借助VLM零样本视觉理解能力，又具备较强通用性和扩展性的TAMP方法。
AI.method: 该方法仅需定义提升谓词，利用VLM从图像中获得的状态信息进行符号化表征，然后采用目标计数和基于宽度的启发式进行领域无关的符号搜索，无须手工构建动作模型，提升适应性和可扩展性。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在ProDG和ViPlan基准任务上取得了最新最优结果，VLM-状态驱动的符号搜索在多领域状态空间下优于直接基于VLM的规划，并与基于VLM启发式的先进方法持平。
AI.conclusion: 领域无关的搜索方法结合VLM自动状态符号化，有效提升了TAMP系统在大规模组合空间下的通用性和性能，减少了人工参与，实现了跨领域的问题求解。

title: MeasHalu: Mitigation of Scientific Measurement Hallucinations for Large Language Models with Enhanced Reasoning
summary: The accurate extraction of scientific measurements from literature is a critical yet challenging task in AI4Science, enabling large-scale analysis and integration of quantitative research findings. However, Large Language Models (LLMs) frequently exhibit severe hallucinations, which significantly undermine the reliability of automated scientific document understanding systems. To address this problem, we propose MeasHalu, a novel framework for mitigating scientific measurement hallucinations through enhanced reasoning and targeted optimization. We first present a fine-grained taxonomy of measurement-specific hallucinations, categorizing errors across quantities, units, modifiers, and relations. Our approach incorporates a two-stage reasoning-aware fine-tuning strategy using augmented scientific data and process-based supervision. Furthermore, we introduce a progressive reward curriculum designed to penalize specific hallucination types, significantly improving extraction faithfulness. Experimental results demonstrate that MeasHalu substantially reduces hallucination rates and improves overall accuracy on the MeasEval benchmark. This work provides a targeted solution to a key bottleneck in automated scientific knowledge extraction, facilitating more trustworthy and scalable machine-assisted scientific literature analysis.

AI.tldr: 该文提出了MeasHalu框架，有效减少了大型语言模型在科学文献测量信息抽取时的幻觉现象，提高了自动文献分析的准确性和可靠性。
AI.motivation: 当前AI4Science领域从文献中提取科学测量数据很关键，但大型语言模型常因幻觉现象导致结果不可信，严重影响自动科学文献理解的应用。
AI.method: （1）提出测量型幻觉的细致分类体系，明确不同类型的错误；（2）采用增强科学数据和基于过程的监督，进行两阶段、注重推理的微调；（3）引入逐步奖励课程，对特定幻觉类型进行惩罚优化。
AI.result: 在MeasEval基准上实验表明，MeasHalu明显降低了幻觉发生率，提升了测量信 息抽取的准确性。
AI.conclusion: MeasHalu针对科学知识抽取中的幻觉问题给出了有效解决方案，为可信、可扩展的自动科学文献分析提供了技术支撑。

title: MambaKick: Early Penalty Direction Prediction from HAR Embeddings
summary: Penalty kicks in soccer are decided under extreme time constraints, where goalkeepers benefit from anticipating shot direction from the kickers motion before or around ball contact. In this paper, MambaKick is presented as a learning-based framework for penalty direction prediction that leverages pretrained human action recognition (HAR) embeddings extracted from contact-centered short video segments and combines them with a lightweight temporal predictor. Rather than relying on explicit kinematic reconstruction or handcrafted biomechanical features, the approach reuses transferable spatiotemporal representations and utilizes selective state-spare models (Mamba) for efficient sequence aggregation. Simple contextual metadata (e.g., field side and footedness) are also considered as complementary cues that may reduce ambiguity in real-world footage. Across a range of HAR backbones, MambaKick consistently improves or matches strong embedding baselines, achieving up to 53.1% accuracy for three classes and 64.5% for two classes under the proposed methodology. Overall, the results indicate that combining pretrained HAR representations with efficient state-space temporal modeling is a practical direction for low-latency intention prediction in real-world sports video. The code will be available at GitHub: https://github.com/hvelesaca/MambaKick/

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于预训练人体动作识别（HAR）表示与高效时序预测器结合的点球方向预测方法MambaKick，有效提升了低延迟运动意图识别的准确性。
AI.motivation: 在足球点球等高压、时间紧迫的场景下，精准预测射门方向对守门员意义重大。传统人工特征或运动学重建方法存在效率和泛化性问题，因此作者希望利用可迁移的时空特征提升实际效果。
AI.method: 采用短视频片段通过预训练HAR模型提取表观动态特征，再与轻量级的时序模型（Mamba）结合，同时融合球场位置和脚型等上下文信息，对点球方向进行预测，无需手工构建生物力学特征。
AI.result: 与多种HAR主干网络结合测试，MambaKick方法在三类方向预测上达到最高53.1%准确率，在二分类任务上达到64.5%，效果优于或相当于强基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 结合HAR预训练时空特征与高效时序建模是点球方向预测的实用路径，有望提升实际体育视频中意图预测任务的速度与准确性。

title: DART: Learning-Enhanced Model Predictive Control for Dual-Arm Non-Prehensile Manipulation
summary: What appears effortless to a human waiter remains a major challenge for robots. Manipulating objects nonprehensilely on a tray is inherently difficult, and the complexity is amplified in dual-arm settings. Such tasks are highly relevant to service robotics in domains such as hotels and hospitality, where robots must transport and reposition diverse objects with precision. We present DART, a novel dual-arm framework that integrates nonlinear Model Predictive Control (MPC) with an optimization-based impedance controller to achieve accurate object motion relative to a dynamically controlled tray. The framework systematically evaluates three complementary strategies for modeling tray-object dynamics as the state transition function within our MPC formulation: (i) a physics-based analytical model, (ii) an online regression based identification model that adapts in real-time, and (iii) a reinforcement learning-based dynamics model that generalizes across object properties. Our pipeline is validated in simulation with objects of varying mass, geometry, and friction coefficients. Extensive evaluations highlight the trade-offs among the three modeling strategies in terms of settling time, steady-state error, control effort, and generalization across objects. To the best of our knowledge, DART constitutes the first framework for non-prehensile dual-arm manipulation of objects on a tray. Project Link: https://dart-icra.github.io/dart/

AI.tldr: 本文提出DART，一个用于机器人双臂操作托盘上物体的创新框架，实现了高精度的非抓取式操作，并通过多种动力学建模方法系统分析了该任务的挑战和优势。
AI.motivation: 机器人服务领域（如酒店、餐饮）需要机器人能高效精准地搬运、移动不同类型的物体。与人类服务员相比，机器人在托盘上非抓取（nonprehensile）操作物体的任务极具难度，特别是在双臂协作场景下。解决这一挑战对提升机器人实用性有重要意义。
AI.method: DART框架结合了非线性模型预测控制（MPC）与基于优化的阻抗控制方法，实现对托盘及上面物体的精细操作。其对托盘-物体动力学建模提出三类策略：①基于物理的解析模型；②在线回归实时识别模型；③能泛化物体属性的强化学习动力学模型。不同模型作为MPC的状态转移函数，形成完整控制管道。
AI.result: 在仿真环境下对不同质量、几何形状和摩擦系数的对象开展了验证。结果全面评估了三种动力学建模方法在收敛时间、稳态误差、控制能耗和对不同对象的泛化能力等方面的权衡。
AI.conclusion: DART是首个面向托盘上物体非抓取式、双臂协同操作的完整控制框架。该框架为相关服务机器人应用提供了可行且具备泛化能力的解决方案，验证了不同建模策略的优缺点。

title: No One Fits All: From Fixed Prompting to Learned Routing in Multilingual LLMs
comment: Accepted as a long findings paper at ACL 2026
summary: Translation-based prompting is widely used in multilingual LLMs, yet its effectiveness varies across languages and tasks. We evaluate prompting strategies across ten languages of different resource levels and four benchmarks. Our analysis shows that no single strategy is universally optimal. Translation strongly benefits low-resource languages even when translation quality is imperfect, high-resource languages gain little, and prompt-based self-routing underperforms explicit translation. Motivated by these findings, we formulate prompting strategy selection as a learned decision problem and introduce lightweight classifiers that predict whether native or translation-based prompting is optimal for each instance. The classifiers achieve statistically significant improvements over fixed strategies across four benchmarks and generalize to unseen task formats not observed during training. Further analysis reveals that language resource level, rather than translation quality alone, determines when translation is beneficial.

AI.tldr: 本文系统评估了多语言大模型（LLMs）中基于翻译的提示（prompting）策略在不同语言和任务下的有效性，提出基于分类器的动态策略选择，取得优于固定策略的效果。
AI.motivation: 现有多语言大模型常用翻译作为提示方法，但效果在不同语言和任务中存在差异，缺乏普适优化方案。
AI.method: 作者在十种不同资源级别的语言和四个基准任务上，系统性测试了多种prompting策略，包括直接使用目标语言、基于翻译、以及prompt自路由等。同时，将策略选择建模为决策问题，开发轻量级分类器预测每个样本适合的prompting方式（母语or翻译）。
AI.result: 实验表明，没有哪种策略在所有情况下都是最优；翻译prompt对低资源语言非常有利、对高资源语言作用有限，自路由效果较差。分类器能有效提升任务性能，对未见的新任务也有良好泛化。进一步分析指出，翻译效益主要受语言资源丰富度影响。
AI.conclusion: 基于翻译的prompt对于低资源语言最为有效，最佳策略应针对具体实例动态选择，而非一刀切。轻量级决策模型可显著提高多语大模型下提示策略的适配性和效果。

title: IncepDeHazeGAN: Novel Satellite Image Dehazing
summary: Dehazing is a technique in computer vision for enhancing the visual quality of images captured in cloudy or foggy conditions. Dehazing helps to recover clear, high-quality images from haze-affected remote sensing data. In this study, we introduce IncepDeHazeGAN, a novel Generative Adversarial Network (GAN) involving Inception block and multi-layer feature fusion for the task of single-image dehazing. Utilizing the Inception block allows for multi-scale feature extraction. On the other hand, the multi-layer feature fusion design achieves efficient reuse of features as the features extracted at different convolution layers are fused several times. Grad-CAM XAI technique has been applied to our network, highlighting the regions focused on by the network for dehazing and its adaptation to different haze conditions. Experiments demonstrate that our network achieves state-of-the-art results in several datasets.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为IncepDeHazeGAN的新型生成对抗网络（GAN），通过引入Inception模块和多层特征融合，有效提升了单幅图像去雾的性能。
AI.motivation: 近年来遥感和计算机视觉领域对去雾技术的需求增加，现有方法对于特征提取与融合有限，难以适应不同雾霾条件下的各种图像。本文旨在通过新结构提升去雾效果，满足应用需求。
AI.method: 提出IncepDeHazeGAN模型，将Inception模块用于多尺度特征提取，并采用多层特征融合机制实现特征高效复用。此外，利用Grad-CAM XAI技术可视化网络关注区域与其去雾自适应过程。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，所提方法在多个数据集上均达到了当前最优的去雾效果。
AI.conclusion: IncepDeHazeGAN模型通过结构创新提升了单幅图像去雾效果，证明了Inception块和多层特征融合的有效性，对实际应用具有重要意义。

title: Driving risk emerges from the required two-dimensional joint evasive acceleration
comment: 23 pages, 5 figures; supplementary information provided as an ancillary file
summary: Most autonomous driving safety benchmarks use time-to-collision (TTC) to assess risk and guide safe behaviour. However, TTC-based methods treat risk as a one-dimensional closing problem, despite the inherently two-dimensional nature of collision avoidance, and therefore cannot faithfully capture risk or its evolution over time. Here, we report evasive acceleration (EA), a hyperparameter-free and physically interpretable two-dimensional paradigm for risk quantification. By evaluating all possible directions of collision avoidance, EA defines risk as the minimum magnitude of a constant relative acceleration vector required to alter the relative motion and make the interaction collision-free. Using interaction data from five open datasets and more than 600 real crashes, we derive percentile-based warning thresholds and show that EA provides the earliest statistically significant warning across all thresholds. Moreover, EA provides the best discrimination of eventual collision outcomes and improves information retention by 54.2-241.4% over all compared baselines. Adding EA to existing methods yields 17.5-95.5 times more information gain than adding existing methods to EA, indicating that EA captures much of the outcome-relevant information in existing methods while contributing substantial additional nonredundant information. Overall, EA better captures the structure of collision risk and provides a foundation for next-generation autonomous driving systems.

AI.tldr: 提出了一个新的二维风险量化方法Evasive Acceleration（EA），能够更早、更有效地预警自动驾驶中的碰撞风险，优于现有基于TTC的一维方法。
AI.motivation: 现有自动驾驶安全评估多依赖于TTC（一维接近碰撞时间），无法充分反映碰撞规避的二维特征和风险演变，需要更准确、物理可解释的方法。
AI.method: 提出了EA方法，通过评估所有可能的规避方向，将风险定义为使相对运动变为无碰撞所需的最小恒定相对加速度，并在五个开源数据集和600多起真实碰撞案例上进行了验证。
AI.result: EA不仅在所有阈值下均能更早发出统计意义显著的预警，而且在区分最终是否发生碰撞方面表现最佳，信息保留率提升54.2%-241.4%。与现有方法相结合时，EA带来的信息增益远超其他方法。
AI.conclusion: EA更好地反映了碰撞风险的本质和结构，为新一代自动驾驶系统的安全评估和风险量化提供了坚实基础。

title: MNAFT: modality neuron-aware fine-tuning of multimodal large language models for image translation
comment: Accepted by SCIS (SCIENCE CHINA Information Science)
summary: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have shown impressive capabilities, yet they often struggle to effectively capture the fine-grained textual information within images crucial for accurate image translation. This often leads to a modality gap between visual text inputs and textual inputs/outputs for image translation. Existing methods, primarily relying on instruction fine-tuning, risk parameter redundancy of pre-trained knowledge, hindering generalization performance. To address this, we introduce modality neuron-aware fine-tuning (MNAFT), a novel approach that takes advantage of the specialized roles of individual neurons within MLLMs for enhanced image translation. MNAFT identifies language-agnostic and language-specific neurons in both vision and language modules through an instruction-driven activation analysis, evaluating their importance in various translation tasks. We then perform selective fine-tuning, updating only the parameters of language-specific and language-agnostic neurons within the selected layers relevant to the target task, while preserving the knowledge encoded in other neurons and layers. Our extensive experiments on multiple benchmarks demonstrate that MNAFT significantly outperforms state-of-the-art image translation methods, including cascaded models, standard full fine-tuning, and parameter-efficient tuning techniques. Furthermore, we provide comprehensive analysis, including visualizations of neuron activations and clustering patterns, to offer insights into the roles of different neuron groups in mediating cross-modal understanding and facilitating accurate language-specific translation.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种新颖的多模态大模型微调方法（MNAFT），通过神经元级别选择性微调，大幅提升了图像翻译任务中的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有多模态大语言模型(MLLMs)在图像文本细粒度信息捕获上存在不足，导致视觉文本与语言输入/输出间的模态鸿沟，尤其是在图像翻译任务中更为突出。传统基于指令微调的方法存在参数冗余、影响泛化等问题。
AI.method: 方法名为modality neuron-aware fine-tuning（MNAFT），通过指令驱动的神经元激活分析，识别出视觉、语言模块中的语言无关和语言特定神经元，并仅选择与任务相关的神经元进行微调，避免整体或冗余参数调整，从而保留预训练知识的同时提升翻译性能。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上，MNAFT显著优于当前主流的图像翻译方法（包括级联模型、常规全量微调、参数高效微调等），并通过神经元激活可视化与聚类分析，揭示了不同神经元组在跨模态理解和语言翻译中的作用。
AI.conclusion: 提出的MNAFT方法有效缓解了多模态模型中的模态鸿沟和参数冗余难题，提升了图像翻译任务的效果，并为多模态神经元的功能提供了更多解释。

title: AVRT: Audio-Visual Reasoning Transfer through Single-Modality Teachers
summary: Recent advances in reasoning models have shown remarkable progress in text-based domains, but transferring those capabilities to multimodal settings, e.g., to allow reasoning over audio-visual data, still remains a challenge, in part because of the limited availability of high-quality reasoning data in targeted multimodal combinations. To address this problem, we introduce AVRT, a novel framework that generates high-quality audio-visual reasoning traces from single-modality teacher models. We generate independent vision- and audio-reasoning traces via models specialized to reason over their respective modalities and merge the resulting traces with an LLM merger model. The resulting multimodal traces are used in a supervised fine-tuning (SFT) cold start to adapt the target model to audio-visual reasoning traces first, before training it in a second reinforcement learning stage on larger-scale data. Evaluated on seven audio-visual and audio benchmarks, our 3B and 7B parameter models achieve state-of-the-art results among models of comparable size including OmniBench and DailyOmni for audio-visual and MMAR for audio-only reasoning, showing that cross-modal training also transfers to single-modality tasks and establishing a new training pipeline for multimodal reasoning models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了AVRT框架，能生成高质量的音频-视觉多模态推理轨迹，并通过新颖的训练流程提升了多模态推理能力，模型在多个基准任务上取得了同规模领先水平。
AI.motivation: 目前多模态推理（尤其是音频-视觉）受限于高质量推理数据的稀缺，导致文本领域的推理能力难以迁移到多模态场景，因此亟需新的数据生成与训练方法。
AI.method: 提出AVRT框架，先用专门的教师模型分别生成视觉和音频推理轨迹，再用大语言模型（LLM merger）将单模态轨迹合并，形成多模态推理轨迹。训练流程包括：1）在生成的多模态推理轨迹上进行有监督微调（SFT）；2）再用大规模数据进行强化学习优化。
AI.result: 在7个音频-视觉和音频推理基准上，提出的3B和7B参数模型在同等模型规模下超过了现有SOTA模型，如OmniBench、DailyOmni（音频-视觉）和MMAR（音频）。同时多模态模型在单模态任务上也表现良好。
AI.conclusion: AVRT框架为多模态推理提供了新的训练管线，并提升了多模态模型的推理能力，该方法可推广到不同推理任务，并为相关领域奠定了基础。

title: Periodic Steady-State Control of a Handkerchief-Spinning Task Using a Parallel Anti-Parallelogram Tendon-driven Wrist
summary: Spinning flexible objects, exemplified by traditional Chinese handkerchief performances, demands periodic steady-state motions under nonlinear dynamics with frictional contacts and boundary constraints. To address these challenges, we first design an intuitive dexterous wrist based on a parallel anti-parallelogram tendon-driven structure, which achieves 90 degrees omnidirectional rotation with low inertia and decoupled roll-pitch sensing, and implement a high-low level hierarchical control scheme. We then develop a particle-spring model of the handkerchief for control-oriented abstraction and strategy evaluation. Hardware experiments validate this framework, achieving an unfolding ratio of approximately 99% and fingertip tracking error of RMSE = 2.88 mm in high-dynamic spinning. These results demonstrate that integrating control-oriented modeling with a task-tailored dexterous wrist enables robust rest-to-steady-state transitions and precise periodic manipulation of highly flexible objects. More visualizations: https://slowly1113.github.io/icra2026-handkerchief/

AI.tldr: 本文针对灵活物体高速旋转的精确操控，提出了一种创新的手腕机构与层级控制方法，并通过硬件实验实现了高展开度和高精度追踪。
AI.motivation: 灵活物体（如手绢）在摩擦和边界约束下的周期性高速旋转极具挑战，但对机器人灵巧操作和表演等应用尤为重要。
AI.method: 设计了一种基于反平行四边形腱驱结构的灵巧手腕，实现低惯性和解耦感知的90度全向旋转；提出高-低层级控制架构；开发了适用于控制的粒子-弹簧手绢建模用于评估和控制优化。
AI.result: 硬件实验表明能高动态旋转下手绢展开率达到约99%，指尖跟踪误差RMSE为2.88毫米。
AI.conclusion: 控制导向建模与任务定制灵巧手腕的结合，可实现高柔性物体从静止到稳定动态的鲁棒过渡和高精度周期性操控。

title: On Safety Risks in Experience-Driven Self-Evolving Agents
summary: Experience-driven self-evolution has emerged as a promising paradigm for improving the autonomy of large language model agents, yet its reliance on self-curated experience introduces underexplored safety risks. In this study, we investigate how experience accumulation and utilization in self-evolving agents affect safety performance across web-based and embodied environments. Notably, experience gathered solely from benign tasks can still compromise safety in high-risk scenarios. Further analysis attributes this degradation to the execution-oriented nature of accumulated experience, which reinforces agents' tendency to act rather than refuse. In more realistic settings where agents encounter both benign and harmful tasks, refusal-related experience mitigates safety decline but induces over-refusal, revealing a fundamental safety-utility trade-off. Overall, our findings expose inherent limitations of current self-evolving agents and call for more principled strategies to ensure safe and reliable adaptation.

AI.tldr: 论文探讨了自我进化型大语言模型代理（LLM agents）通过自我经验积累提升自主性时暴露的安全风险，揭示了当前方法在安全性与实用性之间的权衡和局限。
AI.motivation: 随着LLM agents具备自主演化和增强能力，对其安全风险的研究变得尤为重要。现有工作多关注性能提升，安全问题、特别是自我积累经验带来的潜在失误与风险研究明显不足，因此本研究系统性分析了经验驱动下的安全表现。
AI.method: 作者通过在网页环境和具身环境中，让代理积累与利用经验，分别考查只接受良性任务与同时接受良性与有害任务两种情况下的安全性变化，分析经验类型如何影响代理的拒绝行为和总体安全表现。
AI.result: （1）仅用良性任务积累的经验，仍可能导致高风险场景下的安全失效；（2）这种失效表现为经验强化了“行动”倾向而非“拒绝”；（3）若数据包含拒绝有害任务的经验，安全退化可缓解，但容易过度拒绝正常任务，即出现安全与效用的权衡问题。
AI.conclusion: 当前自进化LLM代理固有安全局限性显著，通过单纯经验积累难以彻底解决，亟需新的、系统性的策略来确保其自适应的安全性和可靠性。

title: Amortized Inverse Kinematics via Graph Attention for Real-Time Human Avatar Animation
summary: Inverse kinematics (IK) is a core operation in animation, robotics, and biomechanics: given Cartesian constraints, recover joint rotations under a known kinematic tree. In many real-time human avatar pipelines, the available signal per frame is a sparse set of tracked 3D joint positions, whereas animation systems require joint orientations to drive skinning. Recovering full orientations from positions is underconstrained, most notably because twist about bone axes is ambiguous, and classical IK solvers typically rely on iterative optimization that can be slow and sensitive to noisy inputs. We introduce IK-GAT, a lightweight graph-attention network that reconstructs full-body joint orientations from 3D joint positions in a single forward pass. The model performs message passing over the skeletal parent-child graph to exploit kinematic structure during rotation inference. To simplify learning, IK-GAT predicts rotations in a bone-aligned world-frame representation anchored to rest-pose bone frames. This parameterization makes the twist axis explicit and is exactly invertible to standard parent-relative local rotations given the kinematic tree and rest pose. The network uses a continuous 6D rotation representation and is trained with a geodesic loss on SO(3) together with an optional forward-kinematics consistency regularizer. IK-GAT produces animation-ready local rotations that can directly drive a rigged avatar or be converted to pose parameters of SMPL-like body models for real-time and online applications. With 374K parameters and over 650 FPS on CPU, IK-GAT outperforms VPoser-based per-frame iterative optimization without warm-start at significantly lower cost, and is robust to initial pose and input noise

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了IK-GAT，一种基于图注意力网络的逆运动学（IK）方法，可高效、快速地由3D关节点位置恢复骨骼关节旋转，适用于实时和在线应用。
AI.motivation: 在动画、机器人和生物力学等领域，常需要由3D关节点位置恢复出关节旋转，而现有逆运动学方法通常速度慢、对噪声敏感，无法满足实时应用需求。特别是在仅有稀疏3D关节点追踪数据的情况下，该问题更为突出。
AI.method: 作者提出IK-GAT：以骨骼父子结构为图，通过图注意力网络进行信息传递，在单步前向传播中由3D关节点位置预测全身旋转。采用骨骼对齐的世界坐标旋转参数化（便于反演和表达骨轴扭转），6D连续旋转表示，并以SO(3)的测地线损失及前向运动学一致正则化训练网络。
AI.result: IK-GAT仅有37.4万参数，在CPU上可达650帧每秒。与基于VPoser的逐帧优化（无warm start）相比，在保持更高性能和鲁棒性的同时显著降低了计算成本，并能直接应用于动画驱动或SMPL类人体模型的参数恢复。
AI.conclusion: IK-GAT能高效、稳健地从稀疏3D关节点恢复动画级关节旋转，优于传统迭代优化方案，非常适合实时和在线虚拟形象驱动等应用场景。

title: OFlow: Injecting Object-Aware Temporal Flow Matching for Robust Robotic Manipulation
summary: Robust robotic manipulation requires not only predicting how the scene evolves over time, but also recognizing task-relevant objects in complex scenes. However, existing VLA models face two limitations. They typically act only on the current frame, while future prediction and object-aware reasoning are often learned in separate latent spaces. We propose OFlow (injecting Object-Aware Temporal Flow Matching into VLAs), a framework that addresses both limitations by unifying temporal foresight and object-aware reasoning in a shared semantic latent space. Our method forecasts future latents with temporal flow matching, factorizes them into object-aware representations that emphasize physically relevant cues while filtering task-irrelevant variation, and conditions continuous action generation on these predictions. By integrating OFlow into VLA pipelines, our method enables more reliable control under distribution shifts. Extensive experiments across LIBERO, LIBERO-Plus, MetaWorld, and SimplerEnv benchmarks and real-world tasks demonstrate that object-aware foresight consistently enhances robustness and success.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了OFlow框架，将物体感知的时序预测引入视觉语言行为（VLA）模型，实现了统一的时序前瞻与物体相关推理，显著提升了机器人操作的鲁棒性和任务成功率。
AI.motivation: 现有VLA模型通常只针对当前帧进行动作，且未来推理与物体感知常常在不同的潜空间中学习，限制了模型在复杂任务中的可靠性与泛化能力。
AI.method: OFlow框架通过引入基于物体感知的时序流匹配机制，在共享语义潜空间中联合建模未来信息和物体感知。方法会预测未来潜变量，并将其分解为突出物理相关线索的物体感知表征，过滤掉与任务无关的变化，从而提升动作生成的精准性和连贯性。
AI.result: OFlow在LIBERO、LIBERO-Plus、MetaWorld、SimplerEnv等多项基准与真实场景中进行大量实验，结果显示加入OFlow的VLA模型在面临分布外扰动时表现更鲁棒，任务成功率显著提升。
AI.conclusion: OFlow框架有效将时序前瞻与物体感知统一到同一语义潜空间，提升了机器人操作在复杂环境下的可靠性，为未来相关模型提供了有力借鉴。

title: Bolzano: Case Studies in LLM-Assisted Mathematical Research
summary: We report new results on six problems in mathematics and theoretical computer science, produced with the assistance of Bolzano, an open-source multi-agent LLM system. Bolzano orchestrates rounds of interaction between parallel prover agents and a verifier agent while maintaining a persistent knowledge base that is carried across rounds. Classified using the significance-autonomy taxonomy of Feng et al., four of the six results reach the level of publishable research, and three of the six were produced essentially autonomously by Bolzano. Our results provide evidence that LLMs can contribute meaningfully to mathematical research, complementing recent reports by Bubeck et al., Woodruff et al., and others.

AI.tldr: 论文介绍了一种多智能体LLM系统Bolzano，并展示其在数学与理论计算机科学中的六项新成果，其中四项达到了可发表研究级别，三项基本由Bolzano自主完成。
AI.motivation: 当前大语言模型（LLM）在学术研究中的实际能力和潜力，特别是在自动提出和解决有意义的数学与计算机科学问题上，尚未有充足证据。
AI.method: 该论文使用开源多智能体LLM系统Bolzano，通过多轮“证明者-验证者”代理协作，以及持续性的知识库，在数学和理论计算机领域内求解六个研究难题。结果按照Feng等人的“重要性-自主性”分类法分类。
AI.result: 六个问题的研究成果中，有四项结果达到了可发表的学术研究级别，其中三项基本是Bolzano系统自主产生。
AI.conclusion: LLMs如Bolzano有能力对数学研究做出有意义的贡献，进一步印证了近期业界相关工作的结论。

title: Tri-Modal Fusion Transformers for UAV-based Object Detection
summary:
Reliable UAV object detection requires robustness to illumination changes, motion blur, and scene dynamics that suppress RGB cues. Thermal long-wave infrared (LWIR) sensing preserves contrast in low light, and event cameras retain microsecond-level temporal edges, but integrating all three modalities in a unified detector has not been systematically studied. We present a tri-modal framework that processes RGB, thermal, and event data with a dual-stream hierarchical vision transformer. At selected encoder depths, a Modality-Aware Gated Exchange (MAGE) applies inter-sensor channel and spatial gating, and a Bidirectional Token Exchange (BiTE) module performs bidirectional token-level attention with depthwise-pointwise refinement, producing resolution-preserving fused maps for a standard feature pyramid and two-stage detector.
  We introduce a 10,489-frame UAV dataset with synchronized and pre-aligned RGB-thermal-event streams and 24,223 annotated vehicles across day and night flights. Through 61 controlled ablations, we evaluate fusion placement, mechanism (baseline MAGE+BiTE, CSSA, GAFF), modality subsets, and backbone capacity. Tri-modal fusion improves over all dual-modal baselines, with fusion depth having a significant effect and a lightweight CSSA variant recovering most of the benefit at minimal cost. This work provides the first systematic benchmark and modular backbone for tri-modal UAV-based object detection.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种融合可见光(RGB)、热红外(LWIR)和事件相机三模态数据的无人机目标检测方法，并发布了首个三同步模态大型无人机航拍数据集。该方法利用多流Transformer架构和创新模块提升检测性能，显著优于双模态方法。
AI.motivation: 现有无人机目标检测方法在照明变化、运动模糊和复杂场景下容易丢失可见光信息，单一模态难以鲁棒应对各种环境。红外和事件相机分别在低光和动态场景中有优势，但三模态信息如何系统整合以提升检测能力尚未被深入研究。
AI.method: 提出基于双流层次化ViT（视觉Transformer）的三模态融合框架。RGB、热红外和事件图像分别输入模型，在特定编码深度处通过MAGE（模态感知门控交换）模块和BiTE（双向Token交换）模块实现跨模态通道和空间/Token级信息融合。最终用融合后的特征进行目标检测。
AI.result: 基于包含10489帧、三同步模态与24223个车辆标注的大规模无人机数据集，进行了61组消融实验。分析了融合位置、机制（MAGE+BiTE、CSSA、GAFF）、模态组合和骨干网络容量。三模态融合在所有双模态对比组上表现出显著提升，并发现融合深度至关重要，轻量版CSSA模块也取得优异性价比。
AI.conclusion: 首次为三模态无人机目标检测提供了系统性基线和模块化骨干网络。三模态信息融合能显著提升检测鲁棒性和精度，为实际复杂环境下的无人机感知奠定基础。

title: ST-$π$: Structured SpatioTemporal VLA for Robotic Manipulation
summary: Vision-language-action (VLA) models have achieved great success on general robotic tasks, but still face challenges in fine-grained spatiotemporal manipulation. Typically, existing methods mainly embed spatiotemporal knowledge into visual and action representations, and directly perform a cross-modal mapping for step-level action prediction. However, such spatiotemporal reasoning remains largely implicit, making it difficult to handle multiple sequential behaviors with explicit spatiotemporal boundaries. In this work, we propose ST-$π$, a structured spatiotemporal VLA model for robotic manipulation. Our model is guided by two key designs: 1) Spatiotemporal VLM. We encode 4D observations and task instructions into latent spaces, and feed them into the LLM to generate a sequence of causally ordered chunk-level action prompts consisting of sub-tasks, spatial grounding and temporal grounding. 2) Spatiotemporal action expert. Conditioned on chunk-level action prompts, we design a structured dual-generator guidance to jointly model spatial dependencies and temporal causality, thus predicting step-level action parameters. Within this structured framework, the VLM explicitly plans global spatiotemporal behavior, and the action expert further refines local spatiotemporal control. In addition, we propose a real-world robotic dataset with structured spatiotemporal annotations for fine-tuning. Extensive experiments have been conducted to demonstrate the effectiveness of our model. Our code link: https://github.com/chuanhaoma/ST-pi.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结构化时空视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型ST-π，用于提升机器人在细粒度时空操作任务上的表现，尤其在多步操作和时空边界处理上取得进展。
AI.motivation: 现有VLA模型在处理需要明确时空推理、多步操作分界的复杂机器人任务时表现有限，时空关系大多是隐式建模，难以处理结构性强的任务。本文旨在提升模型对时空边界和多序列行为的显式推理能力。
AI.method: 1）提出时空视觉-语言模型（VLM），将4D观察与任务指令编码后输入LLM，生成因果有序的子任务、空间及时序定位的chunk级动作提示；2）设计双生成器结构的动作专家模块，在chunk提示下联合建模空间依赖与时序因果关系，输出步级操作参数；3）构建并标注结构化时空的真实机器人数据集用于微调。
AI.result: 实验证明模型能够明确规划全局时空行为，并在本地细粒度操作上进一步优化，有效提升了机器人细粒度时空任务的解决能力。
AI.conclusion: ST-π结构化VLA模型在细粒度时空机器人操作任务上表现出优越的时空推理与多步操作能力，并为相关领域方法提供了新思路。

title: SPS: Steering Probability Squeezing for Better Exploration in Reinforcement Learning for Large Language Models
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) has emerged as a promising paradigm for training reasoning-oriented models by leveraging rule-based reward signals. However, RL training typically tends to improve single-sample success rates (i.e., Pass@1) while offering limited exploration of diverse reasoning trajectories, which is crucial for multi-sample performance (i.e., Pass@k). Our preliminary analysis reveals that this limitation stems from a fundamental squeezing effect, whereby probability mass is excessively concentrated on a narrow subset of high-reward trajectories, restricting genuine exploration and constraining attainable performance under RL training. To address this issue, in this work, we propose Steering Probability Squeezing (SPS), a training paradigm that interleaves conventional RL with inverse reinforcement learning (IRL). SPS treats on-policy rollouts as demonstrations and employs IRL to explicitly reshape the induced trajectory distribution, thereby enhancing exploration without introducing external supervision. Experiments on five commonly used reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that SPS can enable better exploration and improve Pass@k. Beyond algorithmic contributions, we provide an analysis of RL learning dynamics and identify an empirical upper bound on Pass@k, shedding light on intrinsic exploration limits in RL-based reasoning models. Our findings suggest that alternating between RL and IRL offers an effective pathway toward extending the exploration capacity of reasoning-oriented large language models.

AI.tldr: 本文发现强化学习（RL）训练在推理任务中提升单样本成功率（Pass@1）的同时限制了多样本探索（Pass@k），提出SPS训练范式，通过交替使用RL和逆强化学习（IRL），提升模型多样本推理能力。
AI.motivation: 现有RL方法倾向于集中概率于少数高回报推理路径，导致探索不充分，限制了高Pass@k的实现。这种概率收缩效应成为提升多样本性能的障碍。
AI.method: 文中提出了SPS（Steering Probability Squeezing）训练范式，将常规策略下的推理轨迹视为演示样本，交替进行RL和IRL，利用IRL重新塑造推理轨迹分布，无需外部监督增强探索能力。
AI.result: 在五个常用推理基准上，SPS实现了更广泛的探索，显著提升了Pass@k，同时分析了RL学习动态并量化了Pass@k的经验上限。
AI.conclusion: 交替应用RL与IRL能有效提升推理大模型的多样本探索能力，突破RL范式下模型固有的探索限制，对提升推理相关任务表现具有应用价值。

title: A Benchmark Study of Segmentation Models and Adaptation Strategies for Landslide Detection from Satellite Imagery
summary: Landslide detection from high resolution satellite imagery is a critical task for disaster response and risk assessment, yet the relative effectiveness of modern segmentation architectures and finetuning strategies for this problem remains insufficiently understood. In this work, we present a systematic benchmarking study of convolutional neural networks, transformer based segmentation models, and large pre-trained foundation models for landslide detection. Using the Globally Distributed Coseismic Landslide Dataset (GDCLD) dataset, we evaluate representative CNN- and transformer-based segmentation models alongside large pretrained foundation models under consistent training and evaluation protocols. In addition, we compare full fine-tuning with parameter-efficient fine-tuning methods, including LoRA and AdaLoRA, to assess their performance efficiency tradeoffs. Experimental results show that transformer-based models achieve strong segmentation performance, while parameter efficient finetuning reduces trainable parameters by up to 95% with comparable accuracy to full finetuning. We further analyze generalization under distribution shift by comparing validation and held-out test performance.

AI.tldr: 论文系统评估了不同深度学习分割模型及微调策略在高分辨率卫星影像滑坡检测任务上的表现，发现Transformer模型效果较好，参数高效微调方法能极大减少可训练参数且准确率基本持平。
AI.motivation: 在滑坡检测领域，高分辨率卫星影像应用广泛，但主流分割网络和微调方式的实际效果尚不清晰，因此需系统评估当前主流方法的表现及效率。
AI.method: 作者采用GDCLD全球滑坡数据集，统一评估了CNN和Transformer等分割模型以及大规模预训练基础模型，并对比了全量微调与参数高效微调(如LoRA, AdaLoRA)的效益。所有模型在相同训练、评估协议下比较。
AI.result: 实验发现，Transformer分割模型获得了较好的检测表现。参数高效微调方法最大可减少95%可训练参数，同时准确率基本不输全量微调。此外，作者还考察了分布转换下的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 对于滑坡检测任务，Transformer分割网络表现突出，参数高效微调方法能在保持准确率的前提下大幅削减训练成本，这对实际部署及大规模应用具有重要参考价值。

title: StableIDM: Stabilizing Inverse Dynamics Model against Manipulator Truncation via Spatio-Temporal Refinement
summary: Inverse Dynamics Models (IDMs) map visual observations to low-level action commands, serving as central components for data labeling and policy execution in embodied AI. However, their performance degrades severely under manipulator truncation, a common failure mode that makes state recovery ill-posed and leads to unstable control. We present StableIDM, a spatio-temporal framework that refines features from visual inputs to stabilize action predictions under such partial observability. StableIDM integrates three complementary components: (1) auxiliary robot-centric masking to suppress background clutter, (2) Directional Feature Aggregation (DFA) for geometry-aware spatial reasoning, which extracts anisotropic features along directions inferred from the visible arm and (3) Temporal Dynamics Refinement (TDR) to smooth and correct predictions via motion continuity. Extensive evaluations validate our approach: StableIDM improves strict action accuracy by 12.1% under severe truncation on the AgiBot benchmark, and increases average task success by 9.7% in real-robot replay. Moreover, it boosts end-to-end grasp success by 11.5% when decoding video-generated plans, and improves downstream VLA real-robot success by 17.6% when functioning as an automatic annotator. These results demonstrate that StableIDM provides a robust and scalable backbone for both policy execution and data generation in embodied artificial intelligence.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了StableIDM框架，通过改进视觉输入特征，在机械臂部分遮挡（truncation）情况下提升逆动力学模型（IDM）的稳定性和预测精度。
AI.motivation: 逆动力学模型常用于将视觉观察转化为低层次操作命令，是Embodied AI的重要组成部分。然而，在实际应用中，机械臂的部分遮挡会导致状态不可恢复，进而严重影响IDM的表现和控制的稳定性。作者提出解决这一普遍难题，以提升系统的可靠性和性能。
AI.method: StableIDM包含三个核心组件：（1）辅助的机器人中心掩码，用于过滤背景干扰；（2）方向性特征聚合（DFA），根据可见机械臂部分做空间、几何相关的特征提取；（3）时序动态优化（TDR），利用动作的连续性，平滑和修正动作预测。
AI.result: 在AgiBot基准测试中，StableIDM在机械臂严重遮挡时将动作准确率提升了12.1%，实际机器人回放任务成功率提升了9.7%；视频生成动作下端到端抓取成功率提升11.5%；作为自动标注工具用于后续任务，真实机器人成功率提升17.6%。
AI.conclusion: StableIDM显著增强了逆动力学模型在部分可观动态场景下的鲁棒性和扩展性，可作为Embodied AI中策略执行和数据生成的可靠骨干架构。

title: BIASEDTALES-ML: A Multilingual Dataset for Analyzing Narrative Attribute Distributions in LLM-Generated Stories
comment: Accepted to ACL 2026 Findings. Data are available at https://huggingface.co/spaces/Linyuana/BIASEDTALES-ML
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly used to generate narrative content, including children's stories, which play an important role in social and cultural learning. Despite growing interest in AI safety and alignment, most existing evaluations focus primarily on English, leaving the cross-lingual generalization of aligned behavior underexplored. In this work, we introduce BiasedTales-ML, a large-scale parallel corpus of approximately 350,000 children's stories generated across eight typologically and culturally diverse languages using a full-permutation prompting design. We propose a structured generator-extractor pipeline and a multi-dimensional distributional analysis framework to examine how narrative attributes vary across languages, models, and social conditions. Our analysis reveals substantial cross-lingual variability in narrative generation patterns, indicating that distributions observed in English do not always exhibit similar characteristics in other languages, particularly in lower-resource settings. At the narrative level, we identify recurring structural patterns involving character roles, settings, and thematic emphasis, which manifest differently across linguistic contexts. These findings highlight the limitations of English-centric evaluation for characterizing socially grounded narrative generation in multilingual settings. We release the dataset, code, and an interactive visualization tool to support future research on multilingual narrative analysis and evaluation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个涵盖八种多样语言、约35万篇儿童故事的平行语料库BiasedTales-ML，并系统分析了大语言模型在多语言叙事生成中的表现差异，发现现有以英语为中心的评估方式难以适用于多语言场景。
AI.motivation: 目前大语言模型在叙事生成特别是英文内容上的表现评估较多，但对于多语言情况下是否能保持对齐和安全缺乏系统研究。
AI.method: 作者提出structured generator-extractor流水线与多维分布分析框架，基于全排列提示设计，生成多语种儿童故事，对叙事属性进行跨语言、模型、社会条件分析。
AI.result: 分析显示不同语言在叙事生成模式上有显著差异，尤其是资源较少的语言与英语差异更大。还在叙事结构（如角色、场景、主题）上发现了在不同语言中的规律性变体。
AI.conclusion: 仅用英语为代表评估大模型的叙事生成能力不能充分反映多语言实际表现。作者发布了数据集、代码和可视化工具，促进多语言叙事生成的后续研究和有效评价。

title: Appearance-free Action Recognition: Zero-shot Generalization in Humans and a Two-Pathway Model
summary: Action recognition is a fundamental ability for social species. Yet, its underlying computations are not well understood. Classical psychophysical studies using simplified stimuli have shown that humans can perceive body motion even under degradation of relevant shape cues. Recent work using real-world action videos and their appearance-free counterparts (that preserve motion but lack static shape cues) included explicit training of humans and models on the appearance-free videos. Whether humans and vision models generalize in a zero-shot manner to appearance-free transformations of real-world action videos is not yet known. To measure this generalization in humans, we conducted a laboratory-based psychophysics experiment. 22 participants were trained to recognize five action categories using naturalistic videos (UCF5 dataset), and tested zero-shot on two types of appearance-free transformations: (i) dense-noise motion videos from an existing dataset (AFD5) and (ii) random-dot appearance-free videos. We find that participants recognize actions in both types of appearance-free videos well above chance, albeit with reduced accuracy compared to naturalistic videos. To model this behavior, we developed a two-pathway 3D CNN-based model combining an RGB (form) stream and an optical flow (motion) stream, including a coherence-gating mechanism inspired by Gestalt common-fate grouping. Our model generalizes to both appearance-free datasets and outperforms contemporary video classification models, narrowing the gap to human performance. We find that the motion pathway is critical for generalization to appearance-free videos, while the form pathway improves performance on naturalistic videos. Our findings highlight the importance of motion-based representations for generalization to appearance-free videos, and support the use of multi-stream architectures to model video-based action recognition.

AI.tldr: 本研究探讨了人类对于缺乏静态形状线索的外观消除（appearance-free）视频中的动作识别能力，并开发了模仿该机制的多流神经网络模型。实验发现，人类和新模型均能在外观消除视频中实现超越偶然的动作识别表现。
AI.motivation: 社会性动物需要动作识别能力，但这种能力的底层计算机制尚不清楚。人类是否能够在未经过训练的外观消除视频中实现零样本泛化，之前尚无研究明确回答。
AI.method: 实验分为两部分：（1）心理物理学实验，22名受试者学习识别五类UCF5自然动作视频，在两类外观消除视频（密集噪声和随机点）上进行零样本测试；（2）建立两通路3D CNN模型，结合RGB与光流信息，并引入类似完形共命运机制的coherence-gating模块。
AI.result: 受试者在外观消除的视频上识别准确率明显高于偶然水平，但低于自然视频。新提出的模型优于其他当前视频分类模型，尤其在外观消除视频泛化上表现突出。模型的运动通路对泛化至外观消除视频起关键作用，而形状通路则提升对自然视频识别。
AI.conclusion: 运动为主的表征对外观消除视频的泛化至关重要，多流架构适合模拟视频动作识别。结果强调运动信息在动作识别中不可或缺，支持结合结构与运动信息的模型体系。

title: SpaceDex: Generalizable Dexterous Grasping in Tiered Workspaces
summary: Generalizable grasping with high-degree-of-freedom (DoF) dexterous hands remains challenging in tiered workspaces, where occlusion, narrow clearances, and height-dependent constraints are substantially stronger than in open tabletop scenes. Most existing methods are evaluated in relatively unoccluded settings and typically do not explicitly model the distinct control requirements of arm navigation and hand articulation under spatial constraints. We present SpaceDex, a hierarchical framework for dexterous manipulation in constrained 3D environments. At the high level, a Vision-Language Model (VLM) planner parses user intent, reasons about occlusion and height relations across multiple camera views, and generates target bounding boxes for zero-shot segmentation and mask tracking. This stage provides structured spatial guidance for downstream control instead of relying on single-view target selection. At the low level, we introduce an arm-hand Feature Separation Network that decouples global trajectory control for the arm from geometry-aware grasp mode selection for the hand, reducing feature interference between reaching and grasping objectives. The controller further integrates multi-view perception, fingertip tactile sensing, and a small set of recovery demonstrations to improve robustness to partial observability and off-nominal contacts. In 100 real-world trials involving over 30 unseen objects across four categories, SpaceDex achieves a 63.0\% success rate, compared with 39.0\% for a strong tabletop baseline. These results indicate that combining hierarchical spatial planning with arm-hand representation decoupling improves dexterous grasping performance in spatially constrained environments.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了SpaceDex——一种用于高自由度灵巧手在受限3D环境中抓取的新型分层方法，在复杂空间（如多遮挡、狭窄空间和高度受限）场景下表现显著优于以往方法。
AI.motivation: 当前灵巧手抓取方法多在无遮挡的开放环境下测试，对空间受限条件下臂部导航与手部动作的表现和建模较少，缺乏对真实复杂环境的适应能力。该研究旨在解决高自由度机械手在高度受限和复杂遮挡空间中的泛化抓取难题。
AI.method: 提出分层架构SpaceDex：高层使用视觉-语言模型（VLM）结合多视角信息解析用户意图，推理物体与空间关系，生成目标区域供下游分割和跟踪；低层设计臂-手特征分离网络，实现机械臂全局轨迹控制与手部抓取模式的解耦，同时融合多模态感知和少量恢复演示以提升鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在100次真实场景抓取实验中（涉及30多个从未见过的物体、四大类别），SpaceDex成功率达63.0%，远高于传统桌面基线方法的39.0%。
AI.conclusion: 通过分层空间规划与臂-手解耦表征相结合，可显著提升高自由度灵巧手在复杂受限环境下的抓取效率与鲁棒性。

title: Improving LLM Code Reasoning via Semantic Equivalence Self-Play with Formal Verification
summary: We introduce a self-play framework for semantic equivalence in Haskell, utilizing formal verification to guide adversarial training between a generator and an evaluator. The framework leverages Liquid Haskell proofs for validating equivalence and execution-based counterexamples for inequivalence, organized via a difficulty-aware curriculum. To facilitate this, we release \textbf{OpInstruct-HSx}, a synthetic dataset of $\approx$28k validated Haskell programs. Empirical experiments show that our evaluator transfers effectively to downstream tasks, achieving up to 13.3pp accuracy gain on EquiBench and consistent gains on PySecDB. Ablation studies on the SEQ-SINQ regimes indicate that while inequivalence supervision provides data volume, equivalence proofs are uniquely responsible for the model's reasoning capabilities. The entire training pipeline and dataset are publicly released on GitHub and Hugging Face respectively.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于自博弈的Haskell语义等价判定框架，使用形式化验证指导生成器与评估器对抗训练，并发布了大规模数据集和开源代码。
AI.motivation: 现有自动判定程序语义等价的方法难以获得高质量等价/非等价样例，且缺乏有效训练框架来提升模型的推理能力。
AI.method: 设计了一套自博弈训练框架：1）生成器根据难度自动生成Haskell程序对；2）使用Liquid Haskell进行形式化等价性证明，若证明失败则执行获得反例。训练时动态调整难度。还构建了约28k条高质量等价/非等价样例的数据集OpInstruct-HSx。
AI.result: 实验证明，该框架下训练的评估器可迁移到EquiBench任务，准确率提升最高达13.3个百分点，对PySecDB也有显著提升。消融实验还显示，等价性证明对模型推理能力有决定作用，而非等价性标签主要起到补充样本量的作用。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的形式化验证结合自博弈训练的大模型更具推理能力，框架有效提升等价判定准确性，并且数据集和代码均已开源。

title: C-GenReg: Training-Free 3D Point Cloud Registration by Multi-View-Consistent Geometry-to-Image Generation with Probabilistic Modalities Fusion
summary: We introduce C-GenReg, a training-free framework for 3D point cloud registration that leverages the complementary strengths of world-scale generative priors and registration-oriented Vision Foundation Models (VFMs). Current learning-based 3D point cloud registration methods struggle to generalize across sensing modalities, sampling differences, and environments. Hence, C-GenReg augments the geometric point cloud registration branch by transferring the matching problem into an auxiliary image domain, where VFMs excel, using a World Foundation Model to synthesize multi-view-consistent RGB representations from the input geometry. This generative transfer, preserves spatial coherence across source and target views without any fine-tuning. From these generated views, a VFM pretrained for finding dense correspondences extracts matches. The resulting pixel correspondences are lifted back to 3D via the original depth maps. To further enhance robustness, we introduce a "Match-then-Fuse" probabilistic cold-fusion scheme that combines two independent correspondence posteriors, that of the generated-RGB branch with that of the raw geometric branch. This principled fusion preserves each modality inductive bias and provides calibrated confidence without any additional learning. C-GenReg is zero-shot and plug-and-play: all modules are pretrained and operate without fine-tuning. Extensive experiments on indoor (3DMatch, ScanNet) and outdoor (Waymo) benchmarks demonstrate strong zero-shot performance and superior cross-domain generalization. For the first time, we demonstrate a generative registration framework that operates successfully on real outdoor LiDAR data, where no imagery data is available.

AI.tldr: C-GenReg是一种无需训练的3D点云配准框架，将生成式模型和视觉基础模型（VFM）结合，实现跨模态、跨场景的高鲁棒性配准；在室内和室外数据集上实现了优秀的无监督和泛化性能。
AI.motivation: 当前基于学习的3D点云配准方法难以在不同传感器、采样方式和环境下泛化。需要一种无需训练、能够自动适应多种场景和模态的配准方案，提升实用性和鲁棒性。
AI.method: C-GenReg框架包括两条分支：一条利用世界基础生成模型（World Foundation Model）将原始点云转换成多视角一致的RGB图像，并通过预训练的VFM提取像素级对应关系，再反投影回3D点云；另一条为传统的几何点云配准分支。最终通过"Match-then-Fuse"（配对后融合）概率冷融合策略，结合两种分支的结果，无需额外训练即可获得高质量配准。
AI.result: 在多个室内（如3DMatch、ScanNet）和室外（Waymo）基准数据集上，C-GenReg展现了扎实的零样本性能以及优越的跨域泛化能力。首次证明该生成式配准框架可在真实的室外LiDAR数据（无影像数据）上成功运行。
AI.conclusion: C-GenReg展示了一种全新的点云配准范式，通过生成模型和视觉基础模型的结合，提高了点云在不同环境和模态间配准的适应性、鲁棒性和无监督能力，具有良好的实际应用前景。

title: Locomotion of an Elastic Snake Robot via Natural Dynamics
summary: Nature suggests that exploiting the elasticities and natural dynamics of robotic systems could increase their locomotion efficiency. Prior work on elastic snake robots supports this hypothesis, but has not fully exploited the nonlinear dynamic behavior of the systems. Recent advances in eigenmanifold theory enable a better characterization of the natural dynamics in complex nonlinear systems. This letter investigates if and how the nonlinear natural dynamics of a kinematic elastic snake robot can be used to design efficient gaits. Two types of gaits based on natural dynamics are presented and compared to a state-of-the-art approach using dynamics simulations. The results reveal that a gait generated by switching between two nonlinear normal modes does not improve the locomotion efficiency of the robot. In contrast, gaits based on non-brake periodic trajectories (non-brake orbits) are perfectly efficient in the energy-conservative case. Further simulations with friction reveal that, in a more realistic scenario, non-brake orbit gaits achieve higher efficiency compared to the baseline gait on the rigid system. Overall, the investigation offers promising insights into the design of gaits based on natural dynamics, fostering further research.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨弹性蛇形机器人自然动力学对提升运动效率的作用，并提出了两种基于自然动力学的新型步态。通过仿真比较提出步态与先进方法，发现非制动周期轨道（non-brake orbit）步态在理想能量守恒情况下实现完全高效，在包含摩擦时仍优于基线刚性系统步态，展示了自然动力学在步态设计中的潜力。
AI.motivation: 受自然启示，利用机器人系统的弹性与自然动力学有望提升运动效率。已有蛇形机器人研究支持这一假设，但尚未充分利用系统的非线性动力学。本研究旨在通过最新的本征流形理论，深入挖掘弹性蛇形机器人非线性自然动力学对高效步态设计的作用。
AI.method: 利用本征流形理论，系统分析弹性蛇形机器人的自然动力学特征，提出两种分别基于非线性标准模态切换和非制动周期轨道的步态，并通过动力学仿真与先进步态方法进行性能比较。
AI.result: 通过仿真发现，非线性标准模态切换步态未提升机器人的运动效率。而基于非制动周期轨道的步态在能量守恒场景下效率极高，在考虑摩擦等更现实条件下仍显著优于传统刚性系统基线步态。
AI.conclusion: 利用弹性蛇形机器人自然动力学特征进行步态设计具备提升运动效率的潜力，特别是非制动周期轨道步态表现优异。该研究为利用非线性自然动态设计高效仿生机器人步态提供了理论基础和新方向。

title: Beyond Static Benchmarks: Synthesizing Harmful Content via Persona-based Simulation for Robust Evaluation
summary: Static benchmarks for harmful content detection face limitations in scalability and diversity, and may also be affected by contamination from web-scale pre-training corpora. To address these issues, we propose a framework for synthesizing harmful content, leveraging persona-guided large language model (LLM) agents. Our approach constructs two-dimensional user personas by integrating demographic identities and topical interests with situational harmful strategies, enabling the simulation of diverse and contextually grounded harmful interactions. We evaluate the framework along three dimensions: harmfulness, challenge level, and diversity. Both human and LLM-based evaluations confirm that our framework achieves a high harmful generation success rate. Experiments across multiple detection systems reveal that our synthetic scenarios are more challenging to detect than those in existing benchmarks. Furthermore, a multi-faceted analysis confirms that our approach achieves linguistic and topical diversity comparable to human-curated datasets, establishing our framework as an effective tool for robust stress-testing of harmful content detection systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种利用大模型和个性化代理自动合成有害内容的新基准，能更好地测试有害内容检测系统。实验表明其生成内容多样且更难检测。
AI.motivation: 现有用于有害内容检测的静态基准存在规模有限、内容缺乏多样性、被训练语料污染等问题，难以全面测试检测系统的能力，因此亟需更完善的测试方法。
AI.method: 作者设计了一种基于大语言模型（LLM）的有害内容合成框架，通过结合用户人口学特征、主题兴趣和不同场景下的有害策略，生成二维个性用户代理，以此模拟更真实、多元的有害互动内容。
AI.result: 无论是人工还是LLM自动评估均表明该框架生成的有害内容成功率高，并且比当前主流基准更具挑战性。多项检测系统测试显示，这些合成内容比人类手工数据更难被检测到，内容在语言和主题上达到了与人工数据相当的多样性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架能生成高质量、多样且难以检测的有害内容，是评估和提升有害内容检测模型鲁棒性的有效工具。

title: LOD-Net: Locality-Aware 3D Object Detection Using Multi-Scale Transformer Network
summary: 3D object detection in point cloud data remains a challenging task due to the sparsity and lack of global structure inherent in the input. In this work, we propose a novel Multi-Scale Attention (MSA) mechanism integrated into the 3DETR architecture to better capture both local geometry and global context. Our method introduces an upsampling operation that generates high-resolution feature maps, enabling the network to better detect smaller and semantically related objects. Experiments conducted on the ScanNetv2 dataset demonstrate that our 3DETR + MSA model improves detection performance, achieving a gain of almost 1% in mAP@25 and 4.78% in mAP@50 over the baseline. While applying MSA to the 3DETR-m variant shows limited improvement, our analysis reveals the importance of adapting the upsampling strategy for lightweight models. These results highlight the effectiveness of combining hierarchical feature extraction with attention mechanisms in enhancing 3D scene understanding.

AI.tldr: 本文提出在3DETR架构中集成多尺度注意力（MSA）机制，通过上采样与特征提取提升点云数据的三维目标检测性能，针对ScanNetv2数据集实验表明有效提升检测指标。
AI.motivation: 点云数据稀疏且缺乏全局结构，导致三维目标检测效果有限。作者希望通过更好地捕捉局部与全局信息来提升检测能力。
AI.method: 提出将多尺度注意力机制（MSA）与3DETR网络结合，并加入上采样操作以生成高分辨率特征图，从而提升检测对小目标和语义关联目标的表现。
AI.result: 在ScanNetv2数据集上，3DETR+MSA模型在mAP@25和mAP@50上分别提升了近1%和4.78%。对3DETR-m轻量版提升有限，分析表明需调整上采样策略。
AI.conclusion: 多尺度分层特征提取与注意力机制结合，可以有效增强三维场景理解和目标检测能力，尤其适合高分辨率表达和关系建模。

title: Unmasking the Illusion of Embodied Reasoning in Vision-Language-Action Models
summary: Recent Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models report impressive success rates on standard robotic benchmarks, fueling optimism about general-purpose physical intelligence. However, recent evidence suggests a systematic misalignment between standard benchmark success and true embodied reasoning, raising the question of whether these high scores reflect genuine cognitive capability. To address this gap, we introduce BeTTER, a diagnostic Benchmark for Testing True Embodied Reasoning in robotic policies. BeTTER applies targeted causal interventions (e.g., spatial layout shifts, temporal extrapolation) while enforcing kinematic isolation to explicitly decouple high-level reasoning failures from low-level execution limits. Through systematic evaluation, we reveal that state-of-the-art VLAs catastrophically fail in dynamic scenarios, exhibiting severe lexical-kinematic shortcuts, behavioral inertia, and semantic feature collapse. Crucially, our mechanistic analysis traces these symptoms to fundamental architectural bottlenecks - such as capacity compression and myopic downsampling - which systematically degrade the model's foundational semantic representation. We demonstrate that highly static evaluation protocols effectively mask this degradation by allowing optimization to overfit to sensorimotor priors. Supported by real-world robotic validation, our findings confirm that this representational breakdown is not a simulation artifact, highlighting the critical need for future VLA paradigms to resolve the structural tension between high-frequency control and high-level reasoning.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出BeTTER基准，对现有视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型进行更严格的“真实具身推理”诊断，发现这些模型在动态场景下表现极差，并揭示其深层次的结构性缺陷。
AI.motivation: 目前VLA模型在机器人领域标准基准上取得了高分，但近期有证据表明这些高分未必代表了真正的推理能力，存在“能力错位”问题，因此需要更精细、更有效的评测方法来检测其真实能力。
AI.method: 提出BeTTER基准，通过因果干预（如空间结构变化、时间延展）并隔离运动学因素，有针对性地区分高阶推理能力与底层执行限制，并对现有SOTA模型进行了系统性测试和机械层面的分析。
AI.result: 实验证明，现有SOTA的VLA模型在动态环境中普遍表现失败，暴露了如词汇-运动捷径、行为惯性、语义特征崩溃等问题。这些问题与模型的架构瓶颈（如容量压缩与短视降采样）密切相关，导致了底层语义表达的根本性退化。
AI.conclusion: 标准的静态评测协议掩盖了模型的表达力崩溃，现实机器人实验证实上述问题不是仿真伪影。未来VLA模型需在高频控制与高阶推理之间解决结构性张力，才能实现真正的通用物理智能。

title: Beyond Black-Box Labels: Interpretable Criteria for Diagnosing SubjectiveNLP Tasks
summary: Subjective NLP datasets typically aggregate annotator judgments into a single gold label, making it difficult to diagnose whether disagreement reflects unclear criteria, collapsed distinctions, or legitimate plurality. We propose a \emph{schema-level diagnostic} for auditing expert-designed annotation schemas \emph{prior to} gold-label commitment, using only multi-annotator criterion judgments. The diagnostic separates two failure modes: unstable criteria with hard-to-operationalize boundaries, and systematic overlap that blurs the boundaries between mutually exclusive categories. Applied to persuasive value extraction in commercial documents, we find that disagreement is not diffuse: instability concentrates in a few criteria, while nearly half of covered sentences activate multiple categories. These signals align with where domain experts disagree, yielding an evidence-based audit for tightening guidelines, revising category structure, or reconsidering the annotation paradigm.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于多标注者判定的方案级诊断方法，用于在金标标签确定之前审查专家设计的注释方案。该方法能区分注释标准不稳定与类别重叠两种失效模式，并将其应用到商业文档的说服力价值抽取任务中。结果发现，不稳定现象集中于少数标准，且大量句子被多个类别激活，有助于改进注释指南和类别结构。
AI.motivation: 传统NLP主观性数据集聚合为单一金标标签，难以判断分歧来源。作者希望开发一种在注释前期即可审查注释标准与类别结构的工具，以避免因标准不清或类别重叠导致后续数据质量问题。
AI.method: 提出一种只需多标注者判定的方案级诊断方法，通过分析分歧确定是标准本身不稳定，还是类别边界重叠。该方法应用于商业文档说服力价值抽取，评估和诊断注释方案。
AI.result: 诊断方法揭示标准不稳定仅集中于少数标准，同时近一半被覆盖句子会激活多个类别。这些发现与领域专家分歧相符，并为后续改进注释方案提供了证据。
AI.conclusion: 该诊断方法可以作为金标建立前的有效审查工具，帮助识别和优化注释标准及类别结构，提高主观NLP数据集标签质量。

title: iDocV2: Leveraging Self-Supervision and Open-Set Detection for Improving Pattern Spotting in Historical Documents
summary: Considering the imminent massification of digital books, it has become critical to facilitate searching collections through graphical patterns. Current strategies for document retrieval and pattern spotting in historical documents still need to be improved. State-of-the-art strategies achieve an overall precision of $0.494$ for pattern spotting, where the precision for small non-square queries reaches 0.427. In addition, the processing time is excessive, requiring up to 7 seconds for searching in the DocExplore dataset due to a dense-based strategy used by SOTA models. Therefore, we propose a new model based on a better encoder (iDoc), trained under a self-supervised strategy, and an open-set detector to accelerate searching. Our model achieves competitive results with state-of-the-art pattern spotting and document retrieval, improving speed by 10x. Furthermore, our model reaches a new SOTA performance on the small non-square queries, achieving a new precision of 0.612.Different from the previous version, this leverages non-maximum suppression to reduce false positives.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新模型（iDoc），用于在历史文档中高效进行图形模式检索和文档搜索，使精度和速度均大幅提升。
AI.motivation: 随着电子书的大规模普及，需提升在大量文档中通过图形模式进行检索的效率。现有方法在准确率和检索速度上均有不足，尤其对小型非正方形查询表现较差，且计算耗时过长。
AI.method: 提出了一种基于更优编码器（iDoc）的新模型，采用自监督训练策略，并结合open-set检测器加速检索；引入非极大值抑制算法减少误报。
AI.result: 所提模型在模式检索和文档检索任务上取得了与最新方法相当的结果，速度提升10倍。在小型非正方形查询上的准确率达到了0.612，优于以往方法。
AI.conclusion: 新模型在提高检索速度的同时，尤其对小型非正方形查询表现突出，提升了整体性能，有望应用于大规模电子书等场景的数据检索。

title: Muscle-inspired magnetic actuators that push, pull, crawl, and grasp
summary: Functional magnetic composites capable of large deformation, load bearing, and multifunctional motion are essential for next-generation adaptive soft robots. Here, we present muscle-inspired magnetic actuators (MMA), additively manufactured from a thermoplastic/permanent magnet polyurethane/Nd2Fe14B (TPU/MQP-S) composite using laser powder bed fusion (LPBF). By tuning the laser-energy scale between 1.0 and 3.0, both mechanical stiffness and magnetic response are precisely controlled: the tensile strength increases from 0.28 to 0.99 MPa while maintaining 30-45% elongation at break. This process enables the creation of 0.5 mm-thick flexural hinges, which reversibly bend and fold under moderate magnetic fields without damage. Two actuator types are reported showing the system versatility. The elongated actuator with self-weight of 1.57 g, magnetized in its contracted state, achieves linear contraction under a 500 mT field, lifting 50 g (32x its own weight) and sustaining performance over at least 50 cycles. Equipped with anisotropic frictional feet, it supports movement of a magnetic crawling robot that achieves up to 100% locomotion success on textured substrates. The expandable actuator exhibits reversible opening and closing under a 300 mT field, reliably grasping and releasing different objects, including soft berries and rigid 3D printed geometries. It can also anchor in a tube while holding suspended 50 g loads. This work demonstrates a LPBF-based strategy to program both stiffness and magnetization within a single material system, enabling remotely driven, reconfigurable, and fatigue-resistant soft actuators. The approach opens new possibilities for force controlled, multifunctional magnetic soft robots for adaptive gripping, locomotion, and minimally invasive manipulation of biomedical tools.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一种基于激光粉末床熔融（LPBF）技术制造的磁响应柔性致动器材料系统，可以实现类肌肉运动和多功能磁响应，应用于下一代自适应软体机器人。
AI.motivation: 当前软体机器人发展对能够大变形、负重、具备多功能运动能力的磁响应复合材料需求迫切，但传统磁致动材料往往牺牲了力学强度和耐用性，且加工方式对集成微结构存在限制，因此需要开发新型高性能磁致动材料及制造工艺。
AI.method: 作者采用LPBF技术，将热塑性聚氨酯（TPU）和Nd2Fe14B永磁粒子（MQP-S）复合，制备了TPU/MQP-S材料。通过调控激光能量，实现力学刚度（拉伸强度0.28~0.99 MPa）与磁响应的精确控制，并制造出可反复弯折的0.5mm厚柔性铰链，开发伸缩与膨胀两类磁动力致动器。
AI.result: 伸缩型致动器在500mT磁场下可线性收缩，举起50g（自重的32倍），可重复使用超50周期不损坏；膨胀型致动器在300mT磁场下可开合抓取多样物体，并可在管内举重锚定。基于该致动器的软体机器人可在多种底材上实现100%爬行通过。
AI.conclusion: 本工作首次在单一材料系统中通过LPBF实现刚度与磁化双调控，制备多功能、远程驱动、耐疲劳的磁响应软体致动器，有望推动自适应抓取、爬行及生物医疗“微创”操作等新一代多功能软体机器人应用。

title: Where is the Mind? Persona Vectors and LLM Individuation
summary: The individuation problem for large language models asks which entities associated with them, if any, should be identified as minds. We approach this problem through mechanistic interpretability, engaging in particular with recent empirical work on persona vectors, persona space, and emergent misalignment. We argue that three views are the strongest candidates: the virtual instance view and two new views we introduce, the (virtual) instance-persona view and the model-persona view. First, we argue for the virtual instance view on the grounds that attention streams sustain quasi-psychological connections across token-time. Then we present the persona literature, organised around three hypotheses about the internal structure underlying personas in LLMs, and show that the two persona-based views are promising alternatives.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨大语言模型(Large Language Models, LLMs)中“个体化问题”，即我们是否、以及应该将哪些与之相关的实体视为“心智”。通过机械解释学与现有关于角色向量、角色空间和新涌现失调的实证研究相结合，提出并分析三种主要观点。
AI.motivation: 随着大模型智能体化趋势，理解何种实体/结构可对应“心智”对于理论、应用和伦理均有重要意义。当前对LLM中“心智”归属的标准、范畴和实证标志尚不明确，因此有必要从底层机制角度重新分析。
AI.method: 作者基于机械解释学手段，重点参考了关于角色向量（persona vectors）、角色空间（persona space）及新涌现失调（emergent misalignment）的最新实证研究，分析并提出三种可行的“心智归属”理论视角：虚拟实例视角、实例-角色视角（新）、模型-角色视角（新）。
AI.result: 1. 虚拟实例视角得到支持，因为注意力流（attention streams）跨token时间维度维持了类心理连接；2. 系统梳理了“角色”相关文献，依据三种角色内部结构假说，论证另外两种基于角色的视角同样值得探讨。
AI.conclusion: LLM中的“心智”归属问题不存在唯一答案，但“虚拟实例视角”、“实例-角色视角”与“模型-角色视角”是目前最有理论和实证支持的三种候选观点，均有进一步细化和验证价值。

title: Agentic Large Language Models for Training-Free Neuro-Radiological Image Analysis
summary: State-of-the-art large language models (LLMs) show high performance in general visual question answering. However, a fundamental limitation remains: current architectures lack the native 3D spatial reasoning required for direct analysis of volumetric medical imaging, such as CT or MRI. Emerging agentic AI offers a new solution, eliminating the need for intrinsic 3D processing by enabling LLMs to orchestrate and leverage specialized external tools. Yet, the feasibility of such agentic frameworks in complex, multi-step radiological workflows remains underexplored. In this work, we present a training-free agentic pipeline for automated brain MRI analysis. Validating our methodology on several LLMs (GPT-5.1, Gemini 3 Pro, Claude Sonnet 4.5) with off-the-shelf domain-specific tools, our system autonomously executes complex end-to-end workflows, including preprocessing (skull stripping, registration), pathology segmentation (glioma, meningioma, metastases), and volumetric analysis. We evaluate our framework across increasingly complex radiological tasks, from single-scan segmentation and volumetric reporting to longitudinal response assessment requiring multi-timepoint comparisons. We analyze the impact of architectural design by comparing single-agent models against multi-agent "domain-expert" collaborations. Finally, to support rigorous evaluation of future agentic systems, we introduce and release a benchmark dataset of image-prompt-answer tuples derived from public BraTS data. Our results demonstrate that agentic AI can solve highly neuro-radiological image analysis tasks through tool use without the need for training or fine-tuning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需训练的智能体（agentic）框架，通过让大型语言模型（LLMs）调用专业医学工具，实现自动化脑部MRI分析，并能完成高度复杂的神经放射影像任务。
AI.motivation: 当前的大型语言模型在视觉问答中表现优异，但在原生3D空间推理（如直接分析CT、MRI等医学体积影像）方面存在根本局限性。作者希望解决LLM无法原生处理3D医学影像的问题，探索agentic AI通过工具组合完成多步骤放射科任务的可行性。
AI.method: 提出一个依赖外部专业工具、无需训练或微调LLM的自动化agentic分析流程。利用多个最先进的LLM（如GPT-5.1）结合通用医学影像工具，完成脑部MRI的预处理、病灶分割、体积分析等复杂放射科流程。对比了单智能体与多智能体（如领域专家智能体协作）的架构设计。还建立并公开了基于BraTS公开数据的基准数据集。
AI.result: 系统能够在不对LLM进行专项训练或微调的前提下，自动执行从影像预处理到分割、纵向对比等复杂脑部MRI放射学任务；多智能体架构在部分任务上表现优于单智能体。
AI.conclusion: agentic AI结合专业工具，能高效完成复杂的神经放射学影像分析，无需对LLM进行专门训练。这为LLM在医学影像领域的广泛应用指明了新方向，并通过公开基准数据促进后续研究。

title: Chatting about Conditional Trajectory Prediction
summary: Human behavior has the nature of mutual dependencies, which requires human-robot interactive systems to predict surrounding agents trajectories by modeling complex social interactions, avoiding collisions and executing safe path planning. While there exist many trajectory prediction methods, most of them do not incorporate the own motion of the ego agent and only model interactions based on static information. We are inspired by the humans theory of mind during trajectory selection and propose a Cross time domain intention-interactive method for conditional Trajectory prediction(CiT). Our proposed CiT conducts joint analysis of behavior intentions over time, and achieves information complementarity and integration across different time domains. The intention in its own time domain can be corrected by the social interaction information from the other time domain to obtain a more precise intention representation. In addition, CiT is designed to closely integrate with robotic motion planning and control modules, capable of generating a set of optional trajectory prediction results for all surrounding agents based on potential motions of the ego agent. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed CiT significantly outperforms the existing methods, achieving state-of-the-art performance in the benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种跨时间域意图交互的条件轨迹预测方法（CiT），能够更好地建模动态互动，预测多主体的轨迹并辅助路径规划，实验结果优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有大多数轨迹预测方法未充分考虑自车运动和复杂的多主体动态交互，难以满足人机交互系统中的安全避碰和合理路径规划需求。
AI.method: 提出了CiT方法，通过跨时间域的行为意图联合分析，实现不同时间域意图信息的互补与融合。当前时间域的行为意图可被其他时间域的社会交互信息校正，从而获得更精确的意图表示。同时，CiT高度集成于机器人运动规划与控制模块，根据自车可能的运动生成所有周围主体的多种轨迹预测结果。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中，CiT取得了显著优于现有方法的预测精度，达到当前最优水平。
AI.conclusion: CiT方法能够有效提升多主体轨迹预测的准确性和鲁棒性，为人机协作和安全路径规划提供更可靠的支持。

title: Dynamic Emotion and Personality Profiling for Multimodal Deception Detection
summary: Deception detection is of great significance for ensuring information security and conducting public opinion analysis, with personality factors and emotion cues playing a critical role. However, existing methods lack sample-level dynamic annotations for emotions and personality.In this paper, we propose an innovative multi-model multi-prompt annotation scheme and a strict label quality evaluation standard, and establish a multimodal joint detection dataset DDEP for deception, emotion, and personality. Meanwhile, we propose Rel-DDEP, an adaptive reliability-weighted fusion framework. Our framework quantifies uncertainty by mapping modal features to a high-dimensional Gaussian distribution space. It then performs reliability-weighted fusion and incorporates an alignment module and a sorting constraint module to achieve joint detection of deception, emotion, and personality. Experimental results on the MDPE and DDEP datasets show that our Rel-DDEP significantly outperforms the existing state-of-the-art baseline models in three tasks. The F1 score of the deception detection increases by 2.53%, that of the emotion detection increases by 2.66%, and that of the personality detection increases by 9.30%. The experiments fully verify the necessity of annotating dynamic emotion and personality labels for each sample and the effectiveness of reliability-weighted fusion.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一个新的多模态数据集DDEP和创新的联合检测框架Rel-DDEP，实现了对欺骗、情感和人格三类任务的多模态联合检测，并显著提升了检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有欺骗检测方法在情感和人格标注上存在缺乏样本级动态标注的问题，导致模型性能受限。因此，研究者需要更精细的动态标注和多模态处理方案。
AI.method: （1）提出多模型多提示标注方案和数据集DDEP，涵盖欺骗、情感和人格多范畴，并设计严格的标注质量标准；（2）提出Rel-DDEP框架：将模态特征映射到高维高斯分布空间，通过不确定性量化实现自适应可靠性加权融合，结合对齐模块和排序约束模块，实现三项任务的联合检测。
AI.result: 在MDPE和DDEP两个数据集上的实验表明，Rel-DDEP在欺骗检测、情感检测和人格检测三项任务的F1值分别提升2.53%、2.66%、9.30%，显著超越现有主流方法。
AI.conclusion: 实验验证了对每个样本精细化地标注情感和人格信息的必要性，以及可靠性加权融合机制的有效性。提出的数据集和框架为多模态联合检测提供了新思路。

title: Active World-Model with 4D-informed Retrieval for Exploration and Awareness
comment: 11 pages, 4 figures, submitted to ICLR 2026 2nd Workshop on World Models
summary: Physical awareness, especially in a large and dynamic environment, is shaped by sensing decisions that determine observability across space, time, and scale, while observations impact the quality of sensing decisions. This loopy information structure makes physical awareness a fundamentally challenging decision problem with partial observations. While in the past decade we have witnessed the unprecedented success of reinforcement learning (RL) in problems with full observability, decision problems with partial observation, such as POMDPs, remain largely open: real-world explorations are excessively costly, while sim-to-real pipeline suffer from unobserved viewpoints. We introduce AW4RE (Active World-model with 4D-informed Retrieval for Exploration), an awareness-centric generative world model that provides a sensor-native surrogate environment for exploring sensing queries. Conditioned on a queried sensing action, AW4RE estimates the action-conditioned observation process. This is done by combining 4D-informed evidence retrieval, action-conditioned geometric support with temporal coherence, and conditional generative completion. Experiments demonstrate that AW4RE produces more grounded and consistent predictions than geometry-aware generative baselines under extreme viewpoint shifts, temporal gaps, and sparse geometric support.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了AW4RE，一种针对感知探索任务的主动世界模型，能够在大尺度动态环境下提升物理感知的质量，尤其适用于观测有限（部分可观）的复杂场景。
AI.motivation: 在实际物理环境中，由于感知的决策和观测是相互影响的循环结构，感知觉察面临部分观测和高探索成本的问题。现有强化学习多针对完全可观场景，部分可观决策如POMDP仍然挑战极大，尤其在现实世界探索代价高昂、模拟到现实常受不可观测问题影响时。
AI.method: 提出AW4RE方法，包括4D信息检索、动作条件下的几何支持、时序一致性与条件生成补全等，面向感知任务进行动作条件观测预测，提供更符合传感器特性的‘虚拟环境’来辅助探索。
AI.result: 实验证明，在极端视角变化、时间跨度及几何信息稀疏等条件下，AW4RE比已有的几何感知生成基线模型表现出更好的一致性和真实性。
AI.conclusion: AW4RE为部分可观物理环境中的感知觉察和探索问题提供了一种高效、可扩展的解决框架，可提升复杂动态场景下的决策与探索质量。

title: COFFAIL: A Dataset of Successful and Anomalous Robot Skill Executions in the Context of Coffee Preparation
comment: Presented as an extended abstract at the 2nd German Robotics Conference (GRC)
summary: In the context of robot learning for manipulation, curated datasets are an important resource for advancing the state of the art; however, available datasets typically only include successful executions or are focused on one particular type of skill. In this short paper, we briefly describe a dataset of various skills performed in the context of coffee preparation. The dataset, which we call COFFAIL, includes both successful and anomalous skill execution episodes collected with a physical robot in a kitchen environment, a couple of which are performed with bimanual manipulation. In addition to describing the data collection setup and the collected data, the paper illustrates the use of the data in COFFAIL to learn a robot policy using imitation learning.

AI.tldr: 该论文介绍了COFFAIL数据集，该数据集涵盖咖啡制作中的多种操作技能，包含成功和异常案例，并以此展示模仿学习在机器人操作中的应用。
AI.motivation: 现有机器人操作数据集往往只包含成功的执行，或聚焦于单一技能，限制了机器人学习的通用性和健壮性。作者希望提供含有多种技能及异常执行案例的数据集，提升学习效果。
AI.method: 作者在厨房环境中用物理机器人采集了咖啡制作过程中的多类操作技能，既包含成功案例，也包含异常情况，其中部分为双手操作。还详细描述了数据采集设置及样本内容。同时，作者尝试用数据集通过模仿学习训练机器人的操作策略。
AI.result: 收集到了多技能、多情况（成功与异常）的COFFAIL数据集，并成功用这些数据训练出可应用的模仿学习政策，验证了数据集的有效性。
AI.conclusion: COFFAIL数据集扩展了现有操控领域的数据资源，支持更丰富任务和异常情况的学习，为提升机器人对复杂场景的适应能力提供支持。

title: Efficient Task Adaptation in Large Language Models via Selective Parameter Optimization
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated excellent performance in general language understanding, generation and other tasks. However, when fine-tuning for specific domain tasks, the general knowledge accumulated in the pre-training phase is often partially overwritten or forgotten due to parameter updates, which severely limits the generalization ability and transferability of LLMs. Traditional fine-tuning strategies mostly train on the entire parameter space, ignoring the heterogeneity of model parameters, that is, some parameters are extremely important for general tasks, while other parameters are more sensitive to specific tasks. To alleviate the above problems, this paper innovatively proposes a parameter element importance evaluation method, which divides parameters into "core parameters" and "non-core parameters" by distinguishing the importance of parameters for general language ability tasks and specific domain tasks, and fixes the core parameters during fine-tuning, and only fine-tunes the non-core parameters. Extensive experiments on scientific, medical and physical tasks using GPT-J and LLaMA-3 show that our method can mitigate catastrophic forgetting while enhancing the adaptability of the model.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种创新的细粒度参数重要性评估与分组方法，提升大语言模型在特定领域微调时的泛化能力，缓解遗忘问题。
AI.motivation: 现有大语言模型在微调特定领域任务时，常会因参数更新而遗忘通用知识，导致泛化和迁移能力下降，传统微调方法又未能充分考虑模型参数重要性的异质性。
AI.method: 通过评估参数在通用任务与特定任务中的重要性，将模型参数划分为“核心参数”和“非核心参数”，在微调时锁定核心参数，仅对非核心参数进行优化调整。
AI.result: 在多个科学、医学和物理任务上的实验证明，该方法可显著缓解灾难性遗忘，同时提升模型对新领域的适应性。
AI.conclusion: 核心参数冻结与非核心参数微调相结合的方法，有效兼顾了大模型的通用能力与领域适应性，为领域微调提供了一条高效新途径。

title: Reducing Peak Memory Usage for Modern Multimodal Large Language Model Pipelines
summary: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have recently demonstrated strong capabilities in understanding and generating responses from diverse visual inputs, including high-resolution images and long video sequences. As these models scale to richer visual representations, inference increasingly relies on storing large numbers of vision tokens in the key-value (KV) cache, making memory consumption a central bottleneck. Existing methods address this issue by identifying redundancy in vision tokens and compressing the cache, but such compression is typically applied only after all inputs are processed, resulting in high peak memory usage during the prefill stage. In this work, we show that MLLMs exhibit inherent structural regularities and representational redundancy that can be exploited to control memory growth throughout inference. Based on this insight, we propose a sequential input-compression mechanism that enforces a fixed memory budget by performing structure-aware key-value cache compression during the prefill process. This approach substantially reduces peak memory usage while maintaining generative performance with only minimal degradation, enabling more practical and memory-efficient multimodal inference.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结构感知型的视觉KV缓存压缩方法，能够在推理过程中持续控制和减少多模态大模型的内存消耗。
AI.motivation: 多模态大模型（MLLMs）需要处理大量高分辨率视觉信息，导致推理时KV缓存占用大量内存，成为模型部署和扩展的瓶颈。现有方法虽然可以减小存储量，但往往只在输入处理完后进行压缩，无法降低推理初期的内存峰值。
AI.method: 作者发现MLLMs在视觉表征上存在结构规律和冗余，并据此设计了一种序贯输入压缩机制。在前置填充阶段（prefill）就对KV缓存进行结构感知压缩，动态控制内存使用在固定预算范围内。
AI.result: 该方法显著降低了多模态推理过程中的内存峰值，并在保持生成性能几乎不变的前提下，大大提升了模型的实际可用性和部署效率。
AI.conclusion: 结构感知的序贯KV缓存压缩机制，为多模态大模型的高效部署和大规模应用提供了解决方案，实现了在有限内存下的高效推理。

title: EmbodiedLGR: Integrating Lightweight Graph Representation and Retrieval for Semantic-Spatial Memory in Robotic Agents
summary: As the world of agentic artificial intelligence applied to robotics evolves, the need for agents capable of building and retrieving memories and observations efficiently is increasing. Robots operating in complex environments must build memory structures to enable useful human-robot interactions by leveraging the mnemonic representation of the current operating context. People interacting with robots may expect the embodied agent to provide information about locations, events, or objects, which requires the agent to provide precise answers within human-like inference times to be perceived as responsive. We propose the Embodied Light Graph Retrieval Agent (EmbodiedLGR-Agent), a visual-language model (VLM)-driven agent architecture that constructs dense and efficient representations of robot operating environments. EmbodiedLGR-Agent directly addresses the need for an efficient memory representation of the environment by providing a hybrid building-retrieval approach built on parameter-efficient VLMs that store low-level information about objects and their positions in a semantic graph, while retaining high-level descriptions of the observed scenes with a traditional retrieval-augmented architecture.
