EmbodiedLGR-Agent is evaluated on the popular NaVQA dataset, achieving state-of-the-art performance in inference and querying times for embodied agents, while retaining competitive accuracy on the global task relative to the current state-of-the-art approaches. Moreover, EmbodiedLGR-Agent was successfully deployed on a physical robot, showing practical utility in real-world contexts through human-robot interaction, while running the visual-language model and the building-retrieval pipeline locally.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效的视觉-语言模型驱动的机器人智能体架构（EmbodiedLGR-Agent），可高效构建与检索记忆结构，在复杂环境中实现类人响应的人机交互。
AI.motivation: 当前，机器人在复杂环境下需要能够快速、准确地构建与检索环境记忆，以满足人机交互中关于环境信息的实时查询需求。现有方法在效率或准确率方面存在不足。
AI.method: 提出EmbodiedLGR-Agent，其核心为基于高效参数的视觉-语言模型，通过混合的构建-检索方法，将对象及其位置等低层信息以语义图形式存储，同时对场景进行高层描述，结合传统检索增强架构。
AI.result: 在NaVQA数据集上验证，EmbodiedLGR-Agent在推理和查询时间上均达到业内最优水平，并保持了与现有最优方法相比具有竞争力的准确率。此外，还成功实现在真实机器人上的本地化部署，展现了实际应用价值。
AI.conclusion: EmbodiedLGR-Agent能有效提升机器人在复杂环境中的记忆构建和信息检索效率，支持高效、自然的人机交互，兼顾推理时效性与准确性，适用于真实场景中的机器人应用。

title: Jailbreaking Large Language Models with Morality Attacks
comment: 27 pages, 6 figures, 18 tables. Accepted by ACL 2026 Findings
summary: Pluralism alignment with AI has the sophisticated and necessary goal of creating AI that can coexist with and serve morally multifaceted humanity. Research towards pluralism alignment has many efforts in enhancing the learning of large language models (LLMs) to accomplish pluralism. Although this is essential, the robustness of LLMs to produce moral content over pluralistic values is still under exploration.Inspired by the astonishing persuasion abilities via jailbreak prompts, we propose to leverage jailbreak attacks to study LLMs' internal pluralistic values. In detail, we develop a morality dataset with 10.3K instances in two categories: Value Ambiguity and Value Conflict. We further formalize four adversarial attacks with the constructed dataset, to manipulate LLMs' judgment over the morality questions. We evaluate both the large language models and guardrail models which are typically used in generative systems with flexible user input. Our experiment results show that there is a critical vulnerability of LLMs and guardrail models to these subtle and sophisticated moral-aware attacks.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出利用越狱攻击分析大语言模型（LLM）在多元道德价值下的脆弱性，发现LLM及其安全护栏模型在应对复杂道德攻击时存在显著漏洞。
AI.motivation: 随着AI在人类生活中的深入应用，让AI能够理解并适应多元的道德价值观变得尤为重要。当前大多数工作着眼于改进LLM以提升其多元性表现，但对于其在高度复杂道德价值情境中生成内容的鲁棒性认识不足。作者受到越狱攻击成功绕过模型限制的现象启发，试图探查LLM内部的道德多元性。
AI.method: 作者构建了包含1.03万个道德实例的数据集，涵盖价值模糊和价值冲突两类问题。基于此，设计了四种对LLM进行越狱攻击的方法，以操控模型对道德问题的判断，并系统评估了主流LLM及通常用于生成系统中的护栏模型的表现。
AI.result: 实验证明，无论是大语言模型还是护栏模型，在面对精心设计、能够识别道德价值多元性的越狱式攻击时，都表现出明显的脆弱性，易被引导产生违背设定道德规范的内容。
AI.conclusion: 现有的LLM及护栏模型在多元复杂道德场景下的防护存在重大漏洞。未来需要加强模型对于道德模糊和冲突场景的鲁棒性，提升AI与多元人类社会价值观的契合能力。

title: Automated Palynological Analysis System: Integrating Deep Metric Learning and $U^{2}$-Net Detection in $H\infty$ bright field microscopy
summary: Traditional melissopalynology is a time-consuming and subjective process, often taking 4-6 hours per sample. We present an automated, high-throughput microscopy system that integrates $H\infty$ robust mechanical control with advanced deep learning pipelines for the precise counting, classification, and morphological analysis of pollen grains from Bio Bio region in south central territory in Chile. Our system employs $U^{2}$-Net for salient object detection and a DINOv2 Vision Transformer backbone trained via Deep Metric Learning for classification. By integrating Gradient-Weighted Attention, the model provides human-interpretable texture and diagnostic feature annotations. The system achieves a 95.8$\%$ classification recall and a 6x processing speedup compared to manual expert analysis.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一套集成自动化高通量显微镜系统和深度学习方法，高效精确地对智利Bio Bio地区蜂蜜的花粉进行分类与计数，显著提升了效率和准确率。
AI.motivation: 传统蜜粉分析（melissopalynology）手动操作耗时且主观性强，需要提升分析的自动化、准确性和效率，解决难以大规模高效检测的问题。
AI.method: 采用集成$H\infty$鲁棒机械控制和先进的深度学习流水线，包括使用U^2-Net进行显著性目标检测，DINOv2 Vision Transformer作为骨干，通过深度度量学习训练分类，结合梯度加权注意力进行可解释的特征注释。
AI.result: 系统在智利Bio Bio地区样本上实现了95.8%的分类召回率，处理速度是人工专家的6倍。
AI.conclusion: 自动化高通量系统能够大幅提升花粉分析效率和准确率，并能提供可解释的特征分析，为相关领域分析提供了强有力工具。

title: Relative State Estimation using Event-Based Propeller Sensing
summary: Autonomous swarms of multi-Unmanned Aerial Vehicle (UAV) system requires an accurate and fast relative state estimation. Although monocular frame-based camera methods perform well in ideal conditions, they are slow, suffer scale ambiguity, and often struggle in visually challenging conditions. The advent of event cameras addresses these challenging tasks by providing low latency, high dynamic range, and microsecond-level temporal resolution. This paper proposes a framework for relative state estimation for quadrotors using event-based propeller sensing. The propellers in the event stream are tracked by detection to extract the region-of-interests. The event streams in these regions are processed in temporal chunks to estimate per-propeller frequencies. These frequency measurements drive a kinematic state estimation module as a thrust input, while camera-derived position measurements provide the update step. Additionally, we use geometric primitives derived from event streams to estimate the orientation of the quadrotor by fitting an ellipse over a propeller and backprojecting it to recover body-frame tilt-axis. The existing event-based approaches for quadrotor state estimation use the propeller frequency in simulated flight sequences. Our approach estimates the propeller frequency under 3% error on a test dataset of five real-world outdoor flight sequences, providing a method for decentralized relative localization for multi-robot systems using event camera.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种利用事件相机和螺旋桨特征的多无人机编队相对状态估计算法，实现了高精度、低延迟的定位。
AI.motivation: 多无人机编队任务需要精确且快速的相对定位。传统单目相机方法存在速度慢、尺度模糊、在复杂环境下性能下降等问题，限制了其实用性。事件相机具备低延迟、高动态范围优势，是解决此难题的潜在手段。
AI.method: 提出基于事件相机的螺旋桨感知方法。通过检测事件流中的螺旋桨，提取感兴趣区域，再对区域内事件流进行时间切割，估算每个螺旋桨转速。将螺旋桨转速作为动力学输入、相机定位作为观测，驱动状态估计算法。同时用事件流几何特征（椭圆拟合）估算无人机姿态。
AI.result: 在五组真实户外飞行数据集上评估，螺旋桨频率估算误差小于3%。验证了该方法基于事件相机实现了多机系统的分布式定位能力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法利用事件相机高时空分辨能力，实现了多无人机系统低延迟、高精度的相对状态估计，有望提升复杂环境下编队飞行的实际表现。

title: Stability-Weighted Decoding for Diffusion Language Models
summary: Diffusion large language models (dLLMs) enable parallel text generation by iteratively denoising a fully masked sequence, unmasking a subset of masked tokens at each step. Existing decoding strategies rely on static confidence metrics computed at a single denoising step, ignoring temporal history and often leading to premature unmasking of unstable tokens. In this work, we theoretically establish that a token's temporal instability, quantified by the KL divergence between consecutive prediction distributions, provides a strict lower bound on its mutual information with the remaining masked context, indicating that temporally unstable tokens are inherently unsafe to unmask. Based on this insight, we propose Stability-Weighted Decoding (SWD), a training-free, plug-and-play strategy that incorporates temporal stability into token scoring and acts as a universal modulator for arbitrary score-based decoding policies. Experiments on code generation and mathematical reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that SWD consistently improves generation accuracy across representative scoring metrics and selection policies, and exhibits exceptional robustness, maintaining a significant performance lead over standard baselines across varying acceleration ratios.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新型解码策略SWD，通过考虑token的时序稳定性，有效提升了扩散式大语言模型的生成质量和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散大语言模型的并行解码往往只用单步置信度静态度量token的可解除性，忽略了token预测概率随时间变化带来的不确定性，容易过早解除仍不稳定的token，影响生成质量。
AI.method: 作者通过理论分析，提出token的时序不稳定性，即连续预测分布间的KL散度，可以衡量其与剩余上下文的互信息，为是否安全解除提供下界依据。据此，设计了一种无需训练的解码策略——Stability-Weighted Decoding（SWD），结合历史信息动态调整token评分，可作为通用插件用于各种基于评分的解码策略。
AI.result: 实验在代码生成与数学推理任务上验证，SWD在不同的评分与token选择机制下均能持续提升生成准确率，且在解码加速倍率提高时仍显著优于标准基线，表现出极强的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: SWD是一种有效、通用且训练无关的解码策略，显著优化了扩散大语言模型的并行文本生成，对大模型实际应用具有重要价值。

title: Incoherent Deformation, Not Capacity: Diagnosing and Mitigating Overfitting in Dynamic Gaussian Splatting
summary:
Dynamic 3D Gaussian Splatting methods achieve strong training-view PSNR on monocular video but generalize poorly: on the D-NeRF benchmark we measure an average train-test PSNR gap of 6.18 dB, rising to 11 dB on individual scenes. We report two findings that together account for most of that gap.
  Finding 1 (the role of splitting). A systematic ablation of the Adaptive Density Control pipeline (split, clone, prune, frequency, threshold, schedule) shows that splitting is responsible for over 80% of the gap: disabling split collapses the cloud from 44K to 3K Gaussians and the gap from 6.18 dB to 1.15 dB. Across all threshold-varying ablations, gap is log-linear in count (r = 0.995, bootstrap 95% CI [0.99, 1.00]), which suggests a capacity-based explanation.
  Finding 2 (the role of deformation coherence). We show that the capacity explanation is incomplete. A local-smoothness penalty on the per-Gaussian deformation field -- Elastic Energy Regularization (EER) -- reduces the gap by 40.8% while growing the cloud by 85%. Measuring per-Gaussian strain directly on trained checkpoints, EER reduces mean strain by 99.72% (median 99.80%) across all 8 scenes; on 8/8 scenes the median Gaussian under EER is less strained than the 1st-percentile (best-behaved) Gaussian under baseline. Alongside EER, we evaluate two further regularizers: GAD, a loss-rate-aware densification threshold, and PTDrop, a jitter-weighted Gaussian dropout. GAD+EER reduces the gap by 48%; adding PTDrop and a soft growth cap reaches 57%. We confirm that coherence generalizes to (a) a different deformation architecture (Deformable-3DGS, +40.6% gap reduction at re-tuned lambda), and (b) real monocular video (4 HyperNeRF scenes, reducing the mean PSNR gap by 14.9% at the same lambda as D-NeRF, with near-zero quality cost). The overfitting in dynamic 3DGS is driven by incoherent deformation, not parameter count.

AI.tldr: 本文分析了动态3D高斯散射(Dynamic 3DGS)方法在单目视频上的训练视角与测试视角之间存在显著PSNR差距，并系统性地找出了导致泛化性能下降的两个关键因素：高斯数量（模型容量）和变形一致性，提出针对性的改进措施，大幅缩小了训练-测试性能差距。
AI.motivation: 动态场景的3D高斯建模方法（如Dynamic 3DGS）在训练集视角上表现优异，但测试时泛化能力差，PSNR出现明显下降。作者希望找出导致过拟合和泛化性不佳的根本原因，并优化动态3DGS的训练，使其在训练外视图和真实单目视频上表现更好。
AI.method: 作者对Adaptive Density Control（自适应密度控制）流程中的各步骤进行了系统消融，重点关注高斯分裂操作，并引入Elastic Energy Regularization（EER）对每个高斯的变形场加以局部平滑约束。同时还引入GAD（基于丢失率的稠密化阈值）和PTDrop（高斯随机丢弃）两个正则项。各种组合方案在多个数据集和动态场景下进行实验分析。
AI.result:
1）高斯分裂步骤对模型容量和泛化性能影响巨大，单独去除可使PSNR差距（gap）从6.18dB大幅缩小至1.15dB。
2）仅靠增加高斯数量不够，局部平滑的变形约束EER能将差距再缩小40.8%，并极大降低变形拉伸程度。
3）合用GAD与EER，总体性能提升更优，最多可减少57%的PSNR差距。
4）实验验证了上述方案对不同网络结构和真实视频具良好泛化。
AI.conclusion: 动态3DGS方法的过拟合，主要由于变形场的不一致性（而非参数量过大）。通过精确控制高斯数量和增强变形一致性（如EER），能显著提升泛化性能和测试表现，为动态场景神经建模提供了更健壮的技术路线。

title: Will People Enjoy a Robot Trainer? A Case Study with Snoopie the Pacerbot
comment: 8 pages, 4 figures. To appear at ICRA 2026
summary: The physicality of exercise makes the role of athletic trainers unique. Their physical presence allows them to guide a student through a motion, demonstrate an exercise, and give intuitive feedback. Robot quadrupeds are also embodied agents with robust agility and athleticism. In our work, we investigate whether a robot quadruped can serve as an effective and enjoyable personal trainer device. We focus on a case study of interval training for runners: a repetitive, long-horizon task where precision and consistency are important. To meet this challenge, we propose SNOOPIE, an autonomous robot quadruped pacer capable of running interval training exercises tailored to challenge a user's personal abilities. We conduct a set of user experiments that compare the robot trainer to a wearable trainer device--the Apple Watch--to investigate the benefits of a physical embodiment in exercise-based interactions. We demonstrate 60.6% better adherence to a pace schedule and were 45.9% more consistent across their running speeds with the quadruped trainer. Subjective results also showed that participants strongly preferred training with the robot over wearable devices across many qualitative axes, including its ease of use (+56.7%), enjoyability of the interaction (+60.6%), and helpfulness (+39.1%). Additional videos and visualizations can be found on our website: https://sites.google.com/view/snoopie

AI.tldr: 本论文探讨了利用自主四足机器人作为个性化运动训练器的有效性和体验，与目前常用的可穿戴设备（如Apple Watch）进行了对比。
AI.motivation: 当前运动训练主要依赖人类教练或可穿戴设备，但这些方案在直观指导、实际示范和互动体验上存在不足。四足机器人具备强健的运动能力和物理呈现，可能弥补这些不足，因此作者希望探索其在实际训练场景中的潜力。
AI.method: 作者设计并实现了SNOOPIE自主四足机器人，能够根据用户能力定制间歇跑训练计划，并与Apple Watch作为可穿戴训练器进行了对照实验。实验评估用户在使用两种设备时的配速遵守性、一致性，以及主观体验（如易用性、互动愉快度和帮助程度）。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，使用四足机器人训练时，用户对配速计划的遵守性提高了60.6%，速度一致性提升了45.9%。在主观体验方面，参与者对机器人训练器的易用性（+56.7%）、愉快度（+60.6%）和帮助性（+39.1%）均优于可穿戴设备。
AI.conclusion: 四足机器人作为运动训练器在实际应用中表现出明显优于可穿戴设备的效果，既能提升训练成果，也能带来更优质的训练体验。这为“具身”机器人在运动与健康领域的应用提供了有力支持。

title: Abstain-R1: Calibrated Abstention and Post-Refusal Clarification via Verifiable RL
summary: Reinforcement fine-tuning improves the reasoning ability of large language models, but it can also encourage them to answer unanswerable queries by guessing or hallucinating missing information. Existing abstention methods either train models to produce generic refusals or encourage follow-up clarifications without verifying whether those clarifications identify the key missing information. We study queries that are clear in meaning but cannot be reliably resolved from the given information, and argue that a reliable model should not only abstain, but also explain what is missing. We propose a clarification-aware RLVR reward that, while rewarding correct answers on answerable queries, jointly optimizes explicit abstention and semantically aligned post-refusal clarification on unanswerable queries. Using this reward, we train Abstain-R1, a 3B model that improves abstention and clarification on unanswerable queries while preserving strong performance on answerable ones. Experiments on Abstain-Test, Abstain-QA, and SelfAware show that Abstain-R1 substantially improves over its base model and achieves unanswerable-query behavior competitive with larger systems including DeepSeek-R1, suggesting that calibrated abstention and clarification can be learned through verifiable rewards rather than emerging from scale alone.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的基于澄清的强化学习RLVR奖励方法，用于提升大语言模型在无法回答的问题上的拒答和澄清能力，同时保持在可回答问题上的表现。
AI.motivation: 当前大语言模型虽然通过强化学习微调提升了推理能力，但也容易在无法回答的问题上编造答案或猜测。现有的拒答方法只让模型给出拒绝，或进行跟进澄清，但未能有效验证澄清内容是否识别了关键信息缺失。因此，作者希望让模型不仅能拒答，还能解释缺失的信息，提升可靠性。
AI.method: 作者提出了clarification-aware RLVR奖励机制，对于可回答问题奖励正确答案，对于不可回答问题则奖励模型明确拒绝并给出语义对齐的澄清说明。基于该机制，训练了3B参数量的Abstain-R1模型，并在Abstain-Test、Abstain-QA、SelfAware等数据集上进行测试。
AI.result: Abstain-R1相较于基础模型，在无法回答的问题上拒答和澄清能力有显著提升，同时在可回答问题上仍保持较强性能。
AI.conclusion: 调准的拒答和澄清能力可以通过可验证的奖励机制进行训练获得，不一定依赖更大规模的模型。Abstain-R1在对不可回答问题的处理上与更大规模模型（如DeepSeek-R1）表现相当。

title: TriTS: Time Series Forecasting from a Multimodal Perspective
comment: 9 pages, 3 figures. Accepted by the A2A-MML Workshop in conjunction with CVPR 2026
summary: Time series forecasting plays a pivotal role in critical sectors such as finance, energy, transportation, and meteorology. However, Long-term Time Series Forecasting (LTSF) remains a significant challenge because real-world signals contain highly entangled temporal dynamics that are difficult to fully capture from a purely 1D perspective. To break this representation bottleneck, we propose TriTS, a novel cross-modal disentanglement framework that projects 1D time series into orthogonal time, frequency, and 2D-vision spaces.To seamlessly bridge the 1D-to-2D modality gap without the prohibitive $O(N^2)$ computational overhead of Vision Transformers (ViTs), we introduce a Period-Aware Reshaping strategy and incorporate Visual Mamba (Vim). This approach efficiently models cross-period dependencies as global visual textures while maintaining linear computational complexity. Complementing this, we design a Multi-Resolution Wavelet Mixing (MR-WM) module for the frequency modality, which explicitly decouples non-stationary signals into trend and noise components to achieve fine-grained time-frequency localization. Finally, a streaming linear branch is retained in the time domain to anchor numerical stability. By dynamically fusing these three complementary representations, TriTS effectively adapts to diverse data contexts. Extensive experiments across multiple benchmark datasets demonstrate that TriTS achieves state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance, fundamentally outperforming existing vision-based forecasters by drastically reducing both parameter count and inference latency.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种全新预测框架TriTS，通过在时间、频率和2D视觉空间学习时序特征，实现了高效且准确的长时序预测，优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 长期时序预测因时序动态复杂且高度纠缠，现有1D方法难以捕捉全部特征。因此，作者希望打破单一时序特征表示限制，提高预测性能。
AI.method: TriTS框架将1D时序信号分别投影到正交的时间、频率和2D视觉空间：1. 利用Period-Aware Reshaping和Visual Mamba模块，低成本捕获2D全局依赖；2. 通过多分辨率小波混合（MR-WM）模块对频域特征进行趋势与噪声的细致分离；3. 保留线性流式时间分支，稳定数值。在多模态下动态融合三类特征。
AI.result: 在多个公开基准数据集上，TriTS实现了新的性能峰值，不仅预测准确性提升，同时模型参数规模和推理延迟大幅减少，优于其他视觉类预测模型。
AI.conclusion: TriTS通过跨模态分解和融合，有效提升了长期时序预测能力，展现出良好的泛化性和高效率，具有明显应用和推广价值。

title: Enhancing Glass Surface Reconstruction via Depth Prior for Robot Navigation
summary: Indoor robot navigation is often compromised by glass surfaces, which severely corrupt depth sensor measurements. While foundation models like Depth Anything 3 provide excellent geometric priors, they lack an absolute metric scale. We propose a training-free framework that leverages depth foundation models as a structural prior, employing a robust local RANSAC-based alignment to fuse it with raw sensor depth. This naturally avoids contamination from erroneous glass measurements and recovers an accurate metric scale. Furthermore, we introduce \ti{GlassRecon}, a novel RGB-D dataset with geometrically derived ground truth for glass regions. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, especially under severe sensor depth corruption. The dataset and related code will be released at https://github.com/jarvisyjw/GlassRecon.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种无需训练、结合深度基础模型与传感器原始深度数据的方法，有效提升室内机器人在玻璃环境下的导航性能，并发布了新RGB-D玻璃数据集GlassRecon。
AI.motivation: 现有室内机器人导航常因玻璃表面导致深度传感器数据严重失真，而深度基础模型虽提供结构先验却缺乏绝对尺度，亟需结合两者优势，提升导航系统对玻璃区域的鲁棒性和精度。
AI.method: 无需训练的框架：以深度基础模型（如Depth Anything 3，提供几何先验）为结构参考，通过本地鲁棒的RANSAC对齐算法，将其与原始传感器深度数据融合，从而避免玻璃引发的误差及恢复准确的测量尺度。此外，构建了新的RGB-D数据集（GlassRecon），具有几何推导的玻璃区域真值。
AI.result: 实验表明，在传感器深度极度失真的情形下，所提方法在多个指标上均超越最新基线方法，对玻璃区域具更高鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 方法无需训练、易于部署，结合基础模型几何先验与真实深度数据，实现了对玻璃区域环境下的更鲁棒导航，有望广泛应用；同时公开了权威数据集和代码，促进后续研究。

title: Auditing Support Strategies in LLMs through Grounded Multi-Turn Social Simulation
summary: When users seek social support from chatbots, they disclose their situation gradually, yet most evaluations of supportive LLMs rely on single-turn, fully specified prompts. We introduce a multi-turn simulation framework that closes this gap. Support-seeking narratives from five Reddit communities are decomposed into ordered fragments and revealed turn by turn to a language model. Each response is coded with the Social Support Behavior Code (SSBC), an established multi-label taxonomy that captures the composition of support, rather than a single quality score. To ask whether support choices track the model's own construal of user distress, we use linear probes on hidden representations to estimate this internal signal without altering the generation context. Across two mid-scale models (Llama-3.1-8B, OLMo-3-7B) and more than 6,200 turns, support composition shifts systematically with estimated distress: teaching declines as estimated distress rises, a finding that replicates across architectures, while increases in affective and esteem-oriented strategies (such as validation) are suggestive but model-specific and rest on noisier annotations. Community context independently shapes behavior, tracking topic and discourse norms rather than demographic categories. These trajectory-level dynamics, invisible to single-turn evaluation, motivate multi-turn auditing frameworks for socially sensitive applications.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种多轮对话仿真框架，用于更真实地评估大模型（LLMs）在社交支持场景下的表现，发现支持策略会随用户的困扰程度系统性变化。
AI.motivation: 当前对支持型LLM的评估大多局限于单轮、充分指定的提示，无法反映真实用户逐步披露情况时模型的表现。作者希望通过多轮仿真填补此空白，提高对LLM社交敏感任务的理解和评估准确性。
AI.method: 提取Reddit五个社区的真实支持求助叙述，将其分为多个有序片段，逐步呈现给大语言模型（如Llama-3.1-8B、OLMo-3-7B）。每轮模型回应采用社会支持行为代码（SSBC）进行多标签分类，并利用线性探针无需侵入地估算模型内部对用户困扰的感知信号。
AI.result: 模型的支持行为组成会随感知到的困扰程度变化。当模型估算的困扰上升时，教学类支持减少；情感和自尊类支持策略（如情绪验证）有上升趋势，但模型间表现和注释一致性不一。社区语境独立影响模型支持行为，反映话题和讨论规范，而非人口属性。
AI.conclusion: 多轮对话下的行为动态在单轮分析中难以察觉，因此，需要多轮审计框架以提升LLMs在社会敏感应用中的评估和安全性。

title: Frozen Vision Transformers for Dense Prediction on Small Datasets: A Case Study in Arrow Localization
summary: We present a system for automated detection, localization, and scoring of arrow punctures on 40\,cm indoor archery target faces, trained on only 48 annotated photographs (5{,}084 punctures). Our pipeline combines three components: a color-based canonical rectification stage that maps perspective-distorted photographs into a standardized coordinate system where pixel distances correspond to known physical measurements; a frozen self-supervised vision transformer (DINOv3 ViT-L/16) paired with AnyUp guided feature upsampling to recover sub-millimeter spatial precision from $32 \times 32$ patch tokens; and lightweight CenterNet-style detection heads for arrow-center heatmap prediction. Only 3.8\,M of 308\,M total parameters are trainable. Across three cross-validation folds, we achieve a mean F1 score of $0.893 \pm 0.011$ and a mean localization error of $1.41 \pm 0.06$\,mm, comparable to or better than prior fully-supervised approaches that require substantially more training data. An ablation study shows that the CenterNet offset regression head, typically essential for sub-pixel refinement, provides negligible detection improvement while degrading localization in our setting. This suggests that guided feature upsampling already resolves the spatial precision lost through patch tokenization. On downstream archery metrics, the system recovers per-image average arrow scores with a median error of 1.8\% and group centroid positions to within a median of 4.00\,mm. These results demonstrate that frozen foundation models with minimal task-specific adaptation offer a practical paradigm for dense prediction in small-data regimes.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自动检测、定位和评分室内射箭靶上箭孔的系统，仅用48张有标注照片进行训练，结果优于依赖大量数据的传统方法。
AI.motivation: 当前射箭靶箭孔检测依赖大量标注数据，操作繁琐且成本高。研究动机在于能否利用极少数据，通过迁移学习和新颖结构达到高精度自动检测与评分的目的。
AI.method: 系统包含三大组件：1）基于颜色的图像整形，将畸变照片校准为物理尺度标准坐标；2）利用冻结的自监督视觉Transformer（DINOv3 ViT-L/16）与AnyUp特征引导上采样，从粗略Patch Token中恢复亚毫米级空间精度；3）采用轻量级CenterNet检测头预测箭心热力图，且仅少量参数可训练。
AI.result: 在三折交叉验证下，系统取得平均F1分数0.893，箭孔定位误差1.41mm，与甚至优于用更多训练数据的全监督方法。消融实验显示传统位移回归头对本系统无明显提升且反而损害定位精度，表明特征引导上采样已充分精细恢复空间信息。下游评分平均误差仅1.8%，群组质心误差为4.0mm。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证明了冻结大模型结合少量定制训练，在小数据情景下可实现高精度密集预测，为相关实际场景提供了高性价比、易落地的新范式。

title: DAG-STL: A Hierarchical Framework for Zero-Shot Trajectory Planning under Signal Temporal Logic Specifications
summary: Signal Temporal Logic (STL) is a powerful language for specifying temporally structured robotic tasks. Planning executable trajectories under STL constraints remains difficult when system dynamics and environment structure are not analytically available. Existing methods typically either assume explicit models or learn task-specific behaviors, limiting zero-shot generalization to unseen STL tasks. In this work, we study offline STL planning under unknown dynamics using only task-agnostic trajectory data. Our central design philosophy is to separate logical reasoning from trajectory realization. We instantiate this idea in DAG-STL, a hierarchical framework that converts long-horizon STL planning into three stages. It first decomposes an STL formula into reachability and invariance progress conditions linked by shared timing constraints. It then allocates timed waypoints using learned reachability-time estimates. Finally, it synthesizes trajectories between these waypoints with a diffusion-based generator. This decomposition--allocation--generation pipeline reduces global planning to shorter, better-supported subproblems. To bridge the gap between planning-level correctness and execution-level feasibility, we further introduce a rollout-free dynamic consistency metric, an anytime refinement search procedure for improving multiple allocation hypotheses under finite budgets, and a hierarchical online replanning mechanism for execution-time recovery. Experiments in Maze2D, OGBench AntMaze, and the Cube domain show that DAG-STL substantially outperforms direct robustness-guided diffusion on complex long-horizon STL tasks and generalizes across navigation and manipulation settings. In a custom environment with an optimization-based reference, DAG-STL recovers most model-solvable tasks while retaining a clear computational advantage over direct optimization based on the explicit system model.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了DAG-STL框架，用于在未知动力学下，仅凭轨迹数据实现时序逻辑(STL)约束下的任务规划，有效提升了任务泛化与执行效率。
AI.motivation: 现有基于STL的任务规划方法大多需要显式模型或针对任务的数据，缺乏对新任务的零样本泛化能力。而现实环境下，机器人系统的动力学和环境结构往往难以获得精确表达，导致在STL约束下规划可执行轨迹变得困难。
AI.method: 提出了DAG-STL这一分层式规划框架，将长时域STL任务规划分为三步：(1)将STL公式分解为可达性与不变性子条件，以共享时序约束连接；(2)利用学习到的可达时间估计分配有时序的中间点（waypoints）；(3)使用基于扩散的生成器在waypoints间合成轨迹。同时引入了无需回滚的动态一致性指标、多个分配假设的渐进式搜索过程、以及在线分层重规划机制，以保障计划可行性和执行鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在Maze2D、OGBench AntMaze和Cube等领域的实验表明，DAG-STL在复杂长时域STL任务中显著优于基线的直接鲁棒性引导扩散方法，并且能够在不同导航与操作任务间有效泛化。在定制环境与优化型参考对比下，DAG-STL可以解决大多数可由模型求解的任务，且计算效率优于直接优化。
AI.conclusion: DAG-STL框架实现了STL任务规划中的逻辑推理与轨迹生成的分离，显著提升了零样本泛化能力与实用性，为无需动力学模型的复杂机器人时序任务规划提供了高效、鲁棒的解决方案。

title: Comparing Human and Large Language Model Interpretation of Implicit Information
summary: The interpretation of implicit meanings is an integral aspect of human communication. However, this framework may not transfer to interactions with Large Language Models (LLMs). To investigate this, we introduce the task of Implicit Information Extraction (IIE) and propose an LLM-based IIE pipeline that builds a structured knowledge graph from a context sentence by extracting relational triplets, validating implicit inferences, and analyzing temporal relations. We evaluate two LLMs against crowdsourced human judgments on two datasets. We find that humans agree with most model triplets yet consistently propose many additions, indicating limited coverage in current LLM-based IIE. Moreover, in our experiments, models appear to be more conservative about implicit inferences than humans in socially rich contexts, whereas humans become more conservative in shorter, fact-oriented contexts. Our code is available at https://github.com/Antonio-Dee/IIE_from_LLM.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了大语言模型（LLM）对隐含意义解析的能力，设计了隐含信息抽取任务与知识图谱构建流程，并通过人类评审对比评估，发现现有模型覆盖有限且偏谨慎。
AI.motivation: 人类在交流中能够理解大量隐含含义，而当前大语言模型是否具备这样的推理能力尚不明确。为此，作者希望系统性调研和评估LLM在隐含信息处理上的表现。
AI.method: 作者提出了一套基于LLM的隐含信息抽取（IIE）流程，包括：从语境句中抽取关系三元组、验证隐含推理、分析时间关系，并据此构建结构化知识图谱。随后在两个数据集上通过众包收集的人类判断结果，对比评估两种主流LLM表现。
AI.result: 实验显示，大部分模型生成的三元组获得了人类认可，但人类经常给出更多的补充，说明模型存在覆盖盲区。具体来说，在社交丰富的场景下，LLM推断隐含信息更为谨慎；而在简短、事实导向场景下，人类反而更为保守。
AI.conclusion: 现有LLM在隐含信息抽取方面，虽然能捕捉部分隐含意义，但整体覆盖范围有限，且推理风格与人类在不同场景下存在差异。该研究为未来提升模型推理能力提供了数据和方法参考。

title: FairNVT: Improving Fairness via Noise Injection in Vision Transformers
comment: ICLR 2026 Algorithmic Fairness Across Alignment Procedures and Agentic Systems (AFAA) Workshop
summary: This paper presents FairNVT, a lightweight debiasing framework for pretrained transformer-based encoders that improves both representation and prediction level fairness while preserving task accuracy. Unlike many existing debiasing approaches that address these notions separately, we argue they are inherently connected: suppressing sensitive information at the representation level can facilitate fairer predictions. Our approach learns task-relevant and sensitive embeddings via lightweight adapters, applies calibrated Gaussian noise to the sensitive embedding, and fuses it with the task representation. Together with orthogonality constraints and fairness regularization, these components jointly reduce sensitive-attribute leakage in the learned embeddings and encourage fairer downstream predictions. The framework is compatible with a wide range of pretrained transformer encoders. Across three datasets spanning vision and language, FairNVT reduces sensitive-attribute attacker accuracy, improves demographic-parity and equalized-odds metrics, and maintains high task performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为FairNVT的轻量级去偏框架，针对预训练transformer编码器，在保持任务准确率的同时提升表征与预测过程中的公平性。
AI.motivation: 现有许多去偏方法往往分开处理表征公平性与预测公平性，然而两者实际上密切相关。作者认为抑制表征中的敏感信息有助于实现更公平的预测。
AI.method: FairNVT通过轻量级adapter学习任务相关与敏感属性的嵌入，对敏感嵌入加高斯噪声，并与任务表征融合，配合正交约束和公平性正则，联合减少表征中敏感信息泄露并提升公平性。该方法兼容各类预训练transformer。
AI.result: 在涵盖视觉和语言的三个数据集上，FairNVT有效降低敏感属性攻击者准确率，提升demographic-parity和equalized-odds等公平性指标，并保持高任务表现。
AI.conclusion: FairNVT无需大改模型结构，在提升公平性的同时兼顾准确率，并能广泛适用于主流的预训练transformer模型。

title: GenericAgent: A Token-Efficient Self-Evolving LLM Agent via Contextual Information Density Maximization (V1.0)
summary: Long-horizon large language model (LLM) agents are fundamentally limited by context. As interactions become longer, tool descriptions, retrieved memories, and raw environmental feedback accumulate and push out the information needed for decision-making. At the same time, useful experience gained from tasks is often lost across episodes. We argue that long-horizon performance is determined not by context length, but by how much decision-relevant information is maintained within a finite context budget. We present GenericAgent (GA), a general-purpose, self-evolving LLM agent system built around a single principle: context information density maximization. GA implements this through four closely connected components: a minimal atomic tool set that keeps the interface simple, a hierarchical on-demand memory that only shows a small high-level view by default, a self-evolution mechanism that turns verified past trajectories into reusable SOPs and executable code, and a context truncation and compression layer that maintains information density during long executions. Across task completion, tool use efficiency, memory effectiveness, self-evolution, and web browsing, GA consistently outperforms leading agent systems while using significantly fewer tokens and interactions, and it continues to evolve over time. Project: https://github.com/lsdefine/GenericAgent

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种名为GenericAgent（GA）的通用自进化LLM智能体系统，通过提高有限上下文中的信息密度，显著提升了长周期任务执行能力。
AI.motivation: 现有长周期大语言模型智能体受制于上下文长度，导致关键信息丢失，影响决策，同时有价值的经验难以跨回合传递。论文认为决定长周期表现的关键并非上下文长度本身，而是如何在有限的上下文中保存更多决策相关信息。
AI.method: GA系统包含四大核心组件：1）精简原子工具集，优化工具接口；2）分层按需内存，仅默认展示高层摘要；3）自进化机制，将已验证的历史轨迹转化为可复用操作规范及代码；4）上下文截断与压缩层，确保执行过程中最大化信息密度。
AI.result: 在任务完成率、工具使用效率、记忆有效性、自进化能力和网页浏览等多项指标上，GA均显著优于主流智能体系统，并且用更少的tokens和交互次数完成任务。此外，GA还具备持续自我进化的能力。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证明通过提升上下文信息密度、优化记忆与工具机制，可以突破LLM智能体在长周期任务中的上下文瓶颈，并推动智能体持续自优化，在实际多任务环境中有更好的适应和表现。

title: EdgeVTP: Exploration of Latency-efficient Trajectory Prediction for Edge-based Embedded Vision Applications
summary: Vehicle trajectory prediction is central to highway perception, but deployment on roadside edge devices necessitates bounded, deterministic end-to-end latency. We present EdgeVTP, an embedded-first trajectory predictor that combines interaction-aware graph modeling with a lightweight transformer backbone and a one-shot curve decoder. By predicting future motion as compact curve parameters (anchored at the last observed position) rather than horizon-scaled autoregressive waypoints, EdgeVTP reduces decoding overhead while producing smooth trajectories. To keep runtime predictable in crowded scenes, we explicitly bound interaction complexity via a locality graph with a hard neighbor cap. Across three highway benchmarks and two Jetson-class platforms, EdgeVTP achieves the lowest measured end-to-end latency under a protocol that includes graph construction and post-processing, while attaining state-of-the-art (SotA) prediction accuracy on two of the three datasets and competitive error on other benchmarks. Our code is available at https://github.com/SeungjinStevenKim/EdgeVTP.

AI.tldr: EdgeVTP是一种专为边缘设备设计的轻量级、确定性低延迟的高速路车辆轨迹预测方法，将交互图建模、紧凑transformer骨干和一次性曲线解码器结合，实现业界领先的预测准确率和最低端到端时延。
AI.motivation: 高速公路上的车辆轨迹预测对于感知系统至关重要，但要在路侧边缘设备中部署，需要确保端到端延迟低且可预测。本研究旨在解决复杂场景下推理延迟不可控、预测不精确等现实瓶颈。
AI.method: 提出EdgeVTP方法，将邻域限制的交互图用于建模减少复杂度，并用轻量级transformer提取特征，之后用一次性曲线解码器预测以末位置为锚点的未来轨迹曲线参数，避免了传统逐点解码造成的高延迟。
AI.result: 在三个高速公路数据集和两种Jetson级嵌入式平台测试下，EdgeVTP在包含图构建和后处理的端到端协议下，实现了最低的延迟。同时在其中两个数据集上达到了SOTA级预测精度，对其他基准点也表现出竞争力。
AI.conclusion: EdgeVTP兼顾了效率、精度与可部署性，面向真实边缘设备场景，极大推动了车辆轨迹预测模型的实际落地应用。

title: LAGS: Low-Altitude Gaussian Splatting with Groupwise Heterogeneous Graph Learning
summary: Low-altitude Gaussian splatting (LAGS) facilitates 3D scene reconstruction by aggregating aerial images from distributed drones. However, as LAGS prioritizes maximizing reconstruction quality over communication throughput, existing low-altitude resource allocation schemes become inefficient. This inefficiency stems from their failure to account for image diversity introduced by varying viewpoints. To fill this gap, we propose a groupwise heterogeneous graph neural network (GW-HGNN) for LAGS resource allocation. GW-HGNN explicitly models the non-uniform contribution of different image groups to the reconstruction process, thus automatically balancing data fidelity and transmission cost. The key insight of GW-HGNN is to transform LAGS losses and communication constraints into graph learning costs for dual-level message passing. Experiments on real-world LAGS datasets demonstrate that GW-HGNN significantly outperforms state-of-the-art benchmarks across key rendering metrics, including PSNR, SSIM, and LPIPS. Furthermore, GW-HGNN reduces computational latency by approximately 100x compared to the widely-used MOSEK solver, achieving millisecond-level inference suitable for real-time deployment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于低空高斯溅射（LAGS）场景重建的异构图神经网络资源分配方法，有效提升了3D重建质量和效率。
AI.motivation: 现有LAGS资源分配方案未考虑由于不同视角造成的图像多样性，导致数据传输与重建质量权衡失衡及效率低下。
AI.method: 提出了Groupwise Heterogeneous Graph Neural Network（GW-HGNN），通过图学习方式显式建模不同图像组对重建的非均匀贡献，将重建损失和通信约束转化为图学习代价，实现双层消息传递，自动平衡数据保真度与通讯开销。
AI.result: 在真实LAGS数据集上的实验结果显示，GW-HGNN在PSNR、SSIM与LPIPS等关键指标上明显优于现有方法。此外，该方法在推理速度上比主流MOSEK求解器快约100倍，可实现实时应用。
AI.conclusion: GW-HGNN能够高效分配LAGS系统中的资源，兼顾重建质量和传输效率，显著优于现有基线方法，具备实际部署价值。

title: How Tokenization Limits Phonological Knowledge Representation in Language Models and How to Improve Them
summary: Tokenization is the first step in every language model (LM), yet it never takes the sounds of words into account. We investigate how tokenization influences text-only LMs' ability to represent phonological knowledge. Through a series of probing experiments, we show that subword-based tokenization systematically weakens the encoding of both local (e.g., rhyme) and global (e.g., syllabification) phonological features. To quantify this effect, we introduce the syllabification-tokenization alignment distance (STAD), a metric that measures the misalignment between a model's tokenization and the natural syllable boundaries of words, and find that higher misalignment correlates with poorer phonological representations, providing a simple diagnostic for phonology-aware tokenization. To address these limitations, we propose a lightweight IPA-based fine-tuning method that infuses phonological awareness into LMs, leading to consistent improvements across three phonology-related tasks while largely preserving math and general reasoning ability, with 1.1\% and 0.9\% drops on GSM8K and MMLU, respectively.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了语言模型中的分词方式如何影响其音系知识的表达，并提出改进方法。
AI.motivation: 当前的分词（tokenization）策略忽略了单词的语音信息，可能导致语言模型难以捕捉和表达音系特征，这对与音系有关的下游任务构成障碍。
AI.method: 通过一系列探针实验，分析了子词级分词对局部与全局音系特征编码的削弱效应，提出了STAD指标用于量化分词与音节边界之间的不匹配，并引入基于国际音标（IPA）的微调方法来增强模型音系感知能力。
AI.result: 实验证明，分词与音节边界的不匹配程度越高，模型的音系特征表达能力越差。所提IPA微调方法在三个音系相关任务中均带来显著提升，并且在GSM8K和MMLU任务中的性能几乎未下降（分别下降1.1%和0.9%）。
AI.conclusion: 传统分词方法对音系特征学习存在抑制作用，IPA微调能有效提升音系能力且不显著影响其他推理任务，适合构建更具音系感知的语言模型。

title: Bridging Coarse and Fine Recognition: A Hybrid Approach for Open-Ended Multi-Granularity Object Recognition in Interactive Educational Games
summary: Recent advances in Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have enabled open-ended object recognition, yet they struggle with fine-grained tasks. In contrast, CLIP-style models excel at fine-grained recognition but lack broad coverage of general object categories. To bridge this gap, we propose \textbf{HyMOR}, a \textbf{Hy}brid \textbf{M}ulti-granularity open-ended \textbf{O}bject \textbf{R}ecognition framework that integrates an MLLM with a CLIP model. In HyMOR, the MLLM performs open-ended and coarse-grained object recognition, while the CLIP model specializes in fine-grained identification of domain-specific objects such as animals and plants. This hybrid design enables accurate object understanding across multiple semantic granularities, serving as a robust perceptual foundation for downstream multi-modal content generation and interactive gameplay. To support evaluation in content-rich and educational scenarios, we introduce TBO (TextBook Objects), a dataset containing 20,942 images annotated with 8,816 object categories extracted from textbooks. Extensive experiments demonstrate that HyMOR narrows the fine-grained recognition gap with CLIP to 0.2\% while improving general object recognition by 2.5\% over a baseline MLLM, measured by average Sentence-BERT (SBert) similarity. Overall, HyMOR achieves a 23.2\% improvement in average SBert across all evaluated datasets, highlighting its effectiveness in enabling accurate perception for multi-modal game content generation and interactive learning applications.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为HyMOR的混合多粒度开放式目标识别框架，结合了多模态大语言模型（MLLM）与CLIP模型，实现了更全面且精细的目标识别能力。
AI.motivation: 目前MLLM虽然可以进行开放式目标识别，但在精细化任务上表现不佳；而CLIP在精细识别上表现优秀，但无法涵盖广泛目标类别。因此，有必要将两者优势结合，满足多粒度和开放式的任务需求。
AI.method: 作者提出HyMOR框架，将MLLM用于开放式和粗粒度目标识别，同时利用CLIP对如动物、植物等具体领域进行精细化识别，实现多语义粒度的融合。并构建了TBO（TextBook Objects）数据集，便于内容丰富和教育场景的评测。
AI.result: HyMOR使精细识别的差距缩小至0.2%（与CLIP），同时泛化目标识别比基线MLLM提升2.5%，在所有评测数据集上平均SBert相似度提升了23.2%。
AI.conclusion: HyMOR框架有效结合了MLLM与CLIP的优势，大幅提升了多粒度目标识别的能力，非常适用于多模态内容生成和交互式学习等场景。

title: ScenarioControl: Vision-Language Controllable Vectorized Latent Scenario Generation
summary: We introduce ScenarioControl, the first vision-language control mechanism for learned driving scenario generation. Given a text prompt or an input image, Scenario-Control synthesizes diverse, realistic 3D scenario rollouts - including map, 3D boxes of reactive actors over time, pedestrians, driving infrastructure, and ego camera observations. The method generates scenes in a vectorized latent space that represents road structure and dynamic agents jointly. To connect multimodal control with sparse vectorized scene elements, we propose a cross-global control mechanism that integrates crossattention with a lightweight global-context branch, enabling fine-grained control over road layout and traffic conditions while preserving realism. The method produces temporally consistent scenario rollouts from the perspectives different actors in the scene, supporting long-horizon continuation of driving scenarios. To facilitate training and evaluation, we release a dataset with text annotations aligned to vectorized map structures. Extensive experiments validate that the control adherence and fidelity of ScenarioControl compare favorable to all tested methods across all experiments. Project webpage: https://light.princeton.edu/ScenarioControl

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了ScenarioControl，这是首个面向视觉-语言的驾驶场景生成可控机制，实现了根据文本或图片生成多样、真实的3D驾驶场景。方法在联合表征道路结构和动态要素的向量空间中生成场景，并引入跨模态全局控制机制提升控制粒度和场景真实性。实验结果显示该方法优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 当前自动驾驶领域对于模拟多样且真实驾驶场景有强需求，尤其需要灵活、高保真的生成方式，以及能精细控制道路和交通要素的方法。现有技术缺乏能通过多模态输入（如文本和图片）高精度控制的生成机制。
AI.method: 提出了ScenarioControl方法，能根据文字或图片生成3D连续驾驶场景。创新点包括在统一向量化潜空间中建模道路和动态交通要素，并设计了结合跨模态注意力和全局上下文的控制机制，实现对道路布局和交通状况的精细可控。方法支持从场景不同参与者视角持续生成场景。为支持训练与评估，作者还发布了配有文本注释与向量结构的场景数据集。
AI.result: 实验验证了ScenarioControl在控制精度和场景真实性上均优于所有对比方法，无论是从可控性还是生成质量都表现出显著提升。
AI.conclusion: ScenarioControl为自动驾驶仿真场景生成提供了首个视觉-语言控制机制，实现了多模态精细可控，提升了生成场景的多样性和真实性，为自动驾驶场景数据合成和应用探索提供了新工具。

title: Beyond Word Boundaries: A Hebrew Coreference Benchmark and an Evaluation Protocol for Morphologically Complex Text
summary: Coreference Resolution (CR) is a fundamental NLP task critical for long-form tasks as information extraction, summarization, and many business applications. However, CR methods originally designed for English struggle with Morphologically Rich Languages (MRLs), where mention boundaries do not necessarily align with word boundaries, and a single token may consist of multiple anaphors. CR modeling and evaluation protocols standardly assume that, as in English, words and mentions mostly align. However, this assumption breaks down in MRLs, particularly in the context of LLMs' raw-text processing and end-to-end tasks. To assess and address this challenge, we introduce {\em KibutzR}, the first comprehensive CR dataset for Modern Hebrew, an MRL rich with complex words and pronominal clitics. We deliver an annotated dataset that identifies mentions at word, sub-word and multi-word levels, and propose an evaluation protocol that directly addresses word/morpheme boundary discrepancies. Our experiments show that contemporary LLMs perform significantly worse on Hebrew than on English, and that performance degrades on raw unsegmented text. Crucially, we show an inverse performance-trend in Hebrew relative to English, where smaller encoders perform far better than contemporary decoder models, leaving ample space for investigation and improvement. We deliver a new benchmark for Hebrew coreference resolution and a segmentation-aware evaluation protocol to inform future work on other MRLs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了KibutzR，这是适用于现代希伯来语的首个全面指代消解（CR）数据集，并设计了针对词/词素边界不一致问题的新评估协议。实验结果显示，现有的大型语言模型（LLMs）在希伯来语上的表现远差于英语，且小型编码器反而优于主流解码器模型。
AI.motivation: 主流指代消解方法通常假设‘词’和‘提及’大致对齐，但在词形变化丰富的语言（如现代希伯来语）中，这一假设不成立，导致CR效果大幅下滑。现有评估方法和数据集也不适用于这些语言，因此需要新的数据和评价体系来推动相关研究。
AI.method: 作者构建了KibutzR数据集，不仅标注了词级、子词级和多词级的提及，还设计了能够处理词/词素边界不对齐问题的评价协议，并用不同LLM模型在希伯来语和英语上的CR任务表现进行了实验对比。
AI.result: 实验显示，现有的LLMs在希伯来语上的CR表现显著差于英语，且在未分词的原始文本上表现进一步下降。更特别的是，在希伯来语上，小型编码器模型优于大型解码器模型，这一趋势与英语相反。
AI.conclusion: 本文为现代希伯来语CR研究提供了首个基准数据集与细粒度的评估协议，并揭示了主流LLMs在MRLs上的局限与不同模型结构的表现差异，为今后词形变化丰富语言的CR任务研究提供了新的方向和方法论。

title: Improving Radio Interferometry Imaging by Explicitly Modeling Cross-Domain Consistency in Reconstruction
summary: Radio astronomy plays a crucial role in understanding the universe, particularly within the realm of non-thermal astrophysics. Images of celestial objects are derived from the signals (called visibility) measured by radio telescopes. Such imaging results, called dirty images, contain artifacts due to factors such as sparsity and therefore require reconstruction to improve imaging quality. Existing methods typically restrict reconstruction to a unimodal domain, either to the dirty image after imaging or to the sparse visibility prior to imaging. Focusing solely on each unimodal reconstruction results in the loss of complementary in-context information in either the visibility or image domain, leading to an incomplete modeling of mutual dependency and consistency. To address these challenges, we propose CDCRec, a multimodal radio interferometric data reconstruction method that explicitly models cross-domain consistency. We design a hierarchical multi-task and multi-stage framework to enhance the exploration of interplays between domains during reconstruction. Our experimental results demonstrate that CDCRec improves imaging performance through enhanced cross-domain correlation extraction. In particular, our self-supervised complementary modeling strategy is better than current methods at interferometric domain translations that rely heavily on recovering dense information from constrained source-domain data.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的多模态射电干涉数据重建方法，通过跨域一致性建模提升成像质量，并显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 以往射电天文成像方法在重建过程中仅在单一模态（脏图像或原始可见度信号）中操作，忽视了两域之间的互补信息，导致成像结果存在一致性和信息损失问题。
AI.method: 提出CDCRec方法，构建分层多任务、多阶段的重建框架，在重建过程中显式建模并利用可见度与图像域的跨域一致性信息；采用自监督方式提升互补建模能力。
AI.result: 实验表明，CDCRec在成像性能上优于当前其他方法，能够更有效地从受限源域数据恢复密集信息，实现更优的干涉测量域转换。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过增强跨域关联建模，有效提升射电干涉成像的质量，为射电天文观测数据处理提供了更先进的重建手段。

title: Fringe Projection Based Vision Pipeline for Autonomous Hard Drive Disassembly
summary: Unrecovered e-waste represents a significant economic loss. Hard disk drives (HDDs) comprise a valuable e-waste stream necessitating robotic disassembly. Automating the disassembly of HDDs requires holistic 3D sensing, scene understanding, and fastener localization, however current methods are fragmented, lack robust 3D sensing, and lack fastener localization. We propose an autonomous vision pipeline which performs 3D sensing using a Fringe Projection Profilometry (FPP) module, with selective triggering of a depth completion module where FPP fails, and integrates this module with a lightweight, real-time instance segmentation network for scene understanding and critical component localization. By utilizing the same FPP camera-projector system for both our depth sensing and component localization modules, our depth maps and derived 3D geometry are inherently pixel-wise aligned with the segmentation masks without registration, providing an advantage over RGB-D perception systems common in industrial sensing. We optimize both our trained depth completion and instance segmentation networks for deployment-oriented inference. The proposed system achieves a box mAP@50 of 0.960 and mask mAP@50 of 0.957 for instance segmentation, while the selected depth completion configuration with the Depth Anything V2 Base backbone achieves an RMSE of 2.317 mm and MAE of 1.836 mm; the Platter Facing learned inference stack achieved a combined latency of 12.86 ms and a throughput of 77.7 Frames Per Second (FPS) on the evaluation workstation. Finally, we adopt a sim-to-real transfer learning approach to augment our physical dataset. The proposed perception pipeline provides both high-fidelity semantic and spatial data which can be valuable for downstream robotic disassembly. The synthetic dataset developed for HDD instance segmentation will be made publicly available.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于硬盘驱动器（HDD）自动拆解的高精度视觉感知系统，显著提升了3D感知与组件定位能力，并可应用于后续的机器人自动拆解工作。
AI.motivation: 未回收的电子垃圾导致巨大经济损失，尤其是HDD等高价值部件的高效自动回收亟需提升。现有的自动拆解方法缺乏可靠的3D感知和紧固件定位方案，难以满足实际应用需求。
AI.method: 提出一种端到端自主视觉管线：①利用条纹投影轮廓（FPP）进行3D感知，FPP失败时可选择性触发深度补全模块；②通过轻量级实例分割网络进行场景理解与关键部件定位；③系统采用同一FPP相机-投影设备采集数据，实现分割与3D几何天然像素级对齐；④深度补全与实例分割网络均针对部署场景优化，提升运行速度和精度；⑤引入仿真到现实迁移学习扩充物理数据集。
AI.result: 所提系统在实例分割上取得了box mAP@50为0.960，mask mAP@50为0.957；深度补全RMSE为2.317mm，MAE为1.836mm；推理延迟12.86ms，帧率77.7FPS。
AI.conclusion: 该视觉感知管线为下游机器人HDD自动拆解任务提供了高质量的语义与空间数据，具有工业应用前景。论文还将公开用于实例分割的合成数据集。

title: The Provenance Gap in Clinical AI: Evidence-Traceable Temporal Knowledge Graphs for Rare Disease Reasoning
comment: 32 pages, 9 figures, 7 tables. Will submit to npj Digital Medicine. Supplementary materials included
summary: Frontier large language models generate clinically accurate outputs, but their citations are often fabricated. We term this the Provenance Gap. We tested five frontier LLMs across 36 clinician-validated scenarios for three rare neuromuscular disease pairs. No model produced a clinically relevant PubMed identifier without prompting. When explicitly asked to cite, the best model achieved 15.3% relevant PMIDs; the majority resolved to real publications in unrelated fields. We present HEG-TKG (Hierarchical Evidence-Grounded Temporal Knowledge Graphs), a system that grounds clinical claims in temporal knowledge graphs built from 4,512 PubMed records and curated sources with quality-tier stratification and 1,280 disease-trajectory milestones. In a controlled three-arm comparison using the same synthesis model, HEG-TKG matches baseline clinical feature coverage while achieving 100% evidence verifiability with 203 inline citations. Guideline-RAG, given overlapping source documents as raw text, produces zero verifiable citations. LLM judges cannot distinguish fabricated from verified citations without PubMed audit data. Independent clinician evaluation confirms the verifiability advantage (Cohen's d = 1.81, p < 0.001) with no degradation on safety or completeness. A counterfactual experiment shows 80% resistance to injected clinical errors with 100% detectability via citation trace. The system deploys on-premise via open-source models so patient data never leaves institutional infrastructure.

AI.tldr: 主流大语言模型在医学领域输出内容虽准确，但引用经常为伪造，论文提出HEG-TKG系统，有效提升了医学AI生成内容的可溯源性和引用真实性。
AI.motivation: 虽然大语言模型能生成临床上准确的内容，但它们常常随意编造文献引用，影响了医学AI在真正临床场景的可信度，因此急需解决如何让模型输出既有临床价值又可溯源。
AI.method: 作者检验了5个主流大语言模型在36个由临床医生验证的罕见神经肌肉疾病案例中的表现，并构建HEG-TKG（分层证据本体-时序知识图谱）系统，将4,512条PubMed文献及1,280条病程关键点系统化为分层、可溯证据体系，用以溯源LLM生成内容。对比基线方案还包括直接提供原始文本的RAG（Guideline-RAG）。通过实际比对，考察引用的真实性及内容完整性/安全性。
AI.result: HEG-TKG系统在临床信息覆盖率与常规LLM持平，但其生成内容的证据可验证性达到100%（203条实际引用），而RAG方案生成0条可核实引用；单独临床医生评估也证实这一优势，统计学显著；在注入错误信息的对抗实验中，系统可有效检出错误。
AI.conclusion: HEG-TKG系统能显著提高大语言模型在医学AI输出的可溯源性和事实性，同时保障内容的完整性和安全性，可在本地安全部署，有望推动医学类AI的临床实际应用。

title: Generative Semantic Communication via Alternating Dual-Domain Posterior Sampling
summary: Generative semantic communication (SemCom) harnesses pretrained generative priors to improve the perceptual quality of wireless image transmission. Existing generative SemCom receivers, however, rely on maximum a posteriori (MAP) estimation, which fundamentally cannot preserve the data distribution and thus limits achievable perceptual quality. Moreover, current diffusion-based approaches using single-domain guidance face significant limitations: latent-domain guidance is sensitive to channel noise, while image-domain guidance inherits decoder bias. Simply combining both domains simultaneously yields an overconfident pseudo-posterior. In this paper, we formulate semantic decoding as a Bayesian inverse problem and prove that posterior sampling achieves optimal perceptual quality by preserving the data distribution. Building on this insight, we propose alternating dual-domain posterior sampling (ADDPS), a diffusion-based SemCom receiver that alternately enforces latent-domain and image-domain consistency during the sampling process. This alternating strategy decomposes joint posterior sampling into simpler subproblems, avoiding gradient conflicts while retaining the complementary strengths of both domains. Experiments on FFHQ demonstrate that the proposed ADDPS achieves superior perceptual quality compared with existing methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了交替双域后验采样（ADDPS）方法，通过在扩散式语义通信结构中交替施加潜域和图像域一致性，提升了无线图像传输的感知质量，并在FFHQ数据集上取得了优异表现。
AI.motivation: 现有的生成式语义通信接收机多依赖于最大后验（MAP）估计，无法很好地保持数据分布，限制了图像传输的感知质量。同时，当前基于扩散的单域引导方法存在仅在潜域或图像域引导时的局限性，无法兼容两者优势，亟需改进方法。
AI.method: 作者将语义解码建模为贝叶斯逆问题，提出了一种扩散式的交替双域后验采样（ADDPS）方法：在采样过程中交替施加潜域和图像域一致性，将联合后验采样分解为两个简单的子问题，融合两种域的互补优势，避免了梯度冲突。
AI.result: 在FFHQ数据集上的实验表明，ADDPS方法在感知质量方面优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过理论分析和实验验证，作者证明了后验采样能最优保持数据分布，ADDPS实现了更优的无线图像传输感知质量，为生成式语义通信领域带来改进。

title: Seeing Isn't Believing: Mitigating Belief Inertia via Active Intervention in Embodied Agents
summary: Recent advancements in large language models (LLMs) have enabled agents to tackle complex embodied tasks through environmental interaction. However, these agents still make suboptimal decisions and perform ineffective actions, as they often overlook critical environmental feedback that differs from their internal beliefs. Through a formal probing analysis, we characterize this as belief inertia, a phenomenon where agents stubbornly adhere to prior beliefs despite explicit observations. To address this, we advocate active belief intervention, moving from passive understanding to active management. We introduce the Estimate-Verify-Update (EVU) mechanism, which empowers agents to predict expected outcomes, verify them against observations through explicit reasoning, and actively update prior beliefs based on the verification evidence. EVU is designed as a unified intervention mechanism that generates textual belief states explicitly, and can be integrated into both prompting-based and training-based agent reasoning methods. Extensive experiments across three embodied benchmarks demonstrate that EVU consistently yields substantial gains in task success rates. Further analyses validate that our approach effectively mitigates belief inertia, advancing the development of more robust embodied agents. Our code is available at https://github.com/WangHanLinHenry/EVU.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了Estimate-Verify-Update（EVU）机制，以解决大模型智能体在具身任务中容易产生“信念惯性”并忽视环境反馈的问题。实验显示EVU显著提升任务成功率。
AI.motivation: 尽管大语言模型驱动的智能体能够解决复杂的具身任务，但其决策往往受到内部信念影响，忽略与现实反馈不符的信息，导致动作低效或失误。这种现象被称为“信念惯性”。研究者希望提升智能体对环境反馈的敏感度，减缓信念惯性，增强智能体的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 作者提出了一种主动信念干预机制——Estimate-Verify-Update（EVU）。该方法让智能体主动估计预期结果、通过推理验证实际观察与预期的一致性，并据此积极更新先验信念。EVU生成显式的文本化信念状态，能够兼容于基于prompt和基于训练的推理框架。
AI.result: 在三个具身智能体任务基准上，EVU方法带来了显著的任务成功率提升。进一步分析显示，EVU能有效缓解信念惯性，并提升智能体对环境反馈的适应能力。
AI.conclusion: EVU作为统一信念干预机制，有效增强了具身智能体的鲁棒性和决策能力，为该类代理研究带来了进步。相关代码已开源。

title: Please refuse to answer me! Mitigating Over-Refusal in Large Language Models via Adaptive Contrastive Decoding
summary: Safety-aligned large language models (LLMs) often generate refusal responses to harmless queries due to the over-refusal problem. However, existing methods for mitigating over-refusal cannot maintain a low refusal ratio for harmless queries while keeping a high refusal ratio for malicious ones. In this paper, we analyze how system prompts with varying safety levels affect LLM refusal behaviors when facing over-refusal queries. A key observation is that, when LLMs suffer from the over-refusal issue, non-refusal tokens remain present in the next-token candidate list, but the model systematically fails to select them, despite the generation of refusal tokens. Based on this observation, we propose a training-free and model-agnostic approach, Adaptive Contrastive Decoding (AdaCD), to mitigate over-refusal while maintaining LLM safety. First, AdaCD compares the output distributions of the LLM with or without an extreme safety system prompt to refine the refusal token distribution. Second, we introduce an adaptive contrastive decoding strategy that dynamically incorporates or removes the refusal token distribution, adaptively boosting the probability of selecting refusal or non-refusal tokens. Experimental results on five benchmark datasets show that, on average, AdaCD reduces the refusal ratio for over-refusal queries by 10.35%, yet still increases the refusal ratio for malicious queries by 0.13%. Code is available at https://github.com/OutdoorManofML/AdaCD.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种训练无关、模型无关的方法AdaCD，有效缓解了大语言模型（LLM）的过度拒绝问题，同时保证对恶意请求的高拒绝率。
AI.motivation: 现有的大语言模型在安全调整后，常常对无害请求也产生拒绝（即过度拒绝），而现有缓解方法难以做到对无害请求低拒绝率、对恶意请求高拒绝率兼顾。
AI.method: 作者观察到，过度拒绝时，非拒绝（正常回答）tokens 仍在LLM候选列表中，但模型却系统性地未选择它们。基于这一点，提出AdaCD方法：通过对比有无极端安全提示下的输出分布，精细调整拒绝token分布，并引入自适应对比解码策略，动态提升拒绝或非拒绝token的选择概率。该方法无需训练、适用于任何LLM。
AI.result: 实验在五个基准数据集上表明，AdaCD平均将无害请求的拒绝率降低10.35%，恶意请求的拒绝率仍提升0.13%。
AI.conclusion: AdaCD能有效缓解过度拒绝，在保障安全的同时提高了模型实用性；且该方法无需改动模型本身，适用范围广。

title: Frequency-Decomposed INR for NIR-Assisted Low-Light RGB Image Denoising
summary: Addressing the issues of severe noise and high frequency structural degradation in visible images under low-light conditions, this paper proposes a Near Infrared (NIR) aided low light image restoration method based on Frequency Decoupled Implicit Neural Representation (FDINR). Based on the statistical prior of RGB-NIR cross-modal frequency correlations, specifically that low-frequency RGB signals are more reliable, whereas high frequency NIR signals exhibit higher correlation, we explicitly decompose images into distinct frequency components via multi-scale wavelet transforms and construct a dual-branch implicit neural representation framework. Within this framework, we design a cross modal differentiated frequency supervision mechanism, leveraging low light RGB to guide the reconstruction of low frequency luminance and color, and utilizing high-SNR NIR signals to constrain the generation of high frequency texture details, thereby achieving complementary advantages in the frequency domain. Furthermore, an uncertainty-based adaptive weighting loss function is introduced to automatically balance the contributions of different frequency tasks, solving the problems of color distortion and artifacts caused by rigid fusion in the spatial domain common in traditional methods. Experimental results demonstrate that FD-INR not only effectively restores image luminance consistency and structural details but also, benefitting from its implicit continuous representation, outperforms existing methods in arbitrary-resolution reconstruction tasks, significantly enhancing the reliability of low light perception.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于频率解耦隐式神经表示（FDINR）的NIR辅助低照度图像恢复方法，通过多尺度小波变换和双分支网络，将低频RGB和高频NIR信息互补融合，显著提升低照度下图像的结构和色彩还原能力。
AI.motivation: 为解决低光照条件下可见光图像噪声严重和高频结构退化，同时传统方法融合易产生色彩失真与伪影的问题。
AI.method: 利用RGB-NIR频域相关性的统计先验，通过小波变换将图像分离为低频与高频分量，分别以低光RGB引导低频亮度色彩重建、高信噪比NIR约束高频纹理。构建双分支隐式神经表示架构，并引入基于不确定性的自适应加权损失函数，实现不同频率任务的自动平衡监督。
AI.result: 所提出的FD-INR方法不仅有效恢复了图像亮度一致性与结构细节，在任意分辨率的重建下也超越了现有方法，大幅提升低照度感知的可靠性。
AI.conclusion: 频率解耦与跨模态监督结合的隐式表征架构，在低光照图像恢复及大幅面重建任务中表现出优异的性能，是NIR与RGB融合在频率域的有效实现方案。

title: Infrastructure-Centric World Models: Bridging Temporal Depth and Spatial Breadth for Roadside Perception
summary: World models, generative AI systems that simulate how environments evolve, are transforming autonomous driving, yet all existing approaches adopt an ego-vehicle perspective, leaving the infrastructure viewpoint unexplored. We argue that infrastructure-centric world models offer a fundamentally complementary capability: the bird's-eye, multi-sensor, persistent viewpoint that roadside systems uniquely possess. Central to our thesis is a spatio-temporal complementarity: fixed roadside sensors excel at temporal depth, accumulating long-term behavioral distributions including rare safety-critical events, while vehicle-borne sensors excel at spatial breadth, sampling diverse scenes across large road networks. This paper presents a vision for Infrastructure-centric World Models (I-WM) in three phases: (I) generative scene understanding with quality-aware uncertainty propagation, (II) physics-informed predictive dynamics with multi-agent counterfactual reasoning, and (III) collaborative world models for V2X communication via latent space alignment. We propose a dual-layer architecture, annotation-free perception as a multi-modal data engine feeding end-to-end generative world models, with a phased sensor strategy from LiDAR through 4D radar and signal phase data to event cameras. We establish a taxonomy of driving world model paradigms, position I-WM relative to LeCun's JEPA, Li Fei-Fei's spatial intelligence, and VLA architectures, and introduce Infrastructure VLA (I-VLA) as a novel unification of roadside perception, language commands, and traffic control actions. Our vision builds upon existing multi-LiDAR pipelines and identifies open-source foundations for each phase, providing a path toward infrastructure that understands and anticipates traffic.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了基础设施为中心的世界模型（I-WM），以补足以车辆为中心的传统自动驾驶感知方式，强调利用路侧多传感器和持续视角提升交通环境理解和安全预测能力。
AI.motivation: 当前生成式AI世界模型多以自动驾驶车辆自身视角为主，忽视了基础设施（如路侧传感器）能提供的全局、长时、持续和多模态数据，未能充分挖掘红绿灯、摄像头等固定传感器在安全事件积累和稀有场景理解方面的独特价值。
AI.method: 提出三阶段基础设施为中心世界模型I-WM：(I)基于生成模型和不确定性传播进行场景理解；(II)引入物理知识和多智能体反事实推理进行动态预测；(III)通过潜空间对齐实现V2X协作世界模型。此外，设计‘双层架构’，利用多模态数据流（LiDAR、4D雷达、信号相位、事件相机）进行无注释感知，引入Infrastructure VLA（I-VLA）统一路测感知、语言指令及交通管控。
AI.result: 建立了自动驾驶世界模型的分类体系，并将I-WM与JEPA、Fei-Fei的空间智能、VLA体系进行对比，同时提出了I-VLA新架构。基于现有多LiDAR管线，并为各阶段推荐开源基础。
AI.conclusion: I-WM为交通基础设施赋能，能持续、系统地理解和预测交通场景，协助提升安全性和主动控制能力，为下一代自动驾驶与智慧交通提供关键支撑。

title: RoIt-XMASA: Multi-Domain Multilingual Sentiment Analysis Dataset for Romanian and Italian
comment: Accepted at the International AAAI Conference on Web and Social Media (ICWSM 2026)
summary: We present RoIt-XMASA, a multilingual dataset that extends the Cross-lingual Multi-domain Amazon Sentiment Analysis to Italian and Romanian, comprising 36,000 labeled reviews across three domains (books, movies, and music) and 202,141 unlabeled samples. To address cross-lingual and cross-domain challenges, we propose a multi-target adversarial training framework that employs loss reversal with meta-learned coefficients to dynamically balance sentiment discrimination with domain and language invariance. XLM-R achieves an F1-score of 66.23% with our approach, outperforming the baseline by 4.64%. Few-shot evaluation shows that Llama-3.1-8B achieves 58.43% F1-score, revealing a meaningful trade-off between the efficiency of prompting-based approaches and the higher performance of task-specific fine-tuning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了RoIt-XMASA，这是一个含有意大利语和罗马尼亚语、涵盖图书、电影和音乐三个领域的多语言情感分析数据集，共有36,000条带标签和202,141条未标注样本。针对跨语言和跨领域情感分析的挑战，提出了一种多目标对抗训练方法，利用元学习调整损失权重。XLM-R模型在该方法下F1分数提升到66.23%，比基线高4.64%。少样本实验中，Llama-3.1-8B模型在提示方法下取得58.43% F1分数，显示任务微调与提示法之间的性能与效率权衡。
AI.motivation: 当前跨语言、跨领域的情感分析资源有限，尤其是在低资源语言（如意大利语和罗马尼亚语）和多个应用领域。为提升多语言、多领域情感分析的研究和实际应用，需要构建新的数据集，并设计能兼顾语言和领域无关性的模型训练方法。
AI.method: 1）建立包含意大利语和罗马尼亚语、三大领域（图书、电影、音乐）的情感分析数据集。2）提出多目标对抗训练框架：在训练时通过对抗性损失实现领域和语言不变性，元学习动态调整损失权重。3）将XLM-R模型和Llama-3.1-8B少样本学习方法应用于该任务，并与基线法比较。
AI.result: 采用所提出的方法，XLM-R模型F1分数达到66.23%，相比基线提升了4.64%。在少样本学习（few-shot）评估下，Llama-3.1-8B提示方法获得58.43% F1分数。结果反映了精调（fine-tuning）与提示法（prompting）在性能与易用性之间的权衡。
AI.conclusion: 新数据集和对抗框架显著提升了多语言、多领域情感分析的表现。任务定制微调优于提示法，但提示法更高效便捷。该研究为多语言领域的情感分析模型开发与评估提供了重要基准和方法参考。

title: Channel Attention-Guided Cross-Modal Knowledge Distillation for Referring Image Segmentation
summary: Referring image segmentation (RIS) requires accurate segmentation of target regions in images according to language descriptions, which is a cross-modal task integrating vision and language. Existing RIS methods typically employ large-scale vision and language encoding models to improve performance, but their enormous parameter size severely restricts deployment in scenarios with limited computing resources. To solve this problem, this paper proposes a channel attention-guided cross-modal knowledge distillation method, which transfers the high-order fine-grained correlations between vision and language learned by the teacher network, as well as the correlations between semantic components represented by each channel, to the student network. Compared with the traditional pixel-wise relational distillation, this method not only enables the student to learn the knowledge of the teacher, but also retains part of its independent learning ability, alleviating the transfer of learning bias. Experimental results on two public datasets show that the proposed distillation method does not introduce additional parameters during inference and can achieve significant performance improvement for the student model.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种通道注意力引导的跨模态知识蒸馏方法，用于精简但高效地完成语义分割任务。该方法能在不增加推理参数的情况下，显著提升轻量模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有RIS方法为提升性能，常采用大规模视觉-语言编码模型。但参数体量庞大，限制了此类模型在算力受限场景的应用。如何实现精简高效的跨模态图像分割，成为亟需解决的问题。
AI.method: 提出“通道注意力引导的跨模态知识蒸馏方法”，将教师网络中视觉与语言高阶细粒度相关性、以及各个通道的语义成分相关性传递给学生网络，区别于传统像素级蒸馏，做到既学习教师知识，又保留学生自身独立学习的能力。
AI.result: 在两个公开数据集上，学生模型采用该蒸馏方法后，性能显著提升，且在推理时无需增加额外参数。
AI.conclusion: 新提出的知识蒸馏方法能够有效提升轻量RIS模型的分割效果，为RIS在资源受限环境中的应用提供了有力支撑。

title: Re$^2$MoGen: Open-Vocabulary Motion Generation via LLM Reasoning and Physics-Aware Refinement
summary: Text-to-motion (T2M) generation aims to control the behavior of a target character via textual descriptions. Leveraging text-motion paired datasets, existing T2M models have achieved impressive performance in generating high-quality motions within the distribution of their training data. However, their performance deteriorates notably when the motion descriptions differ significantly from the training texts. To address this issue, we propose Re$^2$MoGen, a Reasoning and Refinement open-vocabulary Motion Generation framework that leverages enhanced Large Language Model (LLM) reasoning to generate an initial motion planning and then refine its physical plausibility via reinforcement learning (RL) post-training. Specifically, Re$^2$MoGen consists of three stages: We first employ Monte Carlo tree search to enhance the LLM's reasoning ability in generating reasonable keyframes of the motion based on text prompts, specifying only the root and several key joints' positions to ease the reasoning process. Then, we apply a human pose model as a prior to optimize the full-body poses based on the planned keyframes and use the resulting incomplete motion to supervise fine-tuning a pre-trained motion generator via a dynamic temporal matching objective, enabling spatiotemporal completion. Finally, we use post-training with physics-aware reward to refine motion quality to eliminate physical implausibility in LLM-planned motions. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our framework can generate semantically consistent and physically plausible motions and achieve state-of-the-art performance in open-vocabulary motion generation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的文本到动作生成框架Re$^2$MoGen，通过提升大语言模型的推理能力和后续强化学习细化，能够生成与输入文本语义一致且物理上合理的新颖动作，尤其在开放词汇环境下表现出色。
AI.motivation: 现有文本到动作生成模型虽然在已知训练集分布内表现良好，但遇到与训练文本大不相同的动作描述时，生成能力大幅下降，难以扩展到开放词汇场景。为此，作者旨在提升模型面对新颖或不常见文本描述的泛化与推理能力，并确保生成动作在物理上合理。
AI.method: Re$^2$MoGen框架包括三个阶段：首先，利用蒙特卡洛树搜索增强大语言模型在根据文本生成动作关键帧的推理能力，仅推断根节点与关键关节的位置以简化问题；其次，引入人体姿态模型结合预训练动作生成器，对不完整动作进行时空维度补全，并通过动态时序匹配目标进行微调；最后，通过强化学习和物理感知奖励机制整体验证与细化动作，消除物理不合理性。
AI.result: 大量实验显示，该方法生成的动作在语义一致性和物理合理性方面优于现有方法，在开放词汇的文本到动作生成任务中取得了SOTA（最佳）结果。
AI.conclusion: Re$^2$MoGen不仅提升了对未见文本描述的泛化和推理能力，还保证了生成动作的物理可行性与自然性，为开放文本到动作生成任务带来了显著进展。

title: The Consensus Trap: Rescuing Multi-Agent LLMs from Adversarial Majorities via Token-Level Collaboration
summary: Multi-agent large language model (LLM) architectures increasingly rely on response-level aggregation, such as Majority Voting (MAJ), to raise reasoning ceilings. However, in open environments, agents are highly susceptible to stealthy contextual corruption, such as targeted prompt injections. We reveal a critical structural vulnerability in current multi-agent systems: response-level aggregation collapses when corrupted agents form a local majority. Because voting aggregates fully-formed conclusions, it is blind to flawed intermediate logic. To overcome this systematic limitation, we propose the Token-Level Round-Robin (RR) Collaboration, where agents sequentially interleave generation within a shared auto-regressive context. We formalize this process as a discrete-time dynamical system, proving that token-level interleaving transitions aggregation from a brittle counting of final votes (a linear sum) to a dynamic, interwoven chain of logic (a non-linear operator product). Through this theoretical lens, we prove that the honest model's restorative pull can overpower adversarial corruptions, even when corrupted agents form a majority. We conduct an exhaustive empirical evaluation across diverse reasoning benchmarks and demonstrate that while MAJ collapses when corrupted agents reach a majority, RR maintains robust accuracy well beyond this critical threshold.

AI.tldr: 论文指出当前多智能体大语言模型常用的响应级聚合（如多数投票）架构，在面对恶意上下文污染时存在结构性脆弱，提出了令智能体在共享上下文中逐Token协同生成的新方法，有效缓解了此类攻击的影响。
AI.motivation: 多智能体大模型通过响应级聚合提升推理能力，但在开放环境下易遭受类似定向提示注入的恶意攻击，当被攻击代理占据多数时，多数投票机制会直接崩溃。因此，作者着眼于提升多智能体系统对恶意干扰的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 作者提出Token-Level Round-Robin协同方式：代理在同一自回归上下文中逐Token轮流生成，形成动态交互链，并将该过程形式化为离散时间动力系统，从而改变了信息聚合的结构特性。
AI.result: 理论分析证明，逐Token协同的动力结构，即使在多数代理被攻击时，忠实代理的恢复能力仍可压制恶意扩散。实验还验证了该机制在各类推理基准上，明显优于传统的多数投票，鲁棒性极强。
AI.conclusion: 相比传统响应级投票，多智能体Token级协作能显著提升系统在受控攻击下的健壮性，是多智能体大模型未来值得发展的新协同范式。

title: Modeling Biomechanical Constraint Violations for Language-Agnostic Lip-Sync Deepfake Detection
comment: 8 pages, 4 figures. Keywords: deepfake detection, lip-sync forgery, biomechanical constraints, temporal kinematics, cross-lingual generalization, privacy-preserving detection, geometric features
summary: Current lip-sync deepfake detectors rely on pixel-level artifacts or audio-visual correspondence, failing to generalize across languages because these cues encode data-dependent patterns rather than universal physical laws. We identify a more fundamental principle: generative models do not enforce the biomechanical constraints of authentic orofacial articulation, producing measurably elevated temporal lip variance -- a signal we term temporal lip jitter -- that is empirically consistent across the speaker's language, ethnicity, and recording conditions. We instantiate this principle through BioLip, a lightweight framework operating on 64 perioral landmark coordinates extracted by MediaPipe.

AI.tldr: 现有深度伪造唇同步检测器依赖像素或音视信号，难以跨语言泛化。本文发现生成模型未能遵循真实的面部生物力学，提出用时间唇颤动特征检测伪造。构建了基于MediaPipe面周标记点的BioLip框架。
AI.motivation: 传统唇同步伪造检测方法不具泛化能力，原因在于其使用的数据相关线索（如像素伪影或音视一致性）并非普世规律，跨语言容易失效。亟需更泛化、基于物理或生理机制的方法。
AI.method: 作者提出观测真实说话中面部活动的生物力学约束，发现生成模型无法完全模拟真实性能，从而出现唇部时间波动（temporal lip jitter）异常。利用MediaPipe提取64个人工标记点，设计名为BioLip的轻量级算法框架检测异常波动。
AI.result: 通过对不同语言、种族、录制条件的数据实验，发现“时间唇颤动”信号在伪造视频中表现一致，BioLip方法能稳健地检测深度伪造。
AI.conclusion: 基于唇部生物力学的不变性，BioLip不依赖数据分布和音视频相关性，具备强泛化能力，为唇同步深度伪造检测提供了新思路。

title: A Comparative Evaluation of Geometric Accuracy in NeRF and Gaussian Splatting
summary: Recent advances in neural rendering have introduced numerous 3D scene representations. Although standard computer vision metrics evaluate the visual quality of generated images, they often overlook the fidelity of surface geometry. This limitation is particularly critical in robotics, where accurate geometry is essential for tasks such as grasping and object manipulation. In this paper, we present an evaluation pipeline for neural rendering methods that focuses on geometric accuracy, along with a benchmark comprising 19 diverse scenes. Our approach enables a systematic assessment of reconstruction methods in terms of surface and shape fidelity, complementing traditional visual metrics.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向几何精度的神经渲染方法评测流程，并基于19个场景建立了相关基准，为重建方法在表面与形状保真性方面提供系统评估。
AI.motivation: 现有神经渲染方法侧重图像效果，但忽略了表面几何的精确度，而在机器人的抓取和操控等任务中，几何准确性非常关键。标准视觉指标无法全面反映重建物体的几何保真度，因此亟需有针对性的评测方法。
AI.method: 开发了一套聚焦于几何准确性的评测流程，同时整理了包含19个多样化场景的基准数据集，重点考察表面和形状保真度，与传统视觉指标互补。
AI.result: 该评测流程和基准可以对不同神经重建方法在几何还原能力方面进行系统比较，弥补了现有仅靠视觉指标评价的不足。
AI.conclusion: 本文建立的基于几何精度的评估体系，有助于推动神经渲染方法在对几何精度需求极高的领域（如机器人）的应用和提升。

title: SciImpact: A Multi-Dimensional, Multi-Field Benchmark for Scientific Impact Prediction
summary: The rapid growth of scientific literature calls for automated methods to assess and predict research impact. Prior work has largely focused on citation-based metrics, leaving limited evaluation of models' capability to reason about other impact dimensions. To this end, we introduce SciImpact, a large-scale, multi-dimensional benchmark for scientific impact prediction spanning 19 fields. SciImpact captures various forms of scientific influence, ranging from citation counts to award recognition, media attention, patent reference, and artifact adoption, by integrating heterogeneous data sources and targeted web crawling. It comprises 215,928 contrastive paper pairs reflecting meaningful impact differences in both short-term (e.g., Best Paper Award) and long-term settings (e.g., Nobel Prize). We evaluate 11 widely used large language models (LLMs) on SciImpact. Results show that off-the-shelf models exhibit substantial variability across dimensions and fields, while multi-task supervised fine-tuning consistently enables smaller LLMs (e.g., 4B) to markedly outperform much larger models (e.g., 30B) and surpass powerful closed-source LLMs (e.g., o4-mini). These results establish SciImpact as a challenging benchmark and demonstrate its value for multi-dimensional, multi-field scientific impact prediction. Our project homepage is https://flypig23.github.io/sciimpact-homepage/

AI.tldr: 论文提出了SciImpact，这是一个覆盖19个学科的大规模多维科学影响力预测基准数据集，并用其评估了多个主流大语言模型，发现经过多任务监督微调的小模型在多维影响评估上表现优异。
AI.motivation: 现有自动化评价与预测科学研究影响力的方法大多只关注于基于引用的单一指标，对模型在其他影响力维度（如奖项、媒体关注、专利引用、工具采用等）的衡量和推理能力尚缺乏系统性评估。因此，亟需一个多维度、多领域的基准，用于推动更全面的科学影响力建模。
AI.method: 作者构建了SciImpact基准，覆盖了19个领域，并整合了异构数据源和定向网络爬取，涵盖从引用数、奖项、媒体报道、专利引用到成果采纳等多种影响力维度。数据集包含21.6万组具有显著影响力差异的对比论文对，反映了短期（如最佳论文奖）与长期（如诺贝尔奖）影响。随后，作者用该基准系统性评估了11种大语言模型（包括开源与闭源模型），并测试了经过多任务微调的方法。
AI.result: 实验结果显示：常规大语言模型在不同领域和维度上的表现差异较大，而基于多任务监督微调的小模型（如4B参数规模）在科学影响预测任务中能显著超越未调优的大模型（如30B参数模型）乃至部分强大的闭源模型。
AI.conclusion: SciImpact为多维、多领域的科学影响预测提供了严格、有挑战性的基准，有助于推动相关自动化评估研究的发展。多任务微调策略能让小模型在复杂多维任务中展现超越大模型的能力，验证了其在科学影响评估领域的实际应用价值。

title: Hierarchical Vision Transformer Enhanced by Graph Convolutional Network for Image Classification
summary: Vision Transformer (ViT) has brought new breakthroughs to the field of image classification by introducing the self-attention mechanism and Graph Convolutional Networks(GCN) have been proposed and successfully applied in data representation and analysis. However, there are key challenges which limit their further development: (1) The patch size selected by ViT is crucial for accurate predictions, which raises a natural question: How to select the size of patches properly or how to comprehensively combine small patches and larger patches; (2) While the spatial structure information is important in vision tasks, the 1D position embeddings fails to capture the spatial structure information of patches more accurately; (3) The GCN can capture the local connectivity relationships between image nodes, but it lacks the ability to capture global graph structural information. On the contrary, the self-attention mechanism of ViT can draw the global relation on image patches, but it is unable to model the local structure of image. To overcome such limitations, we propose the Hierarchical Vision Transformer Enhanced by Graph Convolutional Network (GCN-HViT) for image classification. Specifically, the Hierarchical ViT we designed can model patch-wise information interactions on a global scale within each level and model hierarchical relationships between small patches and large patches across multiple levels. In addition, the proposed GCN method functions as a local feature extractor to obtain the local representation of each image patch which serves as a 2D position embedding of each patch in the 2D space. Meanwhile, it models patch-wise information interactions on a local scale within each level. Extensive experiments on 3 real-world datasets demonstrate that GCN-HViT achieves state-of-the-art performance.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了一种结合图卷积网络（GCN）和分层视觉Transformer（HViT）的新模型GCN-HViT，用于提升图像分类性能。
AI.motivation: ViT和GCN在图像分类领域表现优异，但各自存在缺陷：ViT难以处理不同patch大小和空间结构信息，GCN缺乏全局建模能力。如何融合ViT的全局特征与GCN的局部关联，成为研究难点。
AI.method: 提出分层ViT，结合多尺度patch建模patch间的全局和层级关系，通过GCN提取每个patch的局部特征，并作为patch的2D位置嵌入，同时实现patch间的局部信息交互。
AI.result: 在三个真实数据集上进行实验，GCN-HViT优于现有主流方法，达到SOTA性能。
AI.conclusion: GCN-HViT有效融合全局和局部特征建模，克服ViT与GCN局限，显著提升图像分类效果。

title: XEmbodied: A Foundation Model with Enhanced Geometric and Physical Cues for Large-Scale Embodied Environments
summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models drive next-generation autonomous systems, but training them requires scalable, high-quality annotations from complex environments. Current cloud pipelines rely on generic vision-language models (VLMs) that lack geometric reasoning and domain semantics due to their 2D image-text pretraining. To address this mismatch, we propose XEmbodied, a cloud-side foundation model that endows VLMs with intrinsic 3D geometric awareness and interaction with physical cues (e.g., occupancy grids, 3D boxes). Instead of treating geometry as auxiliary input, XEmbodied integrates geometric representations via a structured 3D Adapter and distills physical signals into context tokens using an Efficient Image-Embodied Adapter. Through progressive domain curriculum and reinforcement learning post-training, XEmbodied preserves general capabilities while demonstrating robust performance across 18 public benchmarks. It significantly improves spatial reasoning, traffic semantics, embodied affordance, and out-of-distribution generalization for large-scale scenario mining and embodied VQA.

AI.tldr: XEmbodied是一种云端基础模型，通过引入3D几何感知和物理线索交互能力，提升现有视觉-语言模型（VLM）在自动驾驶等复杂环境中的泛化与推理能力。
AI.motivation: 现有VLM主要基于2D图像与文本预训练，缺乏3D几何推理与专业领域语义，不足以满足下一代自主系统对高质量、可扩展标注的需求，尤其是在涉及物理场景的复杂任务中。
AI.method: 作者提出XEmbodied模型：1）采用结构化3D Adapter，将几何表示直接集成进模型架构中；2）利用高效图像-实体适配器（Efficient Image-Embodied Adapter）将物理信号（如占据网格、3D包围盒）提炼为上下文token；3）辅以渐进式领域课程训练与RL后训练，提升泛化能力。
AI.result: XEmbodied在18个公开基准测试中展示出强大的空间推理、交通语义、具身可及性和分布外泛化能力，优于现有云端VLMs。
AI.conclusion: 通过云端3D适配与高效特征提取，XEmbodied显著弥补了2D VLM在几何和物理理解方面的短板，为大规模场景挖掘和具身问答等任务提供了更强的泛化基础。

title: From Legal Text to Executable Decision Models: Evaluating Structured Representations for Legal Decision Model Generation
summary: Transforming legal text into executable decision logic is a longstanding challenge in legal informatics. With the rise of LLMs, this task has gained renewed interest, but remains challenging due to requiring extensive manual coding and evaluation. We use a unique real-world dataset that pairs production-grade decision models with legal text from the Dutch Environment and Planning Act. These models power the Omgevingsloket government platform, where citizens check permit requirements for environmental activities. We study whether intermediate structured representations can improve LLM-based generation of executable decision models from legal text. We compare four input conditions: raw legal text, text enriched with semantic role labels, text enriched with input and output constraints, and text enriched with both. We evaluate along two dimensions: structural evaluation, through similarity to gold decision models with graph kernels and graphs' descriptive statistics, and outcome evaluation, through functional equivalence by executing models on pre-configured test scenarios. Our findings show that I/O constraints provide the dominant improvement (+37-54% similarity over baseline), while semantic role labels show modest improvements. Outcome evaluation shows that generated models match the gold standard on 51-53% of test scenarios, even though generated models are typically smaller and simpler. We find LLMs eliminate redundant pass-through logic that comprises up to 45-55% of nodes. Importantly, structural similarity and outcome equivalence are complementary: structural similarity does not guarantee outcome equivalence, and vice versa. To facilitate reproducibility, we publicly release our dataset of 95 production decision models with associated legal text and all experimental code.

AI.tldr: 本论文研究如何将法律文本自动转化为可执行的决策模型，提出通过引入中间结构化表示提升大模型生成决策模型的效果。
AI.motivation: 将法律文本转化为可执行决策逻辑对法律信息化十分关键，但传统方法依赖大量人工编码。大模型（LLM）出现为自动化提供了机遇，但转换过程依然复杂，精度与可靠性难以保证。作者希望借助结构化中间表示提升自动生成质量，并以真实政府法案数据验证效果。
AI.method: 使用荷兰环境与规划法案的真实法律文本及配套的生产决策模型，分别将法律文本做四类处理：原始文本、添加语义角色标签、添加输入输出约束、两者都加。分别在结构（图相似度）和结果（功能等价性）两维度评价大模型自动生成的决策模型效果。
AI.result: 引入输入输出约束的结构化信息能显著提升结构相似度（比基线高37-54%），语义角色标签提升有限。生成模型在51-53%测试场景下与金标准模型结果一致。模型相比原始模型更简洁，去除了45-55%的冗余节点。结构相似与功能等价二者互补，不可相互替代。
AI.conclusion: 结构化输入（尤其I/O约束）显著提升法律文本自动转化决策模型的效果，但结构与功能评价需双重使用，单一指标不足。论文公开数据与代码，便于复现和后续研究。

title: Lorentz Framework for Semantic Segmentation
summary: Semantic segmentation in hyperbolic space enables compact modeling of hierarchical structure while providing inherent uncertainty quantification. Prior approaches predominantly rely on the Poincaré ball model, which suffers from numerical instability, optimization, and computational challenges. We propose a novel, tractable, architecture-agnostic semantic segmentation framework (pixel-wise and mask classification) in the hyperbolic Lorentz model. We employ text embeddings with semantic and visual cues to guide hierarchical pixel-level representations in Lorentz space. This enables stable and efficient optimization without requiring a Riemannian optimizer, and easily integrates with existing Euclidean architectures.
