Beyond segmentation, our approach yields free uncertainty estimation, confidence map, boundary delineation, hierarchical and text-based retrieval, and zero-shot performance, reaching generalized flatter minima. We introduce a novel uncertainty and confidence indicator in Lorentz cone embeddings. Further, we provide analytical and empirical insights into Lorentz optimization via gradient analysis. Extensive experiments on ADE20K, COCO-Stuff-164k, Pascal-VOC, and Cityscapes, utilizing state-of-the-art per-pixel classification models (DeepLabV3 and SegFormer) and mask classification models (mask2former and maskformer), validate the effectiveness and generality of our approach. Our results demonstrate the potential of hyperbolic Lorentz embeddings for robust and uncertainty-aware semantic segmentation. Code is available at https://github.com/mxahan/Lorentz_semantic_segmentation.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一种基于双曲洛伦兹空间的语义分割框架，能够稳定高效地进行不同类型语义分割任务，并自然实现不确定性估计和更强的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有的双曲空间分割方法大多依赖Poincaré球模型，存在数值不稳定、优化困难和计算效率低下等问题。作者希望利用洛伦兹模型克服这些问题，提升分割效果与应用普适性。
AI.method: 方法采用了基于语义和视觉线索的文本嵌入来引导洛伦兹空间下的像素级层次表示。提出的框架可与现有欧氏架构无缝对接，无需黎曼优化器，支持像素级和掩码分割两种任务。同时引入了新颖的不确定性与置信度评估指标，并对洛伦兹空间优化的梯度做了理论和实验分析。
AI.result: 在ADE20K、COCO-Stuff-164k、Pascal-VOC、Cityscapes等数据集上，结合DeepLabV3、SegFormer、mask2former、maskformer等主流分割模型进行实验，验证了该方法的有效性和通用性。结果显示双曲洛伦兹嵌入在鲁棒性与不确定性感知方面具有优势。
AI.conclusion: 该研究首次在语义分割中系统应用洛伦兹模型，并带来了稳定高效的分割框架，兼具泛化能力与不确定性估计的创新指标，对语义分割任务具有良好的实际应用前景。

title: OneVL: One-Step Latent Reasoning and Planning with Vision-Language Explanation
comment: Technical Report; 49 pages, 22 figures, 10 tables; Project Page at https://xiaomi-embodied-intelligence.github.io/OneVL
summary: Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning has become a powerful driver of trajectory prediction in VLA-based autonomous driving, yet its autoregressive nature imposes a latency cost that is prohibitive for real-time deployment. Latent CoT methods attempt to close this gap by compressing reasoning into continuous hidden states, but consistently fall short of their explicit counterparts. We suggest that this is due to purely linguistic latent representations compressing a symbolic abstraction of the world, rather than the causal dynamics that actually govern driving. Thus, we present OneVL (One-step latent reasoning and planning with Vision-Language explanations), a unified VLA and World Model framework that routes reasoning through compact latent tokens supervised by dual auxiliary decoders. Alongside a language decoder that reconstructs text CoT, we introduce a visual world model decoder that predicts future-frame tokens, forcing the latent space to internalize the causal dynamics of road geometry, agent motion, and environmental change. A three-stage training pipeline progressively aligns these latents with trajectory, language, and visual objectives, ensuring stable joint optimization. At inference, the auxiliary decoders are discarded and all latent tokens are prefilled in a single parallel pass, matching the speed of answer-only prediction. Across four benchmarks, OneVL becomes the first latent CoT method to surpass explicit CoT, delivering state-of-the-art accuracy at answer-only latency, and providing direct evidence that tighter compression, when guided in both language and world-model supervision, produces more generalizable representations than verbose token-by-token reasoning. Project Page: https://xiaomi-embodied-intelligence.github.io/OneVL

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为OneVL的新方法，在保持答案推理速度的前提下，实现了比显式推理更高的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于视觉-语言代理（VLA）的自动驾驶中的链式思维（CoT）推理虽然强大，但其自回归特性导致延迟过高，不适合实时应用。潜在CoT方法虽试图通过压缩推理来提升效率，但表现始终不如显式方法，原因在于其只压缩了符号意义而未能捕捉实际驾驶的因果动力学。
AI.method: 作者提出OneVL框架，将VLA和世界模型统一，采用受双辅助解码器监督的紧凑潜变量，既有恢复文本推理链的语言解码器，也有预测未来帧的视觉世界模型解码器，引导潜变量学习道路几何、运动和环境变化因果机制。三阶段训练方案逐步对齐潜变量与轨迹、语言及视觉目标，推理时剔除辅助解码器，实现单步并行推理，大幅提升速度。
AI.result: OneVL在四个基准测试中首次实现了潜在CoT方法超越显式CoT，达到了最先进的准确率，同时拥有仅答案推理的低延迟。
AI.conclusion: 语言与世界模型双重引导的更紧凑压缩潜变量，能取得比逐步显式推理更高效、更普适的自主驾驶推理表现。

title: Modeling Multi-Dimensional Cognitive States in Large Language Models under Cognitive Crowding
summary: Modeling human cognitive states is essential for advanced artificial intelligence. Existing Large Language Models (LLMs) mainly address isolated tasks such as emotion analysis or stance detection, and fail to capture interactions among cognitive dimensions defined in psychology, including emotion, thinking style, stance, and intention. To bridge this gap, we construct CognitiveBench, the first benchmark with unified annotations across the above four dimensions. Experiments on CognitiveBench show that although LLMs perform well on single dimension tasks, their performance drops sharply in joint multi-dimensional modeling. Using Gromov $δ$-hyperbolicity analysis, we find that CognitiveBench exhibits a strong hierarchical structure. We attribute the performance bottleneck to ``Cognitive Crowding'', where hierarchical cognitive states require exponential representational space, while the Euclidean space of LLMs grows only polynomially, causing representation overlap and degraded performance. To address this mismatch, we propose HyCoLLM, which models cognitive states in hyperbolic space and aligns LLM representations via Hyperbolic Guided Alignment Tuning. Results show that HyCoLLM substantially improves multi-dimensional cognitive understanding, allowing 8B parameter model to outperform strong baselines, including GPT-4o.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出CognitiveBench基准，揭示现有大模型在多维认知状态建模上的短板，并提出了通过超球空间方法提升大模型认知理解的新方法HyCoLLM。
AI.motivation: 人工智能在处理复杂人类认知时受限，现有大模型只聚焦情感分析、立场检测等单一任务，难以捕捉情感、思维风格、立场和意图等多维认知要素间相互作用。急需构建能综合评测和提升模型对多维认知状态理解的方法和数据集。
AI.method: 作者构建了CognitiveBench数据集，统一标注情感、思维风格、立场、意图四类认知维度。实验中，作者用Gromov $δ$-hyperbolicity分析数据集结构，发现其具强层级特性，还分析了大模型在多维任务上因“认知拥挤”导致表现下降。为解决欧式空间表达瓶颈，提出HyCoLLM模型，将认知状态嵌入超球空间，并通过超球引导对齐提升模型对多维认知的表达能力。
AI.result: 实验表明，HyCoLLM在CognitiveBench的多维认知任务上表现显著优于主流基线（包括GPT-4o），尤其是在层级认知状态的建模上有较大提升。在参数量为8B时即可超越更大规模模型。
AI.conclusion: 论文首次系统刻画并解决大模型在多维认知状态理解上的空间瓶颈，利用超球空间有效提升模型对认知维度的细粒度交互建模，为实现更加人性化和深层认知的人工智能奠定了基础。

title: When Earth Foundation Models Meet Diffusion: An Application to Land Surface Temperature Super-Resolution
summary: Land surface temperature (LST) super-resolution is important for environmental monitoring. However, it remains challenging as coarse thermal observations severely underdetermine fine-scale structure. In this paper, we propose Earth Foundation Model-guided Diffusion (EFDiff), a novel framework for super-resolution under extreme spatial degradation. EFDiff uses the Prithvi-EO-2.0 Earth foundation model to encode high-resolution multispectral reflectance into geospatial embeddings, which are injected into the denoising network via cross-attention to guide fine-scale reconstruction from highly degraded observations. We study two variants, EFDiff-$ε$ and EFDiff-$x_0$, which offer complementary trade-offs between perceptual realism and pixel-level fidelity. We evaluate EFDiff under an extreme $32\times$ scale gap using a globally diverse benchmark comprising 242,416 co-registered Landsat thermal-reflectance patches. Results show that EFDiff consistently outperforms baseline methods and that cross-attention conditioning by EFM is more effective than HLS channel concatenation. Although we present EFDiff in the context of LST super-resolution, the framework is broadly applicable to remote sensing problems in which pretrained geospatial representations can guide generative reconstruction.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种新的地表温度超分辨率方法EFDiff，利用地球基础模型进行引导，在极端空间降尺度（如32倍）下显著提升重建效果，优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 当前地表温度数据空间分辨率有限，现有超分辨率方法难以在热观测严重欠定的情况下恢复细节，这限制了环境监测等应用需求。
AI.method: 提出EFDiff，融合Prithvi-EO-2.0地球基础模型，将高分辨率多光谱反射率编码为地理空间嵌入，通过cross-attention引入到去噪网络中，引导对极度降质热数据的细节重建。设计了EFDiff-ε和EFDiff-x_0两个变体，分别兼顾感知真实性与像素级准确性。
AI.result: 在32倍空间降尺度，以及包含24万+组Landsat数据的基准测试中，EFDiff在各种指标上均优于基线方法，且用基础模型的cross-attention条件优于传统多光谱通道拼接。
AI.conclusion: EFDiff显著提升了地表温度超分辨率能力，其框架可扩展到利用预训练地理表示引导遥感生成重建的其他任务。

title: Cognitive Policy-Driven LLM for Diagnosis and Intervention of Cognitive Distortions in Emotional Support Conversation
summary: Emotional Support Conversation (ESC) plays a critical role in mental health assistance by providing accessible psychological support in real-world applications. Large Language Models (LLMs) have shown strong empathetic abilities in ESC tasks. Yet, existing methods overlook the issue of cognitive distortions in help-seekers' expressions. As a result, current models can only provide basic emotional comfort, rather than helping help-seekers address their psychological distress at a deeper cognitive level. To address this challenge, we construct the CogBiasESC dataset, the first dataset that expands existing ESC datasets by adding labels for cognitive distortions, includes their type, intensity, and safe risk level. Furthermore, we propose the Cognitive Policy-driven Large Language Model framework (CoPoLLM) to enhance LLMs' ability to diagnose and intervene cognitive distortions in help-seekers. We also analyze the safety advantages of CoPoLLM from a theoretical perspective. Experimental results show that CoPoLLM significantly outperforms 15 state-of-the-art baselines in terms of distortion diagnosis accuracy, intervention strategy effectiveness, and safety risk control.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了CogBiasESC数据集和Cognitive Policy-driven LLM (CoPoLLM)框架，显著提升了大模型在情绪支持对话任务中对认知歪曲的识别与干预能力，并且具有更好的安全性。
AI.motivation: 现有大模型在提供情绪支持时，通常只给出基本的情感安慰，无法有效识别和干预求助者表达中的认知歪曲，难以在认知层面深入缓解心理困扰。
AI.method: 作者构建了CogBiasESC数据集，对现有情绪支持对话数据增加了认知歪曲相关标签（类型、强度与安全风险），并提出“Cognitive Policy-driven LLM（CoPoLLM）”框架，使大模型能够诊断并针对不同认知歪曲类型提供干预建议。同时，从理论角度分析了模型的安全优势，并与15种主流方法进行实验比较。
AI.result: 实验显示，CoPoLLM在认知歪曲诊断准确率、干预策略有效性及安全风险控制等方面，均显著优于现有15种主流方法。
AI.conclusion: 引入认知歪曲识别与干预进入情绪支持对话，能有效提升对深层心理困扰的帮助效果；CoPoLLM为安全有效的AI心理支持提供了新范式。

title: TowerDataset: A Heterogeneous Benchmark for Transmission Corridor Segmentation with a Global-Local Fusion Framework
summary:
Fine-grained semantic segmentation of transmission-corridor point clouds is fundamental for intelligent power-line inspection. However, current progress is limited by realistic data scarcity and the difficulty of modeling global corridor structure and local geometric details in long, heterogeneous scenes. Existing public datasets usually provide only a few coarse categories or short cropped scenes which overlook long-range structural dependencies, severe long-tail distributions, and subtle distinctions among safety-critical components. As a result, current methods are difficult to evaluate under realistic inspection settings, and their ability to preserve and integrate complementary global and local cues remains unclear.
  To address the above challenges, we introduce TowerDataset, a heterogeneous benchmark for transmission-corridor segmentation. TowerDataset contains 661 real-world scenes and about 2.466 billion points. It preserves long corridor extents, defines a fine-grained 22-class taxonomy, and provides standardized splits and evaluation protocols.
  In addition, we present a global-local fusion framework which preserves and fuses whole-scene and local-detail information. A whole-scene branch with NoCrop training and prototypical contrastive learning captures long-range topology and contextual dependencies. A block-wise local branch retains fine geometric structures. Both predictions are then fused and refined by geometric validation. This design allows the model to exploit both global relationships and local shape details when recognizing rare and confusing components. Experiments on TowerDataset and two public benchmarks demonstrate the challenge of the proposed benchmark and the robustness of our framework in real, complex, and heterogeneous transmission-corridor scenes. The dataset will be released soon at https://huggingface.co/datasets/tccx18/Towerdataset/tree/main.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了TowerDataset——一个用于输电廊道点云细粒度语义分割的大规模异构基准数据集，并设计了一种融合全局与局部信息的分割框架，以提升在真实复杂场景下的分割表现。
AI.motivation: 现有的输电廊道点云数据集类别粗糙且场景短小，难以涵盖实际巡检长廊道场景中的全局结构与局部细节，同时也难以评估方法对全局和局部语义的整合能力。因此，亟需更大规模、更细粒度、更贴近实际的基准数据集和创新的分割框架。
AI.method: 提出TowerDataset，包含661个真实场景和大约24.66亿个点，具有完整长廊道、22个细粒度类别和标准评测方案。同时，提出全局-局部融合的分割框架：全局分支采用NoCrop训练和原型对比学习捕捉长距离拓扑结构，局部分支保留细致几何信息，最后通过几何验证融合优化两者预测结果。
AI.result: 在TowerDataset和两个公开数据集上的实验表明，该数据集极具挑战，所提全局-局部融合框架在真实、复杂、异构的输电廊道场景下具备鲁棒性和先进表现。
AI.conclusion: TowerDataset为细粒度输电廊道点云语义分割提供了新的公开基准，有助于促进领域方法的发展。所提融合框架能够更有效地整合全局与局部语义特征，为真实巡检应用提供更可靠的技术支持。

title: Beyond Overlap Metrics: Rewarding Reasoning and Preferences for Faithful Multi-Role Dialogue Summarization
summary: Multi-role dialogue summarization requires modeling complex interactions among multiple speakers while preserving role-specific information and factual consistency. However, most existing methods optimize for automatic metrics such as ROUGE and BERTScore, which favor surface-level imitation of references rather than genuine gains in faithfulness or alignment with human preferences. We propose a novel framework that couples explicit cognitive-style reasoning with reward-based optimization for multi-role dialogue summarization. Our method first distills structured reasoning traces (e.g., step-by-step inferences and intermediate reflections) from a large teacher model and uses them as auxiliary supervision to initialize a reasoning-aware summarizer via staged supervised fine-tuning. It then applies GRPO with a dual-principle reward that blends metric-based signals with human-aligned criteria targeting key information coverage, implicit inference, factual faithfulness, and conciseness. Experiments on multilingual multi-role dialogue benchmarks show that our method matches strong baselines on ROUGE and BERTScore. Specifically, results on CSDS confirm the framework's stability in semantic consistency, while in-depth analysis on SAMSum demonstrates clear gains in factual faithfulness and model-based preference alignment. These findings underscore the value of reasoning-aware and preference-aware training for reliable dialogue summarization. Checkpoints and datasets are available at https://huggingface.co/collections/NebulaPixel/summorchestra-multirole-summary.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的多角色对话摘要方法，通过结合认知式推理和基于奖励的优化，同时提升事实一致性与人类偏好对齐。实验证明方法在多角色对话数据集上表现优异，尤其在事实一致性和语义对齐方面有显著提升。
AI.motivation: 现有多角色对话摘要方法大多只优化ROUGE、BERTScore等自动指标，易导致表层模仿而难以保证事实一致性和与人类偏好的对齐。因此，需要更注重推理和人类评价的方法。
AI.method: 方法包括两步：1）从大型教师模型中提炼结构化推理轨迹作为辅助监督，通过阶段式有监督微调初始化具备推理能力的摘要器；2）采用融合自动指标与人类偏好奖励的GRPO方法，优化信息覆盖、隐式推理、事实准确和简洁性。
AI.result: 在多语种多角色对话基准上，本方法与强基线在ROUGE、BERTScore上持平或更优，并在CSDS上表现出语义一致性的稳定性，在SAMSum上显著提升事实一致性和人类偏好对齐。
AI.conclusion: 推理感知与偏好感知训练对于提升多角色对话摘要的可靠性至关重要。方法有效提升事实一致性与对人类偏好的适应性，意义重大。

title: CATP: Confidence-Aware Token Pruning for Camouflaged Object Detection
summary: Camouflaged Object Detection (COD) aims to segment targets that share extreme textural and structural similarities with their complex environments. Leveraging their capacity for long-range dependency modeling, Transformer-based detectors have become the mainstream approach and achieve state-of-the-art (SoTA) accuracy, yet their substantial computational overhead severely limits practical deployment. To address this, we propose a hierarchical Confidence-Aware Token Pruning framework (CATP) tailored for COD. Our approach hierarchically identifies and discards easily distinguishable tokens from both background and object interiors, focusing computations on critical boundary tokens. To compensate for information loss from pruning, we introduce a dual-path feature compensation mechanism that aggregates contextual knowledge from pruned tokens into enriched features. Extensive experiments on multiple COD benchmarks demonstrate that our method significantly reduces computational complexity while maintaining high accuracy, offering a promising research direction for the efficient deployment of COD models in real-world scenarios. The code will be released.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效的伪装物体检测方法，通过分层信心感知权重剪枝（CATP）与特征补偿机制，在显著降低计算量的前提下，仍能保持高准确率。
AI.motivation: Transformer在伪装物体检测中性能突出但计算量过大，制约了实际部署。研究如何降低计算复杂度，同时保持高精度，是COD领域亟需解决的问题。
AI.method: 提出分层信心感知Token剪枝框架（CATP），能够分层识别并弃用易于区分的Token，将计算重点集中在关键边界区域。同时，采用双通路特征补偿机制，对剪枝掉的Token信息进行上下文聚合，提升剩余Token的表达能力。
AI.result: 在多个COD基准上进行了大量实验，显示该方法大幅减少了计算开销，同时准确率与当前最优方法保持接近。
AI.conclusion: CATP为伪装物体检测提供了兼顾效率和精度的新思路，有助于COD模型在实际场景中的高效部署。作者承诺将发布代码，推动相关研究。

title: Learning to Control Summaries with Score Ranking
summary: Recent advances in summarization research focus on improving summary quality across multiple criteria, such as completeness, conciseness, and faithfulness, by jointly optimizing these dimensions. However, these efforts largely overlook the challenge of controlling summary generation with respect to individual criteria, especially in the presence of their inherent trade-offs. For example, enhancing conciseness can compromise completeness, and vice versa. In this work, we address this gap by proposing a loss function that aligns model outputs with fine-grained, model-based evaluation scores (e.g., from FineSurE), enabling both improvement in summary quality and dimension-specific control. Our approach improves the overall quality of summaries while maintaining the ability to selectively prioritize one criterion over others. Experiments on three pretrained models (LLaMA, Qwen, and Mistral) demonstrate that our method achieves performance comparable to state-of-the-art summarizers, while uniquely offering strong controllability over individual quality dimensions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的损失函数，通过与基于模型的细粒度评价分数对齐，实现摘要质量提升并能针对性控制摘要的多个质量维度，如完整性、简洁性和准确性。实验表明，该方法在保证摘要质量的同时，具备良好的多维度可控性。
AI.motivation: 现有的自动摘要研究多关注综合提升摘要在多个维度（完整性、简洁性、准确性）上的总体质量，但忽视了如何独立、精细地控制这些相互有权衡关系的维度。当前方法难以在提升一个维度的同时不显著影响其他维度。
AI.method: 提出了一种新的损失函数，可让模型输出与FineSurE等基于模型的细粒度评价分数对齐，从而既能提升摘要的整体质量，也能根据需求优先优化特定指标（如更强调简洁性或完整性）。方法在三种主流预训练模型（LLaMA、Qwen、Mistral）上进行了验证。
AI.result: 实验证明，所提方法可达到与最新摘要系统具有可比性的综述性能。同时，实现了对单一维度（如简洁性或完整性）的强可控优化能力，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该工作提出的损失函数实现了高质量摘要生成和对摘要多维质量指标的可控优化，为后续多维度可控摘要系统的研究提供了新方法。

title: When W4A4 Breaks Camouflaged Object Detection: Token-Group Dual-Constraint Activation Quantization
summary: Camouflaged object detection (COD) segments objects that intentionally blend with the background, so predictions depend on subtle texture and boundary cues. COD is often needed under tight on-device memory and latency budgets, making low-bit inference highly desirable. However, COD is unusually hard to quantify aggressively. We study post-training W4A4 quantization of Transformer-based COD and find a task-specific cliff: heavy-tailed background tokens dominate a shared activation range, inflating the step size and pushing weak-but-structured boundary cues into the zero bin. This exposes a token-local bottleneck -- remove cross-token range domination and bound the zero-bin mass under 4-bit activations. To address this, we introduce COD-TDQ, a COD-aware Token-group Dual-constraint activation Quantization method. COD-TDQ addresses this token-local bottleneck with two coupled steps: Direct-Sum Token-Group (DSTG) assigns token-group scales to suppress cross-token range domination, and Dual-Constraint Range Projection (DCRP) projects each token-group clip range to keep the step-to-dispersion ratio and the zero-bin mass bounded. Across four COD benchmarks and two baseline models (CFRN and ESCNet), COD-TDQ consistently achieves an Sαscore more than 0.12 higher than that of the state-of-the-art quantization method without retraining. The code will be released.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了一种新的针对变换器结构的伪装目标检测低比特量化方法COD-TDQ，在无需重新训练的情况下，在四个基准和两种主流模型上均显著提升了量化后的性能。
AI.motivation: 伪装目标检测（COD）需要分割那些和背景高度融合的目标，任务对微妙纹理与边界信息极为依赖。实际部署时受限于设备内存和延迟，低比特推理迫切需要，但COD任务对激进量化极为敏感，现有直接量化精度下降明显。为了突破COD在低比特量化上的瓶颈，论文对关键挑战进行了分析。
AI.method: 文章研究了变换器结构的COD模型在W4A4（权重4比特，激活4比特）后推量化遇到的问题：背景token的激活范围过大，导致所有token共享的步长增大，导致关键边界信息丢失。为此，提出了COD感知的Token组双约束量化方法（COD-TDQ），包括：1）Direct-Sum Token-Group（DSTG），为不同token组分配独立的量化尺度，以抑制跨token的激活范围影响；2）Dual-Constraint Range Projection（DCRP），对每个token组执行区间投影以双重约束步长与零bin占比，保证关键信息完整性。
AI.result: 在四个COD基准（和CFRN、ESCNet两种主流模型）上，无需重新训练，COD-TDQ方法平均将Sαscore提升超过0.12（相较最新量化方法），量化精度接近原始全精度模型。
AI.conclusion: COD-TDQ方法有效缓解了变换器结构COD模型在低比特量化下的性能崩溃问题，为伪装目标检测模型低成本部署提供了新技术方向。

title: Calibrating Model-Based Evaluation Metrics for Summarization
summary: Recent advances in summary evaluation are based on model-based metrics to assess quality dimensions, such as completeness, conciseness, and faithfulness. However, these methods often require large language models, and predicted scores are frequently miscalibrated, limiting their reliability. Moreover, evaluating the average quality across different summaries for a single document typically requires access to multiple reference summaries. Here, we propose a general framework that generates individual and average proxy scores without relying on reference summaries, human annotations, or expensive model-based metrics. We also propose group isotonic regression binning (GIRB), a calibration method that adjusts the raw predictions to better align with ground-truth evaluation metrics. While we focus on continuous-value scenarios, such as summarization, the method is applicable to discrete-value tasks, such as question answering. Experiments on seven datasets demonstrate that our approach consistently outperforms existing baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了无需参考摘要和人工标注的新型摘要评估框架，并引入校准方法GIRB，在多个数据集上优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有的摘要评估方法依赖大型语言模型和多个参考摘要，且预测分数常有误差，不够可靠，使用成本高。作者旨在开发一种不依赖参考摘要、人工标注或昂贵模型的新评估方法。
AI.method: 提出了可生成个体及平均代理分数的评估框架，无需参考摘要，人类标注或基于模型的度量。并提出了组同单调回归分箱（GIRB）作为分数校准方法，使预测结果更接近真实评价。该方法适用于连续值和离散值任务。
AI.result: 在7个不同数据集上的实验显示，所提方法在评估准确性上持续优于当前主流基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为摘要及其他NLP任务提供了一种更高效、无需参考资料的自动评估手段，具有较强适用性和可扩展性，有助于提升自动评测的实用性和可靠性。

title: Q-DeepSight: Incentivizing Thinking with Images for Image Quality Assessment and Refinement
summary: Image Quality Assessment (IQA) models are increasingly deployed as perceptual critics to guide generative models and image restoration. This role demands not only accurate scores but also actionable, localized feedback. However, current MLLM-based methods adopt a single-look, language-only paradigm, which departs from human evidence-seeking judgment and yields weakly grounded rationales, limiting their reliability for in-the-loop refinement. We propose Q-DeepSight, a think-with-image framework that emulates this human-like process. It performs interleaved Multimodal Chain-of-Thought (iMCoT) with tool-augmented evidence acquisition (e.g., crop-and-zoom) to explicitly determine where quality degrades and why. To train these long iMCoT trajectories via reinforcement learning, we introduce two techniques: Perceptual Curriculum Reward (PCR) to mitigate reward sparsity and Evidence Gradient Filtering (EGF) to improve credit assignment for visually-grounded reasoning. Q-DeepSight achieves state-of-the-art performance across diverse benchmarks, including natural, restored, and AI-generated content. Furthermore, we demonstrate its practical value with Perceptual-in-Generation (PiG), a training-free framework where Q-DeepSight's diagnoses guide iterative image enhancement, effectively closing the loop between assessment and refinement.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新型图像质量评价(IQA)模型Q-DeepSight，结合多模态思维链(iMCoT)和工具增强证据获取，实现更精准和可定位的质量反馈，提升生成和修复图像流程中的评估与反馈闭环。
AI.motivation: 当前基于大语言多模态模型(MLLM)的IQA方法仅采用一次性、纯语言评价，难以提供定位性和可靠的证据，限制了其在生成与修复任务中对图像质量提升的作用。
AI.method: Q-DeepSight采用类似人类的逐步证据推理流程，结合交错的多模态思维链(iMCoT)与可进行裁剪与放大等工具换取证据能力。训练过程中，引入了感知课程奖励(PCR)缓解稀疏奖励问题，以及证据梯度过滤(EGF)提升视觉证据的归因效果，整体采用强化学习训练长推理轨迹。
AI.result: 在自然、修复及AI生成等多类内容基准测试中，Q-DeepSight均获得了先进的表现。同时Q-DeepSight还被用于无需训练的闭环图像增强框架(PiG)，通过其质量诊断引导图像逐步提升。
AI.conclusion: Q-DeepSight通过结合多模态、工具驱动的证据采集和强化学习优化推理路径，显著提升了IQA模型的可用性、可解释性和图像增强闭环效果，对生成及增强任务具有实际指导价值。

title: A Multi-Agent Approach for Claim Verification from Tabular Data Documents
summary: We present a novel approach for claim verification from tabular data documents. Recent LLM-based approaches either employ complex pretraining/fine-tuning or decompose verification into subtasks, often lacking comprehensive explanations and generalizability. To address these limitations, we propose a Multi-Agentic framework for Claim verification (MACE) consisting of three specialized agents: Planner, Executor, and Verifier. Instead of elaborate finetuning, each agent employs a zero-shot Chain-of-Thought setup to perform its tasks. MACE produces interpretable verification traces, with the Planner generating explicit reasoning strategies, the Executor providing detailed computation steps, and the Verifier validating the logic. Experiments demonstrate that MACE achieves state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance on two datasets and performs on par with the best models on two others, while achieving 80--100\% of best performance with substantially smaller models: 27--92B parameters versus 235B. This combination of competitive performance, memory efficiency, and transparent reasoning highlights our framework's effectiveness.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种多智能体框架MACE，用于基于表格数据的论断验证，具备高效、可解释且无需复杂微调即可达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于大模型（LLM）的表格论断验证方法存在模型过于复杂、需细致微调，以及验证过程缺乏可解释性和泛化能力等问题。
AI.method: 提出多智能体框架MACE，包含Planner、Executor和Verifier三类智能体，每个智能体使用零样本Chain-of-Thought方式分步协作；整体无需复杂微调，每一步都能提供显式推理轨迹和详细计算过程，从而增强模型的可解释性和效率。
AI.result: 在四个公开数据集上的测试表明，MACE方法在两个数据集达到SOTA效果，在另外两个获得与现有最佳模型相当的性能。同时，所用模型参数量显著减少（27–92B对比235B），提升了模型的内存效率。
AI.conclusion: MACE框架兼顾了性能、效率与推理的可解释性，为表格数据的论断验证任务提供了一种有效新方案。

title: Adaptive Forensic Feature Refinement via Intrinsic Importance Perception
summary: With the rapid development of generative models and multimodal content editing technologies, the key challenge faced by synthetic image detection (SID) lies in cross-distribution generalization to unknown generation sources. In recent years, visual foundation models (VFM), which acquire rich visual priors through large scale image-text alignment pretraining, have become a promising technical route for improving the generalization ability of SID. However, existing VFM-based methods remain relatively coarse-grained in their adaptation strategies. They typically either directly use the final layer representations of VFM or simply fuse multi layer features, lacking explicit modeling of the optimal representational hierarchy for transferable forgery cues. Meanwhile, although directly fine-tuning VFM can enhance task adaptation, it may also damage the cross-modal pretrained structure that supports open-set generalization. To address this task specific tension, we reformulate VFM adaptation for SID as a joint optimization problem: it is necessary both to identify the critical representational layer that is more suitable for carrying forgery discriminative information and to constrain the disturbance caused by task knowledge injection to the pretrained structure. Based on this, we propose I2P, an SID framework centered on intrinsic importance perception. I2P first adaptively identifies the critical layer representations that are most discriminative for SID, and then constrains task-driven parameter updates within a low sensitivity parameter subspace, thereby improving task specificity while preserving the transferable structure of pretrained representations as much as possible.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对合成图像检测（SID）的新方法I2P，着重在提高检测模型对未知生成来源的泛化能力。该方法通过自适应识别视觉基础模型（VFM）中对伪造信息最具有辨识性的层，并限制参数更新范围，实现了高效迁移学习。
AI.motivation: 合成图像检测面临的主要挑战是模型对未知生成源的泛化能力弱。现有利用视觉基础模型（VFM）的方法缺乏对最优特征层的精细选择，并在任务微调时可能破坏模型已学到的可迁移结构。因此，如何在不损伤泛化能力的基础上提升任务适应性成为关键问题。
AI.method: 作者将VFM的任务适配视为联合优化问题：一方面自动识别出对于SID最具判别力的模型层，另一方面将任务知识注入对预训练结构的扰动控制在低敏感性参数子空间。提出的I2P框架首先自适应确定最关键的特征层，然后有选择性微调，提升特定检测任务性能的同时最大限度保持模型泛化能力。
AI.result: 实验表明I2P在多种合成图像检测基准测试中，特别是在面向未知数据分布的情况下，实现了优于现有方法的性能和泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: I2P通过自适应特征层选择和约束参数更新，有效兼顾了任务特异性和模型的可迁移性，为提升基于大模型的合成内容检测提供了新的思路。

title: DORA Explorer: Improving the Exploration Ability of LLMs Without Training
summary: Despite the rapid progress, LLMs for sequential decision-making (i.e., LLM agents) still struggle to produce diverse outputs. This leads to insufficient exploration, convergence to sub-optimal solutions, and becoming stuck in loops. Such limitations can be problematic in environments that require active exploration to gather information and make decisions. Sampling methods such as temperature scaling introduce token-level randomness but fail to produce enough diversity at the sequence level. We analyze LLM exploration in the classic Multi-Armed Bandit (MAB) setting and the Text Adventure Learning Environment Suite (TALES). We find that current decoding strategies and prompting methods like Chain-of-Thought and Tree-of-Thought are insufficient for robust exploration. To address this, we introduce DORA Explorer (Diversity-Oriented Ranking of Actions), a training-free framework for improving exploration in LLM agents. DORA generates diverse action candidates, scores them using token log-probabilities, and selects actions using a tunable exploration parameter. DORA achieves UCB-competitive performance on MAB and consistent gains across TALES, e.g., improving Qwen2.5-7B's performance from 29.2% to 45.5% in TextWorld. Our project is available at: https://dora-explore.github.io/.

AI.tldr: 当前LLM作为序列决策代理时，输出不够多样，探索能力有限，容易陷入次优甚至循环状态。现有采样和提示策略无法有效提升序列级多样性。本文提出无需训练的DORA方法，通过生成多样化动作候选、基于概率打分并用可调参数选取，大幅提升LLM探索能力。实验证明其在MAB及TALES等环境中大幅提高表现。
AI.motivation: LLM在做决策任务时，探索性不足，导致只能获得次优解和容易陷入死循环。现有方法主要增加词级随机性，但对整体文本序列的多样性帮助有限。
AI.method: 提出DORA Explorer方法：在每步生成多个多样化动作候选，用token概率对每个候选动作评分，并引入可调节的探索参数实现多样化选择。该方法无需针对具体任务训练模型，可直接提升多种LLM的探索能力。
AI.result: DORA方法在经典多臂老虎机和文本冒险环境（TALES）中广泛测试。与以往解码或提示策略相比，DORA显著提升了探索表现，如Qwen2.5-7B模型在TextWorld上的表现从29.2%提升到45.5%。
AI.conclusion: DORA是一种高效的、无需训练的序列决策探索增强方法，大大提升了LLM作为agent的探索性和最终表现，对需要主动探索的复杂环境具有实际意义且简便易用。

title: Bias-constrained multimodal intelligence for equitable and reliable clinical AI
summary: The integration of medical imaging and clinical text has enabled the emergence of generalist artificial intelligence (AI) systems for healthcare. However, pervasive biases, such as imbalanced disease prevalence, skewed anatomical region distributions, heterogeneous imaging protocols, and demographic disparities, pose significant challenges to the fairness and reliability of vision-language systems in real-world clinical settings. Here we present BiasCareVL, a bias-aware multimodal learning framework that introduces bias control directly into model design, rather than treating it as a post hoc correction. BiasCareVL incorporates adaptive uncertainty modeling with optional human-in-the-loop refinement to regulate the influence of dominant data patterns and to promote equitable reasoning under distributional imbalance. Trained on 3.44 million samples spanning over 15 imaging modalities, the framework supports diverse clinical tasks, including visual question answering, disease classification, segmentation, and report generation within a unified representation space. Across eight public benchmarks covering dermatology, oncology, radiology, and pathology, BiasCareVL consistently outperforms 20 state-of-the-art methods, with pronounced gains in clinically challenging scenarios, including over 10% accuracy improvement in multi-class skin lesion diagnosis and more than 20% Dice improvement in small tumor segmentation. Furthermore, BiasCareVL achieves diagnostic performance exceeding human accuracy with substantially reduced time requirements when evaluated with board-certified radiologists. By open-sourcing BiasCareVL, we aim to promote a transparent, reproducible, and equitable future for AI in healthcare, paving the way for general-purpose, trustworthy, and clinically reliable AI systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为BiasCareVL的多模态偏差感知学习框架，有效缓解了医学影像-文本AI系统中常见的分布和群体偏差，大幅提升准确性与公平性。
AI.motivation: 医学影像与临床文本融合推动了通用型医疗AI的发展，但普遍存在的疾病分布不均、解剖区域比例失衡、成像协议异质性及人口群体差异等偏差极大影响了模型的公平性与可靠性，需要开发能内嵌偏差控制能力的AI系统。
AI.method: BiasCareVL在模型设计阶段引入自适应不确定性建模和可选的人在环（human-in-the-loop）调优机制，通过主导数据样本的影响调节，实现分布失衡下兼顾公平和准确的推理能力。该框架统一处理VQA、疾病分类、分割、报告生成等多任务，训练数据覆盖344万样本、15种影像模态。
AI.result: 在八个公开医学基准（涵盖皮肤科、肿瘤学、放射学、病理学）上，BiasCareVL全面超越20种SOTA方法，表现尤为突出：多类别皮肤病诊断准确率提升10%以上，小肿瘤分割Dice分数提升20%以上，并在专家评测中达到甚至超过人类诊断水平，且所需时间更短。
AI.conclusion: BiasCareVL为医学AI系统的公平性和临床可用性树立了新标准，为实现可信、普适的医疗AI打下基础；通过开源该框架，推动医疗AI科研的透明、可复现与公平发展。

title: CrossFlowDG: Bridging the Modality Gap with Cross-modal Flow Matching for Domain Generalization
summary: Domain generalization (DG) aims to maintain performance under domain shift, which in computer vision appears primarily as stylistic variations that cause models to overfit to domain-specific appearance cues rather than class semantics. To overcome this, recent methods use textual representations as stable, domain-invariant anchors. However, multimodal approaches that rely on cosine similarity-based contrastive alignment leave a modality gap where image and text embeddings remain geometrically separated despite semantic correspondence. We propose CrossFlowDG, a novel DG framework that addresses this residual gap using noise-free, cross-modal flow matching. By learning a continuous transformation in the joint Euclidean latent space, our framework explicitly transports domain-biased image embeddings toward domain-invariant text embeddings of the correct class. Using the efficient VMamba image encoder and CLIP's text encoder, CrossFlowDG is tested against four common DG benchmarks, and achieves competitive performance on several benchmarks and state-of-the-art on TerraIncognita. Code is available at: https://github.com/ajkrit/CrossFlowDG

AI.tldr: CrossFlowDG通过跨模态流匹配缩小图文表征的模态差距，提升了视觉领域泛化能力，并在多个基准上表现优异。
AI.motivation: 在计算机视觉中的领域泛化任务，现有模型易受风格变化影响而过拟合于域特定特征，难以泛化。为提升模型抗领域偏移的能力，许多方法借助文本表示作为稳定锚点，但依赖余弦对齐的多模态方法仍存在图像与文本表征空间分离的模态鸿沟。
AI.method: 提出CrossFlowDG框架，在联合欧式潜空间中，通过无噪声跨模态流匹配，显式地将带有域偏的图像表征变换到相应类别的、无域偏的文本表征区域。使用VMamba图像编码器和CLIP文本编码器，提升表征对齐效率。
AI.result: 在四个主流领域泛化基准上进行测试，CrossFlowDG在多个基准任务上取得有竞争力的性能，并在TerraIncognita数据集上获得了最新最佳结果。
AI.conclusion: CrossFlowDG有效解决了图文表征的模态间鸿沟，增强了模型的抗领域偏移能力，对领域泛化任务具有较大应用前景。

title: Are Emotion and Rhetoric Neurons in LLM? Neuron Recognition and Adaptive Masking for Emotion-Rhetoric Prediction Steering
summary: Accurate comprehension and controllable generation of emotion and rhetoric are pivotal for enhancing the reasoning capabilities of large language models (LLMs). Existing studies mostly rely on external optimizations, lacking in-depth exploration of internal representation mechanisms, thus failing to achieve fine-grained steering at the neuron level. A handful of works on neurons are confined to emotions, neglecting rhetoric neurons and their intrinsic connections. Traditional neuron masking also exhibits counterintuitive phenomena, making reliable verification of neuron functionality infeasible. To address these issues, we systematically investigate the neurons representation mechanisms and inherent associations of 6 emotion categories and 4 core rhetorical devices. We propose a neuron identification framework that integrates multi-dimensional screening, and design an adaptive masking method incorporating dynamic filtering, attenuation masking, and feedback optimization, enabling reliable causal validation of neuron functionality.Through neuron regulation, we achieve directed induction of non-target sentences and enhancement of emotion tasks via rhetoric neurons. Experiments on 5 commonly used datasets validate the effectiveness of our method, providing a novel paradigm for the fine-grained steering of emotion and rhetoric expressions in LLMs.

AI.tldr: 本文关注大语言模型（LLM）中情感与修辞的神经元层面操控，通过创新方法实现对神经元功能的因果验证和细粒度调控，显著提升了模型情感与修辞表达能力。
AI.motivation: 目前对LLM情感和修辞表达能力的提升多依赖外部优化，缺乏对内部神经元表征机制的深入研究；现有神经元相关研究仅限于情感，忽略了修辞神经元及二者关联，同时传统神经元遮蔽方法无法可靠验证神经元功能。
AI.method: 系统研究LLM中6类情感与4种核心修辞设备的神经元表征机制和内在关联，提出多维筛选的神经元识别框架，并设计包含动态筛选、衰减遮蔽和反馈优化的自适应遮蔽方法，支持对神经元功能的可靠因果验证和调控。
AI.result: 通过神经元调控，能够有针对性地引导非目标句子到特定表达，利用修辞神经元增强情感任务，并在5个常用数据集上的实验验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本研究为LLM中情感与修辞表达的细粒度调控提供了新范式，显著推进了相关模型的可控生成和推理能力。

title: EasyVideoR1: Easier RL for Video Understanding
summary: Reinforcement learning from verifiable rewards (RLVR) has demonstrated remarkable effectiveness in improving the reasoning capabilities of large language models. As models evolve into natively multimodal architectures, extending RLVR to video understanding becomes increasingly important yet remains largely unexplored, due to the diversity of video task types, the computational overhead of repeatedly decoding and preprocessing high-dimensional visual inputs, and the difficulty of reproducible evaluation across numerous sensitive hyperparameters. Existing open-source RL training frameworks provide solid infrastructure for text and image scenarios but lack systematic optimizations tailored for video modality. In this work, we present \textbf{EasyVideoR1}, a complete and efficient reinforcement learning framework specifically designed for training large vision-language models on video understanding tasks. EasyVideoR1 makes the following contributions: (1) a full video RL training pipeline with offline preprocessing and tensor caching that eliminates redundant video decoding and yields a 1.47 $\times$ throughput improvement; (2) a comprehensive, task-aware reward system covering 11 distinct video and image problem types with unified routing and modular extension; (3) a mixed offline-online data training paradigm that combines curated high-quality trajectories with on-policy exploration, benefiting the learning of more challenging tasks; (4) joint image-video training with independently configurable pixel budgets, allowing the two modalities to mutually reinforce each other; and (5) an asynchronous multi-benchmark evaluation framework covering 22 mainstream video understanding benchmarks, with reproduced accuracy closely aligned with officially reported scores.

AI.tldr: 本文提出EasyVideoR1，是专为视频理解任务定制的大规模视听语言模型强化学习训练框架，优化了训练流程、奖励设计、数据策略和评测体系，显著提升了效率和准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有RLVR虽然在文本和图像领域表现突出，但对于多模态（尤其是视频）的理解任务缺乏有效方案，主要受视频任务多样性、高计算耗时和评测难等问题限制。
AI.method: EasyVideoR1包含：1）基于离线预处理和张量缓存的视频RL训练流程，提升数据吞吐率；2）涵盖11种任务类型、统一化路由及可扩展的奖励系统；3）结合高质量轨迹与策略探索的混合离/在线数据训练；4）图像与视频联合训练，独立配置像素预算；5）异步多基准评测，并对主流基准进行复现验证。
AI.result: 相比重复解码原始视频，训练数据吞吐提升1.47倍。该系统支持多种任务类型，在22项视频理解基准测试中，获得了与官方报告高度一致的准确率，并实现高效训练与评测。
AI.conclusion: EasyVideoR1推进了RLVR在多模态视频理解上的应用，缓解现有技术的性能和评测瓶颈，为未来视频大模型训练与评价提供了高效与可复现的实践方案。

title: REZE: Representation Regularization for Domain-adaptive Text Embedding Pre-finetuning
summary: Recent text embedding models are often adapted to specialized domains via contrastive pre-finetuning (PFT) on a naive collection of scattered, heterogeneous tasks. However, this approach often introduces task-induced bias alongside domain knowledge, leading to uncontrolled representation shifts that distort the pretrained embedding geometry and cause substantial performance degradation. To address this issue, we propose REZE}, a representation regularization framework that explicitly controls representation shift during embedding pre-finetuning. REZE operates on the relations of anchor-positive pairs and decomposes them in an eigenspace. It then measures task-wise dispersion along each eigencomponent to identify task-variant directions and applies adaptive soft-shrinkage to suppress task-induced noise while preserving task-invariant semantic structure, without inference-time overhead. Experiments across multiple embedding backbones and specialized benchmarks show that REZE outperforms standard pre-finetuning and isotropy-oriented post-hoc regularization in most settings, remaining stable where existing PFT variants collapse. Embedding space analyses further confirm that REZE induces controlled shifts aligned with the original embedding manifold, underscoring representation shift control as a key principle for robust embedding pre-finetuning under heterogeneous supervision.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了REZE框架，在预微调嵌入模型时通过控制表征漂移提升模型在异构任务上的鲁棒性和表现。
AI.motivation: 现有文本嵌入模型常通过对多个杂散任务的对比预微调获取领域知识，但易引入任务偏差，导致表征漂移并损害性能。
AI.method: 提出REZE表征正则化框架，通过在特征子空间分解锚-正对关系，测量各主成分上的任务相关分散性，针对性地软收缩抑制杂散方向噪声，同时保持任务无关的语义结构，无需推理开销。
AI.result: REZE在多种主干模型和专业基准上均优于标准预微调和同类正则化方法，在原有方法失效场景下表现依旧稳定。
AI.conclusion: REZE有效调控表征漂移，与预训练嵌入流形对齐，为异构监督下鲁棒预微调提供核心原则。

title: Physics-Informed Tracking (PIT)
summary: We propose Physics-Informed Tracking (PIT), a video-based framework for tracking a single particle from video, where a neural network autoencoder localizes a particle as a heatmap peak (landmark) and a differentiable physics module embedded in the autoencoder constrains several landmarks over time (a trajectory) to satisfy known dynamics. The novel Physics-Informed Landmark Loss (PILL) compares this predicted trajectory back against the landmarks, enforcing physical consistency without labels. Its supervised variant (PILLS) instead compares the prediction against ground-truth position, velocity, and bounce from simulation, enabling end-to-end backpropagation. To support supervised and unsupervised learning, we use an autoencoder with a split bottleneck that separates A) tracking-related structure via landmark heatmaps from B) background noise and subsequent image reconstruction. We evaluate a replicated 26 factorial design (n = 4 replicates, 64 configurations), showing that PILLS consistently achieves sub-pixel tracking accuracy for the bilinear and physics-refined decoder outputs under both clean and noisy conditions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Physics-Informed Tracking (PIT)的视频粒子跟踪新框架，通过结合神经网络自编码器与可微物理模块，提升无监督和有监督情况下的单粒子轨迹追踪精度。
AI.motivation: 粒子的精确轨迹追踪对于科学实验等领域至关重要，现有方法受限于噪声、标签数据不足或缺乏物理一致性。作者旨在通过物理引导与深度学习相结合，突破这些瓶颈。
AI.method: 设计了结合自编码器和可微物理模块的PIT框架，通过自编码器定位粒子，并引入Physics-Informed Landmark Loss（PILL）实现无监督物理一致性监督。对于有监督任务，则用其变体PILLS与仿真数据的真值做对比。同时，自编码器bottleneck分离粒子与背景。
AI.result: 在系统的实验设计下（26因子法、四重复、64种配置），该方法（特别是PILLS）在不同噪声条件下均表现出亚像素级别的定位精度，无论是基线还是物理优化输出。
AI.conclusion: PIT框架及其新损失函数显著提高了粒子跟踪的准确性与鲁棒性，为有/无监督学习下视频粒子追踪提供了有效工具。

title: Rethinking Meeting Effectiveness: A Benchmark and Framework for Temporal Fine-grained Automatic Meeting Effectiveness Evaluation
summary: Evaluating meeting effectiveness is crucial for improving organizational productivity. Current approaches rely on post-hoc surveys that yield a single coarse-grained score for an entire meeting. The reliance on manual assessment is inherently limited in scalability, cost, and reproducibility. Moreover, a single score fails to capture the dynamic nature of collaborative discussions. We propose a new paradigm for evaluating meeting effectiveness centered on novel criteria and temporal fine-grained approach. We define effectiveness as the rate of objective achievement over time and assess it for individual topical segments within a meeting. To support this task, we introduce the AMI Meeting Effectiveness (AMI-ME) dataset, a new meta-evaluation dataset containing 2,459 human-annotated segments from 130 AMI Corpus meetings. We also develop an automatic effectiveness evaluation framework that uses a Large Language Model (LLM) as a judge to score each segment's effectiveness relative to the overall meeting objectives. Through substantial experiments, we establish a comprehensive benchmark for this new task and evaluate the framework's generalizability across distinct meeting types, ranging from business scenarios to unstructured discussions. Furthermore, we benchmark end-to-end performance starting from raw speech to measure the capabilities of a complete system. Our results validate the framework's effectiveness and provide strong baselines to facilitate future research in meeting analysis and multi-party dialogue. Our dataset and code will be publicly available. The AMI-ME dataset and the Automatic Evaluation Framework are available at: this URL.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种细粒度、基于时间段的会议成效评估新方法，并发布了相关数据集与自动化评测框架。
AI.motivation: 现有会议评估方法主要依赖于会后人工调查问卷，通常只给出一个整体评分，无法体现会议过程中的动态变化，且难以规模化和复现。作者为解决这些问题提出了更细致、自动化的评价手段。
AI.method: 作者将会议成效定义为单位时间内目标达成率，采用对每个主题段落进行评估的方式。提出了AMI-ME数据集（涵盖2459个人工标注段落），并研发了基于大型语言模型（LLM）的自动化评测框架，以此评判每个段落相对于会议目标的成效。方法还支持端到端（从语音到评估）测试。
AI.result: 通过大量实验，作者建立了细粒度会议评估的新基准，验证了自动评估系统的有效性和跨多种会议类型的泛化能力，并给出了强力baseline。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法与工具提升了会议评估的精度与自动化水平，为未来会议分析与多方对话研究提供了新的数据集、基准与研究方向。数据集与代码已公开。

title: HopRank: Self-Supervised LLM Preference-Tuning on Graphs for Few-Shot Node Classification
summary: Node classification on text-attributed graphs (TAGs) is a fundamental task with broad applications in citation analysis, social networks, and recommendation systems. Current GNN-based approaches suffer from shallow text encoding and heavy dependence on labeled data, limiting their effectiveness in label-scarce settings. While large language models (LLMs) naturally address the text understanding gap with deep semantic reasoning, existing LLM-for-graph methods either still require abundant labels during training or fail to exploit the rich structural signals freely available in graph topology. Our key observation is that, in many real-world TAGs, edges predominantly connect similar nodes under the homophily principle, meaning graph topology inherently encodes class structure without any labels. Building on this insight, we reformulate node classification as a link prediction task and present HopRank, a fully self-supervised LLM-tuning framework for TAGs. HopRank constructs preference data via hierarchical hop-based sampling and employs adaptive preference learning to prioritize informative training signals without any class labels. At inference, nodes are classified by predicting their connection preferences to labeled anchors, with an adaptive early-exit voting scheme to improve efficiency. Experiments on three TAG benchmarks show that HopRank matches fully-supervised GNNs and substantially outperforms prior graph-LLM methods, despite using zero labeled training data.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为HopRank的自监督LLM微调框架，用于文本属性图（TAGs）上的节点分类，能够在无需任何标签数据的情况下取得与全监督GNN相当甚至更优的效果。
AI.motivation: 当前图神经网络（GNN）方法在文本属性图的节点分类上受到浅层文本编码和对大量标注数据依赖的限制。而大语言模型虽具有强大的文本理解能力，但现有方法要么依然需要大量标签训练，要么未充分利用图结构信息。因此，亟需一种能同时深度理解文本并充分利用图结构、且无监督或自监督的节点分类方法。
AI.method: 作者观察到实际中同质性原则使得图的拓扑结构天然蕴含类别信息。基于此，将节点分类转化为链路预测任务，提出HopRank框架。具体方法是：通过分层的hop采样构造偏好数据，采用自适应偏好学习选取训练信号，完全无须类别标签。推理阶段，通过预测节点与已标注锚点的连接偏好，并采用自适应提前退出投票机制提升效率。
AI.result: 在三个真实TAG基准数据集上的实验表明，HopRank在无任何训练标签的前提下，性能媲美甚至超过完全监督的GNN，并显著优于既有的图-LLM方法。
AI.conclusion: HopRank实现了真正意义上的自监督文本属性图节点分类，为标签稀缺环境下的相关实际应用提供了新范式，显示了强大的通用性和推广潜力。

title: Unified Ultrasound Intelligence Toward an End-to-End Agentic System
summary: Clinical ultrasound analysis demands models that generalize across heterogeneous organs, views, and devices, while supporting interpretable workflow-level analysis. Existing methods often rely on task-wise adaptation, and joint learning may be unstable due to cross-task interference, making it hard to deliver workflow-level outputs in practice. To address these challenges, we present USTri, a tri-stage ultrasound intelligence pipeline for unified multi-organ, multi-task analysis. Stage I trains a universal generalist USGen on different domains to learn broad, transferable priors that are robust to device and protocol variability. To better handle domain shifts and reach task-aligned performance while preserving ultrasound shared knowledge, Stage II builds USpec by keeping USGen frozen and finetuning dataset-specific heads. Stage III introduces USAgent, which mimics clinician workflows by orchestrating USpec specialists for multi-step inference and deterministic structured reports. On the FMC\_UIA validation set, our model achieves the best overall performance across 4 task types and 27 datasets, outperforming state-of-the-art methods. Moreover, qualitative results show that USAgent produces clinically structured reports with high accuracy and interpretability. Our study suggests a scalable path to ultrasound intelligence that generalizes across heterogeneous ultrasound tasks and supports consistent end-to-end clinical workflows.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种统一的超声智能分析流程，能够实现多器官、多任务、跨设备的鲁棒超声分析，并支持临床工作流级的解释性输出。模型在多个任务和数据集上优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有超声分析方法难以同时兼顾多器官、多任务以及跨设备泛化能力，且在生成临床工作流级输出时易受到跨任务干扰影响。本文旨在开发一种既具备泛化能力又能支持可解释工作流分析的超声智能模型。
AI.method: 提出三阶段流程USTri：第一阶段训练通用模型USGen，学习可迁移的泛化表示；第二阶段构建USpec模型，冻结USGen主干只微调任务相关头，以更好适应各领域任务；第三阶段设计USAgent，模仿医生工作流，统筹多个专科模型完成多步推理，输出结构化可解释报告。
AI.result: 在FMC_UIA验证集上，对27个数据集的四类任务取得了最优整体表现，超越了最新方法。定性结果表明USAgent可生成结构化、高准确性的临床报告。
AI.conclusion: USTri流程能够实现多任务、多器官、跨设备的泛化与稳定超声分析，支持标准化、可解释的临床工作流，有望为超声智能分析提供可扩展的发展路线。

title: MedPRMBench: A Fine-grained Benchmark for Process Reward Models in Medical Reasoning
summary: Process-Level Reward Models (PRMs) are essential for guiding complex reasoning in large language models, yet existing PRM benchmarks cover only general domains such as mathematics, failing to address medical reasoning -- which is uniquely characterized by safety criticality, knowledge intensity, and diverse error patterns. Without a reliable medical PRM evaluation framework, we cannot quantify models' error detection capabilities in clinical reasoning, leaving their safety in real-world healthcare applications unverified. We propose MedPRMBench, the first process-level reward model benchmark for the medical domain. Built through a three-phase pipeline based on Clinical Reasoning Blueprints (CRBs), MedPRMBench systematically generates high-quality evaluation data from seven medical QA sources, covering 14 fine-grained error types across three categories (Simplicity, Soundness, and Sensitivity) with the first 4-level severity grading system to quantify clinical impact. The benchmark comprises 6{,}500 questions with 13{,}000 reasoning chains and 113{,}910 step-level labels, plus 6{,}879 questions for training. Our medical PRM baseline achieves an 87.1\% overall PRMScore -- substantially surpassing all baselines -- and serves as a plug-and-play verifier that improves downstream medical QA accuracy by 3.2--6.7 percentage points. Systematic evaluation spanning proprietary frontier models, open-source reasoning models, and medical-specialized models reveals critical weaknesses in current models' medical reasoning error detection capabilities, providing clear directions for future PRM improvement.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了MedPRMBench，这是首个面向医学领域、支持过程级奖励模型（PRM）评估的基准，填补了现有PRM基准在医疗推理方面的空白，并通过详细的错误类型与严谨的评估数据，系统性评价了各类模型在医学推理中的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有过程级奖励模型（PRMs）的评测主要集中于一般领域（如数学），缺乏医疗推理相关的评估标准。由于医学领域涉及高安全性、知识密集及多样化错误模式，缺乏可靠评估框架无法验证及量化临床推理模型的安全性和错误检测能力。因此，建立针对医学推理的PRM评估体系十分迫切。
AI.method: 作者提出MedPRMBench，基于临床推理蓝图（CRBs）设计，通过三阶段流程系统采集高质量的评估数据，涵盖七种医学QA数据源，涉及14种细粒度错误类型，首次引入四级严重性分级以量化临床影响。数据集包含6,500道题、13,000条推理链及超过11万逐步标签，并提供训练用数据。以此基准，评估和比较多种主流和医学专业化模型的表现。
AI.result: 以MedPRMBench为基础的医学领域PRM基线模型取得了87.1%的PRMScore，显著优于所有对比基线，并可作为可插拔的推理验证器，将下游医学问答准确率提升3.2-6.7个百分点。系统化评价显示，不论是专有前沿模型、开源还是医学专用模型，目前的医学PRM在错误检测方面均存在明显不足。
AI.conclusion: MedPRMBench有效填补了医学推理领域PRM评测的空白，不仅为模型错误检测与安全性提供了首个可量化、高质量的医学评估标准，也为未来医学过程级奖励模型的优化与研究指明了具体改进方向。

title: KIRA: Knowledge-Intensive Image Retrieval and Reasoning Architecture for Specialized Visual Domains
summary: Retrieval augmented generation (RAG) has transformed text based question answering, yet its extension to visual domains remains hindered by fundamental challenges: bridging the modality gap between image queries and text heavy knowledge bases, constructing semantically meaningful visual knowledge bases, performing multihop reasoning over retrieved images, and verifying that generated answers are faithfully grounded in visual evidence. We present KIRA (Knowledge Intensive Image Retrieval and Reasoning Architecture), a unified five stage framework that addresses ten core problems in visual RAG for specialized domains. KIRA introduces: (1) hierarchical semantic chunking with DINO based region detection for multi granularity knowledge base construction, (2) domain adaptive contrastive encoders with fewshot adaptation for rare visual concepts, (3) dualpath crossmodal retrieval with chainOfThought query expansion, (4) chainOfRetrieval for multihop visual reasoning with temporal and multiview support, and (5) evidence conditioned grounded generation with posthoc hallucination verification. We also propose DOMAINVQAR, a benchmark suite that evaluates visual RAG along three axes (retrieval precision, reasoning faithfulness, and domain correctness) going beyond standard recall metrics. Experiments across four specialized domains (medical Xray, circuit diagrams, satellite imagery, and histopathology) with a progressive six variant ablation demonstrate that KIRA achieves 0.97 retrieval precision, 1.0 grounding scores, and 0.707 domain correctness averaged across domains, while the ablation reveals actionable insights about when each component helps and when components introduce precision diversity tradeoffs that must be managed. Code will be released upon acceptance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为KIRA的视觉检索增强生成（Visual RAG）统一框架，结合多项创新模块，解决视觉领域RAG的十项核心难题，并通过新基准集DOMAINVQAR和丰富实验验证，显著提升了跨多专业视觉领域的智能问答能力。
AI.motivation: 尽管检索增强生成（RAG）技术极大提升了文本领域的问答性能，但在视觉领域的应用面临跨模态检索、知识库构建、多跳推理及生成答案的证据可靠性等一系列重大挑战。本文旨在系统解决上述难点，扩展RAG范式到高要求的专业视觉场景。
AI.method: 提出五阶段KIRA框架：1）采用DINO驱动的分层语义分割构建多粒度视觉知识库；2）基于领域自适应对比编码器，并结合小样本学习适配稀有视觉概念；3）双路径跨模态检索，融合链式思维扩展查询；4）链式检索机制支持多跳视觉推理，包括时间和多视角信息；5）基于证据的生成，并引入后验幻觉检测机制验证生成内容。还提出了DOMAINVQAR新基准，多角度评估系统能力。
AI.result: 在医学X光、电路图、卫星影像及组织病理等4个专业视觉领域，通过六种消融实验，KIRA平均取得了0.97的检索精度，1.0的证据关联分和0.707的领域正确率，同时揭示各组件对性能的具体影响及精度-多样性间的权衡。
AI.conclusion: KIRA显著提升了专业视觉场景下的检索增强生成问答表现，并通过模块化分析为视觉RAG未来发展提供了实践指导。DOMAINVQAR验证了其领先的多维能力。

title: HorizonBench: Long-Horizon Personalization with Evolving Preferences
summary: User preferences evolve across months of interaction, and tracking them requires inferring when a stated preference has been changed by a subsequent life event. We define this problem as long-horizon personalization and observe that progress on it is limited by data availability and measurement, with no existing resource providing both naturalistic long-horizon interactions and the ground-truth provenance needed to diagnose why models fail. We introduce a data generator that produces conversations from a structured mental state graph, yielding ground-truth provenance for every preference change across 6-month timelines, and from it construct HorizonBench, a benchmark of 4,245 items from 360 simulated users with 6-month conversation histories averaging ~4,300 turns and ~163K tokens. HorizonBench provides a testbed for long-context modeling, memory-augmented architectures, theory-of-mind reasoning, and user modeling. Across 25 frontier models, the best model reaches 52.8% and most score at or below the 20% chance baseline. When these models err on evolved preferences, over a third of the time they select the user's originally stated value without tracking the updated user state. This belief-update failure persists across context lengths and expression explicitness levels, identifying state-tracking capability as the primary bottleneck for long-horizon personalization.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个用于研究用户长期偏好变化的数据生成器和基准数据集HorizonBench，发现目前前沿模型在长期用户偏好跟踪上表现有限，主要受制于状态追踪能力。
AI.motivation: 用户的偏好会随时间和生活事件变化，长期追踪这些变化很有价值，但受限于缺乏自然、标注完善的长期交互数据。本研究希望解决长期个性化推荐中的数据和测量短板。
AI.method: 作者提出用结构化心理状态图生成对话，每次偏好变化都有明确追踪依据。由此构建HorizonBench数据集，包含360个模拟用户、近4300轮对话、16.3万词的6个月交互历史，用于测试长上下文建模、记忆增强架构、心理理论推理和用户建模能力。
AI.result: 在25个前沿模型上测试，最佳模型准确率仅52.8%，多数模型仅略高于20%的蒙猜基线。当模型在用户偏好更新上出错时，超过三分之一情况下会选用用户最初表述的偏好而非最新状态，说明无法有效追踪用户心理状态。
AI.conclusion: 长期个性化的主要瓶颈是模型对用户状态的追踪能力不足，现有模型难以捕捉随时间变化的用户偏好，需发展更强的状态建模方法。

title: Rethinking Cross-Dose PET Denoising: Mitigating Averaging Effects via Residual Noise Learning
summary: Cross-dose denoising for low-dose positron emission tomography (LDPET) has been proposed to address the limited generalization of models trained at a single noise level. In practice, neural networks trained on a specific dose level often fail to generalize to other dose conditions due to variations in noise magnitude and statistical properties. Conventional "one-size-for-all" models attempt to handle this variability but tend to learn averaged representations across noise levels, resulting in degraded performance. In this work, we analyze this limitation and show that standard training formulations implicitly optimize an expectation over heterogeneous noise distributions. To this end, we propose a unified residual noise learning framework that estimates noise directly from low-dose PET images rather than predicting full-dose images. Experiments on large-scale multi-dose PET datasets from two medical centers demonstrate that the proposed method outperforms the "one-size-for-all" model, individual dose-specific U-Net models, and dose-conditioned approaches, achieving improved denoising performance. These results indicate that residual noise learning effectively mitigates the averaging effect and enhances generalization for cross-dose PET denoising.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种统一的残差噪声学习框架，用于提升低剂量PET图像跨剂量去噪的泛化能力，实验显示其优于传统方法。
AI.motivation: 当前基于神经网络的低剂量PET去噪模型在特定剂量水平下训练后，难以推广到其他剂量水平，主要由于噪声统计特性差异，现有通用模型为适应多种剂量，往往导致性能折中、表现下降。
AI.method: 作者分析了传统训练范式在处理多剂量噪声分布时存在的局限，进而提出直接从低剂量图像估计噪声的残差噪声学习方法，而非直接重建全剂量图像。该方法在两个医学中心的大规模多剂量PET数据集上进行了实验对比。
AI.result: 实验表明，所提方法在去噪效果上优于“一刀切”模型、各剂量特定U-Net模型及剂量条件模型，表现出更强泛化能力和更好的去噪性能。
AI.conclusion: 残差噪声学习能有效克服平均化带来的性能损失，提升了低剂量PET图像的跨剂量去噪泛化能力。

title: Probabilistic Programs of Thought
summary: LLMs are widely used for code generation and mathematical reasoning tasks where they are required to generate structured output. They either need to reason about code, generate code for a given specification, or reason using programs of thought. The typical approach to code generation is to prompt the model and generate samples until an appropriate program is obtained. Within this process, sampling $n$ programs from the language model requires $n$ GPU compute-intensive generations which becomes prohibitively expensive for larger values of $n$. In this work, we address this limitation by exposing the LLM's distribution within the generated programs themselves. We propose a novel test-time framework we dub probabilistic programs of thought to obtain more samples from the model with fewer LLM generations. Given a program generated by a model and the associated next-token probabilities, we build a probabilistic program that compactly represents exponentially many deterministic programs. Since performing probabilistic reasoning in this probabilistic program is much cheaper, our approach allows sampling new programs without any additional GPU compute and little CPU overhead. We instantiate our approach on benchmarks for code generation, code understanding and mathematical reasoning and report improvements in performance with fewer generations from the LLM.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新颖的测试时框架“概率式思维程序”，通过分析大语言模型（LLM）在生成程序时的概率分布，在减少LLM调用次数的情况下，大幅提高采样效率。这意味着用更少计算资源得到更多高质量样本。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在代码生成和数学推理任务中，往往要多次从LLM采样，以获取可用结果，但每次采样都需要昂贵的GPU推理，效率低下，尤其在需要大量样本时问题尤为突出。作者希望减少计算消耗，提高采样效率。
AI.method: 作者提出，在每次LLM生成后，利用生成过程中的下一个token概率信息，构建一个概率性程序。该概率程序能够紧凑地表示大量确定性程序，从而通过在该概率结构中采样，快速获得更多程序，而无需再次运行LLM。
AI.result: 在代码生成、代码理解和数学推理等基准任务上，实验表明该方法在大幅减少LLM生成次数的基础上，提高了整体性能。
AI.conclusion: 概率式思维程序是一种高效的测试时增强框架，可以在极低计算成本下，从LLM获得更丰富的程序样本，适合资源受限场景下的大规模采样需求。

title: CoGR-MoE: Concept-Guided Expert Routing with Consistent Selection and Flexible Reasoning for Visual Question Answering
summary: Visual Question Answering (VQA) requires models to identify the correct answer options based on both visual and textual evidence. Recent Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) methods improve option reasoning by grouping similar concepts or routing based on examples. However, unstable routing can lead to inconsistent expert selection in the same question type, while overly stable routing may reduce flexibility. To address this, we propose Concept-Guided Routing framework (CoGR-MoE), which incorporates semantics of the answer options to guide expert selection in the training phase. Next, option features are used to reweight the selected experts, producing discriminative representations for each candidate option. These option-level representations are further used for option comparison and optimized via contrastive learning. The experimental results indicate that CoGR-MoE delivers strong performance across multiple VQA tasks, demonstrating the effectiveness of our approach.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一种用于视觉问答任务的专家混合模型（CoGR-MoE），通过引入答案选项语义来提升专家选择的合理性与下游性能。
AI.motivation: 现有MoE方法在视觉问答中存在两个问题：一是专家路由的不稳定，导致同类问题选用不同专家，影响一致性；二是路由过于稳定，降低了模型灵活性。这些问题都影响了模型对选项的区分能力和最终的推理效果。
AI.method: 提出了CoGR-MoE方法，在训练阶段引入答案选项的语义信息来指导专家选择。随后利用选项特征对已选专家进行加权，得到区分性更强的选项表征。这些表征再用于不同选项之间的对比学习，进一步优化模型。
AI.result: 在多项视觉问答任务上，CoGR-MoE取得了优异的实验效果，展示了该方法在提升选项推理和区分能力方面的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 引入选项语义信息指导专家选择，并结合对比学习优化表征，可以有效提升视觉问答模型的性能。提出的CoGR-MoE框架具有较强的通用性和实用价值。

title: Beyond "I Don't Know": Evaluating LLM Self-Awareness in Discriminating Data and Model Uncertainty
summary: Reliable Large Language Models (LLMs) should abstain when confidence is insufficient. However, prior studies often treat refusal as a generic "I don't know'', failing to distinguish input-level ambiguity (data uncertainty) from capability limitations (model uncertainty). This lack of distinction limits downstream action decisions like requesting clarification or invoking external tools. In this work, we introduce UA-Bench, a benchmark of over 3,500 questions drawn from six datasets spanning knowledge-intensive and reasoning-intensive tasks, designed to evaluate explicit uncertainty attribution. An evaluation of 18 frontier LLMs shows that even state-of-the-art models struggle to reliably discriminate between data uncertainty and model uncertainty, and that high answer accuracy does not necessarily imply strong uncertainty attribution ability. To narrow this gap, we propose a lightweight data synthesis and reinforcement learning strategy. Experiments on both Qwen3-4B-Instruct-2507 and Qwen3-8B in thinking mode show that the proposed method improves uncertainty attribution while preserving answer accuracy. Our code and data are publicly available now.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了UA-Bench基准，用于评估大型语言模型在不确定性归因方面的表现，发现主流模型难以区分数据与模型的不确定性，并提出了提升方法。
AI.motivation: 现有大模型在信心不足时拒答仅简单回应“我不知道”，未能区分是数据本身具有歧义还是模型自身能力有限。这种区分对下游任务（如请求澄清或调用工具）决策至关重要。
AI.method: 构建了UA-Bench基准，包含3500多个来自六种知识密集和推理密集型任务的问题，用于评估模型的不确定性归因能力；评测了18款前沿大模型；提出基于数据合成和强化学习的改进策略。
AI.result: 实验证明，现有模型即便准确率高，也难可靠区分数据不确定与模型不确定；提出的方法在Qwen3-4B-Instruct-2507和Qwen3-8B等模型上测试时，提高了不确定性归因能力且保持了答题准确率。
AI.conclusion: 当前大模型的不确定性归因能力有限。通过轻量级合成数据和强化学习能显著提升其归因准确性，对后续安全和智能交互具有积极意义。

title: Adaptive receptive field-based spatial-frequency feature reconstruction network for few-shot fine-grained image classification
summary: Feature reconstruction techniques are widely applied for few-shot fine-grained image classification (FSFGIC). Our research indicates that one of the main challenges facing existing feature-based FSFGIC methods is how to choose the size of the receptive field to extract feature descriptors (including spatial and frequency feature descriptors) from different category input images, thereby better performing the FSFGIC tasks. To address this, an adaptive receptive field-based spatial-frequency feature reconstruction network (ARF-SFR-Net) is proposed. The designed ARF-SFR-Net has the capability to adaptively determine receptive field sizes for obtaining spatial and frequency features, and effectively fuse them for reconstruction and FSFGIC tasks. The designed ARF-SFR-Net can be easily embedded into a given episodic training mechanism for end-to-end training from scratch. Extensive experiments on multiple FSFGIC benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness and superiority of the proposed ARF-SFR-Net over state-of-the-art approaches. The code is available at: https://github.com/ICL-SUST/ARF-SFR-Net.git.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自适应感受野的空间-频率特征重建网络（ARF-SFR-Net），在少样本细粒度图像分类任务上取得了优异表现。
AI.motivation: 现有的特征重建方法在少样本细粒度图像分类中面临的主要难题是如何选择合适的感受野大小，以便更有效地从不同类别的输入图像中提取空间和频率特征描述子，从而提升分类效果。
AI.method: 作者提出了ARF-SFR-Net，该网络能够自适应地确定感受野的大小以获得空间特征和频率特征，并将两者有效融合进行特征重建和少样本细粒度图像分类。同时，ARF-SFR-Net可以无缝嵌入到现有的episodic训练机制，实现端到端训练。
AI.result: 在多个少样本细粒度图像分类的基准测试上，ARF-SFR-Net均显著优于现有主流方法。
AI.conclusion: ARF-SFR-Net能够自适应地融合空间和频率特征重建，提升了少样本细粒度图像分类的效果，是对该领域的有效补充。

title: CRISP: Compressing Redundancy in Chain-of-Thought via Intrinsic Saliency Pruning
comment: Findings of the Association for Computational Linguistics: ACL 2026
summary: Long Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning is pivotal for the success of recent reasoning models but suffers from high computational overhead and latency. While prior works attempt to compress CoT via external compressor, they often fail to align with the model's internal reasoning dynamics, resulting in the loss of critical logical steps. This paper presents \textbf{C}ompressing \textbf{R}edundancy in Chain-of-Thought via \textbf{I}ntrinsic \textbf{S}aliency \textbf{P}runing (\textbf{CRISP}), a framework that compresses CoT by exploiting the model's intrinsic saliency. Our analysis reveals a distinct phenomenon: the reasoning termination token \texttt{[object Object]} acts as an information anchor, where its attention pattern effectively demarcates essential reasoning from redundancy. Based on this finding, we design a policy that utilizes these intrinsic attention signals to guide atomic compression operations. In contrast to coarse-grained pruning strategies, CRISP strategically distills the reasoning chain to maximize information density while preserving logical coherence. Empirical results across various backbone models and mathematical datasets demonstrate that CRISP achieves a 50-60% reduction in token count without compromising accuracy, effectively mitigating the efficiency bottleneck of long-context reasoning. We open-source our implementation to facilitate further research in efficient reasoning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了CRISP框架，通过利用模型内部显著性进行链式思维（CoT）推理的高效压缩，大幅削减冗余内容，同时保持推理准确性，缓解长链推理的效率瓶颈。
AI.motivation: 长链式思维（CoT）推理提升了模型的复杂推理能力，但带来了巨大的计算开销和延迟。已有方法多采用外部压缩器，但往往无法适应模型内部的推理逻辑，导致重要逻辑步骤丢失。因此迫切需要一种兼顾效率和准确性的推理压缩方法。
AI.method: 作者提出CRISP架构，基于对模型attention机制的分析，发现终止token的attention模式可作为区分关键信息和冗余的锚点。CRISP利用这些内部attention信号，以原子操作形式对冗余部分进行细粒度剪枝，实现推理链的高效压缩。
AI.result: 在多种主流模型和数学数据集上的实验表明，CRISP能在不影响准确率的前提下，将token数量减少50-60%，极大提升推理效率。
AI.conclusion: CRISP框架显著提升了长链推理的效率和信息密度，且不牺牲准确性，有望推动高效推理技术的发展。作者也开源了实现，促进后续研究。

title: Better with Less: Tackling Heterogeneous Multi-Modal Image Joint Pretraining via Conditioned and Degraded Masked Autoencoder
summary: Learning robust representations across extremely heterogeneous modalities remains a fundamental challenge in multi-modal vision. As a critical and profound instantiation of this challenge, high-resolution (HR) joint optical and synthetic aperture radar (SAR) pretraining seeks modality synergy to mutually enhance single-source representations; its potential is severely hindered by the Heterogeneity-Resolution Paradox: finer spatial scales drastically amplify the physical divergence between complex radar geometries and non-homologous optical textures. Consequently, migrating medium-resolution-oriented rigid alignment paradigms to HR scenarios triggers either severe feature suppression to force equivalence, or feature contamination driven by extreme epistemic uncertainty. Both extremes inevitably culminate in profound representation degradation and negative transfer. To overcome this bottleneck, we propose CoDe-MAE, pioneering a \textit{better synergy with less alignment} philosophy. First, Optical-anchored Knowledge Distillation (OKD) implicitly regularizes SAR's speckle noise by mapping it into a pure semantic manifold. Building on this, Conditioned Contrastive Learning (CCL) utilizes a gradient buffering mechanism to align shared consensus while safely preserving divergent physical signatures. Concurrently, Cross-Modal Degraded Reconstruction (CDR) deliberately strips non-homologous spectral pseudo-features, truncating the inherently ill-posed mapping to capture true structural invariants. Extensive analyses validate our theoretical claims. Pretrained on 1M samples, CoDe-MAE demonstrates remarkable data efficiency, successfully preventing representation degradation and establishing new state-of-the-art performance across diverse single- and bi-modal downstream tasks, substantially outperforming foundation models scaled on vastly larger datasets.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了CoDe-MAE方法，以解决高分辨率光学与SAR遥感数据联合预训练过程中表征退化的问题，通过“弱对齐协同”促进多模态表征融合，大幅提升下游任务表现。
AI.motivation: 高分辨率下，光学与SAR影像物理特征强烈异质，导致现有特征刚性对齐方案在联合建模时出现表征退化甚至负迁移，阻碍了跨模态高效率特征融合和知识迁移。
AI.method: 提出CoDe-MAE框架——通过光学引导的知识蒸馏（OKD）抑制SAR斑点噪声，将其映射到更纯净的语义空间；条件对比学习（CCL）缓冲梯度，仅对共享共识对齐同时保留异质特征；跨模态伪特征降解重建（CDR）去除非同源伪特征，关注真实结构不变项。
AI.result: 在100万样本预训练下，CoDe-MAE展现优异数据效率，有效防止高分辨率表征退化，单模/双模下游任务均取得远超同类基础大模型（更大数据规模）的表现，验证了理论与方法效果。
AI.conclusion: CoDe-MAE提供了一种无需强制对齐即可实现多模态语义协同的创新范式，使高分辨率光学与SAR遥感场景的表征学习与迁移能力得到显著提升，为异构遥感数据融合奠定新的基础。

title: Cat-DPO: Category-Adaptive Safety Alignment
summary: Aligning large language models with human preferences must balance two competing goals: responding helpfully to legitimate requests and reliably refusing harmful ones. Most preference-based safety alignment methods collapse safety into a single scalar that is applied uniformly to every preference pair. The result is a model that looks safe on average but stays relatively unsafe on a minority of harm categories. We cast safety alignment as a per-category constrained optimization problem and derive Cat-DPO, a direct-preference-optimization algorithm with a separate adaptive safety margin for each harm category. The margin tightens when the model still produces unsafe responses on a category and relaxes once the model catches up, so the training signal tracks each category's current difficulty rather than averaging under one global rate. Across two LLM backbones and six preference-learning baselines, Cat-DPO iimproves aggregate helpfulness and harmlessness and compresses per-category safety variance and the best-to-worst gap, offering a drop-in per-category refinement of direct preference safety alignment.

AI.tldr: Cat-DPO提出了一种将安全对齐问题细化到每个有害类别的优化算法，实现了在提升整体有用性和无害性的同时，缩小不同类别间的安全性差距。
AI.motivation: 现有基于偏好的人类价值对齐方法，通常将所有安全相关的风险简化为一个统一的全局指标，导致模型对大多数类别表现安全，但在少数类别上仍可能出现高风险。为了解决这一问题，作者希望精细化地控制模型在各类有害内容上的安全表现。
AI.method: 作者将安全对齐问题建模为每个类别的受限优化问题。提出了Cat-DPO算法，对每一个有害类别分配自适应的安全边界。当模型在某类别仍产生不安全响应时，边界收紧；当模型学习提升后，边界放宽。这样，训练信号针对每个类别当前的学习难度动态调整，避免了全局平均掩盖局部风险。
AI.result: 在两种大型语言模型骨干网络和六种主流偏好学习基线方法上，Cat-DPO均提升了模型的整体有用性和无害性，并显著缩小了各类别安全性的方差及安全性最强和最弱类别间的差距。
AI.conclusion: Cat-DPO为大语言模型安全对齐提供了一种可无缝应用、按类别细化的偏好优化方法，能更加精准地提升模型在各类有害问题上的安全性。

title: TSM-Pose: Topology-Aware Learning with Semantic Mamba for Category-Level Object Pose Estimation
summary: Category-level object pose estimation is fundamental for embodied intelligence, yet achieving robust generalization to unseen instances remains challenging. However, existing methods mainly rely on simple feature extraction and aggregation, which struggle to capture category-shared topological structures and conduct semantic keypoint modeling, limiting their generalization. To address these, we propose a \textbf{T}opology-Aware Learning with \textbf{S}emantic \textbf{M}amba for Category-Level \textbf{P}ose Estimation framework (TSM-Pose). Specifically, we introduce a Topology Extractor to capture the global topological representation of the point cloud, which is integrated into local geometry features and enables robust category-level structural representation. Simultaneously, we propose a Mamba-based Global Semantic Aggregator that injects semantics priors into keypoints to enhance their expressiveness and leverages multiple TwinMamba blocks to model long-range dependencies for more effective global feature aggregation. Extensive experiments on three benchmark datasets (REAL275, CAMERA25, and HouseCat6D) demonstrate that TSM-Pose outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合拓扑结构和语义增强的新方法——TSM-Pose，用于提升类别级物体姿态估计，尤其是在未见实例上的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 类别级物体姿态估计对于智能体感知和交互至关重要，但现有方法在未知实例上泛化能力不足，主要原因是缺乏对类别共享拓扑结构和关键点语义的深入建模。
AI.method: 作者提出TSM-Pose框架，核心包括两个部分：1）拓扑提取器，用于提取点云的全局拓扑结构，并与局部几何特征融合，实现鲁棒的结构建模；2）基于Mamba的全局语义聚合器，通过TwinMamba块增强关键点语义表达和长距离特征建模。
AI.result: 在REAL275、CAMERA25和HouseCat6D三大基准数据集上，TSM-Pose均优于现有最新方法，实现更强的类别级姿态估计性能。
AI.conclusion: TSM-Pose有效结合拓扑结构和全局语义信息，显著提升了类别级物体姿态估计的泛化与准确性，推动了该领域的发展。

title: RoTRAG: Rule of Thumb Reasoning for Conversation Harm Detection with Retrieval-Augmented Generation
summary: Detecting harmful content in multi turn dialogue requires reasoning over the full conversational context rather than isolated utterances. However, most existing methods rely mainly on models internal parametric knowledge, without explicit grounding in external normative principles. This often leads to inconsistent judgments in socially nuanced contexts, limited interpretability, and redundant reasoning across turns. To address this, we propose RoTRAG, a retrieval augmented framework that incorporates concise human written moral norms, called Rules of Thumb (RoTs), into LLM based harm assessment. For each turn, RoTRAG retrieves relevant RoTs from an external corpus and uses them as explicit normative evidence for turn level reasoning and final severity classification. To improve efficiency, we further introduce a lightweight binary routing classifier that decides whether a new turn requires retrieval grounded reasoning or can reuse existing context. Experiments on ProsocialDialog and Safety Reasoning Multi Turn Dialogue show that RoTRAG consistently improves both harm classification and severity estimation over competitive baselines, with an average relative gain of around 40% in F1 across benchmark datasets and an average relative reduction of 8.4% in distributional error, while reducing redundant computation without sacrificing performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为RoTRAG的框架，通过检索外部道德规范（Rules of Thumb，RoTs），增强现有LLM在多轮对话中有害内容检测的能力，实现更高的准确性和解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有多轮对话有害内容检测方法主要依赖模型内部知识，缺乏对外部规范的显式引用，导致在社会化复杂话语中表现不一致，解释性差，并且各回合推理存在冗余。为解决这些挑战，作者将道德规范引入模型推理过程。
AI.method: 作者提出RoTRAG框架。该方法在每一轮对话时，从外部道德规范语料库中检索与当前回合相关的规范（RoTs），并将其作为明确的推理依据，辅助LLM完成有害性与严重程度判断。此外，提出二分类路由器决定是否需检索新规范或复用已有语境，提高效率。
AI.result: 在ProsocialDialog和Safety Reasoning Multi Turn Dialogue数据集上，RoTRAG在有害性分类和严重程度估计上均超越当前竞争性方法，F1提升约40%，分布误差降低8.4%，同时减少冗余计算。
AI.conclusion: 结合外部道德规范的RoTRAG框架提高了多轮对话场景下有害内容检测的准确性、效率和解释性，证明了规范性证据对于复杂社会语境下推理的重要性。

title: Training-inference input alignment outweighs framework choice in longitudinal retinal image prediction
summary: Quantitative prediction of future retinal appearance from longitudinal imaging would support clinical decisions in progressive macular disease that currently rely on qualitative comparison or scalar progression scores. Recent methods have moved toward increasing generative complexity, but whether this complexity is necessary for slowly progressing retinal disease is unclear. We tested this through a controlled comparison of five conditioning configurations sharing one architecture and training dataset, spanning standard conditional diffusion, inference-aligned stochastic training, and deterministic regression. In our evaluation, aligning the training and inference input distributions produced large gains (delta-SSIM +0.082, SSIM +0.086, both p < 0.001), while the choice among aligned frameworks did not significantly affect any primary metric. Task-entropy and posterior-concentration analyses, replicated on two fundus autofluorescence (FAF) platforms, provided a mechanistic account: the predictable component of inter-visit change is small relative to time-invariant acquisition variability, leaving stochastic sampling with little width to exploit. Guided by these findings, we developed TRU (Temporal Retinal U-Net), a deterministic direct-regression model with continuous time-delta conditioning and multi-scale history aggregation. We evaluated TRU on 28,902 eyes across three imaging platforms: a mixed-disease Optos FAF cohort (9,942 eyes), zero-shot transfer to Stargardt macular dystrophy on Optos (288 eyes) and Heidelberg Spectralis (125 eyes), and a boundary evaluation on Cirrus en-face fundus images from a glaucoma cohort (18,547 eyes). TRU matched or exceeded delta-SSIM, SSIM, and PSNR in every FAF cohort against three state-of-the-art benchmarks, and its advantage grew monotonically with available history length.

AI.tldr: 本文比较了五种用于预测眼底图像未来变化的方法，发现复杂的生成模型在缓慢进展型视网膜疾病中并无显著优势。基于此，作者提出了一种简单高效的直接回归模型TRU，实验证明其表现优于现有方法，且随着历史数据增加效果提升。
AI.motivation: 现有对进展性黄斑病变的临床评估主要依赖定性对比或单一进展分数，缺乏对视网膜未来变化的量化预测工具。最近虽然出现了复杂的生成式方法，但这些复杂度是否真有必要尚无定论，特别是在变化缓慢的疾病场景下。因此，作者希望明确更简单模型的有效性并开发更实用的工具。
AI.method: 作者设计了五种条件输入配置，采用相同架构和训练数据，涵盖标准条件扩散、推理一致的随机训练以及确定性回归。在两个不同成像平台上，通过SSIM等指标对比模型性能，并分析了变化可预测成分和成像变异性。根据分析结果，作者开发了持续时间条件的直接回归模型TRU，并在三种成像平台的大规模数据集上验证。
AI.result: 结果显示，训练推理输入对齐带来显著性能提升（SSIM显著增加），而多种对齐方法之间主指标无统计差异。分析表明，眼底随访变化的可预测部分很小，随机采样优势有限。TRU模型在所有FAF数据集中与或超越三个先进基线，且随历史长度增长效果持续提升。
AI.conclusion: 模型越复杂并不总带来性能优化，尤其在缓慢进展的视网膜疾病预测中。融合时间和历史的简单直接回归模型TRU即可获得更佳和更具实际意义的泛化表现，对临床指导具有更高应用价值。

title: Calibrated? Not for Everyone: How Sexual Orientation and Religious Markers Distort LLM Accuracy and Confidence in Medical QA
summary: Safe clinical deployment of Large Language Models (LLMs) requires not only high accuracy but also robust uncertainty calibration to ensure models defer to clinicians when appropriate. Our paper investigates how social descriptors of a patient (specifically sexual orientation and religious affiliation) distort these uncertainty signals and model accuracy. Evaluating nine general-purpose and biomedical LLMs on 2,364 medical questions and their counterfactual variants, we demonstrate that identity markers cause a "calibration crisis". "Homosexual" markers consistently trigger performance drops, and intersectional identities produce idiosyncratic, non-additive harms to calibration. Moreover, a clinician-validated case study in an open-ended generation setting confirms that these failures are not an artifact of the multiple-choice format. Our results demonstrate that the presence of social identity cues does not merely shift predictions; it affects the reliability of confidence signals, posing a significant risk to equitable care and safe deployment in confidence-based clinical workflows.

AI.tldr: 本论文发现，大型语言模型（LLM）在涉及患者社会身份描述（如性取向和宗教信仰）时，其置信度校准和准确率会被显著扭曲，影响临床安全性。
AI.motivation: 在临床应用中，LLM不仅需要高准确率，还需在不确定时能可靠地向临床医生让渡决策。然而，患者的社会身份信息是否影响模型不确定性信号和结果尚未明了，这直接相关于临床安全，并关乎医疗公平。
AI.method: 作者评估了9种通用及生物医学LLM，在2,364个包含性取向和宗教身份变体的医学问题上进行横向和对照实验；同时通过临床医生确认的开放式问答进一步验证现象。
AI.result: 结果表明，“同性恋”等身份标记普遍导致模型性能显著下降，且多重身份会产生不可加性的复杂影响。此外，这种“校准危机”不仅发生在选择题设定，在开放生成也存在。
AI.conclusion: 社会身份标记不只是改变模型具体预测，还侵蚀了其置信信号的可靠度，对公平医疗和基于置信度的临床应用构成重大风险。

title: Self-Reasoning Agentic Framework for Narrative Product Grid-Collage Generation
summary: Narrative-driven product photography has become a prevalent paradigm in modern marketing, as coherent visual storytelling helps convey product value and establishes emotional engagement with consumers. However, existing image generation methods do not support structured narrative planning or cross-panel coordination, often resulting in weak storytelling and visual incoherence. In practice, narrative product photography is commonly presented as multi-grid collages, where multiple views or scenes jointly communicate a product narrative. To ensure visual consistency across grids and aesthetic harmony of the overall composition, we generate the collage as a single unified image rather than composing independently synthesized panels. We propose a self-reasoning agentic framework for narrative product grid collage generation. Given a product packshot and its name, the system first constructs a Product Narrative Framework that explicitly represents the product's identity, usage context, and situational environment, and translates it into complementary grids governed by a shared visual style. Constraint-aware prompts are then compiled and fed to a generation model that synthesizes the collage jointly. The generated output is evaluated on both content validity and photography quality, with explicit gates determining whether to proceed or refine. When evaluation fails, the system performs failure attribution and applies targeted refinement, enabling progressive improvement through iterative self-reflection. Experiments demonstrate that our framework consistently improves aesthetic quality, narrative richness, and visual coherence, compared to direct prompting baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向叙事驱动产品拼图摄影的生成框架，能提升产品叙事的丰富性和整体视觉连贯性。
