AI.motivation: 现代营销中，叙事驱动的产品摄影能够更好地传递产品价值并与消费者建立情感联系。然而，现有图像生成方法难以实现结构化叙事和多格协调，导致叙事性弱和视觉不一致。
AI.method: 作者提出了一个自我推理的代理框架：首先根据产品照片和名称生成叙事框架，明确产品身份、使用场景及环境，并转化为有共享风格的多格拼图。接着，通过带有约束的生成提示词驱动图像生成，随后对结果在内容有效性和摄影品质上进行评价。不合格结果会进行归因分析和定向细化，循环优化输出。
AI.result: 实验表明，该框架在美学质量、叙事丰富性和视觉一致性上，均优于直接提示方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能显著提升产品拼图摄影的整体叙事性和视觉效果，在产品营销相关的自动化视觉内容生成具有应用前景。

title: A Universal Avoidance Method for Diverse Multi-branch Generation
summary: Modern generative models still lack human-level creativity, particularly in multi-branch diversity. Prior approaches to address this problem often incur heavy computation or strong dependency on model architecture. Therefore, we introduce UAG(Universal Avoidance Generation), a model-agnostic and computationally efficient generation strategy that penalizes similarity among previously generated outputs. Thus, UAG can enhance multi-branch diversity across both diffusion and transformer models, with minimal additional computation. In experiments, our method achieves up to 1.9 times higher diversity, runs 4.4 times faster, and requires only 1/64 of the FLOPs compared to state-of-the-art methods. The full code is https://anonymous.4open.science/r/2026_ACL_Universal/.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种通用且高效的生成策略UAG，可显著提升多分支多样性，并减少计算量，对模型架构无依赖。
AI.motivation: 当前生成模型在多分支多样性上的表现仍远不及人类，现有方法要么计算量大，要么对模型架构有强依赖，需要一种通用且计算友好的方法提升生成多样性。
AI.method: 提出UAG(Universal Avoidance Generation)策略，通过对先前生成内容的相似性进行惩罚，从而鼓励生成更多样化的结果。该方法对模型架构无依赖，仅需极少的额外计算量，可用于扩散模型和transformer模型等多种架构。
AI.result: 实验显示，UAG可使生成多样性提升至1.9倍，速度提升4.4倍，FLOPs仅为最先进方法的1/64，性能领先。
AI.conclusion: UAG方法能在多种生成模型下提升多分支多样性，计算和资源消耗极低，实用性强。

title: Hyperspectral Unmixing Hierarchies
summary:
Unmixing reveals the spatial distribution and spectral details of different constituents, called endmembers, in a hyperspectral image. Because unmixing has limited ground truth requirements, can accommodate mixed pixels, and is closely tied to light propagation, it is a uniquely powerful tool for analyzing hyperspectral images. However, spectral variability inhibits unmixing performance, the proper way to determine the number of endmembers is ambiguous, and the clarity of the endmembers degrades as more are included. Hierarchical structure is a possible solution to all three problems.
  Here, hierarchical unmixing is defined by imposing a hierarchical abundance sum constraint on Deep Nonnegative Matrix Factorization. Binary Linear Unmixing Tactile Hierarchies (BLUTHs) solve the hierarchical unmixing problem with a simple network architecture. Sparsity modulation unmixing growth tailors the topology of a BLUTH to each scene. The structure imposed by BLUTHs allows endmembers with varying levels of spectral contrast to be revealed, mitigating the challenge of spectral variability.
  The performance of BLUTHs exceeds state-of-the-art unmixing algorithms on laboratory scenes, particularly with regard to abundance estimation, while their performance remains competitive on remote sensing scenes. In addition, ocean color unmixing by BLUTHs is demonstrated on hyperspectral scenes from the HYPSO and PACE satellites.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的分层解混方法（BLUTHs），通过在深度非负矩阵分解中引入层次约束，有效揭示高光谱图像中的空间分布及光谱细节，提升了解混精度。
AI.motivation: 高光谱图像解混技术能够在有限先验和混合像素下解析图像，但面临光谱变异、端元数目选择和端元可辨性下降等难题，亟需创新方法加以解决。
AI.method: 作者提出在深度非负矩阵分解中施加层次丰度总和约束，形成二元线性解混触觉层级（BLUTHs）网络结构，并通过稀疏调制机制自动适应不同场景的网络拓扑。
AI.result: BLUTHs在实验室场景下的端元丰度估计效果优于当前主流算法，在遥感场景下表现出较强竞争力，并成功在HYPSO和PACE卫星的海洋色高光谱数据上得到应用证明。
AI.conclusion: 分层结构（BLUTHs）在解决光谱变异、端元数选择及可辨性难题方面具有突出优势，为高光谱解混分析提供了更高效和适应性的工具。

title: Align Documents to Questions: Question-Oriented Document Rewriting for Retrieval-Augmented Generation
summary: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) enhances the factuality of Large Language Models (LLMs) by incorporating retrieved documents and/or generated context. However, LLMs often exhibit a stylistic bias when presented with mixed contexts, favoring fluent but hallucinated generated content over factually grounded yet disorganized retrieved evidence. This phenomenon reveals that the utility of retrieved information is bottlenecked by its presentation. To bridge this gap, we propose QREAM, a style-controlled rewriter that aligns retrieved documents with a question-oriented style while preserving facts, better for LLM readers to utilize. Our framework consists of two stages: (1) QREAM-ICL, which uses stylistic seeds to guide iterative rewriting exploration; and (2) QREAM-FT, a lightweight student model distilled from denoised ICL outputs. QREAM-FT employs dual-criteria rejection sampling, filtering based on answer correctness and factual consistency to ensure high-quality supervision. QREAM seamlessly integrates into existing RAG pipelines as a plug-and-play module. Experiments demonstrate that QREAM consistently enhances advanced RAG pipelines, yielding up to 8% relative improvement with negligible latency overhead, effectively balancing question relevance with factual grounding.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种名为QREAM的风格控制重写模块，优化RAG（检索增强生成）系统中文档的表达风格，提高检索信息的有效利用，提升LLM回答的事实性和相关性。
AI.motivation: RAG技术虽能提升LLM的事实性，但检索到的证据往往表达混乱、不易被采纳，导致LLM倾向于更流畅却虚构的生成内容。作者洞察到检索信息的表达风格成为制约其作用的瓶颈，因此提出优化文档风格以提升利用率。
AI.method: QREAM包括两阶段：(1) QREAM-ICL，利用风格种子引导检索文档向问题导向风格重写；(2) QREAM-FT，将ICL输出蒸馏为轻量学生模型，并用答案正确性和事实一致性双重拒采机制过滤生成，确保高质量产出。QREAM作为可插拔模块无缝对接RAG流程。
AI.result: 实验显示，QREAM模块可为高级RAG方案带来最高8%的相对性能提升，且几乎不增加延迟，并且能更好兼顾问题相关性与事实基础。
AI.conclusion: 通过对检索文档进行问题导向风格重写，QREAM提升了检索信息的可用性和LLM回答的准确性，为RAG系统提供了有效且高效的改进思路。

title: UGD: An Unsupervised Geometric Distance for Evaluating Real-world Noisy Point Cloud Denoising
comment: to be published in IEEE Transactions on Visualization and Computer Graphics
summary: Point cloud denoising is a fundamental and crucial challenge in real-world point cloud applications. Existing quantitative evaluation metrics for point cloud denoising methods are implemented in a supervised manner, which requires both the denoised point cloud and the corresponding ground-truth clean point cloud to compute a representative geometric distance. This requirement is highly problematic in real-world scenarios, where ground-truth clean point clouds are often unavailable. In this paper, we propose a simple yet effective unsupervised geometric distance (UGD) for real-world noisy point cloud denoising, calculated solely from noisy point clouds. The core idea of UGD is to learn a patch-wise prior model from a set of clean point clouds and then employ this prior model as the ground-truth to quantify the degradation by measuring the geometric variations of the denoised point cloud. To this end, we first learn a pristine Gaussian Mixture Model (GMM) with extracted patch-wise quality-aware features from a set of pristine clean point clouds by a patch-wise feature extraction network, which serves as the ground-truth for the quantitative evaluation. Then, the UGD is defined as the weighted sum of distances between each patch of the denoised point cloud and the learned pristine GMM model in the patch space. To train the employed patch-wise feature extraction network, we propose a self-supervised training framework through multi-task learning, which includes pair-wise quality ranking, distortion classification, and distortion distribution prediction. Quantitative experiments with synthetic noise confirm that the proposed UGD achieves comparable performance to supervised full-reference metrics. Moreover, experimental results on real-world data demonstrate that the proposed UGD enables unsupervised evaluation of point cloud denoising methods based exclusively on noisy point clouds.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种只需用噪声点云即可实现的无监督几何距离（UGD）评价指标，无需依赖真实干净点云，可在真实场景中评估点云去噪质量。
AI.motivation: 现有点云去噪定量评价指标依赖于监督方式，需有干净点云作为参考，然而在实际应用中往往获取不到。因而亟需一种无需参考点云的评估方法来适应实际需求。
AI.method: 作者提出利用一组干净点云学习patch级别的先验高斯混合模型（GMM），得到patch的特征分布。评价时，用去噪点云的patch与该先验GMM间的距离加权求和，作为去噪质量的分数。特征提取网络通过自监督多任务（质量排序、失真分类和分布预测）方式训练。
AI.result: 在合成噪声实验中，所提UGD评价与监督式全参考指标性能相当；在真实数据中，UGD可实现基于噪声点云的去噪方法无监督评价。
AI.conclusion: UGD不依赖地面真实点云，可高效在真实应用中评估点云去噪效果，具有实际应用潜力。

title: Neuro-Symbolic Resolution of Recommendation Conflicts in Multimorbidity Clinical Guidelines
comment: Accepted by Proceedings of the 40th Annual AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence (Bridge Program on Logic & AI: Logical and Symbolic Reasoning in Language Models)
summary: Clinical guidelines, typically developed by independent specialty societies, inherently exhibit substantial fragmentation, redundancy, and logical contradiction. These inconsistencies, particularly when applied to patients with multimorbidity, not only cause cognitive dissonance for clinicians but also introduce catastrophic noise into AI systems, rendering the standard Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) system fragile and prone to hallucination. To address this fundamental reliability crisis, we introduce a Neuro-Symbolic framework that automates the detection of recommendation redundancies and conflicts. Our pipeline employs a multi-agent system to translate unstructured clinical natural language into rigorous symbolic logic language, which is then verified by a Satisfiability (SAT) solver. By formulating a hierarchical taxonomy of logical rule interactions, we identify a critical category termed Local Conflict - a decision conflict arising from the intersection of comorbidities. Evaluating our system on a curated benchmark of 12 authoritative SGLT2 inhibitor guidelines, we reveal that 90.6% of conflicts are Local, a structural complexity that single-disease guidelines fail to address. While state-of-the-art LLMs fail in detecting these conflicts, our neuro-symbolic approach achieves an F1 score of 0.861. This work demonstrates that logical verification must precede retrieval, establishing a new technical standard for automated knowledge coordination in medical AI.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种神经符号框架，自动检测并解决临床指南中的冗余和冲突，提升面向多病共存患者的AI系统可靠性。
AI.motivation: 现有临床指南来源多样，存在大量分裂、冗余和逻辑矛盾，尤其在多病共存情境下，导致临床决策混乱，并严重影响基于RAG的AI系统的准确性和可靠性。为解决这一关键问题，需要更智能地协调和验证医疗知识。
AI.method: 作者提出利用多智能体系统，将非结构化的医学自然语言推荐自动转化为结构化符号逻辑，再通过可满足性（SAT）求解器进行逻辑一致性验证。通过构建层次化的规则交互分类体系，并定义了'局部冲突'（Local Conflict）类别，精准定位多病共存下的决策冲突。
AI.result: 在SGLT2抑制剂相关的12份权威指南基准数据集上，该系统检测到90.6%的冲突为局部冲突（Local Conflict），而现有单病种指南难以发现。主流大语言模型在冲突检测上表现较差，而该神经符号方法F1值高达0.861。
AI.conclusion: 研究证明了在检索与生成前进行逻辑验证的必要性，为医疗AI中知识自动协调树立了新技术标准，有助于提升AI系统面对多病复杂场景时的正确性和可信度。

title: DOSE: Data Selection for Multi-Modal LLMs via Off-the-Shelf Models
summary: High-quality and diverse multimodal data are essential for improving vision-language models (VLMs), yet existing datasets often contain noisy, redundant, and poorly aligned samples. To address these problems, data filtering is commonly used to enhance the efficiency and performance of multimodal learning, but it introduces extra computational cost because filtering models are usually trained on the same data they are meant to screen. To reduce this cost, we study DOSE, which explores whether off-the-shelf pretrained models that have never seen the target data can be used to select training samples for larger and stronger multimodal models without any task-specific training. Even without fine-tuning, these models can effectively assess text quality and image-text alignment to guide data selection. Based on this, we build a joint quality-alignment distribution and apply adaptive weighted sampling to select informative samples while maintaining long-tail diversity. This approach enhances data diversity, enabling models trained on DOSE-filtered data to match or surpass those trained on the full dataset on standard VQA and math benchmarks. Extensive experiments demonstrate its effectiveness, efficiency, and scalability.

AI.tldr: DOSE方法利用从未见过目标数据的预训练模型高效筛选优质多模态训练样本，提升大模型下游任务表现。
AI.motivation: 现有多模态数据集常含有噪声、冗余和对齐欠佳的问题，影响视觉-语言模型(VLMs)的表现。传统数据过滤虽能缓解此问题，但通常需专门训练额外模型，计算资源消耗大。
AI.method: 提出DOSE方法，使用无须微调的现成预训练模型直接对未见过的数据进行样本筛选，评估文本质量和图文对齐度，并基于质量-对齐联合分布采用自适应加权采样，保证选取多样且优质的数据。
AI.result: 无需任务特定微调即可筛选出优质样本，提升筛选效率和多样性。DOSE方法筛选的数据集在VQA、数学等标准任务上，模型表现可持平或超过使用完整数据集的模型。
AI.conclusion: DOSE提高了多模态数据过滤的效率和有效性，无需额外标注或微调，即可助力大模型取得更好表现，并具良好可扩展性。

title: Logical Computational Linguistics
summary:
In this book we promote logical computational linguistics as opposed to statistical computational linguistics. In particular, we provide a logical semantic interface. This book assembles more than twenty years of research work on type logical grammar, and adds new ideas and material.
  Chains of statistical dependencies of less than one hundred per cent confidence tend monotonically to zero. Chains of logical dependencies of any length maintain one hundred per cent confidence end to end.
  We aspire to enable perfect syntactic and semantic processing in life-critical NLP applications.

AI.tldr: 本书主张使用逻辑计算语言学替代统计计算语言学，提出了一个逻辑语义接口，整合了二十余年类型逻辑语法的研究，并加入了新内容。
AI.motivation: 统计模型依赖的概率链随着链条增长趋近于零，而逻辑推理始终能保持绝对的可信度，尤其在生命攸关的自然语言处理应用中，现有方法无法提供足够可靠的结果。
AI.method: 书中系统地介绍了类型逻辑语法的研究进展，聚焦于如何建立百分之百可靠的逻辑语义接口，对比了逻辑方法和统计方法在处理语言时的本质区别。
AI.result: 逻辑依赖链无论长度如何都能保持推理的完整性和可信度，而传统统计方法则无法做到。通过提出的逻辑语义接口，可以实现更高准确性的语言处理。
AI.conclusion: 当前自然语言处理的许多应用需要绝对可靠的结果，逻辑计算语言学为实现这一目标提供了理论和实践基础，有潜力取代以概率为核心的统计方法。

title: Adverse-to-the-eXtreme Panoptic Segmentation: URVIS 2026 Study and Benchmark
summary: This paper presents the report of the URVIS 2026 challenge on adverse-to-extreme panoptic segmentation. As the first challenge of its kind, it attracted 17 registered participants and 47 submissions, with 4 teams reaching the final phase. The challenge is based on the MUSES dataset, a multi-sensor benchmark for panoptic segmentation in adverse-to-extreme weather, including RGB frame camera, LiDAR, radar, and event camera data. Weighted Panoptic Quality (wPQ) is designed and adopted as the official ranking metric for fair evaluation across weather conditions. In this report, we summarise the challenge setting and benchmark results, analyse the performance of the submitted methods, and discuss current progress and remaining challenges for robust multimodal panoptic segmentation. Link: https://urvis-workshop.github.io/challenge-Muses.html

AI.tldr: 该论文是关于URVIS 2026挑战赛的报告，该挑战聚焦于恶劣环境下的全景分割任务，涉及多种传感器和新的评测标准。
AI.motivation: 当前全景分割技术在恶劣乃至极端天气条件下仍面临较大挑战，需要通过多模态数据和创新评测机制推动算法进步。
AI.method: 基于MUSES数据集（包含RGB相机、LiDAR、雷达及事件相机数据），设计了加权全景质量（wPQ）指标用于评测和排名，组织了公开挑战并对参赛方案进行了分析。
AI.result: 挑战吸引了17支参赛队伍和47份方案，最终有4支队伍进入决赛阶段。总结了各家方案在不同天气和传感器组合下的优劣表现。
AI.conclusion: 多模态全景分割在恶劣天气下仍具挑战性，wPQ指标为评测提供了公平标准。未来仍需进一步攻克鲁棒性、多模态融合等难点。

title: More Than Meets the Eye: Measuring the Semiotic Gap in Vision-Language Models via Semantic Anchorage
comment: 16 pages, 4 figures. Accepted to the Main Conference of ACL 2026
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) excel at photorealistic generation, yet often struggle to represent abstract meaning such as idiomatic interpretations of noun compounds. To study whether high visual fidelity interferes with idiomatic compositionality under visual abstraction, we introduce DIVA, a controlled benchmark that replaces high-fidelity visual detail with schematic iconicity by generating paired, sense-anchored visualizations for literal and idiomatic readings. We further propose Semantic Alignment Gap ($Δ$), an architecture-agnostic metric that quantifies divergence between literal and idiomatic visual grounding. We additionally introduce a directional signed bias $b(t)$ to separately measure the direction and strength of literal preference. Evaluating 8 recent VLMs, we reveal a consistent Literal Superiority Bias: model scale alone does not resolve literal preference, and increased visual fidelity is associated with weaker symbolic alignment, suggesting cognitive interference from hyper-realistic imagery. Our findings suggest that improving compositional understanding requires iconographic abstraction of visual input and anchoring interpretation and generation in intended meaning.

AI.tldr: 本文研究视觉-语言模型（VLMs）在处理抽象意义（如名词复合语的习惯用法）时的局限性，并提出了DIVA基准和新的评估指标，分析模型在惯用与字面理解之间的表现差异。
AI.motivation: 尽管VLMs在真实感图像生成上表现优异，但它们在识别、表达抽象或习惯意义时存在不足。该研究旨在探究高视觉真实度是否影响模型对抽象意义的处理能力及组合性表现。
AI.method: 作者提出了DIVA基准，通过配对生成具备象征性可视元素的简单图像，分别反映词语的字面和习惯解释。同时提出了架构无关的语义对齐差异（Semantic Alignment Gap, Δ）指标和偏向度指标b(t)，用于定量分析模型对字面与惯用意义的区别和偏好。
AI.result: 对8个主流VLMs测试，发现模型普遍存在“字面优越偏向”（Literal Superiority Bias），即无论模型规模如何，字面理解倾向普遍存在。同时，视觉真实度越高，模型的符号对齐能力反而更弱。
AI.conclusion: 提高VLMs对组合型抽象意义的理解，需要引入更具象征性和意图锚定的视觉输入，而不仅仅追求视觉真实度。

title: DVAR: Adversarial Multi-Agent Debate for Video Authenticity Detection
summary: The rapid evolution of video generation technologies poses a significant challenge to media forensics, as conventional detection methods often fail to generalize beyond their training distributions. To address this, we propose DVAR (Debate-based Video Authenticity Reasoning), a training-free framework that reformulates video detection as a structured multi-agent forensic reasoning process. Moving beyond the paradigm of pattern matching, DVAR orchestrates a competition between a Generative Hypothesis Agent and a Natural Mechanism Agent. Through iterative rounds of cross-examination, these agents defend their respective explanations against abnormal evidence, driving a logical convergence where the truth emerges from rigorous stress-testing. To adjudicate these conflicting claims, we apply Occam's Razor through the Minimum Description Length (MDL) framework, defining an Explanatory Cost to quantify the "logical burden" of each reasoning path. Furthermore, we integrate GenVideoKB, a dynamic knowledge repository that provides high-level reasoning heuristics on generative boundaries and failure modes. Extensive experiments demonstrate that DVAR achieves competitive performance against supervised state-of-the-art methods while exhibiting superior generalization to unseen generative architectures. By transforming detection into a transparent debate, DVAR provides explicit, interpretable reasoning traces for robust video authenticity assessment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需训练的视频真伪检测方法DVAR，通过多代理推理和知识库辅助提升检测泛化能力和可解释性。
AI.motivation: 随着视频生成技术快速发展，传统检测方法对新型伪造手段泛化能力有限，亟需更具鲁棒性和可解释性的新方案。
AI.method: DVAR框架引入“生成假设代理”和“自然机制代理”两方博弈，通过多轮交叉辩论推理视频真伪，结合最小描述长度（MDL）来量化各自解释路径的复杂度，并用GenVideoKB知识库辅助推理。
AI.result: DVAR在多项实验中，与有监督的先进方法相比取得了具有竞争力的检测准确率，并且对新型生成架构表现出更好的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: DVAR将视频检测转化为透明可解释的辩论式推理过程，提升了检测的鲁棒性和可解释性，是应对视频伪造泛化问题的有效方案。

title: Still Between Us? Evaluating and Improving Voice Assistant Robustness to Third-Party Interruptions
summary: While recent Spoken Language Models (SLMs) have been actively deployed in real-world scenarios, they lack the capability to discern Third-Party Interruptions (TPI) from the primary user's ongoing flow, leaving them vulnerable to contextual failures. To bridge this gap, we introduce TPI-Train, a dataset of 88K instances designed with speaker-aware hard negatives to enforce acoustic cue prioritization for interruption handling, and TPI-Bench, a comprehensive evaluation framework designed to rigorously measure the interruption-handling strategy and precise speaker discrimination in deceptive contexts. Experiments demonstrate that our dataset design mitigates semantic shortcut learning-a critical pitfall where models exploit semantic context while neglecting acoustic signals essential for discerning speaker changes. We believe our work establishes a foundational resource for overcoming text-dominated unimodal reliance in SLMs, paving the way for more robust multi-party spoken interaction. The code for the framework is publicly available at https://tpi-va.github.io

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了TPI-Train数据集和TPI-Bench评测框架，用于提升口语模型在识别第三方打断和区分说话人方面的能力。
AI.motivation: 当前的口语语言模型（SLM）在实际应用中难以分辨主要用户与第三方的打断，容易在多方交互中发生上下文理解失败。为了提升模型对多说话人、中断等复杂场景的鲁棒性，需要新型的数据集和评测方法。
AI.method: 作者设计了TPI-Train数据集（含88K条实例），通过“说话人感知硬负例”促使模型关注声学线索以识别打断。此外，提出TPI-Bench评测框架，对模型处理打断的策略及在迷惑场景下精确区分说话人的能力进行全面评估。
AI.result: 实验证明，基于新数据集训练的模型能有效减少只依赖语义信息而忽视声学线索的“语义捷径”问题，显著提升了对说话人变化的感知与分辨能力。
AI.conclusion: 本工作为解决SLM过度依赖文本、提升其在多方对话场景下的鲁棒性提供了基础资源，有助于推动更强健的多说话人语音交互系统的发展。

title: Inductive Convolution Nuclear Norm Minimization for Tensor Completion with Arbitrary Sampling
summary: The recently established Convolution Nuclear Norm Minimization (CNNM) addresses the problem of \textit{tensor completion with arbitrary sampling} (TCAS), which involves restoring a tensor from a subset of its entries sampled in an arbitrary manner. Despite its promising performance, the optimization procedure of CNNM needs performing Singular Value Decomposition (SVD) multiple times, which is computationally expensive and hard to parallelize. To address the issue, we reformulate the optimization objective of CNNM from the perspective of convolution eigenvectors. By introducing pre-learned convolution eigenvectors which are shared among different tensors, we propose a novel method called Inductive Convolution Nuclear Norm Minimization (ICNNM), which bypasses the SVD step so as to decrease significantly the computational time. In addition, due to the extra prior knowledge encoded in the pre-learned convolution eigenvectors, ICNNM also outperforms CNNM in terms of recovery performance. Extensive experiments on video completion, prediction and frame interpolation verify the superiority of ICNNM over CNNM and several other competing methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的张量补全方法ICNNM，相比现有CNNM方法大幅提升了计算效率与恢复效果。
AI.motivation: 现有的CNNM方法在解决任意采样张量补全问题时需要多次进行奇异值分解（SVD），计算代价高且难以并行。
AI.method: 将CNNM的优化目标转换为卷积特征向量的视角，引入预训练的、可在不同张量间共享的卷积特征向量，提出免SVD的归纳式卷积核范数最小化（ICNNM）方法。
AI.result: ICNNM方法显著减少了计算时间，并且由于使用了预训练特征向量，恢复性能优于CNNM。
AI.conclusion: 实验表明，ICNNM在视频补全、预测和插帧等任务上，相较于CNNM及其他方法都取得了更好效果，且计算高效。

title: ArgBench: Benchmarking LLMs on Computational Argumentation Tasks
summary: Argumentation skills are an essential toolkit for large language models (LLMs). These skills are crucial in various use cases, including self-reflection, debating collaboratively for diverse answers, and countering hate speech. In this paper, we create the first benchmark for a standardized evaluation of LLM-based approaches to computational argumentation, encompassing 33 datasets from previous work in unified form. Using the benchmark, we evaluate the generalizability of five LLM families across 46 computational argumentation tasks that cover mining arguments, assessing perspectives, assessing argument quality, reasoning about arguments, and generating arguments. On the benchmark, we conduct an extensive systematic analysis of the contribution of few-shot examples, reasoning steps, model size, and training skills to the performance of LLMs on the computational argumentation tasks in the benchmark.

AI.tldr: 本文提出并发布了首个针对LLM（大语言模型）论证能力的标准化基准，并在该基准上系统评测了多种LLM在不同论证任务中的表现。
AI.motivation: 当前LLM在推理、辩论等多场景下广泛应用，但缺乏针对其论证能力的系统化评测工具，因此需要构建标准化基准和全面分析。
AI.method: 作者收集整合了以往工作的33个数据集，统一格式后构建了包含46类论证相关任务的基准，并用五大主流LLM家族进行横向对比评测，系统研究了few-shot示例、推理步骤、模型规模和训练任务对论证能力的影响。
AI.result: 评测结果揭示了不同LLM家族在多维度论证任务的表现差异，并量化了few-shot示例、推理步骤等对提升任务表现的作用。
AI.conclusion: 基于该基准，未来可更目标明确地提升LLM在计算性论证各方面能力，为相关模型研究和应用提供了系统化评测工具和研究基础。

title: TeMuDance: Contrastive Alignment-Based Textual Control for Music-Driven Dance Generation
summary: Existing music-driven dance generation approaches have achieved strong realism and effective audio-motion alignment. However, they generally lack semantic controllability, making it difficult to guide specific movements through natural language descriptions. This limitation primarily stems from the absence of large-scale datasets that jointly align music, text, and motion for supervised learning of text-conditioned control. To address this challenge, we propose TeMuDance, a framework that enables text-based control for music-conditioned dance generation without requiring any manually annotated music-text-motion triplet dataset. TeMuDance introduces a motion-centred bridging paradigm that leverages motion as a shared semantic anchor to align disjoint music-dance and text-motion datasets within a unified embedding space, enabling cross-modal retrieval of missing modalities for end-to-end training. A lightweight text control branch is then trained on top of a frozen music-to-dance diffusion backbone, preserving rhythmic fidelity while enabling fine-grained semantic guidance. To further suppress noise inherent in the retrieved supervision, we design a dual-stream fine-tuning strategy with confidence-based filtering. We also propose a novel task-aligned metric that quantifies whether textual prompts induce the intended kinematic attributes under music conditioning. Extensive experiments demonstrate that TeMuDance achieves competitive dance quality while substantially improving text-conditioned control over existing methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了TeMuDance框架，实现了无需大规模人工标注音乐-文本-舞蹈三元组数据集的文本引导下的音乐驱动舞蹈生成。
AI.motivation: 目前音乐驱动舞蹈生成缺乏语义可控性，难以根据自然语言描述精确控制舞蹈动作，原因是缺乏同步对齐音乐、文本和舞蹈的大数据集。
AI.method: 提出以动作为中心的桥接范式，将分离的音乐-动作和文本-动作数据集对齐到统一的嵌入空间，通过跨模态检索补足缺失模态，并基于冻结的音乐-舞蹈扩散主干训练轻量级文本控制分支。引入可信度过滤的双流微调机制以抑制噪声，并提出了新的评价指标衡量文本引导的动作属性是否达预期。
AI.result: 实验证明TeMuDance能够在保证舞蹈质量的前提下，显著提升文本条件下的语义控制能力，效果优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: TeMuDance无需人工构建大规模三元组数据集，便达到了高质量、强文本控制的音乐驱动舞蹈生成，为多模态生成提供了新思路。

title: AnchorMem: Anchored Facts with Associative Contexts for Building Memory in Large Language Models
summary: While large language models have achieved remarkable performance in complex tasks, they still need a memory system to utilize historical experience in long-term interactions. Existing memory methods (e.g., A-Mem, Mem0) place excessive emphasis on organizing interactions by frequently rewriting them, however, this heavy reliance on summarization risks diluting essential contextual nuances and obscuring key retrieval features. To bridge this gap, we introduce AnchorMem, a novel memory framework inspired by the Proust Phenomenon in cognitive science, where a specific anchor triggers a holistic recollection. We propose a method that decouples the retrieval unit from the generation context. AnchorMem extracts atomic facts from interaction history to serve as retrieval anchors, while preserving the original context as the immutable context. To reveal implicit narrative cues, we construct an associative event graph that uses higher-order event links that bind sets of related facts into shared event representations, strengthening cross-memory integration without relying on generic entities as bridges. During retrieval, the system anchors queries to specific facts and events to locate relevant memories, but reconstructs the context using the associated raw chunks and events. Our method reconciles fine-grained retrieval with the contextual integrity of interactions. Experiments across three closed-source and open-source models on the LoCoMo benchmark demonstrate that AnchorMem significantly outperforms baselines. Code is available at https://github.com/RayNeo-AI-2025/AnchorMem.

AI.tldr: AnchorMem是一种新型记忆系统，针对大语言模型长时记忆问题，加强检索的细粒度与原始上下文间的平衡，显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有记忆方法依赖频繁重写与总结对话历史，容易丢失关键信息，导致内容检索和上下文完整性受损，需要新的机制改进大模型历史经验利用。
AI.method: AnchorMem从互动历史中提取原子事实作为检索锚点，保持原始上下文不变，通过构建关联事件图，将相关事实绑定为事件，强化记忆间联系。检索时用锚点定位相关记忆，并复现相关原始上下文段落，保证检索精度与上下文完整性。
AI.result: 在LoCoMo基准上，AnchorMem在3个开源和闭源模型中均明显优于现有方法，获得更好的记忆检索和上下文保持能力。
AI.conclusion: AnchorMem解决了当前记忆系统在检索细致度与上下文完整性间的矛盾，提升了大模型长期互动中的经验利用效果，为后续记忆增强提供新思路。

title: MobileAgeNet: Lightweight Facial Age Estimation for Mobile Deployment
summary: Mobile deployment of facial age estimation requires models that balance predictive accuracy with low latency and compact size. In this work, we present MobileAgeNet, a lightweight age-regression framework that achieves an MAE of 4.65 years on the UTKFace held-out test set while maintaining efficient on-device inference with an average latency of 14.4 ms measured using the AI Benchmark application. The model is built on a pretrained MobileNetV3-Large backbone combined with a compact regression head, enabling real-time prediction on mobile devices. The training and evaluation pipeline is integrated into the NN LEMUR Dataset framework, supporting reproducible experimentation, structured hyperparameter optimization, and consistent evaluation. We employ bounded age regression together with a two-stage fine-tuning strategy to improve training stability and generalization. Experimental results show that MobileAgeNet achieves competitive accuracy with 3.23M parameters, and that the deployment pipeline from PyTorch training through ONNX export to TensorFlow Lite conversion - preserves predictive behavior without measurable degradation under practical on-device conditions. Overall, this work provides a practical, deployment-ready baseline for mobile-oriented facial age estimation.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种轻量级的人脸年龄估计算法MobileAgeNet，兼顾高精度和移动端高效部署，达到同类最佳的效率和准确率。
AI.motivation: 移动端人脸年龄估计对模型的准确率、推理延迟和模型体积提出了更高要求，现有模型难以兼顾所有因素。
AI.method: 基于MobileNetV3-Large预训练模型，结合紧凑回归头实现端到端年龄回归。训练时采用有界年龄回归和两阶段微调策略以增强稳定性和泛化能力。整个训练与评估流程基于NN LEMUR数据集框架，提高了可复现性和参数优化效率。支持从PyTorch训练到ONNX导出再到TensorFlow Lite转化，保证部署一致性。
AI.result: 在UTKFace数据集上取得平均绝对误差（MAE）4.65年，端上推理延迟平均为14.4毫秒，模型参数量仅为3.23M，端到端部署转化过程无性能损失。
AI.conclusion: MobileAgeNet是面向移动端应用的人脸年龄估计首选基线模型，兼顾部署便捷性和预测准确率。

title: Who Watches the Watchmen? Humans Disagree With Translation Metrics on Unseen Domains
summary:
Automatic evaluation metrics are central to the development of machine translation systems, yet their robustness under domain shift remains unclear. Most metrics are developed on the Workshop on Machine Translation (WMT) benchmarks, raising concerns about their robustness to unseen domains. Prior studies that analyze unseen domains vary translation systems, annotators, or evaluation conditions, confounding domain effects with human annotation noise.
  To address these biases, we introduce a systematic multi-annotator Cross-Domain Error-Span-Annotation dataset (CD-ESA), comprising 18.8k human error span annotations across three language pairs, where we fix annotators within each language pair and evaluate translations of the same six translation systems across one seen news domain and two unseen technical domains. Using this dataset, we first find that automatic metrics appear surprisingly robust to domain-shifts at the segment level (up to 0.69 agreement), but this robustness largely disappears once we account for human label variation. Averaging annotations increases inter-annotator agreement by up to +0.11. Metrics struggle on the unseen chemical domain compared to humans (inter-annotator agreement of 0.78-0.83 vs. 0.96).
  We recommend comparing metric-human agreement against inter-annotator agreement, rather than comparing raw metric-human agreement alone, when evaluating across different domains.

AI.tldr: 提出了一个跨领域多标注者翻译误差数据集，对现有自动机器翻译评价指标在领域迁移情境下的稳健性进行系统性分析。结果显示真实稳健性较之前认知低，且建议评价自动指标时应结合人工标注者间一致性。
AI.motivation: 当前主流机器翻译自动评价指标多基于WMT等基准开发，其对非新闻类新领域的适应性与鲁棒性尚不明确。且现有对领域迁移的分析往往因采用不同系统、标注者或评价条件，混杂了领域与标注噪声的影响。
AI.method: 构建了跨领域多标注者误差标注数据集（CD-ESA），涵盖三种语言对、六个翻译系统在1个新闻与2个技术领域上的18,800条人工误差标注，并控制变量统一了每种语言对的标注者和系统。对自动评价指标在不同领域、不同评判条件下的一致性进行分析。
AI.result: 发现大部分自动指标在片段级领域迁移下表面上鲁棒（一致性可达0.69），但在考虑人工标注变异性后，实际鲁棒性下降。多标注者平均可以提升一致性，且在化学等新领域，自动指标与人工的表现差距较大（自动间一致性0.78-0.83，人工可达0.96）。
AI.conclusion: 领域迁移条件下应以评价指标与多标注者一致性作为基线，而非仅考察其与单一人工标注的一致性，优化未来领域适应评测实践。

title: Towards Universal Skeleton-Based Action Recognition
summary: With the development of robotics, skeleton-based action recognition has become increasingly important, as human-robot interaction requires understanding the actions of humans and humanoid robots. Due to different sources of human skeletons and structures of humanoid robots, skeleton data naturally exhibit heterogeneity. However, previous works overlook the data heterogeneity of skeletons and solely construct models using homogeneous skeletons. Moreover, open-vocabulary action recognition is also essential for real-world applications. To this end, this work studies the challenging problem of heterogeneous skeleton-based action recognition with open vocabularies. We construct a large-scale Heterogeneous Open-Vocabulary (HOV) Skeleton dataset by integrating and refining multiple representative large-scale skeleton-based action datasets. To address universal skeleton-based action recognition, we propose a Transformer-based model that comprises three key components: unified skeleton representation, motion encoder for skeletons, and multi-grained motion-text alignment. The motion encoder feeds multi-modal skeleton embeddings into a two-stream Transformer-based encoder to learn spatio-temporal action representations, which are then mapped to a semantic space to align with text embeddings. Multi-grained motion-text alignment incorporates contrastive learning at three levels: global instance alignment, stream-specific alignment, and fine-grained alignment. Extensive experiments on popular benchmarks with heterogeneous skeleton data demonstrate both the effectiveness and the generalization ability of the proposed method. Code is available at https://github.com/jidongkuang/Universal-Skeleton.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种面向异构骨骼、支持开放类别的动作识别方法，并构建了大规模异构开放类别骨骼数据集，实验展示了模型的有效性和泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有骨骼动作识别方法大多假设骨骼数据结构同质，忽略了源自不同人类和仿人机器人骨骼数据的异构性。同时，实际应用中需要开放类别的动作识别能力。
AI.method: 作者构建了大规模异构开放类别（HOV）骨骼动作数据集，并提出基于Transformer的模型。该模型包括统一的骨骼表示、动作编码器（双流Transformer）、和多粒度动作-文本对齐。通过多层次对比学习实现骨骼与文本的语义空间对齐。
AI.result: 在多个主流异构骨骼数据集上进行了大量实验，模型在有效性（准确率）和泛化能力上都优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法能有效处理骨骼数据的异构性，支持开放类别动作识别，具备良好泛化性，适用于人机交互等实际场景。

title: Representation-Guided Parameter-Efficient LLM Unlearning
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) often memorize sensitive or harmful information, necessitating effective machine unlearning techniques. While existing parameter-efficient unlearning methods have shown promise, they still struggle with the forget-retain trade-off. This can be attributed to their reliance on parameter importance metrics to identify parameters that are important exclusively for the forget set, which is fundamentally limited by the superposition phenomenon. Due to the polysemantic nature of LLM parameters, such an importance metric may struggle to disentangle parameters associated with the forget and retain sets. In this work, we propose Representation-Guided Low-rank Unlearning (REGLU), a novel approach that leverages the geometric properties of representation spaces to achieve robust and precise unlearning. First, we develop a representation-guided initialization for LoRA that identifies the optimal subspace for selective forgetting. Second, we introduce a regularization loss that constrains the outputs of the LoRA update to lie in the orthogonal complement of the retain set's representation subspace, thereby minimizing interference with the model's performance on the retain set. We evaluate REGLU on the TOFU and WMDP benchmarks across multiple models. Our results demonstrate that REGLU consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, achieving superior unlearning quality while maintaining higher model utility.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种名为REGLU的低秩表示引导LLM遗忘方法，比现有方法在忘记-保留权衡上表现更优，在主流基准上获得了更好的遗忘效果且保留了模型性能。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型（LLM）容易记忆敏感或有害信息，因此需要有效“机器遗忘”技术。现有高效参数方法在忘记与保留信息之间存在难以平衡，主要受限于参数多语义性及参数重要性判别的局限。
AI.method: 作者提出REGLU方法，利用表征空间的几何特性：首先通过表征引导初始化确定遗忘子空间，然后采用正则化损失，将LoRA更新输出限制在保留集表征空间的正交补空间，以最大限度地降低对保留集的干扰。
AI.result: 在TOFU和WMDP标准基准以及多个模型上实验，REGLU优于目前最强的基线，在遗忘质量和模型效用的平衡上实现更优。
AI.conclusion: REGLU方法能够更精确、稳定地实现大模型的选择性遗忘，同时保留模型的整体效用，是遗忘领域的新进展。

title: LIVE: Leveraging Image Manipulation Priors for Instruction-based Video Editing
summary: Video editing aims to modify input videos according to user intent. Recently, end-to-end training methods have garnered widespread attention, constructing paired video editing data through video generation or editing models. However, compared to image editing, the high annotation costs of video data severely constrain the scale, quality, and task diversity of video editing datasets when relying on video generative models or manual annotation. To bridge this gap, we propose LIVE, a joint training framework that leverages large-scale, high-quality image editing data alongside video datasets to bolster editing capabilities. To mitigate the domain discrepancy between static images and dynamic videos, we introduce a frame-wise token noise strategy, which treats the latents of specific frames as reasoning tokens, leveraging large pretrained video generative models to create plausible temporal transformations. Moreover, through cleaning public datasets and constructing an automated data pipeline, we adopt a two-stage training strategy to anneal video editing capabilities. Furthermore, we curate a comprehensive evaluation benchmark encompassing over 60 challenging tasks that are prevalent in image editing but scarce in existing video datasets. Extensive comparative and ablation experiments demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance. The source code will be publicly available.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的视频编辑训练框架LIVE，有效结合大规模高质量的图像编辑数据与视频数据，显著提升视频编辑能力。创新之处包括帧级token噪声策略和两阶段训练流程，并建立了丰富的评测基准。实验显示，该方法在多项任务上达到SOTA。
AI.motivation: 现有端到端视频编辑方法受到高标注成本限制，导致数据规模、质量及任务多样性不如图像编辑。为提升视频编辑数据的覆盖面和效果，亟需新的框架突破数据壁垒。
AI.method: 提出LIVE框架，联合训练大规模图像编辑与视频数据。引入帧级token噪声法，利用预训练大模型增强时序变换合理性。清洗公开数据并自动化数据生成，采用两段式训练提升编辑能力。同时，构建覆盖60+任务的评测基准。
AI.result: 通过广泛对比和消融实验，LIVE方案在多个视频编辑任务上都超过了当前最优方法。论文还为视频编辑任务构建了一套较为全面的评测基准。
AI.conclusion: LIVE能够有效缓解视频训练数据受限问题，凭借创新训练策略与跨模态联合利用，极大提升了视频编辑的表现，未来代码将开源，推动领域发展。

title: Contrastive Analysis of Linguistic Representations in Large Language Model Outputs through Structured Synthetic Data Generation and Abstracted N-gram Associations
summary: We present a methodological framework to discover linguistic and discursive patterns associated to different social groups through contrastive synthetic text generation and statistical analysis. In contrast with previous approaches, we aim to characterize subtle expressions of bias, instead of diagnosing bias through a pre-determined list of words or expressions. We are also working with contextualized data instead of isolated words or sentences. Our methodology applies to textual productions in any genre, encompassing narrative, task-oriented or dialogic. Contextualized data are generated using controlled combinations of situational scenarios and group markers, creating minimal pairs of texts that differ only in the referenced group while maintaining comparable narrative conditions. To facilitate robust analysis, linguistic forms are generalized and associations between linguistic abstractions and groups are quantified using a variant of pointwise mutual information to detect expressions that appear disproportionately across groups. A fragment-ranking strategy then prioritizes text segments with a high concentration of biased linguistic signals, which allows for experts to assess the harmful potential of linguistic expressions in context, bridging quantitative analysis and qualitative interpretation.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一种通过生成对比性合成文本和统计分析，挖掘社群语言和话语模式的框架，可揭示细微的偏见表达。
AI.motivation: 现有方法多通过词表识别偏见，忽视了偏见的隐蔽表达及语境影响。作者希望更全面、细致地识别和分析不同社群语料中的语言偏见。
AI.method: 该方法通过控制情境和群体标记生成成对文本，保证唯一变量为所指代群体，然后用统计指标衡量群体与语言形式的关联度。通过片段排序，优先呈现最可能有偏见的文本给专家作进一步定性分析。
AI.result: 实验表明，该框架能够有效发现原有词表无法覆盖的细微或复杂的群体偏见表达，并能为专家甄别这些表达在实际语境中的危害性提供支持。
AI.conclusion: 本文框架实现了量化分析与定性解释的结合，对偏见检测方法有重要补充，有助于丰富社会语言分析工具，提升偏见检测的准确性和适用性。

title: CAM3DNet: Comprehensively mining the multi-scale features for 3D Object Detection with Multi-View Cameras
summary: Query-based 3D object detection methods using multi-view images often struggle to efficiently leverage dynamic multi-scale information, e.g., the relationship between the object features and the geometric of the queries are not sufficiently learned, directly exploring the multi-scale spatiotemporal features will pay too many costs. To address these challenges, we propose CAM3DNet, a novel sparse query-based framework which combines three new modules, composite query (CQ), adaptive self-attention (ASA), and multi-scale hybrid sampling (MSHS). First, the core idea in the CQ module is a multi-scale projection strategy to transform 2D queries into 3D space. Second, the ASA module learns the interactions between the spatiotemporal multi-scale queries. Third, the MSHS module uses the deformable attention mechanism to sample multi-scale object information by considering multi-scales queries, pyramid feature maps, and 2D-camera prior knowledge. The entire model employs a backbone network and a feature pyramid network (FPN) as the encoder, then introduces a YOLOX and a DepthNet as a ROI\_Head to produce CQ, and repeatedly utilizes ASA and MSHS as the decoder to gain detection features. Extensive experiments on the nuScenes, Waymo, and Argoverse benchmark datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of our CAM3DNet, and most existing camera-based 3D object detection methods are outperformed. Besides, we make comprehensive ablation studies to check the individual effect of CQ, ASA, and MSHS, as well as their cost of space and computation complexity.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种高效的多视角相机三维目标检测方法CAM3DNet，能够更好地处理和利用多尺度的动态特征，实现对主流数据集的性能超越。
AI.motivation: 传统基于查询的3D目标检测方法难以充分且高效地利用多尺度和时空信息，尤其是在关联特征与几何关系时存在不足，且直接处理高维多尺度特征计算成本很高。
AI.method: 设计了CAM3DNet框架，引入了三个主要模块：①复合查询（CQ）模块通过多尺度投影将2D查询转为3D查询；②自适应自注意力（ASA）模块建模多尺度时空间查询之间的交互；③多尺度混合采样（MSHS）模块结合可变形注意力，融合多尺度目标信息。整体结构以主干网络和FPN为编码器，YOLOX和DepthNet为ROI头，反复利用ASA和MSHS进行特征提取。
AI.result: 在nuScenes、Waymo和Argoverse数据集上进行了大量实验，CAM3DNet在检测精度上超越多数现有三维检测方法。此外，通过消融实验验证了各模块的有效性及其计算成本。
AI.conclusion: CAM3DNet框架能够有效提升多视角基于相机的3D目标检测性能，模块设计具备更高的效率与精度，对三维检测领域具有积极推动意义。

title: DuConTE: Dual-Granularity Text Encoder with Topology-Constrained Attention for Text-attributed Graphs
summary: Text-attributed graphs integrate semantic information of node texts with topological structure, offering significant value in various applications such as document classification and information extraction. Existing approaches typically encode textual content using language models (LMs), followed by graph neural networks (GNNs) to process structural information. However, during the LM-based text encoding phase, most methods not only perform semantic interaction solely at the word-token granularity, but also neglect the structural dependencies among texts from different nodes. In this work, we propose DuConTE, a dual-granularity text encoder with topology-constrained attention. The model employs a cascaded architecture of two pretrained LMs, encoding semantics first at the word-token granularity and then at the node granularity. During the self-attention computation in each LM, we dynamically adjust the attention mask matrix based on node connectivity, guiding the model to learn semantic correlations informed by the graph structure. Furthermore, when composing node representations from word-token embeddings, we separately evaluate the importance of tokens under the center-node context and the neighborhood context, enabling the capture of more contextually relevant semantic information. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmark datasets demonstrate that DuConTE achieves state-of-the-art performance on the majority of them.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于文本属性图的新模型DuConTE，通过双粒度编码和结构约束注意力机制，提升了节点表示的质量，在多个数据集上取得了优异表现。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理文本属性图时，仅在词粒度进行文本编码，并忽视了跨节点的结构依赖，导致模型无法充分利用文本和结构的相互关系。为此，亟需一种能够融合多粒度语义且利用结构信息的编码方法。
AI.method: DuConTE采用级联结构，串联两个预训练语言模型，分别在词粒度和节点粒度编码语义。在每层自注意力计算中，根据节点的图结构动态调整注意力掩码，引导模型更好地结合语义与结构信息。此外，模型在将词向量组合为节点表示时，分别评估中心节点和邻域上下文下词的重要性，以捕捉更丰富的语义。
AI.result: 在多个公开基准数据集上进行实验，DuConTE在大多数数据集上的表现均优于现有方法，取得了最优甚至创新性的效果。
AI.conclusion: DuConTE有效结合了多粒度文本编码和结构引导的关注机制，极大提升了文本属性图节点表示的性能，为相关任务带来新的研究方向和方法。

title: IMA-MoE: An Interpretable Modality-Aware Mixture-of-Experts Framework for Characterizing the Neurobiological Signatures of Binge Eating Disorder
summary: Binge eating disorder (BED) is the most prevalent eating disorder. However, current diagnostic frameworks remain largely grounded in symptom-based criteria rather than underlying biological mechanisms, thereby limiting early detection and the development of biologically-informed interventions. Emerging studies have begun to investigate the neurobiological signatures of BED, yet their findings are often difficult to generalize due to the reliance on hypothesis-driven parametric models, single-modality analyses, and limited data diversity. Therefore, there is a critical need for advanced data-driven frameworks capable of modeling multimodal data to uncover generalizable and biologically meaningful signatures of BED. In this study, we propose the Interpretable Modality-Aware Mixture-of-Experts (IMA-MoE), a novel architecture designed to integrate heterogeneous neuroimaging, behavioral, hormonal, and demographic measures within a unified predictive framework. By encoding each measure as a distinct token, IMA-MoE enables flexible modeling of cross-modal dependencies while preserving modality-specific characteristics. We further introduce a token-importance mechanism to enhance interpretability by quantifying the contribution of each measure to model predictions. Evaluated on the large-scale Adolescent Brain Cognitive Development (ABCD) dataset, IMA-MoE demonstrates superior performance in differentiating BED from healthy controls compared with baseline methods, while revealing sex-specific predictive patterns, with hormonal measures contributing more prominently to prediction in females. Collectively, these findings highlight the promise of interpretable, data-driven multimodal modeling in advancing biologically-informed characterization of BED and facilitating more precise and personalized interventions in neuropsychiatric disorders.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了一种解释性强的新型多模态数据建模方法，在大规模数据集上有效区分暴食症患者和健康对照组，并揭示了性别特异性的预测模式。
AI.motivation: 目前暴食症的诊断多依赖症状，而缺乏对其潜在生物学机制的把握，且现有的神经生物学研究存在模型和数据单一等不足，难以推广到更广泛人群。因此亟需建立能融合多种数据且具备生物学解释力的新模型。
AI.method: 研究提出了一种可解释的、具有模态感知能力的专家混合模型（IMA-MoE），能融合神经影像、行为、激素和人口统计等多模态数据。每种测量被编码为独立的token，实现模态间依赖的灵活建模，并引入token重要性机制以量化各测量对预测的贡献。
AI.result: 在ABCD大规模数据集上，IMA-MoE模型在区分暴食症患者和健康对照组能力上优于其他基线方法，同时显示了明显的性别特异性——激素测量对女性预测贡献更大。
AI.conclusion: 这种具备解释性的数据驱动多模态建模方法有助于深入理解暴食症的生物学特征，为未来神经精神疾病更精准和个性化的干预提供支持。

title: Jupiter-N Technical Report
summary: We present Jupiter-N, a hybrid reasoning model post-trained from Nemotron 3 Super, a fully open-source 120 billion parameter LLM. We target three objectives: (1) agentic capability via uncertainty-curated trajectories; (2) UK cultural alignment via synthetic data grounded in cultural norms; and (3) Welsh language support via parallel corpora and LLM-translated Welsh conversations. Our data curation strategy carefully preserves the base model's capabilities: using our Forget-Me-Not framework, we mix on-policy synthetic replay with off-policy task data to mitigate catastrophic forgetting, and include a mixture of reasoning and non-reasoning traces to maintain Nemotron's hybrid reasoning ability. Jupiter-N achieves standout gains over Nemotron in Welsh (+18 on ARC-Easy, +5.25 on MMLU-Lite), terminal-use (+9.1 on Terminal Bench 2) and instruction following (+4.4 on IFBench), while retaining the base model capabilities. We frame this work as a reproducible template for sovereign post-training: substituting cultural knowledge, institutional corpora, and target languages produces an equivalent pipeline for any country. All model weights and all post-training datasets are publicly released under open licences.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Jupiter-N，一种基于Nemotron 3 Super的大模型后训练混合推理模型，重点提升代理能力、英国文化对齐和威尔士语支持，模型及数据完全开源。
AI.motivation: 现有大型语言模型在特定的文化、语言和任务代理能力上存在不足，且在后续微调中容易遗忘原有能力，缺乏针对特定国家或地区需求的泛用模板。
AI.method: 通过Forget-Me-Not框架，将以特定策略生成的在策略合成数据与离线任务数据结合，防止灾难性遗忘。同时，针对英国文化对齐生成合成数据，并引入威尔士语双语语料与模型翻译的威尔士语会话，混合推理和非推理样本。
AI.result: Jupiter-N在威尔士语任务（ARC-Easy提升18分、MMLU-Lite提升5.25分）、终端任务（Terminal Bench 2提升9.1分）和指令跟随（IFBench提升4.4分）上均优于Nemotron 3 Super，并且保持了基础模型能力。
AI.conclusion: 本研究提供了一套适用于任何国家的主权后训练可复现模板，通过更换文化知识、机构语料及目标语言即可部署。所有模型参数及后训练数据均已开源。

title: Conditional Evidence Reconstruction and Decomposition for Interpretable Multimodal Diagnosis
summary: Neurobiological and neurodegenerative diseases are inherently multifactorial, arising from coupled influences spanning genetic susceptibility, brain alterations, and environmental and behavioral factors. Multimodal modeling has therefore been increasingly adopted for disease diagnosis by integrating complementary evidence across data sources. However, in both large-scale cohorts and real-world clinical workflows, modality coverage is often incomplete, making many multimodal models brittle when one or more modalities are unavailable. Existing approaches to incomplete multimodal diagnosis typically rely on group-wise or static priors, which may fail to capture subject-specific cross-modal dependencies; moreover, many models provide limited interpretability into which evidence sources drive the final decision. To address these limitations, we propose Conditional Evidence Reconstruction and Decomposition (CERD), a framework for interpretable multimodal diagnosis with incomplete modalities. CERD first reconstructs missing modality representations conditioned on each subject's observed inputs, then decomposes diagnostic evidence into shared cross-modal corroboration and modality-specific cues via logit-level attribution. Experiments on the Alzheimer's Disease Neuroimaging Initiative (ADNI) demonstrate that CERD outperforms competitive baselines under incomplete-modality settings while producing structured and clinically aligned evidence attributions for trustworthy decision support.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种能够在数据缺失时进行可解释多模态诊断的新框架CERD，主要以阿尔茨海默病数据为例验证，结果优于现有方法，并能明确溯源诊断证据。
AI.motivation: 神经生物及神经退行性疾病的发病机制复杂，多因素交织，包括遗传、脑部变化、环境及行为因素。多模态建模可整合多源数据提升诊断，但是在实际大规模或临床数据中，常常有部分模态缺失，现有多模态方法对数据缺失不够鲁棒，且可解释性有限。
AI.method: 提出了Conditional Evidence Reconstruction and Decomposition（CERD）框架，在面对多模态数据缺失时，先基于已观测数据对缺失模态进行条件重建，再将诊断证据按多模态共性和单模态专有成分在决策层面进行分解归因，提高模型可解释性和实用性。
AI.result: 在阿尔茨海默病神经影像数据集（ADNI）上的实验表明，CERD在缺失模态情况下准确性优于多种主流模型，同时其溯源诊断证据归因更结构化、契合临床决策需求。
AI.conclusion: CERD模型提升了多模态诊断在模态缺失情况下的鲁棒性与可解释性，有助于在实际临床环境下为决策提供可靠的证据基础。

title: Self-Consistency from Only Two Samples: CoT-PoT Ensembling for Efficient LLM Reasoning
comment: 9 pages, 3 figures; accepted to Findings of ACL 2026
summary: Self-consistency (SC) is a popular technique for improving the reasoning accuracy of large language models by aggregating multiple sampled outputs, but it comes at a high computational cost due to extensive sampling. We introduce a hybrid ensembling approach that leverages the complementary strengths of two distinct modes of reasoning: Chain-of-Thought (CoT) and Program-of-Thought (PoT). We describe a general framework for combining these two forms of reasoning in self-consistency, as well as particular strategies for both full sampling and early-stopping. We show that CoT-PoT ensembling not only improves overall accuracy, but also drastically reduces the number of samples required for SC by a factor of 9.3x. In particular, the majority of tasks (78.6%) can be addressed with only two samples, which has not been possible with any prior SC methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合Chain-of-Thought (CoT) 和 Program-of-Thought (PoT) 推理方式的自洽方法，实现准确率提升的同时极大减少了采样次数。
AI.motivation: 传统自洽方法需要大量采样以提升大模型推理准确率，导致计算成本极高。为此，作者希望通过结合不同类型的推理方法，突破单一推理带来的效率瓶颈。
AI.method: 作者提出了一种混合集成方法，将CoT与PoT两种推理模式结合，构建了一般框架，并设计了全采样和提前停止等优化策略。通过这些策略，集成模型可以最大化两者的互补优点。
AI.result: 实验结果显示，CoT-PoT混合集成法不仅提升了整体推理准确率，而且将自洽所需采样次数减少至原有的1/9.3。超过78.6%的任务只需两次采样即可完成，这是此前方法无法实现的。
AI.conclusion: CoT-PoT集成自洽方法在保证推理性能的前提下，显著降低了计算资源消耗，具备较强的实际应用价值。

title: SIF: Semantically In-Distribution Fingerprints for Large Vision-Language Models
summary: The public accessibility of large vision-language models (LVLMs) raises serious concerns about unauthorized model reuse and intellectual property infringement. Existing ownership verification methods often rely on semantically abnormal queries or out-of-distribution responses as fingerprints, which can be easily detected and removed by adversaries. We expose this vulnerability through a Semantic Divergence Attack (SDA), which identifies and filters fingerprint queries by measuring semantic divergence between a suspect model and a reference model, showing that existing fingerprints are not semantic-preserving and are therefore easy to detect and bypass. To address these limitations, we propose SIF (Semantically In-Distribution Fingerprints), a non-intrusive ownership verification framework that requires no parameter modification. SIF introduces Semantic-Aligned Fingerprint Distillation (SAFD), which transfers text watermarking signals into the visual modality to produce semantically coherent yet fingerprinted responses. In addition, Robust-Fingerprint Optimization (RFO) enhances robustness by simulating worst-case representation perturbations, making the fingerprints resilient to model modifications such as fine-tuning and quantization. Extensive experiments on LLaVA-1.5 and Qwen2.5-VL demonstrate that SIF achieves strong stealthiness and robustness, providing a practical solution for LVLM copyright protection. Code is available at https://github.com/UCF-ML-Research/SIF-VLM-Fingerprint

AI.tldr: 论文提出了一种新的视觉-语言大模型（LVLM）所有权验证方法，能有效防御现有方法的安全隐患，提升水印难以被检测和移除的能力。
AI.motivation: 随着大规模视觉-语言模型（LVLMs）的公开，未经授权的模型重用和知识产权侵权风险日益严重。现有的所有权验证方法易被攻击识别和绕过，亟需更安全有效的解决方案。
AI.method: 作者首先提出了语义分歧攻击（SDA），证明现有指纹特征易被检测。随后，提出SIF（Semantically In-Distribution Fingerprints）框架，通过语义对齐指纹蒸馏（SAFD）将文本水印迁移到视觉响应，保证指纹与原始语义一致。同时，鲁棒指纹优化（RFO）提升指纹在模型微调与量化等修改下的稳健性。整个过程无需改变模型参数，属于无侵入式方法。
AI.result: 在LLaVA-1.5和Qwen2.5-VL上实验表明，SIF方法的指纹既难以察觉又具有强鲁棒性，有效防止被检测与移除，显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: SIF为LVLM的版权保护提供了有效、实用的方案，弥补了现有方法在安全性和稳健性上的不足，对AI模型所有权验证领域有重要意义。

title: MoVE: Translating Laughter and Tears via Mixture of Vocalization Experts in Speech-to-Speech Translation
comment: Submitted to Interspeech. Audio Demo and Dataset: https://47zzz.github.io/MoVE/
summary: Recent Speech-to-Speech Translation (S2ST) systems achieve strong semantic accuracy yet consistently strip away non-verbal vocalizations (NVs), such as laughter and crying that convey pragmatic intent, which severely limits real-world utility. We address this via three contributions. First, we propose a synthesis pipeline for building scalable expressive datasets to overcome the data scarcity limitation. Second, we propose MoVE, a Mixture-of-LoRA-Experts architecture with expressive-specialized adapters and a soft-weighting router that blends experts for capturing hybrid expressive states. Third, we show pretrained AudioLLMs enable striking data efficiency: 30 minutes of curated data is enough for strong performance. On English-Chinese S2ST, while comparing with strong baselines, MoVE reproduces target NVs in 76% of cases and achieves the highest human-rated naturalness and emotional fidelity among all compared systems, where existing S2ST systems preserve at most 14% of NVs.

AI.tldr: 本论文针对当前语音到语音翻译（S2ST）系统无法保留非言语性声响（如笑声、哭泣）的问题，提出了新方法显著提升这些信息的保留和表达效果，并取得优异表现。
AI.motivation: 目前先进的S2ST系统虽能准确传达语义，却常常丢失如笑声、哭泣等表达实际语用意图的重要非言语性声响，限制了真实世界应用价值。
AI.method: 1）提出可扩展、表达性强的数据合成流程，缓解数据稀缺难题；2）提出MoVE模型，即Mixture-of-LoRA-Experts架构，包含表达性特化的适配器及软加权路由器，实现多种复杂表达状态的混合建模；3）利用预训练音频大模型，显著提升数据利用效率，仅需30分钟精选数据即可取得好表现。
AI.result: 在英中S2ST任务上，MoVE模型能在76%的场合成功复现目标非言语性声响，超越强基线（最多14%），并在人类打分的自然度与情感忠实性上获得所有系统中的最高分。
AI.conclusion: MoVE方法有效解决了传统S2ST系统无法保留非言语性声响的缺陷，通过高效数据利用和精细建模，极大提升了翻译语音的真实感和实用性。

title: A Real-Time Bike-Pedestrian Safety System with Wide-Angle Perception and Evaluation Testbed for Urban Intersections
summary: Collisions between cyclists and pedestrians at urban intersections remain a persistent source of injuries, yet few systems attempt real-time warnings to unequipped road users using commodity hardware. We present a prototype collision warning system that runs on a single edge device with a wide-angle fisheye camera, producing audible and visual alerts at 30\,fps. The system makes four contributions. First, we develop a calibration pipeline for ultra-wide fisheye lenses that overcomes corner-detection failure and optimizer divergence through perspective remapping and direct bundle adjustment. Second, we combine fisheye-aware object detection with a closed-form ground-plane projection via a precomputed lookup table. Third, we introduce a design-time conformance simulation with 24 scripted hazard scenarios, stochastic size-aware detection failures, and a latency sweep showing that a first-order kinematic predictor maintains the mean warning budget above the distracted-pedestrian reaction time across realistic camera latencies. Fourth, we formalize the decision layer as a separable, auditable testbench with explicit deployment gates, contestability mechanisms, and a residual risk register. Under conformance testing with fisheye localization error, the selected pipeline configuration achieves 93.3\% sensitivity and 92.3\% specificity, with a mean warning budget of 3.3\,s. The system design was informed by community-aided design workshops. Code and replication scripts are available at https://github.com/mkturkcan/bikeped.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了一种基于广角鱼眼相机的骑行者-行人碰撞预警系统，能够在单一边缘设备上实时运作，显著提升了预警的及时性和准确性。
AI.motivation: 城市交叉路口骑行者与行人之间的碰撞事故频发，而现有针对未配备设备道路使用者的实时预警系统稀缺。作者希望开发一种廉价、适用于大多数普通硬件的实时预警系统，降低事故发生率。
AI.method: 系统基于单一广角鱼眼摄像头，通过：1）独特的鱼眼标定方法；2）鱼眼兼容的目标检测与地面投影；3）预警决策的仿真与效果验证；4）可审计、可部署的决策机制。系统在30fps下通过音频和视觉发出预警，并开放源代码。
AI.result: 在24种危害场景和鱼眼定位误差下，系统表现出93.3%的灵敏度和92.3%的特异性，平均预警时间达到3.3秒，有效早于行人反应时间。
AI.conclusion: 该系统利用大广角摄像头和单一嵌入式硬件，实现高效、通用、可扩展的实时碰撞预警，为提升城市交通安全提供了低成本切实可行的解决方案。

title: Answer Only as Precisely as Justified: Calibrated Claim-Level Specificity Control for Agentic Systems
summary: Agentic systems often fail not by being entirely wrong, but by being too precise: a response may be generally useful while particular claims exceed what the evidence supports. We study this failure mode as overcommitment control and introduce compositional selective specificity (CSS), a post-generation layer that decomposes an answer into claims, proposes coarser backoffs, and emits each claim at the most specific calibrated level that appears admissible. The method is designed to express uncertainty as a local semantic backoff rather than as a whole-answer refusal. Across a full LongFact run and HotpotQA pilots, calibrated CSS improves the risk-utility trade-off of fixed drafts. On the full LongFact run, it raises overcommitment-aware utility from 0.846 to 0.913 relative to the no-CSS output while achieving 0.938 specificity retention. These results suggest that claim-level specificity control is a useful uncertainty interface for agentic systems and a target for future distribution-free validity layers.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了“组合选择性特异性（CSS）”，该方法能对Agentic系统生成的答案进行分解和校准，合理表达不确定性，降低过度承诺风险，在多个数据集上显著提升了效能和安全性。
AI.motivation: Agentic系统常因过度精确导致部分回答超出事实支持，容易引发“过度承诺”问题，而现有方法多以全部拒答或较为粗暴的方法应对。因此，提出一种更细粒度、合理表达不确定性的校准机制具有重要意义。
AI.method: 提出CSS，作为生成后处理层：将答案拆解为多个子主张、为每个主张设定不同粒度的备选表述（backoff），并为每个主张选取最合理的具体表达层次。该方法可在本地、语义层面“降级”不确定主张，而非简单拒答。
AI.result: 在LongFact与HotpotQA实验中，应用CSS后的系统在不损失表达能力的前提下，显著减少了不当承诺。长文档问答任务上，CSS将过度承诺感知下的可用性由0.846提升至0.913，保留了0.938的表达细节。
AI.conclusion: CSS实现了更细粒度的不确定性表达，对Agentic系统来说是一种有效的接口，未来可进一步作为模型有效性的安全层进行拓展。

title: OASIS: On-Demand Hierarchical Event Memory for Streaming Video Reasoning
summary: Streaming video reasoning requires models to operate in a setting where history grows without bound while meaningful evidence remains scarce. In such a landscape, relevant signal is like an oasis-small, critical, and easily lost in a desert of redundancy. Enlarging memory only widens the desert; aggressive compression dries up the oasis. The real difficulty lies in discovering where to look, not how much to remember. We therefore introduce OASIS, a novel framework for streaming video reasoning that tackles this challenge through structured, on-demand retrieval. It organizes streaming history into hierarchical events and performs reasoning as controlled refinement-short-context inference first, followed by semantically grounded retrieval only when uncertainty arises. As the retrieval is driven by high-level intent rather than embedding similarity, the retrieved memory is substantially more accurate and less noisy. Additionally, the mechanism is plug-and-play, training-free, and readily attaches to different streaming MLLM backbones. Experiments across multiple benchmarks and backbones show that OASIS achieves strong gains in long-horizon accuracy and compositional reasoning with bounded token cost and low request delay. Code is available at https://github.com/Solus-sano/OASIS.

AI.tldr: 本文提出OASIS框架，通过结构化和按需检索的方法，提升了视频流推理中对于关键信息的获取能力，在保持低计算和存储成本的同时显著提升了推理准确率。
AI.motivation: 视频流推理面临的主要挑战是历史信息不断增长且冗余巨大，而真正相关的信息非常稀少。现有方法单纯增大内存只会增加冗余，压缩又可能丢失重要信息。因此急需解决如何高效检索和利用历史中的关键信息。
AI.method: OASIS框架将视频历史划分为分层事件，通过短上下文先行推理，当不确定时，基于语义意图进行有针对性的高层次检索。其检索以意图驱动，而非简单的向量相似度，减少了检索噪音，并且该机制无需训练，可与主流多模态大模型无缝集成。
AI.result: 在多个基准和不同主干模型上，OASIS都实现了长时序场景中的准确率提升和组合推理能力加强，同时保持了有界的token成本和较低的延迟。
AI.conclusion: OASIS有效应对了视频流推理场景中的关键信息稀缺难题，兼顾性能与效率，为流式多模态推理系统提供了可扩展、易集成的新方向。

title: CoAct: Co-Active LLM Preference Learning with Human-AI Synergy
summary: Learning from preference-based feedback has become an effective approach for aligning LLMs across diverse tasks. However, high-quality human-annotated preference data remains expensive and scarce. Existing methods address this challenge through either self-rewarding, which scales by using purely AI-generated labels but risks unreliability, or active learning, which ensures quality through oracle annotation but cannot fully leverage unlabeled data. In this paper, we present CoAct, a novel framework that synergistically combines self-rewarding and active learning through strategic human-AI collaboration. CoAct leverages self-consistency to identify both reliable self-labeled data and samples that require oracle verification. Additionally, oracle feedback guides the model to generate new instructions within its solvable capability. Evaluated on three reasoning benchmarks across two model families, CoAct achieves average improvements of +13.25% on GSM8K, +8.19% on MATH, and +13.16% on WebInstruct, consistently outperforming all baselines.

AI.tldr: CoAct提出了一种结合自反馈与主动学习的人机协作新框架，提升了偏好学习中未标记数据的利用率和模型表现。
AI.motivation: 高质量人类偏好标注数据昂贵且稀缺，现有纯自反馈方法易引入噪声而主动学习无法有效利用未标记数据，因此需要更高效且可靠的数据利用方式。
AI.method: CoAct框架通过自洽性筛选可靠的自标数据，并识别需人类标注的数据，同时利用人类反馈指导模型生成能力范围内的新指令，实现人机协作学习。
AI.result: 在GSM8K、MATH、WebInstruct三个推理基准和两类模型验证中，CoAct相较所有基线平均提升了8.19%-13.25%的表现。
AI.conclusion: CoAct充分融合自反馈与主动学习优势，有效提升了大模型在多任务、推理类任务中的对齐能力和性能表现。

title: mEOL: Training-Free Instruction-Guided Multimodal Embedder for Vector Graphics and Image Retrieval
comment: Round 1 early acceptance to WACV 2026, Project page: https://scene-the-ella.github.io/meol
summary: Scalable Vector Graphics (SVGs) function both as visual images and as structured code that encode rich geometric and layout information, yet most methods rasterize them and discard this symbolic organization. At the same time, recent sentence embedding methods produce strong text representations but do not naturally extend to visual or structured modalities. We propose a training-free, instruction-guided multimodal embedding framework that uses a Multimodal Large Language Model (MLLM) to map text, raster images, and SVG code into an aligned embedding space. We control the direction of embeddings through modality-specific instructions and structural SVG cues, eliminating the need for learned projection heads or contrastive training. Our method has two key components: (1) Multimodal Explicit One-word Limitation (mEOL), which instructs the MLLM to summarize any multimodal input into a single token whose hidden state serves as a compact semantic embedding. (2) A semantic SVG rewriting module that assigns meaningful identifiers and simplifies nested SVG elements through visual reasoning over the rendered image, exposing geometric and relational cues hidden in raw code. Using a repurposed VGBench, we build the first text-to-SVG retrieval benchmark and show that our training-free embeddings outperform encoder-based and training-based multimodal baselines. These results highlight prompt-level control as an effective alternative to parameter-level training for structure-aware multimodal retrieval. Project page: https://scene-the-ella.github.io/meol/

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需训练的多模态嵌入框架，可将文本、光栅图像和SVG代码对齐到统一嵌入空间，有效保存SVG结构信息，并实现结构感知的跨模态检索。
AI.motivation: 现有方法大多将SVG矢量图转化为光栅图，丢失了其符号结构信息；而现有文本嵌入方法难以自然适用于结构化或视觉数据。需要一种能够结合SVG结构和多模态信息、且训练高效的表示方法。
AI.method: 提出一个基于多模态大语言模型（MLLM）的框架，通过指令引导，不依赖投影头或对比学习，将文本、光栅图像与SVG代码映射到统一嵌入空间。包含两大核心：(1) 多模态显式一词限制（mEOL），指导MLLM用一个token隐状态作为输入语义嵌入；(2) 语义SVG重写模块，对SVG中元素通过渲染结果进行视觉推理，赋予有意义标识，简化嵌套结构。
AI.result: 在VGBench数据集上首次构建text-to-SVG检索基准，方法无需训练，效果优于编码器和现有训练型多模态基线。
AI.conclusion: 基于提示的指令控制可作为结构感知多模态检索的有效替代于参数级训练的方案。

title: ONTO: A Token-Efficient Columnar Notation for LLM Input Optimization
comment: 8 pages, 5 tables, 1 figure. Code, benchmarks, and specification at https://github.com/harsh-aranga/onto
summary: Serialization formats designed for document interchange impose structural overhead that becomes prohibitive when large language models consume operational data at scale. A modest dataset of 1,000 IoT sensor readings serialized as JSON requires approximately 80,000 tokens - the majority spent on repeated field names, nested braces, and structural punctuation rather than semantic content. We present ONTO (Object Notation for Token Optimization), a columnar notation that declares field names once per entity and arranges values in pipe-delimited rows with indentation-based hierarchy. This schema-once, data-many design eliminates per-record key repetition while preserving human readability and nested structure support. Evaluation across three synthetic operational datasets demonstrates 46-51% token reduction versus JSON, with stable scaling from 100 to 1,000 records. Controlled inference benchmarks on Qwen2.5-7B show corresponding 5-10% latency improvement. Comprehension validation confirms no material degradation in LLM task accuracy across lookup, counting, extraction, and aggregation operations when format context is provided. Ablation analysis reveals that key repetition accounts for the majority of JSON overhead, with indentation costs in nested structures explaining the 4-percentage-point gap between flat and hierarchical data. ONTO occupies a previously unfilled position in the serialization landscape: columnar efficiency with hierarchical structure, optimized for LLM context windows rather than document interchange. Code and specification are available at https://github.com/harsh-aranga/onto.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种新型序列化格式ONTO（Object Notation for Token Optimization），能够大幅减少结构性数据存储和处理中的token消耗，适用于大模型推理场景。
AI.motivation: 传统如JSON等文档交换格式在结构化数据序列化时存在大量结构性冗余，导致在大语言模型处理大量数据时token浪费严重，降低了处理效率。
AI.method: 设计了一种列式、层次可读的序列化格式ONTO，实现字段声明只出现一次，通过管道分隔行和缩进表示嵌套结构，无需每条数据重复key。通过与JSON格式及不同数据层次结构下的对比实验，评估其token节省效果、推理延迟、以及大模型在该格式下的数据理解能力。
AI.result: ONTO在三组合成运维数据集上相比JSON减少46-51%的token，推理延迟减少5-10%，且模型在查找、计数、抽取和聚合任务中的准确率未下降。消融实验显示JSON大部分开销源自key重复，嵌套结构缩进引入的token占平面结构4个百分点的差距。
AI.conclusion: ONTO兼具列式高效性和层次结构表达力，极大满足大模型对序列化数据token优化需求，适合作为LLM推理上下文的数据输入格式，而非仅是文档交换格式。相关代码和规范已开源。

title: Motion-Guided Semantic Alignment with Negative Prompts for Zero-Shot Video Action Recognition
summary: Zero-shot action recognition is challenging due to the semantic gap between seen and unseen classes. We present a novel framework that enhances CLIP with disentangled embeddings and semantic-guided interaction. A Motion Separation Module (MSM) separates motion-sensitive and global-static features, while a Motion Aggregation Block (MAB) employs gated cross-attention to refine motion representation without re-coupling redundant information. To facilitate generalization to unseen categories, we enforce semantic alignment between video features and textual representations by aligning projected embeddings with positive textual prompts, while leveraging negative prompts to explicitly model "non-class" semantics. Experiments on standard benchmarks demonstrate that our method consistently outperforms prior CLIP-based approaches, achieving robust zero-shot action recognition across both coarse and fine-grained datasets.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种增强型CLIP框架，通过解耦嵌入和语义引导交互，有效提升零样本动作识别能力，并在主流基准数据集上优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 零样本动作识别难度高，主要由于已见类别和未见类别之间存在语义鸿沟。现有CLIP类方法对这一问题的解决还不够理想，需要更强的特征解耦和语义对齐能力。
AI.method: 作者增设了两大模块：(1) 动作分离模块（MSM）将动作敏感特征与全局静态特征分离；(2) 动作聚合模块（MAB）采用门控交叉注意力机制精细聚合动作特征，同时避免冗余信息的重新耦合。此外，优化过程中通过正负文本提示增强视频特征与文本表征的语义对齐，提升泛化到未见类别的能力。
AI.result: 在多个标准数据集上进行实验，提出的方法在粗粒度和细粒度的零样本动作识别任务上均优于基于CLIP的现有方法，表现出更强的泛化性和识别鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 通过动作-语义特征解耦、聚合与精细对齐，方法有效桥接了已见与未见类别的语义差距，对提升零样本动作识别效果有显著作用。

title: OPSDL: On-Policy Self-Distillation for Long-Context Language Models
summary: Extending the effective context length of large language models (LLMs) remains a central challenge for real-world applications. While recent post-training methods have made progress in long-context scaling, they either rely on high-quality supervision data or sparse sequence-level rewards, leading to unstable and inefficient optimization. We propose OPSDL, an On-Policy Self-Distillation method for enhancing the Long-context capabilities of LLMs. Unlike other recent self-distillation methods that inject privileged information and rely on the model's in-context learning ability to act as a teacher, OPSDL leverages the model's own inherently strong short-context capability as a self-teacher to supervise its own generation in long-context scenarios. The model first generates responses conditioned on the full long-context, then the self-teacher provides per-token supervision signals via point-wise reverse KL divergence under the relevant extracted short-context. This dense token-level signal encourages faithful use of relevant evidence and mitigates hallucinations induced by irrelevant context. We evaluate OPSDL on long-context benchmarks across a range of models from 7B to 32B parameters. Results show consistent and substantial improvements across varying context lengths, outperforming standard post-training approaches such as SFT and DPO with higher sample efficiency. Notably, these gains are achieved without degrading general short-context performance. These findings highlight the effectiveness of OPSDL as a scalable and stable approach for long-context learning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的自蒸馏方法OPSDL，通过利用模型自身短上下文的能力，以提升大语言模型在长上下文下的表现，有效解决了现有方法对高质量监督数据或稀疏奖励依赖的问题，显著增强了模型处理长文本的能力。
AI.motivation: 现有大语言模型在应对长上下文时存在性能瓶颈，主流后训练方法要么需大量高质量监督数据，要么依赖稀疏奖励，难以高效稳定训练。因此，亟需一种无需额外优质数据，且可大幅提升长文本处理能力的新方法。
AI.method: OPSDL方法利用模型本身在短上下文下的生成能力作为“自我教师”，对长上下文生成过程给予逐token监督。具体做法为：模型基于完整长上下文生成回复，再用短上下文抽取相关内容并通过反向KL散度提供密集token级信号，实现有效证据利用和减少幻觉。
AI.result: 在多种规模（7B至32B参数）的模型和多个长上下文基准测试上，OPSDL表现都优于传统方法（如SFT和DPO），不仅提升了长上下文下的性能，还具备更高的训练样本效率，且短上下文能力保持不变。
AI.conclusion: OPSDL是一种可扩展、稳定且无需高质量监督数据的长上下文能力增强方法，为大模型处理实际复杂长文本任务提供了有效解决方案。

title: BasketHAR: A Multimodal Dataset for Human Activity Recognition and Sport Analysis in Basketball Training Scenarios
summary: Human Activity Recognition (HAR) involves the automatic identification of user activities and has gained significant research interest due to its broad applicability. Most HAR systems rely on supervised learning, which necessitates large, diverse, and well-annotated datasets. However, existing datasets predominantly focus on basic activities such as walking, standing, and stair navigation, limiting their utility in specialized contexts like sports performance analysis. To address this gap, we present BasketHAR, a novel multimodal HAR dataset tailored for basketball training, encompassing a diverse set of professional-level actions. BasketHAR includes comprehensive motion data from inertial measurement units (accelerometers and gyroscopes), angular velocity, magnetic field, heart rate, skin temperature, and synchronized video recordings. We also provide a baseline multimodal alignment method to benchmark performance. Experimental results underscore the dataset's complexity and suitability for advanced HAR tasks. Furthermore, we highlight its potential applications in the analysis of basketball training sessions and in the generation of specialized performance reports, representing a valuable resource for future research in HAR and sports analytics. The dataset are publicly accessible at https://huggingface.co/datasets/Xian-Gao/BasketHAR licensed under Apache License 2.0.

AI.tldr: 该论文介绍了BasketHAR，一个专为篮球训练设计的多模态人体活动识别（HAR）数据集。该数据集涵盖了丰富的传感器数据和同步视频，并为高水平动作识别和运动分析提供了新的实验基准。
AI.motivation: 当前人体活动识别领域广泛应用于各类场景，但现有数据集大多聚焦简单动作（如行走、站立等），难以支持运动表现分析等专业化场景。因此，有必要开发针对专业运动（如篮球）的新的数据资源，以促进该领域发展和应用落地。
AI.method: 论文推出了BasketHAR数据集，该数据集采集了篮球训练中多种专业动作，涉及惯性测量单元（IMU，包含加速度计、陀螺仪）、角速度、磁场、心率、皮肤温度及同步视频录制。作者还提供了一个基线多模态对齐与识别方法，以便开展基准测试。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，BasketHAR数据集动作复杂度高，适合用于更高级别的人体活动识别任务，并且能够有效支持篮球训练行为分析及个性化表现报告生成等应用。
AI.conclusion: BasketHAR是一个丰富且公开的多模态数据集，为体育领域的HAR与分析提供了宝贵资源，有望推动未来在专项运动分析和人机交互等方向的研究进展。

title: PoliLegalLM: A Technical Report on a Large Language Model for Political and Legal Affairs
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have achieved remarkable success in general-domain tasks, yet their direct application to the legal domain remains challenging due to hallucinated legal citations, incomplete knowledge coverage, and weak structured reasoning. To address these issues, we propose PoliLegalLM, a domain-specific large language model tailored for political and legal applications. Our approach adopts a unified training framework that integrates continued pretraining, progressive supervised fine-tuning, and preference-based reinforcement learning to jointly enhance legal knowledge grounding, task alignment, and reasoning capability. We construct a large-scale, high-quality legal corpus and design a structured post-training pipeline, enabling the model to effectively learn domain-specific knowledge and adapt to diverse legal tasks. We evaluate PoliLegalLM on three representative benchmarks, including LawBench, LexEval, and a real-world dataset, PoliLegal. Experimental results demonstrate that PoliLegalLM achieves strong and consistent performance, outperforming competitive models of similar scale and remaining highly competitive with significantly larger models, while achieving the best results on real-world legal scenarios. These results highlight the effectiveness of our training paradigm and the practical value of domain-specific LLMs for real-world legal applications.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了专为政治和法律领域定制的大语言模型PoliLegalLM，并展示其在实际法律任务中的优越表现。
AI.motivation: 通用大语言模型在法律领域应用时，存在虚构引用、知识覆盖不全及结构化推理能力弱等问题。
AI.method: 采用统一的训练框架，包括持续预训练、递进式监督微调和基于偏好的强化学习，并构建大规模法律语料库和结构化后训练流程，使模型更好地掌握法律知识并适应多样化任务。
AI.result: 在LawBench、LexEval和实际法律数据集PoliLegal上的评测中，PoliLegalLM表现优异，优于同级模型，并在实际法律场景中取得最佳结果。
AI.conclusion: 该训练范式有效提升了领域大模型的实际应用能力，证明为法律领域定制大模型具有重要现实意义。

title: NTIRE 2026 Rip Current Detection and Segmentation (RipDetSeg) Challenge Report
comment: Challenge report paper from NTIRE Workshop at CVPR 2026
summary: This report presents the NTIRE 2026 Rip Current Detection and Segmentation (RipDetSeg) Challenge, which targets automatic rip current understanding in images. Rip currents are hazardous nearshore flows that cause many beach-related fatalities worldwide, yet remain difficult to identify because their visual appearance varies substantially across beaches, viewpoints, and sea states. To advance research on this safety-critical problem, the challenge builds on the RipVIS benchmark, evaluating both detection and segmentation. The dataset is diverse, sourced from more than $10$ countries, with $4$ camera orientations and diverse beach and sea conditions. This report describes the dataset, challenge protocol, evaluation methodology, final results, and summarizes the main insights from the submitted methods. The challenge attracted $159$ registered participants and produced $9$ valid test submissions across the two tasks. Final rankings are based on a composite score that combines $F_1[50]$, $F_2[50]$, $F_1[40\!:\!95]$, and $F_2[40\!:\!95]$. Most participant solutions relied on pretrained models, combined with strong augmentation and post-processing design. These results suggest that rip current understanding benefits strongly from the robust general-purpose vision models' progress, while leaving ample room for future methods tailored to their unique visual structure.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了NTIRE 2026 Rip Current Detection and Segmentation (RipDetSeg) 挑战赛，致力于提升图像中离岸流（rip current）的自动检测与分割。通过多国多视角的多样化数据集，比赛推动了该领域技术发展。
AI.motivation: 离岸流是全球海滩遇险和死亡事故的主要原因，但由于其外观多变，识别极具挑战。解决这一问题对提升海滩安全具有重大意义。
AI.method: 挑战赛建立在RipVIS基准之上，设计了检测和分割两项任务。数据集涵盖10多个国家、4种相机朝向和多样的海滩及环境条件。参赛方案主要采用预训练视觉模型，辅以增强和后处理。成绩由F1[50]、F2[50]、F1[40:95]和F2[40:95]综合评分。
AI.result: 参赛人数达159人，共有9个有效测试提交。大多数方法基于强大的通用视觉模型，结合数据增强和后处理，大幅提升了识别性能。
AI.conclusion: 通用视觉模型的进展已显著提升离岸流检测能力，但鉴于其独特的视觉结构，未来亟需针对性的定制方法以进一步改进性能。

title: MAPLE: A Meta-learning Framework for Cross-Prompt Essay Scoring
summary: Automated Essay Scoring (AES) faces significant challenges in cross-prompt settings, where models must generalize to unseen writing prompts. To address this limitation, we propose MAPLE, a meta-learning framework that leverages prototypical networks to learn transferable representations across different writing prompts. Across three diverse datasets (ELLIPSE and ASAP (English), and LAILA (Arabic)), MAPLE achieves state-of-the-art performance on ELLIPSE and LAILA, outperforming strong baselines by 8.5 and 3 points in QWK, respectively. On ASAP, where prompts exhibit heterogeneous score ranges, MAPLE yields improvements on several traits, highlighting the strengths of our approach in unified scoring settings. Overall, our results demonstrate the potential of meta-learning for building robust cross-prompt AES systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为MAPLE的元学习框架，有效提升了自动作文评分系统在不同写作提示（cross-prompt）下的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有自动作文评分（AES）系统在面对新的、未见过的写作提示时，通常表现不佳，缺乏泛化能力。本文旨在解决AES系统跨写作提示应用时的表现下降难题。
AI.method: 提出了MAPLE元学习框架，结合了原型网络，通过学习可迁移的表示，实现对不同写作提示的自适应评分。该方法在ELLIPSE、ASAP（英语数据集）和LAILA（阿拉伯语数据集）上进行了验证。
AI.result: 在ELLIPSE和LAILA两个数据集上，MAPLE分别在QWK指标上领先最优基线8.5和3分；在ASAP数据集部分评分维度同样取得了改进，显示了方法在统一评分条件下的强大表现。
AI.conclusion: 元学习思路（如MAPLE）有望极大提升AES模型在跨提示场景下的鲁棒性和泛化能力，为构建更健壮的自动评分系统提供了新方向。

title: Comparison Drives Preference: Reference-Aware Modeling for AI-Generated Video Quality Assessment
summary: The rapid advancement of generative models has led to a growing volume of AI-generated videos, making the automatic quality assessment of such videos increasingly important. Existing AI-generated content video quality assessment (AIGC-VQA) methods typically estimate visual quality by analyzing each video independently, ignoring potential relationships among videos. In this work, we revisit AIGC-VQA from an inter-video perspective and formulate it as a reference-aware evaluation problem. Through this formulation, quality assessment is guided not only by intrinsic video characteristics but also by comparisons with related videos, which is more consistent with human perception. To validate its effectiveness, we propose Reference-aware Video Quality Assessment (RefVQA), which utilizes a query-centered reference graph to organize semantically related samples and performs graph-guided difference aggregation from the reference nodes to the query node. Experiments on existing datasets demonstrate that our proposed RefVQA outperforms state-of-the-art methods across multiple quality dimensions, with strong generalization ability validated by cross-dataset evaluation. These results highlight the effectiveness of the proposed reference-based formulation and suggest its potential to advance AIGC-VQA.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于参考的AI生成内容视频质量评价方法，利用视频之间的关系提升评估效果，并超过了现有方法。
AI.motivation: 当前AIGC视频质量评价方法多忽视视频间的关联，只独立分析单个视频，但实际人类主观感知往往依赖参照对比，因此需要更接近人类认知的评估方法。
AI.method: 提出Reference-aware Video Quality Assessment (RefVQA)方法，构建以查询为中心的参考图，将相关视频组织在一起，并通过图指导的差异聚合实现参考感知质量评估。
AI.result: 在现有数据集上，RefVQA在多个质量维度超越了最新方法，并在跨数据集评测中展现出良好的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 参考感知的AIGC视频质量评估方式不仅更契合人类感知，也能有效提升模型性能，具有推动该领域发展的潜力。

title: Beyond Fine-Tuning: In-Context Learning and Chain-of-Thought for Reasoned Distractor Generation
summary: Distractor generation (DG) remains a labor-intensive task that still significantly depends on domain experts. The task focuses on generating plausible yet incorrect options, known as distractors, for multiple-choice questions.
