AI.motivation: 非洲快速扩张城市因气候变化导致城市洪涝风险上升，而排水系统常被垃圾堵塞，现有垃圾监测方法难以大规模实时适用。
AI.method: 开发了一套AI驱动的城市垃圾检测流程，基于公开的航拍和街景图像，结合本地化的标注策略，对城市固体垃圾进行高分辨率空间识别和分析。
AI.result: 在达累斯萨拉姆的应用显示，水道内垃圾堆积量为邻近城区的三倍；垃圾分布与非正规住区及社会经济因素有显著相关性；识别出城市中特别易涝的垃圾积累热点。
AI.conclusion: 该AI方法可大范围、持续性地监测城市垃圾分布，辅助城市防洪与垃圾管理决策，对提升城市应对气候变化和可持续发展具有实际指导意义。

title: Embedding Arithmetic: A Lightweight, Tuning-Free Framework for Post-hoc Bias Mitigation in Text-to-Image Models
comment: A demo notebook with basic implementations can be found at \url{https://github.com/cvims/EMBEDDING-ARITHMETIC}
summary: Modern text-to-image (T2I) models amplify harmful societal biases, challenging their ethical deployment. We introduce an inference-time method that reliably mitigates social bias while keeping prompt semantics and visual context (background, layout, and style) intact. This ensures context persistency and provides a controllable parameter to adjust mitigation strength, giving practitioners fine-grained control over fairness-coherence trade-offs. Using Embedding Arithmetic, we analyze how bias is structured in the embedding space and correct it without altering model weights, prompts, or datasets. Experiments on FLUX 1.0-Dev and Stable Diffusion 3.5-Large show that the conditional embedding space forms a complex, entangled manifold rather than a grid of disentangled concepts. To rigorously assess semantic preservation beyond the circularity and bias limitations of of CLIP scores, we propose the Concept Coherence Score (CCS). Evaluated against this robust metric, our lightweight, tuning-free method significantly outperforms existing baselines in improving diversity while maintaining high concept coherence, effectively resolving the critical fairness-coherence trade-off. By characterizing how models represent social concepts, we establish geometric understanding of latent space as a principled path toward more transparent, controllable, and fair image generation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在推理阶段减少文本到图像（T2I）模型中社会偏见的新方法，兼顾公平性和语义连贯性，并提出新评价指标。
AI.motivation: 现有T2I模型在生成图像时容易放大社会偏见，影响模型的伦理应用，因此需要一种有效减缓偏见的方法；并且这种方法还需兼顾图片语义和视觉上下文不被破坏。
AI.method: 作者提出了一种推理时的偏见缓解方法，采用Embedding Arithmetic分析和修正嵌入空间中的偏见分布，无需修改模型权重、数据集或提示词；并利用新提出的Concept Coherence Score（CCS）指标评价语义连贯性。
AI.result: 实验表明，条件嵌入空间是复杂缠结流形而非可分割的网格。该方法在FLUX 1.0-Dev与Stable Diffusion 3.5-Large上，显著优于基线，提高多样性的同时保持高语义连贯性，公平性与连贯性的权衡表现良好。
AI.conclusion: 通过对模型社会概念表征的几何分析，提出了一条通向更透明、可控和公平图像生成的有效途径。

title: Extending One-Step Image Generation from Class Labels to Text via Discriminative Text Representation
summary: Few-step generation has been a long-standing goal, with recent one-step generation methods exemplified by MeanFlow achieving remarkable results. Existing research on MeanFlow primarily focuses on class-to-image generation. However, an intuitive yet unexplored direction is to extend the condition from fixed class labels to flexible text inputs, enabling richer content creation. Compared to the limited class labels, text conditions pose greater challenges to the model's understanding capability, necessitating the effective integration of powerful text encoders into the MeanFlow framework. Surprisingly, although incorporating text conditions appears straightforward, we find that integrating powerful LLM-based text encoders using conventional training strategies results in unsatisfactory performance. To uncover the underlying cause, we conduct detailed analyses and reveal that, due to the extremely limited number of refinement steps in the MeanFlow generation, such as only one step, the text feature representations are required to possess sufficiently high discriminability. This also explains why discrete and easily distinguishable class features perform well within the MeanFlow framework. Guided by these insights, we leverage a powerful LLM-based text encoder validated to possess the required semantic properties and adapt the MeanFlow generation process to this framework, resulting in efficient text-conditioned synthesis for the first time. Furthermore, we validate our approach on the widely used diffusion model, demonstrating significant generation performance improvements. We hope this work provides a general and practical reference for future research on text-conditioned MeanFlow generation. The code is available at https://github.com/AMAP-ML/EMF.

AI.tldr: 本文推动了MeanFlow极少步生成技术，从传统的类别条件扩展到更灵活的文本条件，实现了高效的基于文本的图像生成，并显著提升了生成性能。
AI.motivation: 传统MeanFlow主要应用于类别到图像的生成，受限于类别标签的信息量和表达能力，不能满足更加丰富多样的内容生成需求。作者希望将条件从固定类别扩展到自由文本，以拓展生成模型的适用场景和内容丰富性。
AI.method: 作者尝试将强大的LLM（大语言模型）为基础的文本编码器集成到MeanFlow生成框架中，分析导致性能下降的原因，并设计了适配机制以提升文本表示的判别性，使文本特征在极少步生成情况下也能有效指导图像合成。同时方法在主流扩散模型上得到验证。
AI.result: 改进后的方法首次实现了高效的文本条件下的MeanFlow图像合成，在扩散模型中表现出大幅度的生成性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的基于强大文本编码器的MeanFlow生成框架，证明了文本条件下极少步生成的可行性和优越性，为后续相关研究提供了参考。

title: CanonSLR: Canonical-View Guided Multi-View Continuous Sign Language Recognition
summary: Continuous Sign Language Recognition (CSLR) has achieved remarkable progress in recent years; however, most existing methods are developed under single-view settings and thus remain insufficiently robust to viewpoint variations in real-world scenarios. To address this limitation, we propose CanonSLR, a canonical-view guided framework for multi-view CSLR. Specifically, we introduce a frontal-view-anchored teacher-student learning strategy, in which a teacher network trained on frontal-view data provides canonical temporal supervision for a student network trained on all viewpoints. To further reduce cross-view semantic discrepancy, we propose Sequence-Level Soft-Target Distillation, which transfers structured temporal knowledge from the frontal view to non-frontal samples, thereby alleviating gloss boundary ambiguity and category confusion caused by occlusion and projection variation. In addition, we introduce Temporal Motion Relational Enhancement to explicitly model motion-aware temporal relations in high-level visual features, strengthening stable dynamic representations while suppressing viewpoint-sensitive appearance disturbances. To support multi-view CSLR research, we further develop a universal multi-view sign language data construction pipeline that transforms original single-view RGB videos into semantically consistent, temporally coherent, and viewpoint-controllable multi-view sign language videos. Based on this pipeline, we extend PHOENIX-2014T and CSL-Daily into two seven-view benchmarks, namely PT14-MV and CSL-MV, providing a new experimental foundation for multi-view CSLR. Extensive experiments on PT14-MV and CSL-MV demonstrate that CanonSLR consistently outperforms existing approaches under multi-view settings and exhibits stronger robustness, especially on challenging non-frontal views.

AI.tldr: 本文针对目前连续手语识别在单一视角下表现良好但对视角变化不够鲁棒的问题，提出了一个以标准正面视角为引导的多视角识别框架（CanonSLR），并构建了新的多视角手语数据集。实验验证了该方法的有效性和优越性。
AI.motivation: 现有连续手语识别方法大多在单一视角数据集上开发，在面对实际中频繁变化的拍摄视角时，表现会显著下降。因此需要提升对多视角的适应能力，并推动多视角数据集与方法的发展。
AI.method: 1）提出了以正面视角为锚点的教师-学生学习策略：教师网络在正面数据上训练，向学生网络（在不同视角数据上训练）提供规范性时序监督。2）提出序列级柔性目标蒸馏，通过柔性方式传递正面视角的时序知识，减少视角转换带来的语义边界模糊等问题。3）引入运动关系增强模块，加强时序动态建模，提升对于动态特征的建模能力，减少外观信息带来的干扰。4）开发通用多视角手语视频构建流程，将单一视角数据扩展为多视角一致的数据集，用于实验评估。
AI.result: 在基于新构建的多视角数据集PT14-MV和CSL-MV上的实验显示，CanonSLR框架在多视角，尤其是非正面视角下，均优于当前主流方法，表现出更强鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的方法显著提升了多视角连续手语识别的性能，通过新方法和新数据集共同推动了该领域向更实用、更鲁棒方向发展。

title: DiffuSAM: Diffusion Guided Zero-Shot Object Grounding for Remote Sensing Imagery
summary: Diffusion models have emerged as powerful tools for a wide range of vision tasks, including text-guided image generation and editing. In this work, we explore their potential for object grounding in remote sensing imagery. We propose a hybrid pipeline that integrates diffusion-based localization cues with state-of-the-art segmentation models such as RemoteSAM and SAM3 to obtain more accurate bounding boxes. By leveraging the complementary strengths of generative diffusion models and foundational segmentation models, our approach enables robust and adaptive object localization across complex scenes. Experiments demonstrate that our pipeline significantly improves localization performance, achieving over a 14% increase in Acc@0.5 compared to existing state-of-the-art methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合扩散模型与先进分割模型的新方法，用于提升遥感图像中的目标定位精度。
AI.motivation: 现有遥感图像中的目标定位方法准确率有限，亟需利用扩散模型和分割模型各自的优势来提升定位效果。
AI.method: 作者设计了一个混合管道，将扩散模型在定位上的提示与RemoteSAM、SAM3等最新分割模型相结合，实现更准确的目标框选。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在Acc@0.5指标上较最新方法提升了14%以上，有效增强了定位能力。
AI.conclusion: 通过将扩散生成模型与基础分割模型互补结合，能显著提升遥感复杂场景下的目标定位表现。

title: Towards Symmetry-sensitive Pose Estimation: A Rotation Representation for Symmetric Object Classes
comment: Published Open-Access in IJCV, see https://link.springer.com/article/10.1007/s11263-026-02770-x . 28 pages, 6 figures, 9 tables, 1 algorithm
summary: Symmetric objects are common in daily life and industry, yet their inherent orientation ambiguities that impede the training of deep learning networks for pose estimation are rarely discussed in the literature. To cope with these ambiguities, existing solutions typically require the design of specific loss functions and network architectures or resort to symmetry-invariant evaluation metrics. In contrast, we focus on the numeric representation of the rotation itself, modifying trigonometric identities with the degrees of symmetry derived from the objects' shapes. We use our representation, SARR, to obtain canonic (symmetry-resolved) poses for the symmetric objects in two popular 6D pose estimation datasets, T-LESS and ITODD, where SARR is unique and continuous w.r.t. the visual appearance. This allows us to use a standard CNN for 3D orientation estimation whose performance is evaluated with the symmetry-sensitive cosine distance $\text{AR}_{\text{C}}$. Our networks outperform the state of the art using $\text{AR}_{\text{C}}$ and achieve satisfactory performance when using conventional symmetry-invariant measures. Our method does not require any 3D models but only depth, or, as part of an additional experiment, texture-less RGB/grayscale images as input. We also show that networks trained on SARR outperform the same networks trained on rotation matrices, Euler angles, quaternions, standard trigonometrics or the recently popular 6d representation -- even in inference scenarios where no prior knowledge of the objects' symmetry properties is available. Code and a visualization toolkit are available at https://github.com/akriegler/SARR .

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种全新的旋转数值表达方法SARR，解决了对称物体在姿态估计中由于本身对称性带来的模糊难题，使得传统CNN也能实现高精度的3D姿态估计，无需复杂定制的损失函数或网络结构。
AI.motivation: 现有的深度学习姿态估计算法在处理对称物体时容易受其固有的方向模糊影响，导致网络难以有效学习，并且通常需要特殊设计损失函数、网络结构或使用对称不变度量。这些方法复杂且依赖先验，限制了实际应用。因此，作者希望找到一种更通用、直接且易于使用的方法。
AI.method: 作者提出了一种基于对称性修正的三角恒等式旋转数值表达方法（SARR），通过物体形状得出的对称次数对旋转表示进行修正，有效分解并唯一确定每个对称物体的标准姿态。他们在T-LESS和ITODD两个公开数据集上，将该表示作为网络输出，并使用标准CNN进行训练和评估，采用对称敏感的余弦距离（AR_C）作为主要评测指标。该方法只需输入深度图或无纹理的可见光/灰度图像，无需3D模型。
AI.result: 在AR_C指标下，该方法在两个数据集上的表现超过了目前最先进的方法。即使在常规的对称不变指标下依然表现出色。与传统旋转参数化方法和最新的6D表达相比，SARR具有更高的准确率和更好的泛化能力，且在不知道物体对称性的推断场景下依然优于对比方法。
AI.conclusion: 新提出的SARR旋转表示方法可有效解决对称物体的姿态估计问题，无需对网络结构和损失函数做特殊设计，输入要求低，适用于多种实际场景，具有显著优越性和应用推广价值。相关代码和可视化工具已开放。

title: Memorize When Needed: Decoupled Memory Control for Spatially Consistent Long-Horizon Video Generation
summary: Spatially consistent long-horizon video generation aims to maintain temporal and spatial consistency along predefined camera trajectories. Existing methods mostly entangle memory modeling with video generation, leading to inconsistent content during scene revisits and diminished generative capacity when exploring novel regions, even trained on extensive annotated data. To address these limitations, we propose a decoupled framework that separates memory conditioning from generation. Our approach significantly reduces training costs while simultaneously enhancing spatial consistency and preserving the generative capacity for novel scene exploration. Specifically, we employ a lightweight, independent memory branch to learn precise spatial consistency from historical observation. We first introduce a hybrid memory representation to capture complementary temporal and spatial cues from generated frames, then leverage a per-frame cross-attention mechanism to ensure each frame is conditioned exclusively on the most spatially relevant historical information, which is injected into the generative model to ensure spatial consistency. When generating new scenes, a camera-aware gating mechanism is proposed to mediate the interaction between memory and generation modules, enabling memory conditioning only when meaningful historical references exist. Compared with the existing method, our method is highly data-efficient, yet the experiments demonstrate that our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance in terms of both visual quality and spatial consistency.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种时空一致性长时视频生成新方法，通过将记忆建模与生成过程解耦，提高了生成视频的空间一致性和对新场景的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有视频生成方法在记忆建模与生成过程中高度耦合，导致在重复访问场景时内容不一致，并在探索新区域时生成能力减弱，且通常需要大量带注释数据来训练。
AI.method: 提出一种记忆与生成解耦的框架，单独设计轻量化的独立记忆分支用于学习空间一致性，引入混合记忆表征获取时空线索。通过逐帧跨注意力机制，使每一帧仅受与其空间最相关的历史信息影响。此外，提出相机感知门限机制，实现仅在存在有意义历史参考时才使用记忆，对新场景生成也有良好表现。
AI.result: 方法大幅降低了训练成本，提高了空间一致性和对新场景生成的能力。在实验中，相较于已有方法，在视觉质量和空间一致性方面都达到了最新水平。
AI.conclusion: 提出的解耦框架不仅数据高效且易于训练，在长时空一致性视频生成领域获得了优异效果，为相关方向研究提供了新思路。

title: Instruction-as-State: Environment-Guided and State-Conditioned Semantic Understanding for Embodied Navigation
summary: Vision-and-Language Navigation requires agents to follow natural-language instructions in visually changing environments. A central challenge is the dynamic entanglement between language and observations: the meaning of instruction shifts as the agent's field of view and spatial context evolve. However, many existing models encode the instruction as a static global representation, limiting their ability to adapt instruction meaning to the current visual context. We therefore model instruction understanding as an Instruction-as-State variable: a decision-relevant, token-level instruction state that evolves step by step conditioned on the agent's perceptual state, where the perceptual state denotes the observation-grounded navigation context at each step. To realize this principle, we introduce State-Entangled Environment-Guided Instruction Understanding (S-EGIU), a coarse-to-fine framework for state-conditioned segment activation and token-level semantic refinement. At the coarse level, S-EGIU activates the instruction segment whose semantics align with the current observation. At the fine level, it refines the activated segment through observation-guided token grounding and contextual modeling, sharpening its internal semantics under the current observation. Together, these stages maintain an instruction state that is continuously updated according to the agent's perceptual state during navigation. S-EGIU delivers strong performance on several key metrics, including a +2.68% SPL gain on REVERIE Test Unseen, and demonstrates consistent efficiency gains across multiple VLN benchmarks, underscoring the value of dynamic instruction--perception entanglement.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种用于视觉-语言导航任务的新方法，通过动态地将指令理解与环境感知状态结合，提高了导航任务中的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有许多视觉-语言导航模型将指令编码为全局静态表示，忽视了指令语义随环境和视角变化而动态变化的特性，导致模型难以适应复杂多变的导航场景。
AI.method: 论文提出Instruction-as-State的思想，将指令理解建模为一种随环境感知状态动态变化的变量。具体实现为提出State-Entangled Environment-Guided Instruction Understanding（S-EGIU）框架，通过粗到细两级：粗层面激活与当前观察语义相关的指令片段；细层面利用观察结果细化、加强该指令片段中词语的语义，并进行上下文建模。整个过程中，指令状态随场景感知持续动态更新。
AI.result: S-EGIU在多个视觉-语言导航数据集上取得明显提升，其中在REVERIE Test Unseen上SPL指标提升2.68%，并在多项VLN基准测试中表现出一致的效率提升。
AI.conclusion: 动态绑定指令理解与环境感知状态显著提升了视觉-语言导航模型的导航能力和效率，证明了动态指令-感知纠缠建模的有效性。

title: Is SAM3 ready for pathology segmentation?
summary: Is Segment Anything Model 3 (SAM3) capable in segmenting Any Pathology Images? Digital pathology segmentation spans tissue-level and nuclei-level scales, where traditional methods often suffer from high annotation costs and poor generalization. SAM3 introduces Promptable Concept Segmentation, offering a potential automated interface via text prompts. With this work, we propose a systematic evaluation protocol to explore the capability space of SAM3 in a structured manner. Specifically, we evaluate SAM3 under different supervision settings including zero-shot, few-shot, and supervised with varying prompting strategies. Our extensive evaluation on pathological datasets including NuInsSeg, PanNuke and GlaS, reveals that: 1.text-only prompts poorly activate nuclear concepts. 2.performance is highly sensitive to visual prompt types and budgets. 3.few-shot learning offers gains, but SAM3 lacks robustness against visual prompt noise. and 4.a significant gap persists between prompt-based usage and task-trained adapter-based reference. Our study delineates SAM3's boundaries in pathology image segmentation and provides practical guidance on the necessity of pathology domain adaptation.

AI.tldr: 本文系统性评估了Segment Anything Model 3（SAM3）在病理图像分割中的能力，包括组织级和细胞核级分割。通过多种监督与提示策略实验，揭示了SAM3在病理分割中的优势与局限性。
AI.motivation: 病理图像分割费时费力且泛化能力差，亟需自动化、低注释成本且泛化性强的新方法。SAM3作为最新可通过文本和视觉提示进行分割的大模型，能否适用于病理分割值得探索。
AI.method: 提出了系统的评估协议，利用不同的数据集（NuInsSeg, PanNuke, GlaS），从零样本（zero-shot）、小样本（few-shot）和监督等多种设置下，测试SAM3在不同文本和视觉提示下的性能。
AI.result:
1. 仅用文本提示无法有效分割细胞核。
2. 性能对视觉提示类型和数量高度敏感。
3. 少样本学习能提升效果，但对视觉提示噪声不鲁棒。
4. SAM3提示式分割与针对任务训练的适配方法之间仍存在明显性能差距。
AI.conclusion: SAM3在病理分割场景展现了一定潜力，但存在明显局限，尤其是在可靠性和泛化性上。病理图像分割仍需专门的领域自适应和优化策略，不能仅依赖大模型的通用能力。

title: Medical Image Understanding Improves Survival Prediction via Visual Instruction Tuning
summary: Accurate prognostication and risk estimation are essential for guiding clinical decision-making and optimizing patient management. While radiologist-assessed features from CT scans provide valuable indicators of disease severity and outcomes, interpreting such images requires expert knowledge, and translating rich visual information into textual summaries inevitably leads to information loss. In this work, we propose a vision-language framework for 3D CT image understanding that leverages large-scale open-sourced CT images paired with radiology reports through visual instruction tuning. This pre-training enables the model to learn clinically meaningful visual-textual representations, which can then be adapted to downstream survival prediction tasks. By incorporating a survival prediction head on top of the pre-trained model, our approach improves survival prediction from CT images and clinical data while generating clinically meaningful language responses to predefined questions. Experimental results demonstrate that our method outperforms baseline methods in survival prediction, particularly, when clinical data alone is less predictive. The code will be released upon acceptance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合视觉和语言的3D CT图像理解框架，通过预训练提升生存预测能力，并能生成有临床意义的语言回答，显著优于传统方法。
AI.motivation: CT影像与文本报告信息丰富，但传统由放射科医师解读容易有信息损失且依赖专家经验；因此，需要一种自动化、保留更多信息的方式提升疾病严重程度与结果预测。
AI.method: 采用视觉-语言框架，将大规模配对的CT影像与放射学报告通过视觉指令微调训练预模型，然后在其基础上加入生存预测模块，利用模型进行生存预测和医学问答。
AI.result: 在实验中，该模型在生存预测任务上优于传统方法，尤其是在仅有临床数据预测性弱时优势更明显。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的多模态预训练模型可提升CT影像生存预测准确性，并可生成临床意义丰富的医学语言回复；显示了多模态方法在医学图像分析中的应用前景。

title: Style-Based Neural Architectures for Real-Time Weather Classification
summary: In this paper, we present three neural network architectures designed for real-time classification of weather conditions (sunny, rain, snow, fog) from images. These models, inspired by recent advances in style transfer, aim to capture the stylistic elements present in images. One model, called "Multi-PatchGAN", is based on PatchGANs used in well-known architectures such as Pix2Pix and CycleGAN, but here adapted with multiple patch sizes for detection tasks. The second model, "Truncated ResNet50", is a simplified version of ResNet50 retaining only its first nine layers. This truncation, determined by an evolutionary algorithm, facilitates the extraction of high-frequency features essential for capturing subtle stylistic details. Finally, we propose "Truncated ResNet50 with Gram Matrix and Attention", which computes Gram matrices for each layer during training and automatically weights them via an attention mechanism, thus optimizing the extraction of the most relevant stylistic expressions for classification. These last two models outperform the state of the art and demonstrate remarkable generalization capability on several public databases. Although developed for weather detection, these architectures are also suitable for other appearance-based classification tasks, such as animal species recognition, texture classification, disease detection in medical imaging, or industrial defect identification.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了三种用于实时天气图像分类的神经网络模型，包括Multi-PatchGAN、多层截断的ResNet50、以及结合Grammatrix和注意力机制的ResNet50。这些模型均致力于提升图像风格特征提取能力，用于准确区分不同天气类别。实验结果显示，后两者在多个公开数据集上优于现有方法，并具有较强泛化能力，也适用于其他基于外观的分类任务。
AI.motivation: 现有基于图像的天气条件识别模型在区分细微风格特征时存在不足，且泛化能力有限，难以应对多样化的实际场景。因此，作者希望设计可实时处理、捕捉图像风格差异的新网络结构，以提升分类准确性和通用性。
AI.method:
1. 设计Multi-PatchGAN：结合多种patch大小的PatchGAN架构，增强对局部风格元素的捕获能力。
2. Truncated ResNet50：通过进化算法截取ResNet50前九层，专注高频特征提取。
3. Truncated ResNet50 with Gram Matrix and Attention：在每层训练期间计算Gram矩阵，并通过注意力机制为不同层赋权，优化风格特征的提取。
所有模型均用于实时天气分类测试。
AI.result: 经过在多个公开天气图像数据集上的测试，后两种模型（Truncated ResNet50及其Gram矩阵注意力增强版）在准确率和泛化能力上均超过了当前主流方法。模型还展现了对其他基于外观分类任务的良好适应性。
AI.conclusion: 文中提出的三种新型网络结构能够更有效地提取图像中的风格细节，提升了天气分类准确性和泛化能力，具有广泛的应用潜力。方法不仅限于天气分类，也适合其他外观相关的图像识别任务。

title: Domain-Specialized Object Detection via Model-Level Mixtures of Experts
summary: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models provide a structured approach to combining specialized neural networks and offer greater interpretability than conventional ensembles. While MoEs have been successfully applied to image classification and semantic segmentation, their use in object detection remains limited due to challenges in merging dense and structured predictions. In this work, we investigate model-level mixtures of object detectors and analyze their suitability for improving performance and interpretability in object detection. We propose an MoE architecture that combines YOLO-based detectors trained on semantically disjoint data subsets, with a learned gating network that dynamically weights expert contributions. We study different strategies for fusing detection outputs and for training the gating mechanism, including balancing losses to prevent expert collapse. Experiments on the BDD100K dataset demonstrate that the proposed MoE consistently outperforms standard ensemble approaches and provides insights into expert specialization across domains, highlighting model-level MoEs as a viable alternative to traditional ensembling for object detection. Our code is available at https://github.com/KASTEL-MobilityLab/mixtures-of-experts/.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一种基于Mixture-of-Experts (MoE)的目标检测新架构，通过组合多个在语义上不相交数据集上训练的YOLO检测器，并由门控网络动态分配专家贡献，提高检测性能和可解释性。实验表明该方法优于传统集成方法。
AI.motivation: MoE模型因结构化和可解释性优势在图像分类等领域已被应用，但在目标检测中的应用较少，主要由于目标检测预测的复杂性和结果合并难题。作者旨在探究MoE在目标检测领域的应用潜力。
AI.method: 提出一种基于YOLO系列的MoE目标检测架构。每个专家（检测器）在语义上不同的数据子集上训练，使用一个门控网络根据输入图像动态分配专家贡献。作者对检测结果融合和门控机制训练进行了多种策略的对比研究，包括损失权重的平衡避免专家塌陷。
AI.result: 在BDD100K数据集上的实验显示，所提MoE检测器在性能上始终优于传统的模型集成方法。此外，通过分析门控分配和专家行为，揭示了专家在不同领域的专长分化。
AI.conclusion: 模型级MoE为目标检测提供了一种性能和可解释性兼具的可行替代方案，优于传统集成方法，并有助于专家机制的理解和分析。

title: Long-Text-to-Image Generation via Compositional Prompt Decomposition
comment: Accepted to the Fourteenth International Conference on Learning Representations (ICLR 2026)
summary: While modern text-to-image (T2I) models excel at generating images from intricate prompts, they struggle to capture the key details when the inputs are descriptive paragraphs. This limitation stems from the prevalence of concise captions that shape their training distributions. Existing methods attempt to bridge this gap by either fine-tuning T2I models on long prompts, which generalizes poorly to longer lengths; or by projecting the oversize inputs into normal-prompt space and compromising fidelity. We propose Prompt Refraction for Intricate Scene Modeling (PRISM), a compositional approach that enables pre-trained T2I models to process long sequence inputs. PRISM uses a lightweight module to extract constituent representations from the long prompts. The T2I model makes independent noise predictions for each component, and their outputs are merged into a single denoising step using energy-based conjunction. We evaluate PRISM across a wide range of model architectures, showing comparable performances to models fine-tuned on the same training data. Furthermore, PRISM demonstrates superior generalization, outperforming baseline models by 7.4% on prompts over 500 tokens in a challenging public benchmark.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种新方法PRISM，让现有文本生成图片模型（T2I）更好地理解复杂长文本描述，通过模块化方式分解和综合处理长文本信息，在多个模型和测试中取得了更好的效果。
AI.motivation: 现有T2I模型主要训练于简短描述，对于长文本描述提取的信息有限，生成图片时难以覆盖重要细节。而现有改进方法，如直接微调或对长文本投射简化，均有缺陷。因此需要有新方案突破这一瓶颈。
AI.method: 提出PRISM方法：通过一个轻量模块将长文本解析为多个组成部分，然后T2I模型分别对每个部分进行独立噪声预测，最后利用基于能量的结合方式将各自结果融合为一个整体，完成去噪生成图像。
AI.result: 在多种T2I模型体系下测试，PRISM性能与针对长文本微调过的模型接近，且对超长文本（超过500词元）有更好泛化性，在公开基准测试领先基线模型7.4%。
AI.conclusion: PRISM能显著提升现有T2I模型对长文本场景描述的处理能力，无需大规模微调，表现优异且泛化性更强，有望应用到实际复杂文本到图像生成场景。

title: Geometry-Guided 3D Visual Token Pruning for Video-Language Models
summary: Multimodal large language models have demonstrated remarkable capabilities in 2D vision, motivating their extension to 3D scene understanding. Recent studies represent 3D scenes as 3D spatial videos composed of image sequences with depth and camera pose information, enabling pre-trained video-language models to perform 3D reasoning tasks. However, the large number of visual tokens in spatial videos remains a major bottleneck for efficient inference and context management. Existing pruning methods overlook the view consistency of spatial videos and the spatial diversity of the remaining tokens, which prevents them from effectively removing inter-frame redundancy and preserving scene completeness. In this paper, we propose Geo3DPruner, a Geometry-Guided 3D Visual Token Pruning framework. Geo3DPruner first models cross-frame relevance through geometry-aware global attention, and then performs a two-stage pruning process. The intra-voxel stage selects representative multi-view features within each voxel, while the inter-voxel stage preserves spatial diversity by selecting a globally distributed subset of voxels. Extensive experiments on multiple 3D scene understanding benchmarks demonstrate that Geo3DPruner retains over 90% of the original performance while pruning 90% of visual tokens, significantly outperforming existing text-guided and vision-guided pruning methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效的3D视觉token剪枝框架Geo3DPruner，能大幅减少3D场景理解任务中的视觉token数量，同时保留关键场景信息。实验显示该方法在剪枝90% token的情况下仍能保持90%以上的原始性能，优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 多模态大模型已在2D视觉领域展现出强大能力，推动其在3D场景理解的拓展。然而，3D空间视频的token数量庞大，现有剪枝方法未充分兼顾视角一致性和空间多样性，导致推理低效和信息丢失。
AI.method: 提出Geo3DPruner框架，首先用几何感知的全局注意力建模跨帧关联，之后分两步剪枝：先在单元格内选择具代表性的多视角特征（intra-voxel），再跨单元格保留具有空间分散性的voxel子集（inter-voxel），以有效去除帧间冗余并保证场景完整性。
AI.result: 在多个3D场景理解基准上，Geo3DPruner在剪除90%视觉token情况下，仍能保存90%以上原始性能，显著优于文字或视觉引导的现有剪枝方法。
AI.conclusion: Geo3DPruner能高效压缩3D视觉输入，显著提升大模型在3D场景理解任务上的推理效率和信息保留，对实现大规模3D多模态应用有重要意义。

title: MARCO: Navigating the Unseen Space of Semantic Correspondence
summary: Recent advances in semantic correspondence rely on dual-encoder architectures, combining DINOv2 with diffusion backbones. While accurate, these billion-parameter models generalize poorly beyond training keypoints, revealing a gap between benchmark performance and real-world usability, where queried points rarely match those seen during training. Building upon DINOv2, we introduce MARCO, a unified model for generalizable correspondence driven by a novel training framework that enhances both fine-grained localization and semantic generalization. By coupling a coarse-to-fine objective that refines spatial precision with a self-distillation framework, which expands sparse supervision beyond annotated regions, our approach transforms a handful of keypoints into dense, semantically coherent correspondences. MARCO sets a new state of the art on SPair-71k, AP-10K, and PF-PASCAL, with gains that amplify at fine-grained localization thresholds (+8.9 PCK@0.01), strongest generalization to unseen keypoints (+5.1, SPair-U) and categories (+4.7, MP-100), while remaining 3x smaller and 10x faster than diffusion-based approaches. Code is available at https://github.com/visinf/MARCO .

AI.tldr: 本文提出了MARCO模型，通过创新的训练框架显著提升了语义对应任务中的精细定位和泛化能力，并在多个基准上取得了新SOTA，同时模型更小更快。
AI.motivation: 现有基于双编码器的大规模语义对应模型虽精度高，但泛化能力有限，特别是在真实场景中新查询点不在训练集时性能下滑明显。因此，需要一种在精细定位和语义泛化方面都有提升的通用语义对应方法。
AI.method: 在DINOv2基础上，提出了MARCO模型，结合了粗到细定位目标和自蒸馏机制。粗到细目标提升空间精度，自蒸馏框架则将稀疏标签扩展到更广泛区域，从而实现密集且一致的对应关系。
AI.result: MARCO在SPair-71k、AP-10K和PF-PASCAL等基准数据集上取得了最新SOTA，细粒度定位、对未见关键点与新类别的泛化能力显著提升，且模型参数量减少3倍、推理速度提升10倍。
AI.conclusion: MARCO不仅在多个主流数据集上推高了语义对应的性能，还大幅提升了模型效率和泛化能力，适用于真实应用场景，具有较强的实际价值。

title: LiquidTAD: An Efficient Method for Temporal Action Detection via Liquid Neural Dynamics
summary: Temporal Action Detection (TAD) in untrimmed videos is currently dominated by Transformer-based architectures. While high-performing, their quadratic computational complexity and substantial parameter redundancy limit deployment in resource-constrained environments. In this paper, we propose LiquidTAD, a novel parameter-efficient framework that replaces cumbersome self-attention layers with parallelized ActionLiquid blocks. Unlike traditional Liquid Neural Networks (LNNs) that suffer from sequential execution bottlenecks, LiquidTAD leverages a closed-form continuous-time (CfC) formulation, allowing the model to be reformulated as a parallelizable operator while preserving the intrinsic physical prior of continuous-time dynamics. This architecture captures complex temporal dependencies with $O(N)$ linear complexity and adaptively modulates temporal sensitivity through learned time-constants ($τ$), providing a robust mechanism for handling varying action durations. To the best of our knowledge, this work is the first to introduce a parallelized LNN-based architecture to the TAD domain. Experimental results on the THUMOS-14 dataset demonstrate that LiquidTAD achieves a highly competitive Average mAP of 69.46\% with only 10.82M parameters -- a 63\% reduction compared to the ActionFormer baseline. Further evaluations on ActivityNet-1.3 and Ego4D benchmarks confirm that LiquidTAD achieves an optimal accuracy-efficiency trade-off and exhibits superior robustness to temporal sampling variations, advancing the Pareto frontier of modern TAD frameworks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效参数的时序动作检测新框架LiquidTAD，用并行的ActionLiquid模块取代传统耗资源的自注意力层，实现了更优的精度-效率权衡。
AI.motivation: 当前时序动作检测领域主要被Transformer主导，但其高计算复杂度和参数冗余问题限制了在资源受限环境中的应用，因此亟需一种既高效又准确的新方法。
AI.method: 作者提出用基于Liquid Neural Network (LNN)的ActionLiquid模块取代自注意力层，并采用闭式连续时间（CfC）模型，使网络结构可并行计算，复杂度降至O(N)，同时自适应调整时间敏感度以处理不同长度的动作。
AI.result: LiquidTAD在THUMOS-14数据集上达到69.46%的mAP，仅用1082万参数，比主流ActionFormer模型参数减少63%；在ActivityNet-1.3及Ego4D等数据集也表现良好，证明了方法的效率和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: LiquidTAD作为首个可并行化的LNN架构的TAD方法，显著提升了效率—精度权衡，并扩展了现代TAD方案的Pareto前沿，适用于对算力有要求的实际场景中。

title: Spike-NVPT: Learning Robust Visual Prompts via Bio-Inspired Temporal Filtering and Discretization
summary: Pre-trained vision models have found widespread application across diverse domains. Prompt tuning-based methods have emerged as a parameter-efficient paradigm for adapting pre-trained vision models. While effective on standard benchmarks, the continuous and dense nature of learned prompts can lead to sensitivity against input noise, as the high-capacity prompts tend to overfit task-irrelevant details. To address this trade-off, we propose Spike-NVPT, a noise-robust visual prompt tuning method. Specifically, we design a Signal Filtering Layer based on spiking neurons, which uses the integrate-and-fire (IF) mechanism to accumulate task-relevant signals over time and filter transient noise fluctuations. A subsequent Spike Discretization Unit converts filtered signals into sparse binary prompts. This discretization acts as a strong regularizer, forcing the model to anchor decision boundaries on the most discriminative and robust features. Notably, the resulting binary prompts remain static during deployment, ensuring zero additional computational overhead during inference. Experimental results demonstrate that Spike-NVPT achieves superior robustness performance, with a maximum improvement of 11.2% over conventional methods, and retains competitive accuracy on clean datasets. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first attempt to leverage spiking neurons for fine-tuning traditional artificial neural network (ANN)-based visual models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新颖的视觉提示调优方法Spike-NVPT，大幅提升了模型对输入噪声的鲁棒性，并且在无噪声数据上也保持了高准确率。
AI.motivation: 当前主流的提示调优方法（prompt tuning）对参数效率高，但连续的高容量提示向量易对输入噪声敏感，导致过拟合无关细节，影响模型鲁棒性。
AI.method: 作者设计了一种基于脉冲神经元的信号过滤层，利用积分-发放机制累积有用信号并过滤瞬时噪声，再通过脉冲离散化单元将信号转换为稀疏二值提示，起到强正则化作用。部署时这些二值提示保持静态，无额外推理开销。
AI.result: Spike-NVPT在多项实验中对比传统方法，鲁棒性表现提升高达11.2%，在干净数据集上也保持了有竞争力的准确率。
AI.conclusion: Spike-NVPT有效提升了视觉模型噪声鲁棒性，并首次尝试将脉冲神经元机制引入ANN视觉模型的微调，具有一定创新性和应用潜力。

title: Denoise and Align: Diffusion-Driven Foreground Knowledge Prompting for Open-Vocabulary Temporal Action Detection
summary: Open-Vocabulary Temporal Action Detection (OV-TAD) aims to localize and classify action segments of unseen categories in untrimmed videos, where effective alignment between action semantics and video representations is critical for accurate detection. However, existing methods struggle to mitigate the semantic imbalance between concise, abstract action labels and rich, complex video contents, inevitably introducing semantic noise and misleading cross-modal alignment. To address this challenge, we propose DFAlign, the first framework that leverages diffusion-based denoising to generate foreground knowledge for the guidance of action-video alignment. Following the 'conditioning, denoising and aligning' manner, we first introduce the Semantic-Unify Conditioning (SUC) module, which unifies action-shared and action-specific semantics as conditions for diffusion denoising. Then, the Background-Suppress Denoising (BSD) module generates foreground knowledge by progressively removing background redundancy from videos through denoising process. This foreground knowledge serves as effective intermediate semantic anchor between video and text representations, mitigating the semantic gap and enhancing the discriminability of action-relevant segments. Furthermore, we introduce the Foreground-Prompt Alignment (FPA) module to inject extracted foreground knowledge as prompt tokens into text representations, guiding model's attention towards action-relevant segments and enabling precise cross-modal alignment. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance on two OV-TAD benchmarks. The code repository is provided as follows: https://anonymous.4open.science/r/Code-2114/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的基于扩散去噪的开放词汇时序动作检测方法DFAlign，通过生成前景知识提升动作语义和视频表征的对齐效率，在两个公开基准上取得了最优表现。
AI.motivation: 现有开放词汇时序动作检测方法由于动作标签（简练抽象）与视频内容（丰富复杂）语义失衡，导致对齐效果不佳，容易引入语义噪声。急需创新方法提升动作语义与视频表征的有效对齐，减少误判。
AI.method: 1. 引入Semantic-Unify Conditioning（SUC）模块，将动作共享和动作特有语义统一作为扩散去噪的条件；2. 提出Background-Suppress Denoising（BSD）模块，通过扩散去噪过程逐步去除视频背景冗余，获得前景知识；3. 设计Foreground-Prompt Alignment（FPA）模块，将前景知识注入文本表征，引导模型关注动作相关片段实现精确的跨模态对齐。
AI.result: 在两个开放词汇时序动作检测数据集上，DFAlign均达到了最新最优水平，显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 扩散去噪和前景知识引导在开放词汇时序动作检测中能极大提高动作语义与视频表征对齐的准确性，显著推动了该领域的进步。

title: EVE: Verifiable Self-Evolution of MLLMs via Executable Visual Transformations
summary: Self-evolution of multimodal large language models (MLLMs) remains a critical challenge: pseudo-label-based methods suffer from progressive quality degradation as model predictions drift, while template-based methods are confined to a static set of transformations that cannot adapt in difficulty or diversity. We contend that robust, continuous self-improvement requires not only deterministic external feedback independent of the model's internal certainty, but also a mechanism to perpetually diversify the training distribution. To this end, we introduce EVE (Executable Visual transformation-based self-Evolution), a novel framework that entirely bypasses pseudo-labels by harnessing executable visual transformations continuously enriched in both variety and complexity. EVE adopts a Challenger-Solver dual-policy architecture. The Challenger maintains and progressively expands a queue of visual transformation code examples, from which it synthesizes novel Python scripts to perform dynamic visual transformations. Executing these scripts yields VQA problems with absolute, execution-verified ground-truth answers, eliminating any reliance on model-generated supervision. A multi-dimensional reward system integrating semantic diversity and dynamic difficulty calibration steers the Challenger to enrich its code example queue while posing progressively more challenging tasks, preventing mode collapse and fostering reciprocal co-evolution between the two policies. Extensive experiments demonstrate that EVE consistently surpasses existing self-evolution methods, establishing a robust and scalable paradigm for verifiable MLLM self-evolution. The code is available at https://github.com/0001Henry/EVE .

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为EVE的新框架，以可执行视觉变换推动多模态大模型（MLLMs）的自我进化，有效解决了传统自进化方法易陷入标签漂移和多样性不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有MLLM自进化主要依赖伪标签或模板，这会导致模型输出质量逐步下降或训练任务单一、难度和多样性受限，难以实现持续、稳定的性能提升。为此，亟需一种能够动态丰富训练分布、实现外部确定性反馈的新方法，打破伪标签和静态模板的局限。
AI.method: 提出EVE框架，采用Challenger-Solver双策略：Challenger负责管理并扩展视觉变换代码示例队列，通过合成新Python脚本进行动态视觉变换，生成执行可验证答案的VQA任务；Solver负责解决这些任务，并通过多维奖励结合多样性和难度动态调整，促进两者协同进化。整个流程无需模型生成伪标签，答案经程序完全确定。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，EVE在自我进化能力、任务多样性和难度扩展等方面均优于现有方法，展示出更强的可扩展性和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: EVE为可验证的MLLM自我进化提供了一种新颖且有效的范式，突破了伪标签和静态模板的局限，促进了模型持续自我优化，具备广泛的实际应用前景。

title: OmniHuman: A Large-scale Dataset and Benchmark for Human-Centric Video Generation
summary: Recent advancements in audio-video joint generation models have demonstrated impressive capabilities in content creation. However, generating high-fidelity human-centric videos in complex, real-world physical scenes remains a significant challenge. We identify that the root cause lies in the structural deficiencies of existing datasets across three dimensions: limited global scene and camera diversity, sparse interaction modeling (both person-person and person-object), and insufficient individual attribute alignment. To bridge these gaps, we present OmniHuman, a large-scale, multi-scene dataset designed for fine-grained human modeling. OmniHuman provides a hierarchical annotation covering video-level scenes, frame-level interactions, and individual-level attributes. To facilitate this, we develop a fully automated pipeline for high-quality data collection and multi-modal annotation. Complementary to the dataset, we establish the OmniHuman Benchmark (OHBench), a three-level evaluation system that provides a scientific diagnosis for human-centric audio-video synthesis. Crucially, OHBench introduces metrics that are highly consistent with human perception, filling the gaps in existing benchmarks by providing a comprehensive diagnosis across global scenes, relational interactions, and individual attributes.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了一个名为OmniHuman的大规模、多场景人类建模数据集，以及配套的三层级基准评价体系，提升了人像音视频生成的真实性与完整性。
AI.motivation: 现有音视频生成模型在复杂、真实场景下生成高保真以人为中心的视频依然存在困难，主要原因是现有数据集在场景多样性、交互建模和个体属性对齐等方面存在结构性不足。
AI.method: 作者提出OmniHuman数据集，具备多场景、多层级的细粒度标注，包括视频级场景、帧级交互和个体级属性，并开发了自动化数据收集与多模态标注流程。此外，建立了OmniHuman Benchmark，提供三层级的评测体系及与人类感知高度一致的评价指标。
AI.result: OmniHuman数据集为人类音视频生成提供了更丰富、多样且精细标注的数据基础，同时其评价体系能够科学诊断生成效果，弥补了现有基准的不足。
AI.conclusion: OmniHuman及其评价体系为人类音视频合成领域提供了重要工具，将推动生成模型在复杂场景和更真实人物表现上的发展。

title: AdaCluster: Adaptive Query-Key Clustering for Sparse Attention in Video Generation
summary: Video diffusion transformers (DiTs) suffer from prohibitive inference latency due to quadratic attention complexity. Existing sparse attention methods either overlook semantic similarity or fail to adapt to heterogeneous token distributions across layers, leading to model performance degradation. We propose AdaCluster, a training-free adaptive clustering framework that accelerates the generation of DiTs while preserving accuracy. AdaCluster applies an angle-similarity-preserving clustering method to query vectors for higher compression, and designs a euclidean-similarity-preserving clustering method for keys, covering cluster number assignment, threshold-wise adaptive clustering, and efficient critical cluster selection. Experiments on CogVideoX-2B, HunyuanVideo, and Wan-2.1 on one A40 GPU demonstrate up to 1.67-4.31x speedup with negligible quality degradation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AdaCluster方法，在不影响生成视频质量的情况下，大幅提升了视频扩散Transformer的推理速度。
AI.motivation: 针对视频扩散Transformer（DiTs）因注意力机制的二次方计算复杂度导致推理延迟严重的问题，且现有稀疏注意力方法忽略语义相似性或不能自适应不同层的token分布，造成性能下降。
AI.method: AdaCluster为一种无需训练的自适应聚类框架：对query采用基于角度相似性的聚类提高压缩效率，对key用欧氏相似性聚类，涵盖聚类数分配、阈值自适应聚类和高效的关键簇选择。
AI.result: 在CogVideoX-2B、HunyuanVideo、Wan-2.1等模型和一块A40 GPU上实验，推理速度提升1.67-4.31倍，且生成质量几乎没有下降。
AI.conclusion: AdaCluster能显著加速DiTs的推理，且方法高效、适应性强，无需额外训练，确保了生成视频质量。

title: LBFTI: Layer-Based Facial Template Inversion for Identity-Preserving Fine-Grained Face Reconstruction
summary: In face recognition systems, facial templates are widely adopted for identity authentication due to their compliance with the data minimization principle. However, facial template inversion technologies have posed a severe privacy leakage risk by enabling face reconstruction from templates. This paper proposes a Layer-Based Facial Template Inversion (LBFTI) method to reconstruct identity-preserving fine-grained face images. Our scheme decomposes face images into three layers: foreground layers (including eyebrows, eyes, nose, and mouth), midground layers (skin), and background layers (other parts). LBFTI leverages dedicated generators to produce these layers, adopting a rigorous three-stage training strategy: (1) independent refined generation of foreground and midground layers, (2) fusion of foreground and midground layers with template secondary injection to produce complete panoramic face images with background layers, and (3) joint fine-tuning of all modules to optimize inter-layer coordination and identity consistency. Experiments demonstrate that our LBFTI not only outperforms state-of-the-art methods in machine authentication performance, with a 25.3% improvement in TAR, but also achieves better similarity in human perception, as validated by both quantitative metrics and a questionnaire survey.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的基于层次的面部模板反演方法（LBFTI），能够从面部模板高质量地重建细粒度、保留身份特征的人脸图像，有效提升了识别准确性和可用性。
AI.motivation: 面部识别系统采用模板进行身份认证，虽然能够减少数据暴露，但随着模板反演技术的发展，仅凭模板也可能泄露隐私。现有反演方法存在重建质量有限、身份一致性弱的问题。论文旨在提出一种既能保障身份还原精度，又能细致反映人脸各组成部分的新方法。
AI.method: 作者将面部图像分为前景层（眉毛、眼睛、鼻子、嘴巴）、中景层（皮肤）和背景层，并为每个层次设计专门生成器。首先独立精细生成前景和中景层，然后融合这些层并利用模板再一次注入生成完整人脸，最后统一微调所有模块以优化层级协调和身份一致性。整个过程采用三阶段训练策略。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法比当前最优的其它方法在机器自动认证性能上提升了25.3%的TAR指标，并在图像与实际人脸的相似度方面，通过量化指标和问卷调查证明具有人类视觉感知上的更高相似度。
AI.conclusion: LBFTI方法显著提升了人脸模板反演的质量和身份还原能力，在保证机器识别性能的同时，更加贴合人类实际视觉体验，为后续安全与隐私保护研究提供了重要参考。

title: EAST: Early Action Prediction Sampling Strategy with Token Masking
summary: Early action prediction seeks to anticipate an action before it fully unfolds, but limited visual evidence makes this task especially challenging. We introduce EAST, a simple and efficient framework that enables a model to reason about incomplete observations. In our empirical study, we identify key components when training early action prediction models. Our key contribution is a randomized training strategy that samples a time step separating observed and unobserved video frames, enabling a single model to generalize seamlessly across all test-time observation ratios. We further show that joint learning on both observed and future (oracle) representations significantly boosts performance, even allowing an encoder-only model to excel. To improve scalability, we propose a token masking procedure that cuts memory usage in half and accelerates training by 2x with negligible accuracy loss. Combined with a forecasting decoder, EAST sets a new state of the art on NTU60, SSv2, and UCF101, surpassing previous best work by 10.1, 7.7, and 3.9 percentage points, respectively.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了EAST框架，通过随机训练策略和联合学习机制，在早期动作预测任务中取得了显著提升，并在多个数据集上创下新纪录。
AI.motivation: 早期动作预测因观测信息不完整而极具挑战性，亟需高效利用有限视觉证据，使模型能更好地推断未发生部分。
AI.method: 提出EAST框架：1）采用随机训练策略，抽样不同时间步的观察与未观察帧，实现模型对各种观测比例的泛化；2）联合学习当前（观察到的）和未来（oracle）视频表示，并通过token masking大幅降低内存和加速训练；3）搭配预测解码器优化最终效果。
AI.result: 在NTU60、SSv2与UCF101数据集上分别超越之前最佳方法10.1、7.7和3.9个百分点，并显著减少计算资源消耗，训练速度提升2倍。
AI.conclusion: EAST能够高效泛化于不同早期观测比例，提升准确率的同时优化资源利用，推动早期动作预测领域实现新进展。

title: DSA-CycleGAN: A Domain Shift Aware CycleGAN for Robust Multi-Stain Glomeruli Segmentation
summary: A key challenge in segmentation in digital histopathology is inter- and intra-stain variations as it reduces model performance. Labelling each stain is expensive and time-consuming so methods using stain transfer via CycleGAN, have been developed for training multi-stain segmentation models using labels from a single stain. Nevertheless, CycleGAN tends to introduce noise during translation because of the one-to-many nature of some stain pairs, which conflicts with its cycle consistency loss. To address this, we propose the Domain Shift Aware CycleGAN, which reduces the presence of such noise. Furthermore, we evaluate several advances from the field of machine learning aimed at resolving similar problems and compare their effectiveness against DSA-CycleGAN in the context of multi-stain glomeruli segmentation. Experiments demonstrate that DSA-CycleGAN not only improves segmentation performance in glomeruli segmentation but also outperforms other methods in reducing noise. This is particularly evident when translating between biologically distinct stains. The code is publicly available at https://github.com/zeeshannisar/DSA-CycleGAN.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种能有效减少染色之间翻译噪声的新方法DSA-CycleGAN，提升了数字病理图像分割的准确性。
AI.motivation: 数字病理学的分割任务面临染色间和染色内变异带来的挑战，导致模型性能下降。而标注每种染色的数据成本高昂。现有通过CycleGAN实现染色转移的方法虽然缓解了标注需求，但在部分染色对间因一对多映射易产生噪声，影响分割效果。
AI.method: 本文提出Domain Shift Aware CycleGAN（DSA-CycleGAN），针对不同染色对间一对多映射导致的噪声问题进行改进。在多染色肾小球分割任务中，将DSA-CycleGAN与其他机器学习最新方法进行了系统比较，评价其降噪与分割性能。
AI.result: 实验显示，DSA-CycleGAN在降低染色转换噪声及提升多染色分割精度方面优于其他方法，尤其是在生物学上差异明显的染色间表现突出。
AI.conclusion: DSA-CycleGAN能有效提升多染色数字病理图像分割效果，降低噪声，具有良好的实际应用前景。

title: Towards Robust Text-to-Image Person Retrieval: Multi-View Reformulation for Semantic Compensation
summary: In text-to-image person retrieval tasks, the diversity of natural language expressions and the implicitness of visual semantics often lead to the problem of Expression Drift, where semantically equivalent texts exhibit significant feature discrepancies in the embedding space due to phrasing variations, thereby degrading the robustness of image-text alignment. This paper proposes a semantic compensation framework (MVR) driven by Large Language Models (LLMs), which enhances cross-modal representation consistency through multi-view semantic reformulation and feature compensation. The core methodology comprises three components: Multi-View Reformulation (MVR): A dual-branch prompting strategy combines key feature guidance (extracting visually critical components via feature similarity) and diversity-aware rewriting to generate semantically equivalent yet distributionally diverse textual variants; Textual Feature Robustness Enhancement: A training-free latent space compensation mechanism suppresses noise interference through multi-view feature mean-pooling and residual connections, effectively capturing "Semantic Echoes"; Visual Semantic Compensation: VLM generates multi-perspective image descriptions, which are further enhanced through shared text reformulation to address visual semantic gaps. Experiments demonstrate that our method can improve the accuracy of the original model well without training and performs SOTA on three text-to-image person retrieval datasets.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在文本到图像人物检索任务中，通过大语言模型驱动的多视角语义补偿框架（MVR），有效提升了跨模态表示的一致性和鲁棒性，尤其在不依赖额外训练的情况下使原有模型精度大幅提升，达到SOTA表现。
AI.motivation: 现有文本-图像检索面临“表达漂移”难题：尽管语义等价，不同表达方式的文本经常在嵌入空间表现出较大特征差异，降低了模型的匹配鲁棒性。
AI.method: 提出了三大核心模块：1）多视角重构（MVR）：通过双分支提示策略，结合关键特征引导和多样性重写，生成分布更丰富、语义等价的文本表达；2）文本特征鲁棒性增强：基于无训练的特征均值池化与残差机制，补偿并滤除嵌入空间噪声；3）视觉语义补偿：多视角生成图片描述，并基于文本重构进一步缩小跨模态语义鸿沟。
AI.result: 在无需额外训练的前提下，方法显著提升了原有文本-图像检索模型在三个人物检索数据集上的准确率，并达到最新水平（SOTA）。
AI.conclusion: 基于大模型实现的多视角语义补偿机制，能有效减缓表达漂移问题，从而提升跨模态（文本-图片）对齐精度且具备良好泛化性，具备实用价值。

title: One-Step Diffusion with Inverse Residual Fields for Unsupervised Industrial Anomaly Detection
summary: Diffusion models have achieved outstanding performance in unsupervised industrial anomaly detection (uIAD) by learning a manifold of normal data under the common assumption that off-manifold anomalies are harder to generate, resulting in larger reconstruction errors in data space or lower probability densities in the tractable latent space. However, their iterative denoising and noising nature leads to slow inference. In this paper, we propose OSD-IRF, a novel one-step diffusion with inverse residual fields, to address this limitation for uIAD task. We first train a deep diffusion probabilistic model (DDPM) on normal data without any conditioning. Then, for a test sample, we predict its inverse residual fields (IRF) based on the noise estimated by the well-trained parametric noise function of the DDPM. Finally, uIAD is performed by evaluating the probability density of the IRF under a Gaussian distribution and comparing it with a threshold. Our key observation is that anomalies become distinguishable in this IRF space, a finding that has seldom been reported in prior works. Moreover, OSD-IRF requires only single step diffusion for uIAD, thanks to the property that IRF holds for any neighboring time step in the denoising process. Extensive experiments on three widely used uIAD benchmarks show that our model achieves SOTA or competitive performance across six metrics, along with roughly a 2X inference speedup without distillation.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了OSD-IRF，一种用于无监督工业异常检测（uIAD）的单步扩散方法，在保持高准确率的同时，提高了推理速度。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散模型用于uIAD时推理慢，因为需要多步去噪与加噪，限制了实际应用。作者希望在不用蒸馏的情况下，实现高效且高性能的异常检测。
AI.method: 先用无条件的深度扩散概率模型（DDPM）在正常数据上训练。测试时通过DDPM学得的参数噪声函数，预测样本的逆残差场（IRF）。以IRF在高斯分布下的概率密度作为评价指标，并与阈值比较进行异常检测。OSD-IRF只需单步扩散推理。
AI.result: 在三个主流uIAD数据集上，OSD-IRF在六项指标中取得了SOTA或有竞争力的性能，推理速度约提升2倍，无需蒸馏操作。
AI.conclusion: OSD-IRF显著提升了无监督工业异常检测的效率，在单步扩散基础上保证了准确率，展示了逆残差场空间在异常区分上的独特优势。

title: MedProbeBench: Systematic Benchmarking at Deep Evidence Integration for Expert-level Medical Guideline
summary: Recent advances in deep research systems enable large language models to retrieve, synthesize, and reason over large-scale external knowledge. In medicine, developing clinical guidelines critically depends on such deep evidence integration. However, existing benchmarks fail to evaluate this capability in realistic workflows requiring multi-step evidence integration and expert-level judgment. To address this gap, we introduce MedProbeBench, the first benchmark leveraging high-quality clinical guidelines as expert-level references. Medical guidelines, with their rigorous standards in neutrality and verifiability, represent the pinnacle of medical expertise and pose substantial challenges for deep research agents. For evaluation, we propose MedProbe-Eval, a comprehensive evaluation framework featuring: (1) Holistic Rubrics with 1,200+ task-adaptive rubric criteria for comprehensive quality assessment, and (2) Fine-grained Evidence Verification for rigorous validation of evidence precision, grounded in 5,130+ atomic claims. Evaluation of 17 LLMs and deep research agents reveals critical gaps in evidence integration and guideline generation, underscoring the substantial distance between current capabilities and expert-level clinical guideline development. Project: https://github.com/uni-medical/MedProbeBench

AI.tldr: 本文提出了MedProbeBench，这是首个以高质量临床指南为标准、用于评估大语言模型在医学领域深度证据整合与推理能力的基准。
AI.motivation: 临床指南的开发依赖于对大规模外部医学证据的整合。目前缺乏评估大型语言模型在现实工作流程中多步骤、专家级证据整合能力的基准，阻碍了其在医学专业中的有效应用。
AI.method: 作者提出了MedProbeBench基准，以临床指南为专家级参考，并设计了MedProbe-Eval评估框架，包含1200+任务自适应评分标准及5100+原子级证据核查点，对LLM与研究代理人进行多维评估。
AI.result: 对17种LLM和深度研究系统的评测表明，它们在证据整合和指南生成方面与专家级标准仍有显著差距。
AI.conclusion: 当前的AI系统距离临床指南专家级开发尚有较大距离，MedProbeBench为未来AI医学能力的提升和评估提供了重要基准和工具。

title: Revisiting Change VQA in Remote Sensing with Structured and Native Multimodal Qwen Models
summary: Change visual question answering (Change VQA) addresses the problem of answering natural-language questions about semantic changes between bi-temporal remote sensing (RS) images. Although vision-language models (VLMs) have recently been studied for temporal RS image understanding, Change VQA remains underexplored in the context of modern multimodal models. In this letter, we revisit the CDVQA benchmark using recent Qwen models under a unified low-rank adaptation (LoRA) setting. We compare Qwen3-VL, which follows a structured vision-language pipeline with multi-depth visual conditioning and a full-attention decoder, with Qwen3.5, a native multimodal model that combines a single-stage alignment with a hybrid decoder backbone. Experimental results on the official CDVQA test splits show that recent VLMs improve over earlier specialized baselines. They further show that performance does not scale monotonically with model size, and that native multimodal models are more effective than structured vision-language pipelines for this task. These findings indicate that tightly integrated multimodal backbones contribute more to performance than scale or explicit multi-depth visual conditioning for language-driven semantic change reasoning in RS imagery.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了遥感图像语义变化问答（Change VQA）任务，采用了近期Qwen系列多模态模型，并对其性能进行了分析对比，发现原生多模态模型对该任务更有效。
AI.motivation: 尽管多模态视觉-语言模型在时序遥感图像理解方面有进展，但Change VQA在现代多模态模型领域仍缺乏深入探索，因此有必要用最新模型重新检验该任务。
AI.method: 文章在统一的低秩适配（LoRA）设定下，采用Qwen3-VL（结构化视觉-语言流程及多层次视觉条件）和Qwen3.5（单阶段原生多模态模型），并在CDVQA基准测试集上进行了实验和对比。
AI.result: 实验结果显示，近期的视觉-语言模型在Change VQA上优于旧有专用基线；另一方面，模型规模增大不一定带来性能提升，原生多模态模型优于分阶段的视觉-语言流程。
AI.conclusion: 多模态主干的紧密集成对提升遥感图像语义变化推理的性能作用更大，优于模型规模或显式多层次视觉条件。

title: Progressive Online Video Understanding with Evidence-Aligned Timing and Transparent Decisions
summary: Visual agents operating in the wild must respond to queries precisely when sufficient evidence first appears in a video stream, a critical capability that is overlooked by conventional video LLMs evaluated in offline settings. The shift to an online, streaming paradigm introduces significant challenges: a lack of decision transparency, the difficulty of aligning response timing with visual evidence, and the need to maintain a global, causally consistent understanding under tight computational budgets. To address these issues, we propose a novel framework that decouples reasoning control from memory integration. We introduce \textbf{\model{}}, an instantiation of this framework with two core components. First, the \emph{Active Thinking Decision Maker (ATDM)} is a transparent reasoning controller that externalizes its decision process using observable progress ($\boldsymbolρ$) and confidence ($\boldsymbol{c}$) metrics. This allows it to precisely time its response $t_r$ to match the first-sufficient-evidence timestamp $t^\star$ while streaming its reasoning to the user. Second, the \emph{Hierarchical Progressive Semantic Integration (HPSI)} module acts as an efficient memory system. It employs a set of learnable, multi-level aggregation tokens that are propagated across clips to build a rich, global cognitive state without exceeding token budgets. %Our approach sets a new standard on key online video understanding benchmarks, achieving strong performance of \textbf{71.6\%} on StreamingBench and \textbf{46.9\%} on OVOBench, demonstrating a robust solution for evidence-aligned and transparent online video analysis. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of ATDM and HPSI, e.g., Thinking-QwenVL improves the accuracy of the previous state-of-the-art from 67.63\% to 71.60\% on the StreamingBench benchmark.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的在线视频理解框架，通过解耦推理控制与记忆集成，实现了及时、透明、和高效的视频问答响应。
AI.motivation: 现有的视频大模型多在离线环境评估，缺乏对证据首次出现时精确做出响应的能力。在实际应用如在线视频流需要模型能及时对首要证据作出决策。
AI.method: 提出了包含两个核心组件的新框架：(1) 活跃思考决策器（ATDM）——通过进展和置信度外显地控制和解释推理过程，精确控制回应时机；(2) 分层渐进语义集成（HPSI）模块——利用多层次的聚合token跨片段构建丰富的全局记忆状态，兼顾效率与能力。
AI.result: 在主流在线视频理解基准(StreamingBench、OVOBench)上，提出方法取得71.6%和46.9%的优异成绩，且Thinking-QwenVL模型将前最佳准确率从67.63%提升到71.60%。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架在提升证据对齐、响应透明度及计算效率方面具有显著优势，为在线视频分析树立了新标杆。

title: Asset Harvester: Extracting 3D Assets from Autonomous Driving Logs for Simulation
comment: NVIDIA white paper. The project page: https://research.nvidia.com/labs/sil/projects/asset-harvester/
summary: Closed-loop simulation is a core component of autonomous vehicle (AV) development, enabling scalable testing, training, and safety validation before real-world deployment. Neural scene reconstruction converts driving logs into interactive 3D environments for simulation, but it does not produce complete 3D object assets required for agent manipulation and large-viewpoint novel-view synthesis. To address this challenge, we present Asset Harvester, an image-to-3D model and end-to-end pipeline that converts sparse, in-the-wild object observations from real driving logs into complete, simulation-ready assets. Rather than relying on a single model component, we developed a system-level design for real-world AV data that combines large-scale curation of object-centric training tuples, geometry-aware preprocessing across heterogeneous sensors, and a robust training recipe that couples sparse-view-conditioned multiview generation with 3D Gaussian lifting. Within this system, SparseViewDiT is explicitly designed to address limited-angle views and other real-world data challenges. Together with hybrid data curation, augmentation, and self-distillation, this system enables scalable conversion of sparse AV object observations into reusable 3D assets.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了Asset Harvester系统，实现自动驾驶日志中的稀疏对象观测到完整可用3D资产的自动化转换，提升仿真场景的真实与可扩展性。
AI.motivation: 现有神经场景重建方法不能产出完整可操控的3D对象，限制了闭环仿真系统中虚拟车辆与环境的交互能力和大视角新视图合成能力。为提升仿真测试的真实性和覆盖面，亟需一种能将真实驾驶日志中稀疏对象观测转化为完整3D仿真资产的解决方案。
AI.method: 作者提出了Asset Harvester，这是一个端到端的图像到3D模型管线，结合大规模对象训练样本采集、异构传感器几何预处理、稀疏多视图生成与3D高斯提升方法。其中SparseViewDiT专门针对视角受限等现实数据挑战进行设计，并辅以混合数据拉取、增广与自蒸馏技术，显著提升了从稀疏观测重建3D模型的能力。
AI.result: 系统能够高效地把真实自动驾驶日志中的稀疏对象观测转化为完整、可重用的3D资产。SparseViewDiT在有限视角和数据稀疏条件下表现优异，整体流程适用于大规模自动化资产生成。
AI.conclusion: Asset Harvester极大提升了自动驾驶仿真中三维资产的自动化获取与重建水平，为虚拟测试、训练和安全验证提供了可扩展的3D环境构建能力，加速了自动驾驶技术的实际部署。

title: SemLT3D: Semantic-Guided Expert Distillation for Camera-only Long-Tailed 3D Object Detection
summary: Camera-only 3D object detection has emerged as a cost-effective and scalable alternative to LiDAR for autonomous driving, yet existing methods primarily prioritize overall performance while overlooking the severe long-tail imbalance inherent in real-world datasets. In practice, many rare but safety-critical categories such as children, strollers, or emergency vehicles are heavily underrepresented, leading to biased learning and degraded performance. This challenge is further exacerbated by pronounced inter-class ambiguity (e.g., visually similar subclasses) and substantial intra-class diversity (e.g., objects varying widely in appearance, scale, pose, or context), which together hinder reliable long-tail recognition. In this work, we introduce SemLT3D, a Semantic-Guided Expert Distillation framework designed to enrich the representation space for underrepresented classes through semantic priors. SemLT3D consists of: (1) a language-guided mixture-of-experts module that routes 3D queries to specialized experts according to their semantic affinity, enabling the model to better disentangle confusing classes and specialize on tail distributions; and (2) a semantic projection distillation pipeline that aligns 3D queries with CLIP-informed 2D semantics, producing more coherent and discriminative features across diverse visual manifestations. Although motivated by long-tail imbalance, the semantically structured learning in SemLT3D also improves robustness under broader appearance variations and challenging corner cases, offering a principled step toward more reliable camera-only 3D perception.

AI.tldr: 该论文针对当前主流的纯视觉3D目标检测方法在实际数据集中存在的长尾类别不平衡问题，提出了一种基于语义引导专家蒸馏的SemLT3D框架，大幅提升了稀有但关键类别的识别性能。
AI.motivation: 现实交通场景中，许多稀有但安全关键的类别（如孩童、婴儿车、急救车辆）数量极少，现有视觉3D检测方法对这些类别识别表现不佳，且类别间相似与类别内多样性进一步加剧了难度，因此亟需提升长尾类别识别能力。
AI.method: 提出SemLT3D框架，包括两个关键模块：（1）语言引导的专家混合模块，根据3D目标与语义亲和度将其分派给不同的专家网络，增强难区分类别和长尾类别的建模能力；（2）语义投影蒸馏模块，将3D特征与基于CLIP获取的2D语义特征对齐，使视觉表现多样的目标具有更统一且具区分力的特征表示。
AI.result: SemLT3D对长尾类别显著提升检测性能，同时在外观变化大和极端复杂场景下表现更为鲁棒。
AI.conclusion: SemLT3D通过语义结构化学习，有效缓解了纯视觉3D感知中的长尾不平衡和样本多样性问题，为提升自动驾驶场景下摄像头感知可靠性迈出了坚实一步。

title: S2H-DPO: Hardness-Aware Preference Optimization for Vision-Language Models
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have demonstrated remarkable progress in single-image understanding, yet effective reasoning across multiple images remains challenging. We identify a critical capability gap in existing multi-image alignment approaches: current methods focus primarily on localized reasoning with pre-specified image indices (``Look at Image 3 and...''), bypassing the essential skills of global visual search and autonomous cross-image comparison. To address this limitation, we introduce a Simple-to-Hard (S2H) learning framework that systematically constructs multi-image preference data across three hierarchical reasoning levels requiring an increasing level of capabilities: (1) single-image localized reasoning, (2) multi-image localized comparison, and (3) global visual search. Unlike prior work that relies on model-specific attributes, such as hallucinations or attention heuristics, to generate preference pairs, our approach leverages prompt-driven complexity to create chosen/rejected pairs that are applicable across different models. Through extensive evaluations on LLaVA and Qwen-VL models, we show that our diverse multi-image reasoning data significantly enhances multi-image reasoning performance, yielding significant improvements over baseline methods across benchmarks. Importantly, our approach maintains strong single-image reasoning performance while simultaneously strengthening multi-image understanding capabilities, thus advancing the state of the art for holistic visual preference alignment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种提升视觉-语言模型（VLMs）多图像推理能力的新方法，通过分层构建“简单到复杂”（S2H）多图像偏好数据，有效增强模型的全局视觉搜索和多图像比较能力。
AI.motivation: 尽管VLMs在单图像理解上进步显著，但多图像间的全局推理与自主比较依然不足，目前方法局限于局部、指定图片索引的推理，无法实现自主的综合性视觉搜索和对比。
AI.method: 作者设计了S2H学习框架，构建涵盖三层次推理难度的数据：（1）单图像局部推理，（2）多图像定向对比，（3）全局视觉搜索。与以往依赖模型内部机制（如幻觉检测、注意力启发式）的数据生成方式不同，本方法通过提示（prompt）驱动的数据复杂性，构建适用于不同模型的偏好对选择/拒绝对。
AI.result: 在LLaVA和Qwen-VL等主流模型上大量实验证明，该数据集显著提升了多图像推理能力，并优于现有多图像对齐方法。同时，单图像推理性能保持强劲。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效弥补了现有模型在多图像理解上的短板，实现了单图像与多图像推理能力的双重提升，为更全面的视觉偏好对齐设定新标准。

title: UDM-GRPO: Stable and Efficient Group Relative Policy Optimization for Uniform Discrete Diffusion Models
summary: Uniform Discrete Diffusion Model (UDM) has recently emerged as a promising paradigm for discrete generative modeling; however, its integration with reinforcement learning remains largely unexplored. We observe that naively applying GRPO to UDM leads to training instability and marginal performance gains. To address this, we propose \Ours, the first framework to integrate UDM with RL. Our method is guided by two key insights: (i) treating the final clean sample as the action provides more accurate and stable optimization signals; and (ii) reconstructing trajectories via the diffusion forward process better aligns probability paths with the pretraining distribution. Additionally, we introduce two strategies, Reduced-Step and CFG-Free, to further improve training efficiency. \Ours significantly improves base model performance across multiple T2I tasks. Notably, GenEval accuracy improves from $69\%$ to $96\%$ and PickScore increases from $20.46$ to $23.81$, achieving state-of-the-art performance in both continuous and discrete settings. On the OCR benchmark, accuracy rises from $8\%$ to $57\%$, further validating the generalization ability of our method. Code is available at \href{https://github.com/Yovecent/UDM-GRPO}{https://github.com/Yovecent/UDM-GRPO}.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了首个将Uniform Discrete Diffusion Model（UDM）与强化学习（RL）结合的框架，显著提升了多项任务中的模型表现。
AI.motivation: 当前UDM在离散生成建模方面表现突出，但与强化学习结合还缺乏探索，直接将GRPO应用于UDM无法获得理想效果。为解决训练不稳定和性能提升有限的问题，提出新方法。
AI.method: 方法核心在于：1）将最终clean样本作为action，带来更准确稳定的优化信号；2）通过扩散前向过程重建轨迹，使概率路径与预训练分布更对齐。同时提出Reduced-Step和CFG-Free策略来提升训练效率。
AI.result: 在多个文本到图像生成（T2I）任务中，提出的方法显著提升了基线模型的表现，GenEval准确率由69%提升至96%，PickScore从20.46提升到23.81。在OCR基准上的准确率从8%提升到57%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法不仅在连续和离散任务上实现了最优性能，也通过大量实验验证了其优秀的泛化能力。

title: MetaCloak-JPEG: JPEG-Robust Adversarial Perturbation for Preventing Unauthorized DreamBooth-Based Deepfake Generation
summary: The rapid progress of subject-driven text-to-image synthesis, and in particular DreamBooth, has enabled a consent-free deepfake pipeline: an adversary needs only 4-8 publicly available face images to fine-tune a personalized diffusion model and produce photorealistic harmful content. Current adversarial face-protection systems -- PhotoGuard, Anti-DreamBooth, and MetaCloak -- perturb user images to disrupt surrogate fine-tuning, but all share a structural blindness: none backpropagates gradients through the JPEG compression pipeline that every major social-media platform applies before adversary access. Because JPEG quantization relies on round(), whose derivative is zero almost everywhere, adversarial energy concentrates in high-frequency DCT bands that JPEG discards, eliminating 60-80% of the protective signal. We introduce MetaCloak-JPEG, which closes this gap by inserting a Differentiable JPEG (DiffJPEG) layer built on the Straight-Through Estimator (STE): the forward pass applies standard JPEG compression, while the backward pass replaces round() with the identity. DiffJPEG is embedded in a JPEG-aware EOT distribution (~70% of augmentations include DiffJPEG) and a curriculum quality-factor schedule (QF: 95 to 50) inside a bilevel meta-learning loop. Under an l-inf perturbation budget of eps=8/255, MetaCloak-JPEG attains 32.7 dB PSNR, a 91.3% JPEG survival rate, and outperforms PhotoGuard on all 9 evaluated JPEG quality factors (9/9 wins, mean denoising-loss gain +0.125) within a 4.1 GB training-memory budget.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的人脸保护方法MetaCloak-JPEG，通过引入可微JPEG层，有效提升了对抗性防护图片在社交平台JPEG压缩下的生存率和防护效果，显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 目前，主流的人脸图片对抗防护系统都忽视了JPEG压缩（社交平台广泛采用）的影响，导致绝大部分防护信号在压缩时丢失，难以抵御通过少量用户照片进行个性化扩散模型精调（如DreamBooth）的深度伪造攻击。
AI.method: 作者提出MetaCloak-JPEG，构建了一个基于STE可微JPEG层的JPEG感知防护系统。该方法在前向传播时进行标准JPEG压缩，反向传播时用身份映射替代不可导的round操作，并集成到多样性的EOT增强分布与高QF到低QF的课程学习调度中，通过双层元学习优化人脸图片扰动。
AI.result: 在l_inf=8/255限制下，MetaCloak-JPEG达到32.7dB的PSNR、91.3%的JPEG生存率，并在9个压缩质量因子上全面优于PhotoGuard（9/9胜利，平均去噪损失提升0.125），训练内存仅4.1GB。
AI.conclusion: MetaCloak-JPEG显著提升了在真实社交平台JPEG压缩环境下的人脸对抗防护效果，为用户阻断伪造模型的个性化训练提供了更实用有效的防线。

title: Advancing Vision Transformer with Enhanced Spatial Priors
summary: In recent years, the Vision Transformer (ViT) has garnered significant attention within the computer vision community. However, the core component of ViT, Self-Attention, lacks explicit spatial priors and suffers from quadratic computational complexity, limiting its applicability. To address these issues, we have proposed RMT, a robust vision backbone with explicit spatial priors for general purposes. RMT utilizes Manhattan distance decay to introduce spatial information and employs a horizontal and vertical decomposition attention method to model global information. Building on the strengths of RMT, Euclidean enhanced Vision Transformer (EVT) is an expanded version that incorporates several key improvements. Firstly, EVT uses a more reasonable Euclidean distance decay to enhance the modeling of spatial information, allowing for a more accurate representation of spatial relationships compared to the Manhattan distance used in RMT. Secondly, EVT abandons the decomposed attention mechanism featured in RMT and instead adopts a simpler spatially-independent grouping approach, providing the model with greater flexibility in controlling the number of tokens within each group. By addressing these modifications, EVT offers a more sophisticated and adaptable approach to incorporating spatial priors into the Self-Attention mechanism, thus overcoming some of the limitations associated with RMT and further enhancing its applicability in various computer vision tasks. Extensive experiments on Image Classification, Object Detection, Instance Segmentation, and Semantic Segmentation demonstrate that EVT exhibits exceptional performance. Without additional training data, EVT achieves 86.6% top1-acc on ImageNet-1k.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进的视觉Transformer——EVT，通过引入欧氏距离衰减和分组机制，有效增强了模型对空间先验的建模能力。实验结果显示，EVT在各类计算机视觉任务中表现优越。
AI.motivation: 传统ViT中的自注意力机制缺乏显式的空间先验，且计算复杂度高，限制了其应用范围。先前提出的RMT虽有改进，但依赖曼哈顿距离且机制有限，仍存在不足。
AI.method: RMT通过引入曼哈顿距离衰减和横纵分解注意力机制增强空间信息建模。EVT进一步提升：一是用欧氏距离替代曼哈顿距离，使空间关系建模更准确；二是用分组机制代替分解注意力，提高灵活性和适用性。
AI.result: EVT在图像分类（ImageNet-1k top1-acc达86.6%）、目标检测、实例分割、语义分割等多个任务上均取得了优异的实验结果。
AI.conclusion: EVT通过更合理的空间建模和灵活的注意力机制，有效克服了RMT的部分局限性，成为更适用的通用视觉主干网络。

title: SynAgent: Generalizable Cooperative Humanoid Manipulation via Solo-to-Cooperative Agent Synergy
summary: Controllable cooperative humanoid manipulation is a fundamental yet challenging problem for embodied intelligence, due to severe data scarcity, complexities in multi-agent coordination, and limited generalization across objects. In this paper, we present SynAgent, a unified framework that enables scalable and physically plausible cooperative manipulation by leveraging Solo-to-Cooperative Agent Synergy to transfer skills from single-agent human-object interaction to multi-agent human-object-human scenarios. To maintain semantic integrity during motion transfer, we introduce an interaction-preserving retargeting method based on an Interact Mesh constructed via Delaunay tetrahedralization, which faithfully maintains spatial relationships among humans and objects. Building upon this refined data, we propose a single-agent pretraining and adaptation paradigm that bootstraps synergistic collaborative behaviors from abundant single-human data through decentralized training and multi-agent PPO. Finally, we develop a trajectory-conditioned generative policy using a conditional VAE, trained via multi-teacher distillation from motion imitation priors to achieve stable and controllable object-level trajectory execution. Extensive experiments demonstrate that SynAgent significantly outperforms existing baselines in both cooperative imitation and trajectory-conditioned control, while generalizing across diverse object geometries. Codes and data will be available after publication. Project Page: http://yw0208.github.io/synagent

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种名为SynAgent的统一框架，通过单人到多人的技能转移，实现多智能体的人形体协作操控，解决了数据稀缺和泛化能力不足等难题，并在实验中取得了优异的效果。
AI.motivation: 多智能体合作操作因数据稀缺、多智能体协同复杂和泛化能力有限，是具身智能领域的基础且具挑战性的问题。如何从丰富的单人操作数据实现高效的多智能体协作，是提升协作体操控能力的核心动因。
AI.method: 1. 提出Solo-to-Cooperative Agent Synergy方法，将单人-物交互技能迁移到多人-物协作；2. 引入基于Delaunay四面体网格的Interact Mesh实现交互保持的动作转移；3. 采用单智能体预训练与协作适应范式，通过去中心化训练和多智能体PPO促进合作行为的涌现；4. 基于条件VAE和多教师知识蒸馏训练，实现轨迹条件的生成策略，实现稳定、可控的目标物体操控。
AI.result: SynAgent在协作模仿与轨迹条件控制任务上明显优于现有主流方法，并在多种异构物体泛化任务中展现强鲁棒性和优越表现。
AI.conclusion: 通过技能转移、交互保持、生成策略及多智能体强化学习等方法，SynAgent有效提升了多智能体人形体协作操控的表现和泛化能力，为具身智能领域提供了新的解决方案。

title: AnchorSeg: Language Grounded Query Banks for Reasoning Segmentation
comment: This work has been accepted to ACL 2026, please refer to https://github.com/rui-qian/AnchorSeg
summary: Reasoning segmentation requires models to ground complex, implicit textual queries into precise pixel-level masks. Existing approaches rely on a single segmentation token $\texttt{<SEG>}$, whose hidden state implicitly encodes both semantic reasoning and spatial localization, limiting the model's ability to explicitly disentangle what to segment from where to segment. We introduce AnchorSeg, which reformulates reasoning segmentation as a structured conditional generation process over image tokens, conditioned on language grounded query banks. Instead of compressing all semantic reasoning and spatial localization into a single embedding, AnchorSeg constructs an ordered sequence of query banks: latent reasoning tokens that capture intermediate semantic states, and a segmentation anchor token that provides explicit spatial grounding. We model spatial conditioning as a factorized distribution over image tokens, where the anchor query determines localization signals while contextual queries provide semantic modulation. To bridge token-level predictions and pixel-level supervision, we propose Token--Mask Cycle Consistency (TMCC), a bidirectional training objective that enforces alignment across resolutions. By explicitly decoupling spatial grounding from semantic reasoning through structured language grounded query banks, AnchorSeg achieves state-of-the-art results on ReasonSeg test set (67.7\% gIoU and 68.1\% cIoU). All code and models are publicly available at https://github.com/rui-qian/AnchorSeg.

AI.tldr: 提出AnchorSeg方法，通过显式分离语义推理与空间定位，提升了复杂文本引导分割任务的性能，在ReasonSeg测试集上取得SOTA。
AI.motivation: 现有的推理分割方法仅使用一个分割token将语义推理和空间定位等信息混合编码，导致模型无法明确区分“分割什么”和“在哪里分割”，影响分割效果。
AI.method: AnchorSeg将推理分割任务重新表述为有结构的条件生成过程：引入序列化的查询库（query banks），包括用于捕获中间语义状态的推理token和用于空间定位的锚点token。空间条件建模为对图像token的分布，其中锚点token提供定位信号，语境token调节语义。提出Token-Mask Cycle Consistency（TMCC）训练目标，实现token和像素级之间的双向一致性监督。
AI.result: AnchorSeg在ReasonSeg测试集上取得67.7%的gIoU和68.1%的 cIoU，达到最新最优水平。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式地用结构化语言查询库分离空间定位与语义推理，AnchorSeg有效提升了基于文本的推理分割性能。

title: MultiWorld: Scalable Multi-Agent Multi-View Video World Models
summary: Video world models have achieved remarkable success in simulating environmental dynamics in response to actions by users or agents. They are modeled as action-conditioned video generation models that take historical frames and current actions as input to predict future frames. Yet, most existing approaches are limited to single-agent scenarios and fail to capture the complex interactions inherent in real-world multi-agent systems. We present \textbf{MultiWorld}, a unified framework for multi-agent multi-view world modeling that enables accurate control of multiple agents while maintaining multi-view consistency. We introduce the Multi-Agent Condition Module to achieve precise multi-agent controllability, and the Global State Encoder to ensure coherent observations across different views. MultiWorld supports flexible scaling of agent and view counts, and synthesizes different views in parallel for high efficiency. Experiments on multi-player game environments and multi-robot manipulation tasks demonstrate that MultiWorld outperforms baselines in video fidelity, action-following ability, and multi-view consistency. Project page: https://multi-world.github.io/

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了MultiWorld框架，实现了多智能体和多视角下的环境视频建模，支持高效、协调地控制多个智能体，并且保持不同视角间观测一致。
AI.motivation: 现有的视频世界模型主要针对单智能体，难以应用于需要多个智能体协同操作、多视角观测的复杂现实场景，因此亟需一种新的方法解决多智能体多视角建模与控制的问题。
AI.method: 提出了MultiWorld统一建模框架，引入了Multi-Agent Condition Module（多智能体条件模块）提升多智能体可控性，以及Global State Encoder（全局状态编码器）保障多视角一致性。框架支持灵活扩展智能体和视角数量，并能够并行合成多视角画面，实现高效推理。
AI.result: 在多玩家游戏和多机器人操作等任务中，MultiWorld在视频清晰度、动作跟随能力和多视角一致性方面均优于现有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: MultiWorld实现了高效的多智能体多视角环境视频生成，显著提升了仿真精度和一致性，可广泛应用于多智能体系统和复杂环境的建模与控制。

title: Back into Plato's Cave: Examining Cross-modal Representational Convergence at Scale
summary: The Platonic Representation Hypothesis suggests that neural networks trained on different modalities (e.g., text and images) align and eventually converge toward the same representation of reality. If true, this has significant implications for whether modality choice matters at all. We show that the experimental evidence for this hypothesis is fragile and depends critically on the evaluation regime. Alignment is measured using mutual nearest neighbors on small datasets ($\approx$1K samples) and degrades substantially as the dataset is scaled to millions of samples. The alignment that remains between model representations reflects coarse semantic overlap rather than consistent fine-grained structure. Moreover, the evaluations in Huh et al. are done in a one-to-one image-caption setting, a constraint that breaks down in realistic many-to-many settings and further reduces alignment. We also find that the reported trend of stronger language models increasingly aligning with vision does not appear to hold for newer models. Overall, our findings suggest that the current evidence for cross-modal representational convergence is considerably weaker than subsequent works have taken it to be. Models trained on different modalities may learn equally rich representations of the world, just not the same one.

AI.tldr: 本文质疑了“柏拉图式表征假说”（即不同模态神经网络最后会趋同于相同现实表征）的实验依据，发现其实质疑点很多。
AI.motivation: 如果不同模态（如文本和图像）的模型表现真的收敛到相同的现实表征，对多模态学习和模型选择有重大影响；但相关实验证据是否可靠，值得进一步检验。
AI.method: 分析和复现之前的表征对齐实验，使用大规模数据集（百万级样本）替换原有小数据集（约1K样本），研究模型表示对齐（如互为最近邻）在数据扩展和一对多场景（多图片、多文本）下的表现变化，并对新旧语言-视觉模型进行对比。
AI.result: 原本衡量的表示对齐（mutual nearest neighbors）随数据量增加显著下降，并注明这种对齐仅体现了粗粒度而非细粒度的语义相似。在更多现实场景下（例如多对多），对齐程度进一步下滑，新一代模型也未表现出对齐提升。
AI.conclusion: 不同模态模型学到的表示同样丰富，但未必是同一种——即表征收敛证据远比人们认为的要弱。多模态模型的“表征趋同”假说有待重新审视。

title: T-REN: Learning Text-Aligned Region Tokens Improves Dense Vision-Language Alignment and Scalability
summary: Despite recent progress, vision-language encoders struggle with two core limitations: (1) weak alignment between language and dense vision features, which hurts tasks like open-vocabulary semantic segmentation; and (2) high token counts for fine-grained visual representations, which limits scalability to long videos. This work addresses both limitations. We propose T-REN (Text-aligned Region Encoder Network), an efficient encoder that maps visual data to a compact set of text-aligned region-level representations (or region tokens). T-REN achieves this through a lightweight network added on top of a frozen vision backbone, trained to pool patch-level representations within each semantic region into region tokens and align them with region-level text annotations. With only 3.7% additional parameters compared to the vision-language backbone, this design yields substantially stronger dense cross-modal understanding while reducing the token count by orders of magnitude. Specifically, T-REN delivers +5.9 mIoU on ADE20K open-vocabulary segmentation, +18.4% recall on COCO object-level text-image retrieval, +15.6% recall on Ego4D video object localization, and +17.6% mIoU on VSPW video scene parsing, all while reducing token counts by more than 24x for images and 187x for videos compared to the patch-based vision-language backbone. The code and model are available at https://github.com/savya08/T-REN.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效的视觉-语言编码器T-REN，通过对视觉特征和文本标签的区域级对齐，显著提升了跨模态理解能力，并大幅减少了视觉token数量。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉-语言编码器存在两大问题：（1）语言与密集视觉特征对齐不佳，影响诸如开放词汇语义分割等任务性能；（2）细粒度视觉表示需要大量token，难以扩展到长视频。为解决这些瓶颈，作者寻求一种能够高效、紧凑对齐文本与视觉区域特征的方案。
AI.method: 作者提出了T-REN（Text-aligned Region Encoder Network）。该方法在冻结的视觉主干网络顶层添加了一个轻量的模块，将每个语义区域内的patch级特征池化为少量的区域token，并与区域级文本注解对齐，从而实现紧凑且文本相关的视觉特征表示。
AI.result: T-REN在仅增加3.7%参数的前提下，实现了更强的密集跨模态理解，同时将token数量大幅减少。具体地，在ADE20K开放词汇分割上提升5.9 mIoU，COCO目标级文本-图像检索提升18.4%召回，Ego4D视频目标定位提升15.6%召回，VSPW视频场景解析提升17.6% mIoU，对于图像和视频token数量降幅分别超过24倍和187倍。
AI.conclusion: T-REN在提升视觉-语言任务性能的同时，有效缓解了密集标记数量带来的计算压力，为大规模跨模态理解提供了可扩展的新架构。

title: ReCap: Lightweight Referential Grounding for Coherent Story Visualization
summary: Story Visualization aims to generate a sequence of images that faithfully depicts a textual narrative that preserve character identity, spatial configuration, and stylistic coherence as the narratives unfold.
